instrucoes: Deite-se on the chão and secure your pés. Your pernas should be bent at the joelhos.
Place your mãos behind or to the side of your head. You will begin with your costas on the ground. This will be your posição inicial.
Flex your quadris and spine to raise your tronco toward your joelhos.
At the top of the contraction your tronco should be perpendicular to the ground. Reverse the motion, going only ¾ of the way down.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on the floor and secure your feet. Your legs should be bent at the knees.
Place your hands behind or to the side of your head. You will begin with your back on the ground. This will be your starting position.
Flex your hips and spine to raise your torso toward your knees.
At the top of the contraction your torso should be perpendicular to the ground. Reverse the motion, going only ¾ of the way down.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas, with one perna extended straight out.
With the other perna, bend the hip and knee to 90 degrees. You may brace your perna with your mãos if necessary. This will be your posição inicial.
Extend your perna straight into the air, pausing briefly at the top. Retorne the perna to the posição inicial.
Repita for 10-20 repetitions, and then switch to the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back, with one leg extended straight out.
With the other leg, bend the hip and knee to 90 degrees. You may brace your leg with your hands if necessary. This will be your starting position.
Extend your leg straight into the air, pausing briefly at the top. Return the leg to the starting position.
Repeat for 10-20 repetitions, and then switch to the other leg.

instrucoes: Select a light resistance and sit down on the ab machine placing your pés under the pads provided and grabbing the top mãoles. Your braços should be bent at a 90 degree angle as you rest the triceps on the pads provided. This will be your posição inicial.

At the same time, begin to lift the pernas up as you crunch your upper tronco. Breathe out as you perform this movimento. Dica: Be sure to use a slow and controlled motion. Concentrate on using your abs to move the peso while relaxing your pernas and pés.
After a second pause, slowly return to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Select a light resistance and sit down on the ab machine placing your feet under the pads provided and grabbing the top handles. Your arms should be bent at a 90 degree angle as you rest the triceps on the pads provided. This will be your starting position.

At the same time, begin to lift the legs up as you crunch your upper torso. Breathe out as you perform this movement. Tip: Be sure to use a slow and controlled motion. Concentrate on using your abs to move the weight while relaxing your legs and feet.
After a second pause, slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Segure the Ab Roller with both mãos and kneel on the chão.
Now place the ab roller on the chão in front of you so that you are on all your mãos and joelhos (as in a kneeling push up posição). This will be your posição inicial.

Lentamente roll the ab roller straight forward, stretching your body into a straight posição. Dica: Go down as far as you can without touching the chão with your body. Breathe in during this portion of the movimento.
After a pause at the stretched posição, start pulling yourself costas to the posição inicial as you expire. Dica: Go slowly and keep your abs tight at all times.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold the Ab Roller with both hands and kneel on the floor.
Now place the ab roller on the floor in front of you so that you are on all your hands and knees (as in a kneeling push up position). This will be your starting position.

Slowly roll the ab roller straight forward, stretching your body into a straight position. Tip: Go down as far as you can without touching the floor with your body. Breathe in during this portion of the movement.
After a pause at the stretched position, start pulling yourself back to the starting position as you breathe out. Tip: Go slowly and keep your abs tight at all times.

instrucoes: Lie face down with one perna on a foam roll.
Rotate the perna so that the foam roll contacts against your inner thigh. Shift as much peso onto the foam roll as can be tolerated.
While trying to relax the muscles if the inner thigh, roll over the foam between your hip and knee, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repita with the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face down with one leg on a foam roll.
Rotate the leg so that the foam roll contacts against your inner thigh. Shift as much weight onto the foam roll as can be tolerated.
While trying to relax the muscles if the inner thigh, roll over the foam between your hip and knee, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat with the other leg.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your pés raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your pés or ankles. Abduct your pernas as far as you can. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to squeeze your pernas together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your pernas as your partner pushes your pés apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

instrucoes: Clean and press a kettlebell overhead with one braço.

Mantenhaing the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Mantenha the non-working braço behind your costas and turn your pés out at a forty-five degree angle from the braço with the kettlebell.
Abaixe yourself as far as possible.
Faça uma pausa for a second and reverse the motion costas to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean and press a kettlebell overhead with one arm.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Keep the non-working arm behind your back and turn your feet out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm with the kettlebell.
Lower yourself as far as possible.
Pause for a second and reverse the motion back to the starting position.

instrucoes: Lie flat on the chão with your lower costas pressed to the ground. For this exercise, you will need to put your mãos beside your head. Be careful however to not strain with the neck as you perform it. Now lift your ombros into the crunch posição.
Bring joelhos up to where they are perpendicular to the chão, with your lower pernas parallel to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

Now simultaneously, slowly go through a cycle pedal motion kicking forward with the right perna and bringing in the knee of the left perna. Bring your right elbow close to your left knee by crunching to the side, as you expire.
Go costas to the initial posição as you inspire.
Crunch to the opposite side as you cycle your pernas and bring closer your left elbow to your right knee and exhale.
Continue alternating in this manner until all of the recommended repetitions for each side have been completed.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on the floor with your lower back pressed to the ground. For this exercise, you will need to put your hands beside your head. Be careful however to not strain with the neck as you perform it. Now lift your shoulders into the crunch position.
Bring knees up to where they are perpendicular to the floor, with your lower legs parallel to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Now simultaneously, slowly go through a cycle pedal motion kicking forward with the right leg and bringing in the knee of the left leg. Bring your right elbow close to your left knee by crunching to the side, as you breathe out.
Go back to the initial position as you breathe in.
Crunch to the opposite side as you cycle your legs and bring closer your left elbow to your right knee and exhale.
Continue alternating in this manner until all of the recommended repetitions for each side have been completed.

instrucoes: Start off on your mãos and joelhos, then lift your perna off the chão and hold the foot with your mão.
Use your mão to hold the foot or ankle, keeping the knee fully flexed, stretching the quadriceps and hip flexors.
Focus on extending your quadris, thrusting them towards the chão. Segure for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Start off on your hands and knees, then lift your leg off the floor and hold the foot with your hand.
Use your hand to hold the foot or ankle, keeping the knee fully flexed, stretching the quadriceps and hip flexors.
Focus on extending your hips, thrusting them towards the floor. Hold for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright and a halter in each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco.
The palms of the mãos should be facing your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the right peso forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Continue the movimento until your biceps is fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps. Dica: Only the forebraços should move.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita the movimento with the left mão. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright and a dumbbell in each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
The palms of the hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right weight forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Continue the movement until your biceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat the movement with the left hand. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão with the joelhos bent and the pés on the chão around 18-24 inches apart. Your braços should be extended by your side. This will be your posição inicial.
Crunch over your tronco forward and up about 3-4 inches to the right side and touch your right heel as you hold the contraction for a second. Exhale while performing this movimento.
Now go costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inhale.

Now crunch over your tronco forward and up around 3-4 inches to the left side and touch your left heel as you hold the contraction for a second. Exhale while performing this movimento and then go costas to the posição inicial as you inhale. Now that both heels have been touched, that is considered 1 repetition.
Continue alternating sides in this manner until all prescribed repetitions are done.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor with the knees bent and the feet on the floor around 18-24 inches apart. Your arms should be extended by your side. This will be your starting position.
Crunch over your torso forward and up about 3-4 inches to the right side and touch your right heel as you hold the contraction for a second. Exhale while performing this movement.
Now go back slowly to the starting position as you inhale.

Now crunch over your torso forward and up around 3-4 inches to the left side and touch your left heel as you hold the contraction for a second. Exhale while performing this movement and then go back to the starting position as you inhale. Now that both heels have been touched, that is considered 1 repetition.
Continue alternating sides in this manner until all prescribed repetitions are done.

instrucoes: Sente-se on an incline bench with a halter in each mão being held at braços length. Dica: Mantenha the cotovelos close to the tronco.This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the right peso forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. As you do so, rotate the mão so that the palm is facing up. Continue the movimento until your biceps is fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps. Dica: Only the forebraços should move.
Lentamente begin to bring the halter costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita the movimento with the left mão. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand being held at arms length. Tip: Keep the elbows close to the torso.This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right weight forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. As you do so, rotate the hand so that the palm is facing up. Continue the movement until your biceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat the movement with the left hand. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Assume a comfortable stance with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Comece by pushing off with the front perna, driving the opposite knee forward and as high as possible before landing. Attempt to cover as much distance to each side with each bound.
It may help to use a line on the ground to guage distance from side to side.
Repita the sequence with the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a comfortable stance with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Begin by pushing off with the front leg, driving the opposite knee forward and as high as possible before landing. Attempt to cover as much distance to each side with each bound.
It may help to use a line on the ground to guage distance from side to side.
Repeat the sequence with the other leg.

nome: Alternating no cabo desenvolvimento de ombros
instrucoes: Move the cables to the bottom of the tower and select an appropriate peso.
Grasp the cables and hold them at shoulder height, palms facing forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your head and peito up, extend through the elbow to press one side directly over head.
After pausing at the top, return to the posição inicial and repeat on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Move the cables to the bottom of the tower and select an appropriate weight.
Grasp the cables and hold them at shoulder height, palms facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your head and chest up, extend through the elbow to press one side directly over head.
After pausing at the top, return to the starting position and repeat on the opposite side.

instrucoes: In a standing posição, hold a pair of halters at your side.
Mantenhaing your cotovelos slightly bent, raise the pesos directly in front of you to shoulder height, avoiding any swinging or cheating.
Retorne the pesos to your side.
On the next repetition, raise the pesos laterally, raising them out to your side to about shoulder height.
Retorne the pesos to the posição inicial and continue alternating to the front and side.
instrucoesOriginais: In a standing position, hold a pair of dumbbells at your side.
Keeping your elbows slightly bent, raise the weights directly in front of you to shoulder height, avoiding any swinging or cheating.
Return the weights to your side.
On the next repetition, raise the weights laterally, raising them out to your side to about shoulder height.
Return the weights to the starting position and continue alternating to the front and side.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão with two kettlebells next to your ombros.
Position one in place on your peito and then the other, gripping the kettlebells on the mãole with the palms facing forward.
Extend both braços, so that the kettlebells are being held above your peito. Abaixe one kettlebell, bringing it to your peito and turn the wrist in the direction of the locked out kettlebell.
Eleve the kettlebell and repeat on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor with two kettlebells next to your shoulders.
Position one in place on your chest and then the other, gripping the kettlebells on the handle with the palms facing forward.
Extend both arms, so that the kettlebells are being held above your chest. Lower one kettlebell, bringing it to your chest and turn the wrist in the direction of the locked out kettlebell.
Raise the kettlebell and repeat on the opposite side.

instrucoes: Place two kettlebells between your pés. To get in the posição inicial, push your butt costas and look straight ahead.

Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder and hold on to the other kettlebell in a hanging posição. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your ombros. Rotate your wrist as you do so.
Abaixe the cleaned kettlebell to a hanging posição and clean the alternate kettlebell. Repita.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells between your feet. To get in the starting position, push your butt back and look straight ahead.

Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder and hold on to the other kettlebell in a hanging position. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrist as you do so.
Lower the cleaned kettlebell to a hanging position and clean the alternate kettlebell. Repeat.

instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells to your ombros. Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so.
Press one directly overhead by extending through the elbow, turning it so the palm faces forward while holding the other kettlebell stationary .
Abaixe the pressed kettlebell to the posição inicial and immediately press with your other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so.
Press one directly overhead by extending through the elbow, turning it so the palm faces forward while holding the other kettlebell stationary .
Lower the pressed kettlebell to the starting position and immediately press with your other arm.

instrucoes: Place two kettlebells in front of your pés. Bend your joelhos slightly and push your butt out as much as possible. As you bend over to get into the posição inicial grab both kettlebells by the mãoles.

Pull one kettlebell off of the chão while holding on to the other kettlebell. Retract the shoulder blade of the working side, as you flex the elbow, drawing the kettlebell towards your stomach or rib cage.
Abaixe the kettlebell in the working braço and repeat with your other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells in front of your feet. Bend your knees slightly and push your butt out as much as possible. As you bend over to get into the starting position grab both kettlebells by the handles.

Pull one kettlebell off of the floor while holding on to the other kettlebell. Retract the shoulder blade of the working side, as you flex the elbow, drawing the kettlebell towards your stomach or rib cage.
Lower the kettlebell in the working arm and repeat with your other arm.

instrucoes: Place two kettlebells on the chão about shoulder width apart. Position yourself on your toes and your mãos as though you were doing a pushup, with the body straight and extended. Use the mãoles of the kettlebells to support your upper body. You may need to posição your pés wide for support.
Push one kettlebell into the chão and row the other kettlebell, retracting the shoulder blade of the working side as you flex the elbow, pulling it to your side.
Then lower the kettlebell to the chão and begin the kettlebell in the opposite mão. Repita for several reps.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells on the floor about shoulder width apart. Position yourself on your toes and your hands as though you were doing a pushup, with the body straight and extended. Use the handles of the kettlebells to support your upper body. You may need to position your feet wide for support.
Push one kettlebell into the floor and row the other kettlebell, retracting the shoulder blade of the working side as you flex the elbow, pulling it to your side.
Then lower the kettlebell to the floor and begin the kettlebell in the opposite hand. Repeat for several reps.

instrucoes: Use a sturdy object like a squat rack to hold yourself.

Levante the right perna in the air (just around 2 inches from the chão) and perform a circular motion with the big toe. Pretend that you are drawing a big circle with it. Dica: One circle equals 1 repetition. Breathe normally as you perform the movimento.
When you are done with the right foot, then repeat with the left perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Use a sturdy object like a squat rack to hold yourself.

Lift the right leg in the air (just around 2 inches from the floor) and perform a circular motion with the big toe. Pretend that you are drawing a big circle with it. Tip: One circle equals 1 repetition. Breathe normally as you perform the movement.
When you are done with the right foot, then repeat with the left leg.

instrucoes: From a lying posição, flexione os joelhos and keep your pés on the chão.
Place your ankle of one foot on your opposite knee.
Grasp the thigh or knee of the bottom perna and pull both of your pernas into the peito. Relax your neck and ombros. Segure for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: From a lying position, bend your knees and keep your feet on the floor.
Place your ankle of one foot on your opposite knee.
Grasp the thigh or knee of the bottom leg and pull both of your legs into the chest. Relax your neck and shoulders. Hold for 10-20 seconds and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Comece seated on the ground with your pernas bent and your pés on the chão.

Using a Muscle Roller or a rolling pin, apply pressure to the muscles on the outside of your shins. Work from just below the knee to above the ankle, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repita on the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin seated on the ground with your legs bent and your feet on the floor.

Using a Muscle Roller or a rolling pin, apply pressure to the muscles on the outside of your shins. Work from just below the knee to above the ankle, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat on the other leg.

instrucoes: Place a bar on the ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay on the bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barra up from the chão. Flex the cotovelos, performing a reverse curl to bring the bar near your peito. This will be your posição inicial.
To begin, press the barra out in front of your head by extending your cotovelos. Mantenha your braços parallel to the ground throughout the movimento.
Retorne to the posição inicial and repeat to complete the set.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a bar on the ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay on the bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barbell up from the floor. Flex the elbows, performing a reverse curl to bring the bar near your chest. This will be your starting position.
To begin, press the barbell out in front of your head by extending your elbows. Keep your arms parallel to the ground throughout the movement.
Return to the starting position and repeat to complete the set.

instrucoes: Fique em pé and extend your braços straight out by the sides. The braços should be parallel to the chão and perpendicular (90-degree angle) to your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Lentamente start to make circles of about 1 foot in diameter with each outstretched braço. Breathe normally as you perform the movimento.
Continue the circular motion of the outstretched braços for about ten seconds. Then reverse the movimento, going the opposite direction.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up and extend your arms straight out by the sides. The arms should be parallel to the floor and perpendicular (90-degree angle) to your torso. This will be your starting position.
Slowly start to make circles of about 1 foot in diameter with each outstretched arm. Breathe normally as you perform the movement.
Continue the circular motion of the outstretched arms for about ten seconds. Then reverse the movement, going the opposite direction.

instrucoes: Sit on an exercise bench with costas support and hold two halters in front of you at about upper peito level with your palms facing your body and your cotovelos bent. Dica: Your braços should be next to your tronco. The posição inicial should look like the contracted portion of a halter curl.
Now to perform the movimento, raise the halters as you rotate the palms of your mãos until they are facing forward.
Continue lifting the halters until your braços are extended above you in straight braço posição. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movimento.

After a second pause at the top, begin to lower the halters to the original posição by rotating the palms of your mãos towards you. Dica: The left braço will be rotated in a counter clockwise manner while the right one will be rotated clockwise. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on an exercise bench with back support and hold two dumbbells in front of you at about upper chest level with your palms facing your body and your elbows bent. Tip: Your arms should be next to your torso. The starting position should look like the contracted portion of a dumbbell curl.
Now to perform the movement, raise the dumbbells as you rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Continue lifting the dumbbells until your arms are extended above you in straight arm position. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movement.

After a second pause at the top, begin to lower the dumbbells to the original position by rotating the palms of your hands towards you. Tip: The left arm will be rotated in a counter clockwise manner while the right one will be rotated clockwise. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lay down on a flat bench holding a halter in each mão with the palms of the mãos facing towards the ceiling. Dica: Your braços should be parallel to the chão and next to your thighs. To avoid injury, make sure that you keep your cotovelos slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.

Now move the halters by creating a semi-circle as you displace them from the initial posição to over the head. All of the movimento should happen with the braços parallel to the chão at all times. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Reverse the movimento to return the peso to the posição inicial as you exhale.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay down on a flat bench holding a dumbbell in each hand with the palms of the hands facing towards the ceiling. Tip: Your arms should be parallel to the floor and next to your thighs. To avoid injury, make sure that you keep your elbows slightly bent. This will be your starting position.

Now move the dumbbells by creating a semi-circle as you displace them from the initial position to over the head. All of the movement should happen with the arms parallel to the floor at all times. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Reverse the movement to return the weight to the starting position as you exhale.

instrucoes: This trainer is effective for developing Atlas Stone strength for those who don't have access to stones, and are typically made from bar ends or heavy pipe.
Comece by loading the desired peso onto the bar. Straddle the peso, wrapping your braços around the implement, bending at the quadris.

Comece by pulling the peso up past the joelhos, extending through the quadris. As the peso clears the joelhos, it can be lapped by resting it on your thighs and sitting costas, hugging it tightly to your peito.
Finish the movimento by extending through your quadris and joelhos to raise the peso as high as possible. The peso can be returned to the lap or to the ground for successive repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: This trainer is effective for developing Atlas Stone strength for those who don't have access to stones, and are typically made from bar ends or heavy pipe.
Begin by loading the desired weight onto the bar. Straddle the weight, wrapping your arms around the implement, bending at the hips.

Begin by pulling the weight up past the knees, extending through the hips. As the weight clears the knees, it can be lapped by resting it on your thighs and sitting back, hugging it tightly to your chest.
Finish the movement by extending through your hips and knees to raise the weight as high as possible. The weight can be returned to the lap or to the ground for successive repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with the atlas stone between your pés. Bend at the quadris to wrap your braços vertically around the Atlas Stone, attempting to get your fingers underneath the stone. Many stones will have a small flat portion on the bottom, which will make the stone easier to hold.
Pulling the stone into your tronco, drive through the costas half of your pés to pull the stone from the ground.
As the stone passes the joelhos, lap it by sitting costasward, pulling the stone on top of your thighs.

Sit low, getting the stone high onto your peito as you change your grip to reach over the stone. Stand, driving through with your quadris. Close distance to the loading platform, and lean costas, extending the quadris to get the stone as high as possible.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with the atlas stone between your feet. Bend at the hips to wrap your arms vertically around the Atlas Stone, attempting to get your fingers underneath the stone. Many stones will have a small flat portion on the bottom, which will make the stone easier to hold.
Pulling the stone into your torso, drive through the back half of your feet to pull the stone from the ground.
As the stone passes the knees, lap it by sitting backward, pulling the stone on top of your thighs.

Sit low, getting the stone high onto your chest as you change your grip to reach over the stone. Stand, driving through with your hips. Close distance to the loading platform, and lean back, extending the hips to get the stone as high as possible.

instrucoes: Approach the bar so that it is centered over your pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an over/under grip.

With your pés and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your quadris and flex the joelhos until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your peito up and your costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward.
After the bar passes the joelhos, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your quadris forward into the bar.
Abaixe the bar by bending at the quadris and guiding it to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an over/under grip.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

instrucoes: Run a band around a stationary post like that of a squat rack.
Grab the band by the mãoles and stand costas so that the tension in the band rises.

Extend and lift the braços straight in front of you. Dica: Your braços should be straight and parallel to the chão while perpendicular to your tronco. Your pés should be firmly planted on the chão spread at shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.
As you exhale, move your braços to the sides and costas. Mantenha your braços extended and parallel to the chão. Continue the movimento until the braços are extended to your sides.
After a pause, go costas to the original posição as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Run a band around a stationary post like that of a squat rack.
Grab the band by the handles and stand back so that the tension in the band rises.

Extend and lift the arms straight in front of you. Tip: Your arms should be straight and parallel to the floor while perpendicular to your torso. Your feet should be firmly planted on the floor spread at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, move your arms to the sides and back. Keep your arms extended and parallel to the floor. Continue the movement until the arms are extended to your sides.
After a pause, go back to the original position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Load a sled with the desired peso, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Comece the exercise by moving costaswards for a given distance. Leaning costas, extend through the pernas for short steps to move as quickly as possible.
instrucoesOriginais: Load a sled with the desired weight, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Begin the exercise by moving backwards for a given distance. Leaning back, extend through the legs for short steps to move as quickly as possible.

instrucoes: This exercise is best done with a partner. If you lack a partner, the ball can be thrown and retrieved or thrown against a wall.
Comece standing a few meters in front of your partner, both facing the same direction. Comece holding the ball between your pernas.
Squat down and then forcefully reverse direction, coming to full extension and you toss the ball over your head to your partner.
Your partner can then roll the ball costas to you. Repita for the número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best done with a partner. If you lack a partner, the ball can be thrown and retrieved or thrown against a wall.
Begin standing a few meters in front of your partner, both facing the same direction. Begin holding the ball between your legs.
Squat down and then forcefully reverse direction, coming to full extension and you toss the ball over your head to your partner.
Your partner can then roll the ball back to you. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a balance board in front of you.
Fique em pé on it and try to balance yourself.
Segure the balance for as long as desired.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a balance board in front of you.
Stand up on it and try to balance yourself.
Hold the balance for as long as desired.

nome: Flexão de pernas na bola suíça
instrucoes: Comece on the chão laying on your costas with your pés on top of the ball.
Position the ball so that when your pernas are extended your ankles are on top of the ball. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve your quadris off of the ground, keeping your peso on the shoulder blades and your pés.
Flex the joelhos, pulling the ball as close to you as you can, contraindo the hamstrings.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin on the floor laying on your back with your feet on top of the ball.
Position the ball so that when your legs are extended your ankles are on top of the ball. This will be your starting position.
Raise your hips off of the ground, keeping your weight on the shoulder blades and your feet.
Flex the knees, pulling the ball as close to you as you can, contracting the hamstrings.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Choke the band around the center of the pullup bar. You can use different bands to provide varying levels of assistance.
Pull the end of the band down, and place one bent knee into the loop, ensuring it won't slip out. Take a medium to wide grip on the bar. This will be your posição inicial.

Pull yourself upward by contraindo the lats as you flex the elbow. The elbow should be driven to your side. Pull to the front, attempting to get your chin over the bar. Avoid swinging or jerking movimentos.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Choke the band around the center of the pullup bar. You can use different bands to provide varying levels of assistance.
Pull the end of the band down, and place one bent knee into the loop, ensuring it won't slip out. Take a medium to wide grip on the bar. This will be your starting position.

Pull yourself upward by contracting the lats as you flex the elbow. The elbow should be driven to your side. Pull to the front, attempting to get your chin over the bar. Avoid swinging or jerking movements.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Using a 41 inch band, stand on one end, spreading your pés a small amount. Bend at the quadris to loop the end of the band behind your neck. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your pernas straight, extend through the quadris to come to a near vertical posição.
Ensure that you do not round your costas as you go down costas to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a 41 inch band, stand on one end, spreading your feet a small amount. Bend at the hips to loop the end of the band behind your neck. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your legs straight, extend through the hips to come to a near vertical position.
Ensure that you do not round your back as you go down back to the starting position.

instrucoes: Loop the band around a post. Standing a little ways away, loop the opposite end around the neck. Your mãos can help hold the band in posição.
Comece by bending at the quadris, getting your butt costas as far as possible. Mantenha your costas flat and bend forward to about 90 degrees. Your joelhos should be only slightly bent.
Retorne to the posição inicial be driving through with the quadris to come costas to a standing posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Loop the band around a post. Standing a little ways away, loop the opposite end around the neck. Your hands can help hold the band in position.
Begin by bending at the hips, getting your butt back as far as possible. Keep your back flat and bend forward to about 90 degrees. Your knees should be only slightly bent.
Return to the starting position be driving through with the hips to come back to a standing position.

instrucoes: Anchor a band around a solid post or other object.
Stand with your left side to the post, and put your right foot through the band, getting it around the ankle.
Fique em pé straight and hold onto the post if needed. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing the knee straight, raise your right pernas out to the side as far as you can.
Retorne to the posição inicial and repeat for the desired rep count.
Troque de lado.
instrucoesOriginais: Anchor a band around a solid post or other object.
Stand with your left side to the post, and put your right foot through the band, getting it around the ankle.
Stand up straight and hold onto the post if needed. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the knee straight, raise your right legs out to the side as far as you can.
Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired rep count.
Switch sides.

instrucoes: Comece with your braços extended straight out in front of you, holding the band with both mãos.
Initiate the movimento by performing a reverse fly motion, moving your mãos out laterally to your sides.
Mantenha your cotovelos extended as you perform the movimento, bringing the band to your peito. Ensure that you keep your ombros costas during the exercise.
Faça uma pausa as you complete the movimento, returning to the posição inicial under control.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding the band with both hands.
Initiate the movement by performing a reverse fly motion, moving your hands out laterally to your sides.
Keep your elbows extended as you perform the movement, bringing the band to your chest. Ensure that you keep your shoulders back during the exercise.
Pause as you complete the movement, returning to the starting position under control.

instrucoes: Secure a band to the base of a rack or the bench. Lay on the bench so that the band is lined up with your head.
Take hold of the band, raising your cotovelos so that the upper braço is perpendicular to the chão. With the elbow flexed, the band should be above your head. This will be your posição inicial.
Extend through the elbow to straighten your braço, keeping your upper braço in place. Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure a band to the base of a rack or the bench. Lay on the bench so that the band is lined up with your head.
Take hold of the band, raising your elbows so that the upper arm is perpendicular to the floor. With the elbow flexed, the band should be above your head. This will be your starting position.
Extend through the elbow to straighten your arm, keeping your upper arm in place. Pause at the top of the motion, and return to the starting position.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need to get into a pushup posição, but instead of having your mãos of the chão, you will be grabbing on to an Olympic barra (loaded with 5-10 lbs on each side) instead. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping a slight arch on your costas, lift your quadris and roll the barra towards your pés as you exhale. Dica: As you perform the movimento, your glutes should be coming up, you should be keeping the abs tight and should maintain your costas posture at all times. Also your braços should be staying perpendicular to the chão throughout the movimento. If you don't, you will work out your ombros and costas more than the abs.
After a second contraction at the top, start to roll the barra costas forward to the posição inicial slowly as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need to get into a pushup position, but instead of having your hands of the floor, you will be grabbing on to an Olympic barbell (loaded with 5-10 lbs on each side) instead. This will be your starting position.

While keeping a slight arch on your back, lift your hips and roll the barbell towards your feet as you exhale. Tip: As you perform the movement, your glutes should be coming up, you should be keeping the abs tight and should maintain your back posture at all times. Also your arms should be staying perpendicular to the floor throughout the movement. If you don't, you will work out your shoulders and back more than the abs.
After a second contraction at the top, start to roll the barbell back forward to the starting position slowly as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: com barra Ab Rollout - On Knees
instrucoes: Segure an Olympic barra loaded with 5-10lbs on each side and kneel on the chão.
Now place the barra on the chão in front of you so that you are on all your mãos and joelhos (as in a kneeling push up posição). This will be your posição inicial.

Lentamente roll the barra straight forward, stretching your body into a straight posição. Dica: Go down as far as you can without touching the chão with your body. Breathe in during this portion of the movimento.
After a second pause at the stretched posição, start pulling yourself costas to the posição inicial as you expire. Dica: Go slowly and keep your abs tight at all times.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold an Olympic barbell loaded with 5-10lbs on each side and kneel on the floor.
Now place the barbell on the floor in front of you so that you are on all your hands and knees (as in a kneeling push up position). This will be your starting position.

Slowly roll the barbell straight forward, stretching your body into a straight position. Tip: Go down as far as you can without touching the floor with your body. Breathe in during this portion of the movement.
After a second pause at the stretched position, start pulling yourself back to the starting position as you breathe out. Tip: Go slowly and keep your abs tight at all times.

nome: Supino reto com barra - pegada média
instrucoes: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movimento between the forebraços and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.
From the posição inicial, inspire and begin coming down slowly until the bar touches your middle peito.

After a brief pause, push the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire. Focus on pushing the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços and squeeze your peito in the contracted posição at the top of the motion, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: Ideally, lowering the peso should take about twice as long as raising it.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on a flat bench. Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper arms), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.
From the starting position, breathe in and begin coming down slowly until the bar touches your middle chest.

After a brief pause, push the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out. Focus on pushing the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position at the top of the motion, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: Ideally, lowering the weight should take about twice as long as raising it.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright while holding a barra at a shoulder-width grip. The palm of your mãos should be facing forward and the cotovelos should be close to the tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Dica: Only the forebraços should move.
Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second and squeeze the biceps hard.
Lentamente begin to bring the bar costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright while holding a barbell at a shoulder-width grip. The palm of your hands should be facing forward and the elbows should be close to the torso. This will be your starting position.
While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second and squeeze the biceps hard.
Slowly begin to bring the bar back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: com barra roscas Lying Against An Incline
nomeOriginal: Barbell Curls Lying Against An Incline
instrucoes: Lie against an incline bench, with your braços holding a barra and hanging down in a horizontal line. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping the upper braços stationary, curl the peso up as high as you can while squeezing the biceps. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Only the forebraços should move. Do not swing the braços.
After a second contraction, slowly go costas to the posição inicial as you inhale. Dica: Make sure that you go all of the way down.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie against an incline bench, with your arms holding a barbell and hanging down in a horizontal line. This will be your starting position.

While keeping the upper arms stationary, curl the weight up as high as you can while squeezing the biceps. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Only the forearms should move. Do not swing the arms.
After a second contraction, slowly go back to the starting position as you inhale. Tip: Make sure that you go all of the way down.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand in front of a loaded barra.

While keeping the costas as straight as possible, flexione os joelhos, bend forward and grasp the bar using a medium (shoulder width) overmão grip. This will be the posição inicial of the exercise. Dica: If it is difficult to hold on to the bar with this grip, alternate your grip or use wrist straps.

While holding the bar, start the lift by pushing with your pernas while simultaneously getting your tronco to the upright posição as you expire. In the upright posição, stick your peito out and contract the costas by bringing the shoulder blades costas. Think of how the soldiers in the military look when they are in standing in attention.

Go costas to the posição inicial by bending at the joelhos while simultaneously leaning the tronco forward at the waist while keeping the costas straight. When the pesos on the bar touch the chão you are costas at the posição inicial and ready to perform another repetition.
Perform the amount of repetitions prescribed in the program.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand in front of a loaded barbell.

While keeping the back as straight as possible, bend your knees, bend forward and grasp the bar using a medium (shoulder width) overhand grip. This will be the starting position of the exercise. Tip: If it is difficult to hold on to the bar with this grip, alternate your grip or use wrist straps.

While holding the bar, start the lift by pushing with your legs while simultaneously getting your torso to the upright position as you breathe out. In the upright position, stick your chest out and contract the back by bringing the shoulder blades back. Think of how the soldiers in the military look when they are in standing in attention.

Go back to the starting position by bending at the knees while simultaneously leaning the torso forward at the waist while keeping the back straight. When the weights on the bar touch the floor you are back at the starting position and ready to perform another repetition.
Perform the amount of repetitions prescribed in the program.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just above shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder-width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times and maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos and sitting costas with your quadris as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the pernas and extend the quadris to go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just above shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder-width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and sitting back with your hips as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the legs and extend the hips to go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece seated on the ground with a loaded barra over your pernas. Using a fat bar or having a pad on the bar can greatly reduce the discomfort caused by this exercise. Roll the bar so that it is directly above your quadris, and lay down flat on the chão.
Comece the movimento by driving through with your heels, extending your quadris vertically through the bar. Your peso should be supported by your upper costas and the heels of your pés.
Extend as far as possible, then reverse the motion to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin seated on the ground with a loaded barbell over your legs. Using a fat bar or having a pad on the bar can greatly reduce the discomfort caused by this exercise. Roll the bar so that it is directly above your hips, and lay down flat on the floor.
Begin the movement by driving through with your heels, extending your hips vertically through the bar. Your weight should be supported by your upper back and the heels of your feet.
Extend as far as possible, then reverse the motion to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movimento between the forebraços and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over your neck with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, bring the bar down slowly until it is about 1 inch from your neck.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços and squeeze your peito in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper arms), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over your neck with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, bring the bar down slowly until it is about 1 inch from your neck.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a barra behind you at braços length and your pés at shoulder width. Dica: A shoulder width grip is best with the palms of your mãos facing costas. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for a better grip. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping your head and eyes up and costas straight, squat until your upper thighs are parallel to the chão. Breathe in as you slowly go down.
Pressing mainly with the heel of the foot and squeezing the thighs, go costas up as you expire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a barbell behind you at arms length and your feet at shoulder width. Tip: A shoulder width grip is best with the palms of your hands facing back. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for a better grip. This will be your starting position.
While keeping your head and eyes up and back straight, squat until your upper thighs are parallel to the floor. Breathe in as you slowly go down.
Pressing mainly with the heel of the foot and squeezing the thighs, go back up as you breathe out.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece seated on the ground with a bench directly behind you. Have a loaded barra over your pernas. Using a fat bar or having a pad on the bar can greatly reduce the discomfort caused by this exercise.
Roll the bar so that it is directly above your quadris, and lean costas against the bench so that your shoulder blades are near the top of it.

Comece the movimento by driving through your pés, extending your quadris vertically through the bar. Your peso should be supported by your shoulder blades and your pés. Extend as far as possible, then reverse the motion to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin seated on the ground with a bench directly behind you. Have a loaded barbell over your legs. Using a fat bar or having a pad on the bar can greatly reduce the discomfort caused by this exercise.
Roll the bar so that it is directly above your hips, and lean back against the bench so that your shoulder blades are near the top of it.

Begin the movement by driving through your feet, extending your hips vertically through the bar. Your weight should be supported by your shoulder blades and your feet. Extend as far as possible, then reverse the motion to return to the starting position.

nome: Supino inclinado com barra - pegada média
nomeOriginal: Barbell Incline Bench Press - Medium Grip
instrucoes: Lie costas on an incline bench. Using a medium-width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movimento between the forebraços and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on you upper peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, squeeze your peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: it should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on an incline bench. Using a medium-width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper arms), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on you upper chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, squeeze your chest, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: it should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Lie costas on an Incline Bench. Using a medium width grip (a grip that is slightly wider than shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços straight. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping the braços straight, lift the bar by protracting your shoulder blades, raising the ombros from the bench as you expire.
Bring costas the bar to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on an Incline Bench. Using a medium width grip (a grip that is slightly wider than shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms straight. This will be your starting position.
While keeping the arms straight, lift the bar by protracting your shoulder blades, raising the shoulders from the bench as you breathe out.
Bring back the bar to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and step forward with your right perna and squat down through your quadris, while keeping the tronco upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: Do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. li>
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go costas to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita the movimento for the número recomendado de repetições and then perform with the left perna.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and step forward with your right leg and squat down through your hips, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: Do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. li>
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a barra using a wide (higher than shoulder width) and overmão (palms facing your body) grip.

Bend joelhos slightly and bend over as you keep the natural arch of your costas. Let the braços hang in front of you as they hold the bar. Once your tronco is parallel to the chão, flare the cotovelos out and away from your body. Dica: Your tronco and your braços should resemble the letter "T". Now you are ready to begin the exercise.

While keeping the upper braços perpendicular to the tronco, pull the barra up towards your upper peito as you squeeze the rear delts and you expire. Dica: When performed correctly, this exercise should resemble a bench press in reverse. Also, refrain from using your biceps to do the work. Focus on targeting the rear delts; the braços should only act as hooks.
Lentamente go costas to the initial posição as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a barbell using a wide (higher than shoulder width) and overhand (palms facing your body) grip.

Bend knees slightly and bend over as you keep the natural arch of your back. Let the arms hang in front of you as they hold the bar. Once your torso is parallel to the floor, flare the elbows out and away from your body. Tip: Your torso and your arms should resemble the letter "T". Now you are ready to begin the exercise.

While keeping the upper arms perpendicular to the torso, pull the barbell up towards your upper chest as you squeeze the rear delts and you breathe out. Tip: When performed correctly, this exercise should resemble a bench press in reverse. Also, refrain from using your biceps to do the work. Focus on targeting the rear delts; the arms should only act as hooks.
Slowly go back to the initial position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a loaded barra on the ground, near the end of a bench. Kneel with both pernas on the bench, and take a medium to narrow grip on the barra. This will be your posição inicial.

To begin, extend through the quadris to slowly roll the bar forward. As you roll out, flex the shoulder to roll the bar above your head. Ensure that your braços remain extended throughout the movimento.
When the bar has been moved as far forward as possible, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a loaded barbell on the ground, near the end of a bench. Kneel with both legs on the bench, and take a medium to narrow grip on the barbell. This will be your starting position.
To begin, extend through the hips to slowly roll the bar forward. As you roll out, flex the shoulder to roll the bar above your head. Ensure that your arms remain extended throughout the movement.
When the bar has been moved as far forward as possible, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Place a block about 12 inches in front of a flat bench.
Sit on the bench and place the ball of your pés on the block.
Have someone place a barra over your upper thighs about 3 inches above your joelhos and hold it there. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve up on your toes as high as possible as you squeeze the calves and as you expire.
After a second contraction, slowly go costas to the posição inicial. Dica: To get maximum benefit stretch your calves as far as you can.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a block about 12 inches in front of a flat bench.
Sit on the bench and place the ball of your feet on the block.
Have someone place a barbell over your upper thighs about 3 inches above your knees and hold it there. This will be your starting position.
Raise up on your toes as high as possible as you squeeze the calves and as you breathe out.
After a second contraction, slowly go back to the starting position. Tip: To get maximum benefit stretch your calves as far as you can.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on a bench with costas support in a squat rack. Position a barra at a height that is just above your head. Grab the barra with a pronated grip (palms facing forward).

Once you pick up the barra with the correct grip width, lift the bar up over your head by locking your braços. Segure at about shoulder level and slightly in front of your head. This is your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar down to the ombros slowly as you inhale.
Levante the bar costas up to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a bench with back support in a squat rack. Position a barbell at a height that is just above your head. Grab the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing forward).

Once you pick up the barbell with the correct grip width, lift the bar up over your head by locking your arms. Hold at about shoulder level and slightly in front of your head. This is your starting position.
Lower the bar down to the shoulders slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar back up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with your pés at shoulder width as you hold a barra with both mãos in front of you using a pronated grip (palms facing the thighs). Dica: Your mãos should be a little wider than shoulder width apart. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for a better grip. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve your ombros up as far as you can go as you expire and hold the contraction for a second. Dica: Refrain from trying to lift the barra by using your biceps.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with your feet at shoulder width as you hold a barbell with both hands in front of you using a pronated grip (palms facing the thighs). Tip: Your hands should be a little wider than shoulder width apart. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for a better grip. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up as far as you can go as you breathe out and hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Refrain from trying to lift the barbell by using your biceps.
Slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: com barra Shrug Behind The Back
instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with your pés at shoulder width as you hold a barra with both mãos behind your costas using a pronated grip (palms facing costas). Dica: Your mãos should be a little wider than shoulder width apart. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for better grip. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your ombros up as far as you can go as you expire and hold the contraction for a second. Dica: Refrain from trying to lift the barra by using your biceps. The braços should remain stretched out at all times.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with your feet at shoulder width as you hold a barbell with both hands behind your back using a pronated grip (palms facing back). Tip: Your hands should be a little wider than shoulder width apart. You can use wrist wraps for this exercise for better grip. This will be your starting position.

Raise your shoulders up as far as you can go as you breathe out and hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Refrain from trying to lift the barbell by using your biceps. The arms should remain stretched out at all times.
Slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a barra placed on the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck). Your pés should be shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping your costas straight and your head up, bend only at the waist to the right as far as possible. Breathe in as you bend to the side. Then hold for a second and come costas up to the posição inicial as you exhale. Dica: Mantenha the rest of the body stationary.
Now repeat the movimento but bending to the left instead. Segure for a second and come costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a barbell placed on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck). Your feet should be shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.

While keeping your back straight and your head up, bend only at the waist to the right as far as possible. Breathe in as you bend to the side. Then hold for a second and come back up to the starting position as you exhale. Tip: Keep the rest of the body stationary.
Now repeat the movement but bending to the left instead. Hold for a second and come back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a barra placed on the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck). Your pés should be placed wide apart with the foot of the lead perna angled out to the side. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe your body towards the side of your angled foot by bending the knee and hip of your lead perna and while keeping the opposite perna only slightly bent. Breathe in as you lower your body.
Retorne to the posição inicial by extending the hip and knee of the lead perna. Breathe out as you perform this movimento.
After performing the recommended amount of reps, repeat the movimento with the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a barbell placed on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck). Your feet should be placed wide apart with the foot of the lead leg angled out to the side. This will be your starting position.
Lower your body towards the side of your angled foot by bending the knee and hip of your lead leg and while keeping the opposite leg only slightly bent. Breathe in as you lower your body.
Return to the starting position by extending the hip and knee of the lead leg. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
After performing the recommended amount of reps, repeat the movement with the opposite leg.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos and quadris as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: com barra agachamento To A Bench
instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first place a flat bench or a box behind you. The flat bench is used to teach you to set your quadris costas and to hit depth.

Then, set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos and sitting your quadris costas as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until you slightly touch the bench behind you. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
