Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot as you straighten the pernas and extend the quadris to go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first place a flat bench or a box behind you. The flat bench is used to teach you to set your hips back and to hit depth.

Then, set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and sitting your hips back as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until you slightly touch the bench behind you. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs and extend the hips to go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a barra placed on the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) and stand upright behind an elevated platform (such as the one used for spotting behind a flat bench). This is your posição inicial.

Place the right foot on the elevated platform. Step on the platform by extending the hip and the knee of your right perna. Use the heel mainly to lift the rest of your body up and place the foot of the left perna on the platform as well. Breathe out as you execute the force required to come up.

Step down with the left perna by flexing the hip and knee of the right perna as you inhale. Retorne to the original standing posição by placing the right foot of to next to the left foot on the initial posição.
Repita with the right perna for the número recomendado de repetições and then perform with the left perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a barbell placed on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) and stand upright behind an elevated platform (such as the one used for spotting behind a flat bench). This is your starting position.

Place the right foot on the elevated platform. Step on the platform by extending the hip and the knee of your right leg. Use the heel mainly to lift the rest of your body up and place the foot of the left leg on the platform as well. Breathe out as you execute the force required to come up.

Step down with the left leg by flexing the hip and knee of the right leg as you inhale. Return to the original standing position by placing the right foot of to next to the left foot on the initial position.
Repeat with the right leg for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.

instrucoes: Comece standing with your pés shoulder width apart and a barra across your upper costas.

Step forward with one perna, flexing the joelhos to drop your quadris. Descend until your rear knee nearly touches the ground. Your posture should remain upright, and your front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of your lead foot and extend both joelhos to raise yourself costas up.
Step forward with your rear foot, repeating the lunge on the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing with your feet shoulder width apart and a barbell across your upper back.

Step forward with one leg, flexing the knees to drop your hips. Descend until your rear knee nearly touches the ground. Your posture should remain upright, and your front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of your lead foot and extend both knees to raise yourself back up.
Step forward with your rear foot, repeating the lunge on the opposite leg.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 pés away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each mão with your braços extended at your side. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by rapidly raising one braço to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that braço drop to the posição inicial, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right braços, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.

instrucoes: Wearing either a harness or a loose peso belt, attach the chain to the costas so that you will be facing away from the sled. Bend down so that your mãos are on the ground. Your costas should be flat and joelhos bent. This is your posição inicial.
Comece by driving with pernas, alternating left and right. Use your mãos to maintain balance and to help pull. Try to keep your costas flat as you move over a given distance.
instrucoesOriginais: Wearing either a harness or a loose weight belt, attach the chain to the back so that you will be facing away from the sled. Bend down so that your hands are on the ground. Your back should be flat and knees bent. This is your starting position.
Begin by driving with legs, alternating left and right. Use your hands to maintain balance and to help pull. Try to keep your back flat as you move over a given distance.

instrucoes: Sit upright on the chão with your partner behind you.
Place your mãos behind your mão, and push your cotovelos costas as far as you can. Your partner should hold your cotovelos. This will be your posição inicial.
Gently attempt to pull your cotovelos forward with your mãos still behind your head for 10 or more seconds. Your partner should prevent your cotovelos from moving.

Now, relax your muscles and have your partner gently pull the cotovelos costas as far as it comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit upright on the floor with your partner behind you.
Place your hands behind your hand, and push your elbows back as far as you can. Your partner should hold your elbows. This will be your starting position.
Gently attempt to pull your elbows forward with your hands still behind your head for 10 or more seconds. Your partner should prevent your elbows from moving.

Now, relax your muscles and have your partner gently pull the elbows back as far as it comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need to place a bench behind your costas. With the bench perpendicular to your body, and while looking away from it, hold on to the bench on its edge with the mãos fully extended, separated at shoulder width. The pernas will be extended forward, bent at the waist and perpendicular to your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

Lentamente lower your body as you inhale by bending at the cotovelos until you lower yourself far enough to where there is an angle slightly smaller than 90 degrees between the upper braço and the forebraço. Dica: Mantenha the cotovelos as close as possible throughout the movimento. Forebraços should always be pointing down.
Using your triceps to bring your tronco up again, lift yourself costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need to place a bench behind your back. With the bench perpendicular to your body, and while looking away from it, hold on to the bench on its edge with the hands fully extended, separated at shoulder width. The legs will be extended forward, bent at the waist and perpendicular to your torso. This will be your starting position.

Slowly lower your body as you inhale by bending at the elbows until you lower yourself far enough to where there is an angle slightly smaller than 90 degrees between the upper arm and the forearm. Tip: Keep the elbows as close as possible throughout the movement. Forearms should always be pointing down.
Using your triceps to bring your torso up again, lift yourself back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with a box or bench 1-2 pés in front of you. Stand with your pés shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your braços behind you.
Rebound out of this posição, extending through the quadris, joelhos, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your braços forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the joelhos bent, absorbing the impact through the pernas.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump costas over the bench.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump back over the bench.

instrucoes: Comece by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck your pés underneath you and arch your costas. Using the bar to help support your peso, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your pés to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body posição throughout the movimento.
However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your ombros. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Abaixe the bar to your lower peito or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Faça uma pausa when the barra touches your tronco, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The cotovelos should be tucked in until lockout.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.
However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

instrucoes: Using a flat bench secure a band under the perna of the bench that is nearest to your head.
Once the band is secure, grab it by both mãoles and lie down on the bench.
Extend your braços so that you are holding the band mãoles in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your mãos are facing away from you. This will be your posição inicial.
Bring down the mãoles slowly until your elbow forms a 90 degree angle. Mantenha full control at all times.

As you expire, bring the mãoles up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, squeeze your peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a flat bench secure a band under the leg of the bench that is nearest to your head.
Once the band is secure, grab it by both handles and lie down on the bench.
Extend your arms so that you are holding the band handles in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Bring down the handles slowly until your elbow forms a 90 degree angle. Keep full control at all times.

As you breathe out, bring the handles up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, squeeze your chest, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.

instrucoes: Adjust the leader chain, shortening it to the desired length.Place the chains on the sleeves of the bar.

Lying on the bench, get your head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck your pés underneath you and arch your costas. Using the bar to help support your peso, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your pés to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body posição throughout the movimento. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your ombros. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Abaixe the bar to your lower peito or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Faça uma pausa when the barra touches your tronco, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The cotovelos should be tucked in until lockout.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the leader chain, shortening it to the desired length.Place the chains on the sleeves of the bar.

Lying on the bench, get your head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

instrucoes: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on a bench or box with your heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the bench, extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the opposite foot on top of the box, returning your other foot costas to the start posição.
Continue alternating from one foot to another to complete the set.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on a bench or box with your heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the bench, extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the opposite foot on top of the box, returning your other foot back to the start position.
Continue alternating from one foot to another to complete the set.

instrucoes: Lie on a flat bench with a barra using a shoulder grip width.
Segure the bar straight over your peito with a bend in your braços. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping your braços in the bent braço posição, lower the peso slowly in an arc behind your head while breathing in until you feel a stretch on the peito.
At that point, bring the barra costas to the posição inicial using the arc through which the peso was lowered and exhale as you perform this movimento.
Segure the peso on the initial posição for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on a flat bench with a barbell using a shoulder grip width.
Hold the bar straight over your chest with a bend in your arms. This will be your starting position.
While keeping your arms in the bent arm position, lower the weight slowly in an arc behind your head while breathing in until you feel a stretch on the chest.
At that point, bring the barbell back to the starting position using the arc through which the weight was lowered and exhale as you perform this movement.
Hold the weight on the initial position for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a halter standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the halter stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench (tronco across it as in forming a cross) with only your ombros lying on the surface. Hips should be below the bench and pernas bent with pés firmly on the chão. The head will be off the bench as well.

Grasp the halter with both mãos and hold it straight over your peito with a bend in your braços. Both palms should be pressing against the underside one of the sides of the halter. This will be your posição inicial. Caution: Always ensure that the halter used for this exercise is secure. Using a halter with loose plates can result in the halter falling apart and falling on your face.
While keeping your braços locked in the bent braço posição, lower the peso slowly in an arc behind your head while breathing in until you feel a stretch on the peito.
At that point, bring the halter costas to the posição inicial using the arc through which the peso was lowered and exhale as you perform this movimento.
Segure the peso on the initial posição for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a dumbbell standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the dumbbell stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench (torso across it as in forming a cross) with only your shoulders lying on the surface. Hips should be below the bench and legs bent with feet firmly on the floor. The head will be off the bench as well.

Grasp the dumbbell with both hands and hold it straight over your chest with a bend in your arms. Both palms should be pressing against the underside one of the sides of the dumbbell. This will be your starting position. Caution: Always ensure that the dumbbell used for this exercise is secure. Using a dumbbell with loose plates can result in the dumbbell falling apart and falling on your face.
While keeping your arms locked in the bent arm position, lower the weight slowly in an arc behind your head while breathing in until you feel a stretch on the chest.
At that point, bring the dumbbell back to the starting position using the arc through which the weight was lowered and exhale as you perform this movement.
Hold the weight on the initial position for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lay flat on the chão with your braços next to your sides.
Now flexione os joelhos at around a 75 degree angle and lift your pés off the chão by around 2 inches.

Using your lower abs, bring your joelhos in towards you as you maintain the 75 degree angle bend in your pernas. Continue this movimento until you raise your quadris off of the chão by rolling your pelvis costasward. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: At the end of the movimento your joelhos will be over your peito.
Squeeze your abs at the top of the movimento for a second and then return to the posição inicial slowly as you inspire. Dica: Maintain a controlled motion at all times.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay flat on the floor with your arms next to your sides.
Now bend your knees at around a 75 degree angle and lift your feet off the floor by around 2 inches.

Using your lower abs, bring your knees in towards you as you maintain the 75 degree angle bend in your legs. Continue this movement until you raise your hips off of the floor by rolling your pelvis backward. Breathe out as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: At the end of the movement your knees will be over your chest.
Squeeze your abs at the top of the movement for a second and then return to the starting position slowly as you breathe in. Tip: Maintain a controlled motion at all times.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Segureing a barra with a pronated grip (palms facing down), flexione os joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Dica: Make sure that you keep the head up. The barra should hang directly in front of you as your braços hang perpendicular to the chão and your tronco. This is your posição inicial.

Now, while keeping the tronco stationary, expire and lift the barra to you. Mantenha the cotovelos close to the body and only use the forebraços to hold the peso. At the top contracted posição, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a brief pause.
Then inhale and slowly lower the barra costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Holding a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing down), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The barbell should hang directly in front of you as your arms hang perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

Now, while keeping the torso stationary, breathe out and lift the barbell to you. Keep the elbows close to the body and only use the forearms to hold the weight. At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a brief pause.
Then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Bent Over com halter Rear Delt elevação With Head On Bench
nomeOriginal: Bent Over Dumbbell Rear Delt Raise With Head On Bench
instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a halter in each mão and with an incline bench in front of you.

While keeping your costas straight and maintaining the natural arch of your costas, lean forward until your forehead touches the bench in front of you. Let the braços hang in front of you perpendicular to the ground. The palms of your mãos should be facing each other and your tronco should be parallel to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your tronco forward and stationary, and the braços straight with a slight bend at the cotovelos, lift the halters straight to the side until both braços are parallel to the chão. Exhale as you lift the pesos. Caution: avoid swinging the tronco or bringing the braços costas as opposed to the side.
After a one second contraction at the top, slowly lower the halters costas to the posição inicial.
Repita the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell in each hand and with an incline bench in front of you.

While keeping your back straight and maintaining the natural arch of your back, lean forward until your forehead touches the bench in front of you. Let the arms hang in front of you perpendicular to the ground. The palms of your hands should be facing each other and your torso should be parallel to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your torso forward and stationary, and the arms straight with a slight bend at the elbows, lift the dumbbells straight to the side until both arms are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you lift the weights. Caution: avoid swinging the torso or bringing the arms back as opposed to the side.
After a one second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Select a peso and hold the mãole of the low pulley with your right mão.

Bend at the waist until your tronco is nearly parallel to the chão. Your pernas should be slightly bent with your left mão placed on your lower left thigh. Your right braço should be hanging from your shoulder in front of you and with a slight bend at the elbow. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve your right braço, elbow slightly bent, to the side until the braço is parallel to the chão and in line with your right ear. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Lentamente lower the peso costas to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and repeat the movimento with the other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Select a weight and hold the handle of the low pulley with your right hand.

Bend at the waist until your torso is nearly parallel to the floor. Your legs should be slightly bent with your left hand placed on your lower left thigh. Your right arm should be hanging from your shoulder in front of you and with a slight bend at the elbow. This will be your starting position.
Raise your right arm, elbow slightly bent, to the side until the arm is parallel to the floor and in line with your right ear. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Slowly lower the weight back to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and repeat the movement with the other arm.

nome: Bent Over One-Arm Long Bar remada
nomeOriginal: Bent Over One-Arm Long Bar Row
instrucoes: Put peso on one of the ends of an Olympic barra. Make sure that you either place the other end of the barra in the corner of two walls; or put a heavy object on the ground so the barra cannot slide costasward.
Bend forward until your tronco is as close to parallel with the chão as you can and keep your joelhos slightly bent.
Now grab the bar with one braço just behind the plates on the side where the peso was placed and put your other mão on your knee. This will be your posição inicial.

Pull the bar straight up with your elbow in (to maximize costas stimulation) until the plates touch your lower peito. Squeeze the costas muscles as you lift the peso up and hold for a second at the top of the movimento. Breathe out as you lift the peso. Dica: Do not allow for any swinging of the tronco. Only the braço should move.

Lentamente lower the bar to the posição inicial getting a nice stretch on the lats. Dica: Do not let the plates touch the chão. To ensure the best range of motion, I recommend using small plates (25-lb ones) as opposed to larger plates (like 35-45lb ones).
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and switch braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Put weight on one of the ends of an Olympic barbell. Make sure that you either place the other end of the barbell in the corner of two walls; or put a heavy object on the ground so the barbell cannot slide backward.
Bend forward until your torso is as close to parallel with the floor as you can and keep your knees slightly bent.
Now grab the bar with one arm just behind the plates on the side where the weight was placed and put your other hand on your knee. This will be your starting position.

Pull the bar straight up with your elbow in (to maximize back stimulation) until the plates touch your lower chest. Squeeze the back muscles as you lift the weight up and hold for a second at the top of the movement. Breathe out as you lift the weight. Tip: Do not allow for any swinging of the torso. Only the arm should move.

Slowly lower the bar to the starting position getting a nice stretch on the lats. Tip: Do not let the plates touch the floor. To ensure the best range of motion, I recommend using small plates (25-lb ones) as opposed to larger plates (like 35-45lb ones).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and switch arms.

nome: Bent Over Two-Arm Long Bar remada
nomeOriginal: Bent Over Two-Arm Long Bar Row
instrucoes: Put peso on one of the ends of an Olympic barra. Make sure that you either place the other end of the barra in the corner of two walls; or put a heavy object on the ground so the barra cannot slide costasward.
Bend forward until your tronco is as close to parallel with the chão as you can and keep your joelhos slightly bent.
Now grab the bar with both braços just behind the plates on the side where the peso was placed and put your other mão on your knee. This will be your posição inicial.

Pull the bar straight up with your cotovelos in (to maximize costas stimulation) until the plates touch your lower peito. Squeeze the costas muscles as you lift the peso up and hold for a second at the top of the movimento. Breathe out as you lift the peso. Dica: Use a stirrup or double mãole cable attachment by hooking it under the end of the bar.

Lentamente lower the bar to the posição inicial getting a nice stretch on the lats. Dica: Do not let the plates touch the chão. To ensure the best range of motion, I recommend using small plates (25-lb ones) as opposed to larger plates (like 35-45lb ones).
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Put weight on one of the ends of an Olympic barbell. Make sure that you either place the other end of the barbell in the corner of two walls; or put a heavy object on the ground so the barbell cannot slide backward.
Bend forward until your torso is as close to parallel with the floor as you can and keep your knees slightly bent.
Now grab the bar with both arms just behind the plates on the side where the weight was placed and put your other hand on your knee. This will be your starting position.

Pull the bar straight up with your elbows in (to maximize back stimulation) until the plates touch your lower chest. Squeeze the back muscles as you lift the weight up and hold for a second at the top of the movement. Breathe out as you lift the weight. Tip: Use a stirrup or double handle cable attachment by hooking it under the end of the bar.

Slowly lower the bar to the starting position getting a nice stretch on the lats. Tip: Do not let the plates touch the floor. To ensure the best range of motion, I recommend using small plates (25-lb ones) as opposed to larger plates (like 35-45lb ones).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: With a halter in each mão (palms facing your tronco), flexione os joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward by bending at the waist; as you bend make sure to keep your costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Dica: Make sure that you keep the head up. The pesos should hang directly in front of you as your braços hang perpendicular to the chão and your tronco. This is your posição inicial.

While keeping the tronco stationary, lift the halters to your side (as you expire), keeping the cotovelos close to the body (do not exert any force with the forebraço other than holding the pesos). On the top contracted posição, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Lentamente lower the peso again to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing your torso), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at the waist; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms hang perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to your side (as you breathe out), keeping the elbows close to the body (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). On the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Bent Over Two-com halter remada With Palms In
nomeOriginal: Bent Over Two-Dumbbell Row With Palms In
instrucoes: With a halter in each mão (palms facing each other), flexione os joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Dica: Make sure that you keep the head up. The pesos should hang directly in front of you as your braços hang perpendicular to the chão and your tronco. This is your posição inicial.

While keeping the tronco stationary, lift the halters to your side as you expire, squeezing your shoulder blades together. On the top contracted posição, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Lentamente lower the peso again to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing each other), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms hang perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to your side as you breathe out, squeezing your shoulder blades together. On the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece my leaning to the side opposite the kettlebell, continuing until you are able to touch the ground with your free mão, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell. As you do so, press the peso vertically be extending through the elbow, keeping your braço perpendicular to the ground.
Retorne to an upright posição, with the kettlebell above your head. Retorne the kettlebell to the shoulder and repeat for the número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so. This will be your starting position.

Begin my leaning to the side opposite the kettlebell, continuing until you are able to touch the ground with your free hand, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell. As you do so, press the weight vertically be extending through the elbow, keeping your arm perpendicular to the ground.
Return to an upright position, with the kettlebell above your head. Return the kettlebell to the shoulder and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, seat yourself on the bike and adjust the seat to your height.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, seat yourself on the bike and adjust the seat to your height.

instrucoes: To begin, seat yourself on the bike and adjust the seat to your height.

Select the desired option from the menu. You may have to start pedaling to turn it on. You can use the manual setting, or you can select a program to use. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. The level of resistance can be changed throughout the workout. The mãoles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, seat yourself on the bike and adjust the seat to your height.

Select the desired option from the menu. You may have to start pedaling to turn it on. You can use the manual setting, or you can select a program to use. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. The level of resistance can be changed throughout the workout. The handles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

instrucoes: Comece by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. One to five boards, made out of 2x6's, can be screwed together and held in place by a training partner, bands, or just tucked under your shirt.

Tuck your pés underneath you and arch your costas. Using the bar to help support your peso, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your pés to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body posição throughout the movimento.

You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your ombros. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Abaixe the bar to the boards, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The cotovelos should be tucked in until lockout.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. One to five boards, made out of 2x6's, can be screwed together and held in place by a training partner, bands, or just tucked under your shirt.

Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.

You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to the boards, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

instrucoes: Assume a plank posição on the ground. You should be supporting your bodypeso on your toes and forebraços, keeping your tronco straight. Your forebraços should be shoulder-width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Pressing your palms firmly into the ground, extend through the cotovelos to raise your body from the ground. Mantenha your tronco rigid as you perform the movimento.
Lentamente lower your forebraços costas to the ground by allowing the cotovelos to flex.
Repita.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a plank position on the ground. You should be supporting your bodyweight on your toes and forearms, keeping your torso straight. Your forearms should be shoulder-width apart. This will be your starting position.
Pressing your palms firmly into the ground, extend through the elbows to raise your body from the ground. Keep your torso rigid as you perform the movement.
Slowly lower your forearms back to the ground by allowing the elbows to flex.
Repeat.

instrucoes: Position a bar in a rack at peito height.
Standing, take a shoulder width grip on the bar and step a yard or two costas, pés together and braços extended so that you are leaning on the bar. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by flexing the elbow, lowering yourself towards the bar.
Faça uma pausa, and then reverse the motion by extending the cotovelos.
Progress from bodypeso by adding chains over your ombros.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar in a rack at chest height.
Standing, take a shoulder width grip on the bar and step a yard or two back, feet together and arms extended so that you are leaning on the bar. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering yourself towards the bar.
Pause, and then reverse the motion by extending the elbows.
Progress from bodyweight by adding chains over your shoulders.

instrucoes: Position two equally loaded EZ bars on the ground next to each other. Ensure they are able to roll.
Assume a push-up posição over the bars, supporting your peso on your toes and mãos with your braços extended and body straight.
Place your mãos on the bars. This will be your posição inicial.
Using a slow and controlled motion, move your mãos away from the midline of your body, rolling the bars apart. Inhale during this portion of the motion.
After moving the bars as far apart as you can, return to the posição inicial by pulling them costas together. Exhale as you perform this movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Position two equally loaded EZ bars on the ground next to each other. Ensure they are able to roll.
Assume a push-up position over the bars, supporting your weight on your toes and hands with your arms extended and body straight.
Place your hands on the bars. This will be your starting position.
Using a slow and controlled motion, move your hands away from the midline of your body, rolling the bars apart. Inhale during this portion of the motion.
After moving the bars as far apart as you can, return to the starting position by pulling them back together. Exhale as you perform this movement.

instrucoes: Comece by taking a medium to wide grip on a pull-up apparatus with your palms facing away from you. From a hanging posição, tuck your joelhos to your peito, leaning costas and getting your pernas over your side of the pull-up apparatus. This will be your posição inicial.
Comecening with your braços straight, flex the cotovelos and retract the shoulder blades to raise your body up until your pernas contact the pull-up apparatus.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by taking a medium to wide grip on a pull-up apparatus with your palms facing away from you. From a hanging position, tuck your knees to your chest, leaning back and getting your legs over your side of the pull-up apparatus. This will be your starting position.
Beginning with your arms straight, flex the elbows and retract the shoulder blades to raise your body up until your legs contact the pull-up apparatus.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés shoulder width apart. You can place your mãos behind your head. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing your joelhos and quadris, sitting costas with your quadris.
Continue down to full depth if you are able,and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the posição inicial. As you squat, keep your head and peito up and push your joelhos out.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. You can place your hands behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing your knees and hips, sitting back with your hips.
Continue down to full depth if you are able,and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the starting position. As you squat, keep your head and chest up and push your knees out.

instrucoes: Comece standing with your pés shoulder width apart and your mãos on your quadris.

Step forward with one perna, flexing the joelhos to drop your quadris. Descend until your rear knee nearly touches the ground. Your posture should remain upright, and your front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of your lead foot and extend both joelhos to raise yourself costas up.
Step forward with your rear foot, repeating the lunge on the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing with your feet shoulder width apart and your hands on your hips.

Step forward with one leg, flexing the knees to drop your hips. Descend until your rear knee nearly touches the ground. Your posture should remain upright, and your front knee should stay above the front foot.
Drive through the heel of your lead foot and extend both knees to raise yourself back up.
Step forward with your rear foot, repeating the lunge on the opposite leg.

nome: Bosu Ball no cabo abdominal With Side Bends
nomeOriginal: Bosu Ball Cable Crunch With Side Bends
instrucoes: Connect a standard mãole to each braço of a cable machine, and posição them in the most downward posição.
Grab a Bosu Ball and posição it in front and center of the cable machine.
Deite-se on the Bosu Ball with the small of your costas arched around the ball. Your rear end should be close to the chão without touching it.
With both mãos, reach costas and grab the mãole of each cable.
With your pés posiçãoed in a wide stance, extend your braços straight out in front of you and in between your joelhos. Your mãos should be at knee level.
Mantenha your braços straight and in-line with the upward angle of the cable. Elevate your tronco in a crunching motion without dropping or bending your braços.
Maintain the rigid posição with your braços. Lentamente descend costas to the posição inicial with your costas arched around the Bosu Ball and your abdominals elongated.
Repita the same series of movimentos to failure.
Once you reach failure, keep your abs tight and raise your tronco into plank posição so your costas is elevated off the Bosu Ball.
Abaixe your braços down to your side; keep them straight. Start doing alternating side bends; reach for your heels! This finishing movimento will focus on your obliques.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a standard handle to each arm of a cable machine, and position them in the most downward position.
Grab a Bosu Ball and position it in front and center of the cable machine.
Lie down on the Bosu Ball with the small of your back arched around the ball. Your rear end should be close to the floor without touching it.
With both hands, reach back and grab the handle of each cable.
With your feet positioned in a wide stance, extend your arms straight out in front of you and in between your knees. Your hands should be at knee level.
Keep your arms straight and in-line with the upward angle of the cable. Elevate your torso in a crunching motion without dropping or bending your arms.
Maintain the rigid position with your arms. Slowly descend back to the starting position with your back arched around the Bosu Ball and your abdominals elongated.
Repeat the same series of movements to failure.
Once you reach failure, keep your abs tight and raise your torso into plank position so your back is elevated off the Bosu Ball.
Lower your arms down to your side; keep them straight. Start doing alternating side bends; reach for your heels! This finishing movement will focus on your obliques.

nome: Bottoms-Up Clean From The Hang Position
nomeOriginal: Bottoms-Up Clean From The Hang Position
instrucoes: Initiate the exercise by standing upright with a kettlebell in one mão.
Swing the kettlebell costas forcefully and then reverse the motion forcefully. Crush the kettlebell mãole as hard as possible and raise the kettlebell to your shoulder.
instrucoesOriginais: Initiate the exercise by standing upright with a kettlebell in one hand.
Swing the kettlebell back forcefully and then reverse the motion forcefully. Crush the kettlebell handle as hard as possible and raise the kettlebell to your shoulder.

instrucoes: Comece by lying on your costas on the ground. Your pernas should be straight and your braços at your side. This will be your posição inicial.

To perform the movimento, tuck the joelhos toward your peito by flexing the quadris and joelhos. Following this, extend your pernas directly above you so that they are perpendicular to the ground. Rotate and elevate your pelvis to raise your glutes from the chão.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by lying on your back on the ground. Your legs should be straight and your arms at your side. This will be your starting position.

To perform the movement, tuck the knees toward your chest by flexing the hips and knees. Following this, extend your legs directly above you so that they are perpendicular to the ground. Rotate and elevate your pelvis to raise your glutes from the floor.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Assume a relaxed stance facing the box or platform approximately an braço's length away. Arms should be down at the sides and pernas slightly bent.
Using the braços to aid in the initial burst, jump upward and forward, landing with pés simultaneously on top of the box or platform.
Immediately drop or jump costas down to the original starting place; then repeat the sequence.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a relaxed stance facing the box or platform approximately an arm's length away. Arms should be down at the sides and legs slightly bent.
Using the arms to aid in the initial burst, jump upward and forward, landing with feet simultaneously on top of the box or platform.
Immediately drop or jump back down to the original starting place; then repeat the sequence.

instrucoes: You will need several boxes lined up about 8 pés apart.
Comece facing the first box with one perna slightly behind the other.
Drive off the costas perna, attempting to gain as much height with the quadris as possible.

Immediately upon landing on the box, drive the other perna forward and upward to gain height and distance, leaping from the box. Land between the first two boxes with the same perna that landed on the first box.
Then, step to the next box and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need several boxes lined up about 8 feet apart.
Begin facing the first box with one leg slightly behind the other.
Drive off the back leg, attempting to gain as much height with the hips as possible.

Immediately upon landing on the box, drive the other leg forward and upward to gain height and distance, leaping from the box. Land between the first two boxes with the same leg that landed on the first box.
Then, step to the next box and repeat.

instrucoes: The box squat allows you to squat to desired depth and develop explosive strength in the squat movimento. Comece in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wider for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Mantenha your head facing forward.

With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Faça uma pausa when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.
Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.
instrucoesOriginais: The box squat allows you to squat to desired depth and develop explosive strength in the squat movement. Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.
Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.

instrucoes: Comece in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Set up the bands on the sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or halters so that there is appropriate tension. If halters are used, secure them so that they don't move. Also, ensure that the halters you are using are heavy enough for the bands that you are using. Additional plates can be used to hold the halters down. If more tension is needed, you can either widen the base on the chão or choke the bands. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wider for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Mantenha your head facing forward.

With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Faça uma pausa when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barra to the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Set up the bands on the sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or dumbbells so that there is appropriate tension. If dumbbells are used, secure them so that they don't move. Also, ensure that the dumbbells you are using are heavy enough for the bands that you are using. Additional plates can be used to hold the dumbbells down. If more tension is needed, you can either widen the base on the floor or choke the bands. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barbell to the rack.

instrucoes: Comece in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the chão at the top of the movimento.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wider for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Mantenha your head facing forward.

With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Faça uma pausa when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.
Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.
Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.

instrucoes: Lie on your side, with your upper braço against the foam roller. The upper braço should be more or less aligned with your body, with the outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Eleve your quadris off of the chão, supporting your peso on your braço and on your pés. Segure for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your side, with your upper arm against the foam roller. The upper arm should be more or less aligned with your body, with the outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Raise your hips off of the floor, supporting your weight on your arm and on your feet. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Sit on a Military Press Bench with a bar at shoulder level with a pronated grip (palms facing forward). Dica: Your grip should be wider than shoulder width and it should create a 90-degree angle between the forebraço and the upper braço as the barra goes down. This is your posição inicial.
Once you pick up the barra with the correct grip, lift the bar up over your head by locking your braços.
Now lower the bar down to the costas of the head slowly as you inhale.
Levante the bar costas up to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Abaixe the bar down to the posição inicial slowly as you inhale. This is one repetition.
Alternate in this manner until you complete the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a Military Press Bench with a bar at shoulder level with a pronated grip (palms facing forward). Tip: Your grip should be wider than shoulder width and it should create a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm as the barbell goes down. This is your starting position.
Once you pick up the barbell with the correct grip, lift the bar up over your head by locking your arms.
Now lower the bar down to the back of the head slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar back up to the starting position as you exhale.
Lower the bar down to the starting position slowly as you inhale. This is one repetition.
Alternate in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece a pushup posição but with your cotovelos on the ground and resting on your forebraços. Your braços should be bent at a 90 degree angle.
Arch your costas slightly out rather than keeping your costas completely straight.

Eleve your glutes toward the ceiling, squeezing your abs tightly to close the distance between your ribcage and quadris. The end result will be that you'll end up in a high bridge posição. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Abaixe costas down slowly to your posição inicial as you inspire. Dica: Don't let your costas sag downwards.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin a pushup position but with your elbows on the ground and resting on your forearms. Your arms should be bent at a 90 degree angle.
Arch your back slightly out rather than keeping your back completely straight.

Raise your glutes toward the ceiling, squeezing your abs tightly to close the distance between your ribcage and hips. The end result will be that you'll end up in a high bridge position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lower back down slowly to your starting position as you breathe in. Tip: Don't let your back sag downwards.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie flat on the chão on your costas with the mãos by your side and your joelhos bent. Your pés should be placed around shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.
Pushing mainly with your heels, lift your quadris off the chão while keeping your costas straight. Breathe out as you perform this part of the motion and hold at the top for a second.
Lentamente go costas to the posição inicial as you inspire.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on the floor on your back with the hands by your side and your knees bent. Your feet should be placed around shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Pushing mainly with your heels, lift your hips off the floor while keeping your back straight. Breathe out as you perform this part of the motion and hold at the top for a second.
Slowly go back to the starting position as you breathe in.

instrucoes: Sit on the machine with your costas flat on the pad.
Take hold of the mãoles. Dica: Your upper braços should be posiçãoed parallel to the chão; adjust the machine accordingly. This will be your posição inicial.
Push the mãoles together slowly as you squeeze your peito in the middle. Breathe out during this part of the motion and hold the contraction for a second.
Retorne costas to the posição inicial slowly as you inhale until your peito muscles are fully stretched.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on the machine with your back flat on the pad.
Take hold of the handles. Tip: Your upper arms should be positioned parallel to the floor; adjust the machine accordingly. This will be your starting position.
Push the handles together slowly as you squeeze your chest in the middle. Breathe out during this part of the motion and hold the contraction for a second.
Return back to the starting position slowly as you inhale until your chest muscles are fully stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the mãoles. Your upper braços should be about 45 degrees to the body, with your head and peito up. The cotovelos should be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by extending through the elbow, pressing the mãoles together straight in front of you. Mantenha your shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movimento.
After pausing at full extension, return to th posição inicial, keeping tension on the cables.
You can also execute this movimento with your costas off the pad, at an incline or decline, or alternate mãos.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the weight to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Your upper arms should be about 45 degrees to the body, with your head and chest up. The elbows should be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together straight in front of you. Keep your shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movement.
After pausing at full extension, return to th starting position, keeping tension on the cables.
You can also execute this movement with your back off the pad, at an incline or decline, or alternate hands.

instrucoes: To get yourself into the posição inicial, place the pulleys on a high posição (above your head), select the resistance to be used and hold the pulleys in each mão.

Step forward in front of an imaginary straight line between both pulleys while pulling your braços together in front of you. Your tronco should have a small forward bend from the waist. This will be your posição inicial.

With a slight bend on your cotovelos in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon, extend your braços to the side (straight out at both sides) in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha in mind that throughout the movimento, the braços and tronco should remain stationary; the movimento should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Retorne your braços costas to the posição inicial as you expire. Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the pesos.
Segure for a second at the posição inicial and repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: To get yourself into the starting position, place the pulleys on a high position (above your head), select the resistance to be used and hold the pulleys in each hand.

Step forward in front of an imaginary straight line between both pulleys while pulling your arms together in front of you. Your torso should have a small forward bend from the waist. This will be your starting position.

With a slight bend on your elbows in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon, extend your arms to the side (straight out at both sides) in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your chest. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the arms and torso should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return your arms back to the starting position as you breathe out. Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the weights.
Hold for a second at the starting position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Kneel below a high pulley that contains a rope attachment.
Grasp cable rope attachment and lower the rope until your mãos are placed next to your face.
Flex your quadris slightly and allow the peso to hyperextend the lower costas. This will be your posição inicial.

With the quadris stationary, flex the waist as you contract the abs so that the cotovelos travel towards the middle of the thighs. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento and hold the contraction for a second.

Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inhale. Dica: Make sure that you keep constant tension on the abs throughout the movimento. Also, do not choose a peso so heavy that the lower costas mãoles the brunt of the work.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Kneel below a high pulley that contains a rope attachment.
Grasp cable rope attachment and lower the rope until your hands are placed next to your face.
Flex your hips slightly and allow the weight to hyperextend the lower back. This will be your starting position.

With the hips stationary, flex the waist as you contract the abs so that the elbows travel towards the middle of the thighs. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction for a second.

Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale. Tip: Make sure that you keep constant tension on the abs throughout the movement. Also, do not choose a weight so heavy that the lower back handles the brunt of the work.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Move the cables to the bottom of the towers and select an appropriate peso. Stand directly in between the uprights.
To begin, squat down be flexing your quadris and joelhos until you can reach the mãoles.
After grasping them, begin your ascent. Driving through your heels extend your quadris and joelhos keeping your mãos hanging at your side. Mantenha your head and peito up throughout the movimento.
After reaching a full standing posição, Retorne to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Move the cables to the bottom of the towers and select an appropriate weight. Stand directly in between the uprights.
To begin, squat down be flexing your hips and knees until you can reach the handles.
After grasping them, begin your ascent. Driving through your heels extend your hips and knees keeping your hands hanging at your side. Keep your head and chest up throughout the movement.
After reaching a full standing position, Return to the starting position and repeat.

nome: no cabo Hammer roscas - Rope Attachment
instrucoes: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley and stand facing the machine about 12 inches away from it.
Grasp the rope with a neutral (palms-in) grip and stand straight up keeping the natural arch of the costas and your tronco stationary.
Put your cotovelos in by your side and keep them there stationary during the entire movimento. Dica: Only the forebraços should move; not your upper braços. This will be your posição inicial.
Using your biceps, pull your braços up as you exhale until your biceps touch your forebraços. Dica: Remember to keep the cotovelos in and your upper braços stationary.
After a 1 second contraction where you squeeze your biceps, slowly start to bring the peso costas to the original posição.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley and stand facing the machine about 12 inches away from it.
Grasp the rope with a neutral (palms-in) grip and stand straight up keeping the natural arch of the back and your torso stationary.
Put your elbows in by your side and keep them there stationary during the entire movement. Tip: Only the forearms should move; not your upper arms. This will be your starting position.
Using your biceps, pull your arms up as you exhale until your biceps touch your forearms. Tip: Remember to keep the elbows in and your upper arms stationary.
After a 1 second contraction where you squeeze your biceps, slowly start to bring the weight back to the original position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand in front of a low pulley facing forward with one perna next to the pulley and the other one away.
Attach the ankle cuff to the cable and also to the ankle of the perna that is next to the pulley.
Now step out and away from the stack with a wide stance and grasp the bar of the pulley system.
Stand on the foot that does not have the ankle cuff (the far foot) and allow the perna with the cuff to be pulled towards the low pulley. This will be your posição inicial.
Now perform the movimento by moving the perna with the ankle cuff in front of the far perna by using the inner thighs to abduct the hip. Breathe out during this portion of the movimento.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then repeat the same movimento with the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand in front of a low pulley facing forward with one leg next to the pulley and the other one away.
Attach the ankle cuff to the cable and also to the ankle of the leg that is next to the pulley.
Now step out and away from the stack with a wide stance and grasp the bar of the pulley system.
Stand on the foot that does not have the ankle cuff (the far foot) and allow the leg with the cuff to be pulled towards the low pulley. This will be your starting position.
Now perform the movement by moving the leg with the ankle cuff in front of the far leg by using the inner thighs to abduct the hip. Breathe out during this portion of the movement.
Slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then repeat the same movement with the opposite leg.

instrucoes: Lie on incline an bench facing away from a high pulley machine that has a straight bar attachment on it.

Grasp the straight bar attachment overhead with a pronated (overmão; palms down) shoulder width grip and extend your braços in front of you. The bar should be around 2 inches away from your upper thighs. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, lift your braços costas in a semi circle until the bar is straight over your head. Breathe in during this portion of the movimento.
Lentamente go costas to the posição inicial using your lats and hold the contraction once you reach the posição inicial. Breathe out during the execution of this movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on incline an bench facing away from a high pulley machine that has a straight bar attachment on it.

Grasp the straight bar attachment overhead with a pronated (overhand; palms down) shoulder width grip and extend your arms in front of you. The bar should be around 2 inches away from your upper thighs. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the upper arms stationary, lift your arms back in a semi circle until the bar is straight over your head. Breathe in during this portion of the movement.
Slowly go back to the starting position using your lats and hold the contraction once you reach the starting position. Breathe out during the execution of this movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on incline an bench facing away from a high pulley machine that has a straight bar attachment on it.

Grasp the straight bar attachment overhead with a pronated (overmão; palms down) narrow grip (less than shoulder width) and keep your cotovelos tucked in to your sides. Your upper braços should create around a 25 degree angle when measured from the chão.
Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, extend the braços as you flex the triceps. Breathe out during this portion of the movimento and hold the contraction for a second.
Lentamente go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on incline an bench facing away from a high pulley machine that has a straight bar attachment on it.

Grasp the straight bar attachment overhead with a pronated (overhand; palms down) narrow grip (less than shoulder width) and keep your elbows tucked in to your sides. Your upper arms should create around a 25 degree angle when measured from the floor.
Keeping the upper arms stationary, extend the arms as you flex the triceps. Breathe out during this portion of the movement and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit next to a low pulley sideways (with pernas stretched in front of you or crossed) and grasp the single mão cable attachment with the braço nearest to the cable. Dica: If you can adjust the pulley's height, you can use a flat bench to sit on instead.
Position the elbow against your side with the elbow bent at 90° and the braço pointing towards the pulley. This will be your posição inicial.

Pull the single mão cable attachment toward your body by internally rotating your shoulder until your forebraço is across your abs. You will be creating an imaginary semi-circle. Dica: The forebraço should be perpendicular to your tronco at all times.
Lentamente go costas to the initial posição.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then repeat the movimento with the next braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit next to a low pulley sideways (with legs stretched in front of you or crossed) and grasp the single hand cable attachment with the arm nearest to the cable. Tip: If you can adjust the pulley's height, you can use a flat bench to sit on instead.
Position the elbow against your side with the elbow bent at 90° and the arm pointing towards the pulley. This will be your starting position.

Pull the single hand cable attachment toward your body by internally rotating your shoulder until your forearm is across your abs. You will be creating an imaginary semi-circle. Tip: The forearm should be perpendicular to your torso at all times.
Slowly go back to the initial position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then repeat the movement with the next arm.

instrucoes: Comece by moving the pulleys to the high posição, select the resistance to be used, and take a mãole in each mão.
Stand directly between both pulleys with your braços extended out to your sides. Your head and peito should be up while your braços form a "T". This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing the cotovelos extended, pull your braços straight to your sides.
Retorne your braços costas to the posição inicial after a pause at the peak contraction.
Continue the movimento for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by moving the pulleys to the high position, select the resistance to be used, and take a handle in each hand.
Stand directly between both pulleys with your arms extended out to your sides. Your head and chest should be up while your arms form a "T". This will be your starting position.
Keeping the elbows extended, pull your arms straight to your sides.
Return your arms back to the starting position after a pause at the peak contraction.
Continue the movement for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Connect a rope attachment to a tower, and move the cable to the lowest pulley posição. Stand with your side to the cable with a wide stance, and grab the rope with both mãos.
Twist your body away from the pulley as you bring the rope over your shoulder like you're performing a judo flip.
Shift your peso between your pés as you twist and crunch forward, pulling the cable downward.
