Press yourself costas up to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a pause at the contracted posição, repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor and place your hands on an upright dumbbell. Supporting your weight on your toes and hands, keep your torso rigid and your elbows in with your arms straight. This will be your starting position.
Lower your body, allowing the elbows to flex while you inhale. Keep your body straight, not allowing your hips to rise or sag.
Press yourself back up to the starting position by extending the elbows. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Segure a barra with both mãos, palms up and a few inches apart.

Stand with your tronco straight and your head up. Your pés should be about shoulder width and your cotovelos close to your tronco. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: You will keep your upper braços and cotovelos stationary throughout the movimento.

Curl the bar up in a semicircular motion until the forebraços touch your biceps. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento and contract your biceps hard for a second at the top. Dica: Avoid bending the costas or using swinging motions as you lift the peso. Only the forebraços should move.
Lentamente go costas down to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a barbell with both hands, palms up and a few inches apart.

Stand with your torso straight and your head up. Your feet should be about shoulder width and your elbows close to your torso. This will be your starting position. Tip: You will keep your upper arms and elbows stationary throughout the movement.

Curl the bar up in a semicircular motion until the forearms touch your biceps. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and contract your biceps hard for a second at the top. Tip: Avoid bending the back or using swinging motions as you lift the weight. Only the forearms should move.
Slowly go back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece by lying on your costas on the ground. Your pernas should be straight and your braços extended behind your head. This will be your posição inicial.

To perform the movimento, tuck the joelhos toward your peito, rotating your pelvis to lift your glutes from the chão. As you do so, flex the spine, bringing your braços costas over your head to perform a simultaneous crunch motion.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by lying on your back on the ground. Your legs should be straight and your arms extended behind your head. This will be your starting position.

To perform the movement, tuck the knees toward your chest, rotating your pelvis to lift your glutes from the floor. As you do so, flex the spine, bringing your arms back over your head to perform a simultaneous crunch motion.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: With the peso loaded, take a zurcher hold on the end of the implement. Place the bar in the crook of the elbow and hold onto your wrist. Try to keep the peso off of the forebraços.

Comece by lifting the peso from the ground. Mantenha a tight, upright posture as you being to walk, taking short, fast steps. Look up and away as you turn in a circle. Do not hold your breath during the event. Continue walking until you complete one or more complete turns.
instrucoesOriginais: With the weight loaded, take a zurcher hold on the end of the implement. Place the bar in the crook of the elbow and hold onto your wrist. Try to keep the weight off of the forearms.

Begin by lifting the weight from the ground. Keep a tight, upright posture as you being to walk, taking short, fast steps. Look up and away as you turn in a circle. Do not hold your breath during the event. Continue walking until you complete one or more complete turns.

instrucoes: Sente-se on a flat bench with one halter in front of you between your pernas. Your pernas should be spread with your joelhos bent and pés on the chão.

Use your right braço to pick the halter up. Place the costas of your right upper braço on the top of your inner right thigh. Rotate the palm of your mão until it is facing forward away from your thigh. Dica: Your braço should be extended and the halter should be above the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the pesos forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Dica: At the top of the movimento make sure that the little finger of your braço is higher than your thumb. This guarantees a good contraction. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to posição inicial as your inspire. Caution: Avoid swinging motions at any time.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições. Then repeat the movimento with the left braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a flat bench with one dumbbell in front of you between your legs. Your legs should be spread with your knees bent and feet on the floor.

Use your right arm to pick the dumbbell up. Place the back of your right upper arm on the top of your inner right thigh. Rotate the palm of your hand until it is facing forward away from your thigh. Tip: Your arm should be extended and the dumbbell should be above the floor. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the weights forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Tip: At the top of the movement make sure that the little finger of your arm is higher than your thumb. This guarantees a good contraction. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to starting position as your breathe in. Caution: Avoid swinging motions at any time.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. Then repeat the movement with the left arm.

instrucoes: Lie flat on your costas and flexione os joelhos about 60 degrees.
Mantenha your pés flat on the chão and place your mãos loosely behind your head. This will be your posição inicial.

Now curl up and bring your right elbow and shoulder across your body while bring your left knee in toward your left shoulder at the same time. Reach with your elbow and try to touch your knee. Exhale as you perform this movimento. Dica: Try to bring your shoulder up towards your knee rather than just your elbow and remember that the key is to contract the abs as you perform the movimento; not just to move the elbow.
Now go costas down to the posição inicial as you inhale and repeat with the left elbow and the right knee.
Continue alternating in this manner until all prescribed repetitions are done.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on your back and bend your knees about 60 degrees.
Keep your feet flat on the floor and place your hands loosely behind your head. This will be your starting position.

Now curl up and bring your right elbow and shoulder across your body while bring your left knee in toward your left shoulder at the same time. Reach with your elbow and try to touch your knee. Exhale as you perform this movement. Tip: Try to bring your shoulder up towards your knee rather than just your elbow and remember that the key is to contract the abs as you perform the movement; not just to move the elbow.
Now go back down to the starting position as you inhale and repeat with the left elbow and the right knee.
Continue alternating in this manner until all prescribed repetitions are done.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with a halter in each mão. Your mãos should be down at your side with your palms facing in.

While keeping your palms facing in and without twisting your braço, curl the halter of the right braço up towards your left shoulder as you exhale. Touch the top of the halter to your shoulder and hold the contraction for a second.
Lentamente lower the halter along the same path as you inhale and then repeat the same movimento for the left braço.
Continue alternating in this fashion until the número recomendado de repetições is performed for each braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand. Your hands should be down at your side with your palms facing in.

While keeping your palms facing in and without twisting your arm, curl the dumbbell of the right arm up towards your left shoulder as you exhale. Touch the top of the dumbbell to your shoulder and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbell along the same path as you inhale and then repeat the same movement for the left arm.
Continue alternating in this fashion until the recommended amount of repetitions is performed for each arm.

instrucoes: Secure an exercise band around a stationary post.
While facing away from the post, grab the mãoles on both ends of the band and step forward enough to create tension on the band.

Eleve your braços to the sides, parallel to the chão, perpendicular to your tronco (your tronco and the braços should resemble the letter "T") and with the palms facing forward. Have them extended with a slight bend at the cotovelos. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping your braços straight, bring them across your peito in a semicircular motion to the front as you exhale and flex your pecs. Segure the contraction for a second.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Perform for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure an exercise band around a stationary post.
While facing away from the post, grab the handles on both ends of the band and step forward enough to create tension on the band.

Raise your arms to the sides, parallel to the floor, perpendicular to your torso (your torso and the arms should resemble the letter "T") and with the palms facing forward. Have them extended with a slight bend at the elbows. This will be your starting position.
While keeping your arms straight, bring them across your chest in a semicircular motion to the front as you exhale and flex your pecs. Hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Perform for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping costas with one foot and flexing the quadris and front knee. As you do so, rotate your tronco across the front perna.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.

instrucoes: In the crucifix, you statically hold pesos out to the side for time. While the event can be practiced using halters, it is best to practice with one of the various implements used, such as axes and hammers, as it feels different.

Comece standing, and raise your braços out to the side holding the implements. Your braços should be parallel to the ground. In competition, judges or sensors are used to let you know when you break parallel. Segure for as long as you can. Typically, the pesos should be heavy enough that you fail in 30-60 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: In the crucifix, you statically hold weights out to the side for time. While the event can be practiced using dumbbells, it is best to practice with one of the various implements used, such as axes and hammers, as it feels different.

Begin standing, and raise your arms out to the side holding the implements. Your arms should be parallel to the ground. In competition, judges or sensors are used to let you know when you break parallel. Hold for as long as you can. Typically, the weights should be heavy enough that you fail in 30-60 seconds.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão with your costas flat and joelhos bent with around a 60-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves.
Mantenha your pés flat on the chão and stretch your braços overhead with your palms crossed. This will be your posição inicial.

Curl your upper body forward and bring your shoulder blades just off the chão. At all times, keep your braços aligned with your head, neck and shoulder. Don't move them forward from that posição. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento and hold the contraction for a second.
Lentamente lower down to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor with your back flat and knees bent with around a 60-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves.
Keep your feet flat on the floor and stretch your arms overhead with your palms crossed. This will be your starting position.

Curl your upper body forward and bring your shoulder blades just off the floor. At all times, keep your arms aligned with your head, neck and shoulder. Don't move them forward from that position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly lower down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie flat on your costas with your pés resting on an exercise ball and your joelhos bent at a 90 degree angle.
Place your pés three to four inches apart and point your toes inward so they touch.
Place your mãos lightly on either side of your head keeping your cotovelos in. Dica: Don't lock your fingers behind your head.
Push the small of your costas down in the chão in order to better isolate your abdominal muscles. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece to roll your ombros off the chão and continue to push down as hard as you can with your lower costas. Your ombros should come up off the chão only about four inches, and your lower costas should remain on the chão. Breathe out as you execute this portion of the movimento. Squeeze your abdominals hard at the top of the contraction and hold for a second. Dica: Focus on a slow, controlled movimento. Refrain from using momentum at any time.
Lentamente go costas down to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on your back with your feet resting on an exercise ball and your knees bent at a 90 degree angle.
Place your feet three to four inches apart and point your toes inward so they touch.
Place your hands lightly on either side of your head keeping your elbows in. Tip: Don't lock your fingers behind your head.
Push the small of your back down in the floor in order to better isolate your abdominal muscles. This will be your starting position.

Begin to roll your shoulders off the floor and continue to push down as hard as you can with your lower back. Your shoulders should come up off the floor only about four inches, and your lower back should remain on the floor. Breathe out as you execute this portion of the movement. Squeeze your abdominals hard at the top of the contraction and hold for a second. Tip: Focus on a slow, controlled movement. Refrain from using momentum at any time.
Slowly go back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie flat on your costas with your pés flat on the ground, or resting on a bench with your joelhos bent at a 90 degree angle. If you are resting your pés on a bench, place them three to four inches apart and point your toes inward so they touch.
Now place your mãos lightly on either side of your head keeping your cotovelos in. Dica: Don't lock your fingers behind your head.
While pushing the small of your costas down in the chão to better isolate your abdominal muscles, begin to roll your ombros off the chão.

Continue to push down as hard as you can with your lower costas as you contract your abdominals and exhale. Your ombros should come up off the chão only about four inches, and your lower costas should remain on the chão. At the top of the movimento, contract your abdominals hard and keep the contraction for a second. Dica: Focus on slow, controlled movimento - don't cheat yourself by using momentum.
After the one second contraction, begin to come down slowly again to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on your back with your feet flat on the ground, or resting on a bench with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle. If you are resting your feet on a bench, place them three to four inches apart and point your toes inward so they touch.
Now place your hands lightly on either side of your head keeping your elbows in. Tip: Don't lock your fingers behind your head.
While pushing the small of your back down in the floor to better isolate your abdominal muscles, begin to roll your shoulders off the floor.

Continue to push down as hard as you can with your lower back as you contract your abdominals and exhale. Your shoulders should come up off the floor only about four inches, and your lower back should remain on the floor. At the top of the movement, contract your abdominals hard and keep the contraction for a second. Tip: Focus on slow, controlled movement - don't cheat yourself by using momentum.
After the one second contraction, begin to come down slowly again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Take a halter in each mão with a pronated grip in a standing posição. Eleve your upper braços so that they are parallel to the chão, allowing your lower braços to hang in the "scarecrow" posição. This will be your posição inicial.

To initiate the movimento, externally rotate the ombros to move the upper braço 180 degrees. Mantenha the upper braços in place, rotating the upper braços until the wrists are directly above the cotovelos, the forebraços perpendicular to the chão.
Now press the halters by extending at the cotovelos, straightening your braços overhead.
Retorne to the posição inicial as you inspire by reversing the steps.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Take a dumbbell in each hand with a pronated grip in a standing position. Raise your upper arms so that they are parallel to the floor, allowing your lower arms to hang in the "scarecrow" position. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, externally rotate the shoulders to move the upper arm 180 degrees. Keep the upper arms in place, rotating the upper arms until the wrists are directly above the elbows, the forearms perpendicular to the floor.
Now press the dumbbells by extending at the elbows, straightening your arms overhead.
Return to the starting position as you breathe in by reversing the steps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit up on the chão.
Cross your right perna over your left, keeping the knee bent. Your left perna is straight and down on the chão.
Place your left braço on your right perna and your right mão on the chão.
Rotate your upper body to the right, and hold for 10-20 seconds. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit up on the floor.
Cross your right leg over your left, keeping the knee bent. Your left leg is straight and down on the floor.
Place your left arm on your right leg and your right hand on the floor.
Rotate your upper body to the right, and hold for 10-20 seconds. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Comece lying on your costas with your mãos extended above you toward the ceiling.
Bring your pés, joelhos, and quadris up to 90 degrees.

Exhale hard to bring your ribcage down and flatten your costas onto the chão, rotating your pelvis up and squeezing your glutes. Segure this posição throughout the movimento. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the exercise by extending one perna, straightening the knee and hip to bring the perna just above the ground.
Maintain the posição of your lumbar and pelvis as you perform the movimento, as your costas is going to want to arch.
Stay tight and return the working perna to the posição inicial.
Repita on the opposite side, alternating until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin lying on your back with your hands extended above you toward the ceiling.
Bring your feet, knees, and hips up to 90 degrees.

Exhale hard to bring your ribcage down and flatten your back onto the floor, rotating your pelvis up and squeezing your glutes. Hold this position throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the exercise by extending one leg, straightening the knee and hip to bring the leg just above the ground.
Maintain the position of your lumbar and pelvis as you perform the movement, as your back is going to want to arch.
Stay tight and return the working leg to the starting position.
Repeat on the opposite side, alternating until the set is complete.

instrucoes: To deadlift with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up. For long bands, they will need to be anchored to a secure base, such as heavy halters or a rack.

With your pés, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your quadris and bend the joelhos until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your peito up and your costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. After the bar passes the joelhos, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your quadris forward into the bar.
Abaixe the bar by bending at the quadris and guiding it to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: To deadlift with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up. For long bands, they will need to be anchored to a secure base, such as heavy dumbbells or a rack.

With your feet, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and bend the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

instrucoes: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater peso increase as you lift.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over your pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overmão grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets. With your pés, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your quadris and bend the joelhos until your shins contact the bar.

Look forward with your head, keep your peito up and your costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. After the bar passes the joelhos, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your quadris forward into the bar.
Abaixe the bar by bending at the quadris and guiding it to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater weight increase as you lift.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets. With your feet, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and bend the knees until your shins contact the bar.

Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.

Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movimento between the forebraços and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. The braços should be perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: In order to protect your rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barra off the rack.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your lower peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços and squeeze your peito in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up).
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.

Using a medium width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper arms), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. The arms should be perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: In order to protect your rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barbell off the rack.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your lower chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up).
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

nome: Decline Close-Grip Bench To Skull Crusher
nomeOriginal: Decline Close-Grip Bench To Skull Crusher
instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.

Using a close grip (a grip that is slightly less than shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked and cotovelos in. The braços should be perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: In order to protect your rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barra off the rack.
Now lower the bar down to your lower peito as you inspire. Mantenha the cotovelos in as you perform this movimento.
Using the triceps to push the bar costas up, press it costas to the posição inicial as you exhale.

As you inspire and you keep the upper braços stationary, bring the bar down slowly by moving your forebraços in a semicircular motion towards you until you feel the bar slightly touch your forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Levante the bar costas to the posição inicial by contraindo the triceps and exhaling.
Repita steps 3-6 until the número recomendado de repetições is performed.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.

Using a close grip (a grip that is slightly less than shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked and elbows in. The arms should be perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: In order to protect your rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barbell off the rack.
Now lower the bar down to your lower chest as you breathe in. Keep the elbows in as you perform this movement.
Using the triceps to push the bar back up, press it back to the starting position as you exhale.

As you breathe in and you keep the upper arms stationary, bring the bar down slowly by moving your forearms in a semicircular motion towards you until you feel the bar slightly touch your forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lift the bar back to the starting position by contracting the triceps and exhaling.
Repeat steps 3-6 until the recommended amount of repetitions is performed.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down.
Now place your mãos lightly on either side of your head keeping your cotovelos in. Dica: Don't lock your fingers behind your head.
While pushing the small of your costas down in the bench to better isolate your abdominal muscles, begin to roll your ombros off it.

Continue to push down as hard as you can with your lower costas as you contract your abdominals and exhale. Your ombros should come up off the bench only about four inches, and your lower costas should remain on the bench. At the top of the movimento, contract your abdominals hard and keep the contraction for a second. Dica: Focus on slow, controlled movimento - don't cheat yourself by using momentum.
After the one second contraction, begin to come down slowly again to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and lie down.
Now place your hands lightly on either side of your head keeping your elbows in. Tip: Don't lock your fingers behind your head.
While pushing the small of your back down in the bench to better isolate your abdominal muscles, begin to roll your shoulders off it.

Continue to push down as hard as you can with your lower back as you contract your abdominals and exhale. Your shoulders should come up off the bench only about four inches, and your lower back should remain on the bench. At the top of the movement, contract your abdominals hard and keep the contraction for a second. Tip: Focus on slow, controlled movement - don't cheat yourself by using momentum.
After the one second contraction, begin to come down slowly again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a halter on each mão on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.
Once you are laying down, move the halters in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your mãos are facing away from you. This will be your posição inicial.
Bring down the pesos slowly to your side as you expire. Mantenha full control of the halters at all times. Dica: Throughout the motion, the forebraços should always be perpendicular to the chão.

As you expire, push the halters up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, squeeze your peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up..
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a dumbbell on each hand on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.
Once you are laying down, move the dumbbells in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Bring down the weights slowly to your side as you breathe out. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times. Tip: Throughout the motion, the forearms should always be perpendicular to the floor.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, squeeze your chest, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up..
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a halter on each mão on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.

Once you are laying down, move the halters in front of you at shoulder width. The palms of the mãos should be facing each other and the braços should be perpendicular to the chão and fully extended. This will be your posição inicial.

With a slight bend on your cotovelos in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon, lower your braços out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha in mind that throughout the movimento, the braços should remain stationary; the movimento should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Retorne your braços costas to the posição inicial as you squeeze your peito muscles and expire. Dica: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the pesos.
Segure for a second at the contracted posição and repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a dumbbell on each hand on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.

Once you are laying down, move the dumbbells in front of you at shoulder width. The palms of the hands should be facing each other and the arms should be perpendicular to the floor and fully extended. This will be your starting position.

With a slight bend on your elbows in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon, lower your arms out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your chest. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the arms should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return your arms back to the starting position as you squeeze your chest muscles and breathe out. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the weights.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a halter on each mão on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.

Once you are laying down, move the halters in front of you at shoulder width. The palms of the mãos should be facing each other and the braços should be perpendicular to the chão and fully extended. This will be your posição inicial.

As you inspire and you keep the upper braços stationary (and cotovelos in), bring the halters down slowly by moving your forebraços in a semicircular motion towards you until your thumbs are next to your ears. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Levante the halters costas to the posição inicial by contraindo the triceps and exhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and lie down with a dumbbell on each hand on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.

Once you are laying down, move the dumbbells in front of you at shoulder width. The palms of the hands should be facing each other and the arms should be perpendicular to the floor and fully extended. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe in and you keep the upper arms stationary (and elbows in), bring the dumbbells down slowly by moving your forearms in a semicircular motion towards you until your thumbs are next to your ears. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lift the dumbbells back to the starting position by contracting the triceps and exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.

Using a close grip (a grip that is slightly less than shoulder width), lift the EZ bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked and cotovelos in. The braços should be perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: In order to protect your rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barra off the rack.

As you inspire and you keep the upper braços stationary, bring the bar down slowly by moving your forebraços in a semicircular motion towards you until you feel the bar slightly touch your forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Levante the bar costas to the posição inicial by contraindo the triceps and exhaling.
Repita until the número recomendado de repetições is performed.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.

Using a close grip (a grip that is slightly less than shoulder width), lift the EZ bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked and elbows in. The arms should be perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: In order to protect your rotator cuff, it is best if you have a spotter help you lift the barbell off the rack.

As you breathe in and you keep the upper arms stationary, bring the bar down slowly by moving your forearms in a semicircular motion towards you until you feel the bar slightly touch your forehead. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.
Lift the bar back to the starting position by contracting the triceps and exhaling.
Repeat until the recommended amount of repetitions is performed.

instrucoes: Secure your pernas at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.
Eleve your upper body off the bench until your tronco is about 35-45 degrees if measured from the chão.
Put one mão beside your head and the other on your thigh. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your upper body slowly from the posição inicial while turning your tronco to the left. Continue crunching up as you exhale until your right elbow touches your left knee. Segure this contracted posição for a second. Dica: Focus on keeping your abs tight and keeping the movimento slow and controlled.
Abaixe your body costas down slowly to the posição inicial as you inhale.

After completing one set on the right for the número recomendado de repetições, switch to your left side. Dica: Focus on really twisting your tronco and feeling the contraction when you are in the up posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your legs at the end of the decline bench and slowly lay down on the bench.
Raise your upper body off the bench until your torso is about 35-45 degrees if measured from the floor.
Put one hand beside your head and the other on your thigh. This will be your starting position.

Raise your upper body slowly from the starting position while turning your torso to the left. Continue crunching up as you exhale until your right elbow touches your left knee. Hold this contracted position for a second. Tip: Focus on keeping your abs tight and keeping the movement slow and controlled.
Lower your body back down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.

After completing one set on the right for the recommended amount of repetitions, switch to your left side. Tip: Focus on really twisting your torso and feeling the contraction when you are in the up position.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão face down and place your mãos about 36 inches apart while holding your tronco up at braços length. Move your pés up to a box or bench. This will be your posição inicial.
Next, lower yourself downward until your peito almost touches the chão as you inhale.
Now expire and press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial while squeezing your peito.
After a brief pause at the top contracted posição, you can begin to lower yourself downward again for as many repetitions as needed.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands about 36 inches apart while holding your torso up at arms length. Move your feet up to a box or bench. This will be your starting position.
Next, lower yourself downward until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Now breathe out and press your upper body back up to the starting position while squeezing your chest.
After a brief pause at the top contracted position, you can begin to lower yourself downward again for as many repetitions as needed.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas on a decline bench and hold on to the top of the bench with both mãos. Don't let your body slip down from this posição.

Segure your pernas parallel to the chão using your abs to hold them there while keeping your joelhos and pés together. Dica: Your pernas should be fully extended with a slight bend on the knee. This will be your posição inicial.

While exhaling, move your pernas towards the tronco as you roll your pelvis costaswards and you raise your quadris off the bench. At the end of this movimento your joelhos will be touching your peito.
Segure the contraction for a second and move your pernas costas to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back on a decline bench and hold on to the top of the bench with both hands. Don't let your body slip down from this position.

Hold your legs parallel to the floor using your abs to hold them there while keeping your knees and feet together. Tip: Your legs should be fully extended with a slight bend on the knee. This will be your starting position.
While exhaling, move your legs towards the torso as you roll your pelvis backwards and you raise your hips off the bench. At the end of this movement your knees will be touching your chest.
Hold the contraction for a second and move your legs back to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a decline bench underneath the Smith machine. Now place the barra at a height that you can reach when lying down and your braços are almost fully extended. Using a pronated grip that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços extended. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inhale, lower the bar under control by allowing the cotovelos to flex, lightly contacting the tronco.
After a brief pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos, exhaling as you do so.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When the set is complete, lock the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a decline bench underneath the Smith machine. Now place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended. Using a pronated grip that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, lower the bar under control by allowing the elbows to flex, lightly contacting the torso.
After a brief pause, bring the bar back to the starting position by extending the elbows, exhaling as you do so.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When the set is complete, lock the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Comece by having a platform or peso plates that you can stand on, usually 1-3 inches in height. Approach the bar so that it is centered over your pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overmão grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your pés, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your quadris and bend the joelhos until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your peito up and your costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. After the bar passes the joelhos, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your quadris forward into the bar.
Abaixe the bar by bending at the quadris and guiding it to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by having a platform or weight plates that you can stand on, usually 1-3 inches in height. Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your feet, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and bend the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

instrucoes: For this drill you will need two boxes or benches, one 12 to 16 inches high and the other 22 to 26 inches high.

Stand on one of the two boxes with braços at the sides; pés should be together and slightly off the edge as in the depth jump. Place the other box approximately two or three pés in front of and facing the performer.
Comece by dropping off the initial box, landing and simultaneously taking off with both pés.
Rebound by driving upward and outward as intensely as possible, using the braços and full extension of the body to jump onto the higher box. Again, allow the pernas to absorb the impact.
instrucoesOriginais: For this drill you will need two boxes or benches, one 12 to 16 inches high and the other 22 to 26 inches high.

Stand on one of the two boxes with arms at the sides; feet should be together and slightly off the edge as in the depth jump. Place the other box approximately two or three feet in front of and facing the performer.
Begin by dropping off the initial box, landing and simultaneously taking off with both feet.
Rebound by driving upward and outward as intensely as possible, using the arms and full extension of the body to jump onto the higher box. Again, allow the legs to absorb the impact.

instrucoes: Sit securely in a dip machine, select the peso and firmly grasp the mãoles.
Now keep your cotovelos in at your sides in order to place emphasis on the triceps. The cotovelos should be bent at a 90 degree angle.
As you contract the triceps, extend your braços downwards as you exhale. Dica: At the bottom of the movimento, focus on keeping a little bend in your braços to keep tension on the triceps muscle.
Now slowly let your braços come costas up to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit securely in a dip machine, select the weight and firmly grasp the handles.
Now keep your elbows in at your sides in order to place emphasis on the triceps. The elbows should be bent at a 90 degree angle.
As you contract the triceps, extend your arms downwards as you exhale. Tip: At the bottom of the movement, focus on keeping a little bend in your arms to keep tension on the triceps muscle.
Now slowly let your arms come back up to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need access to parallel bars. To get yourself into the posição inicial, hold your body at braços length (braços locked) above the bars.
While breathing in, lower yourself slowly with your tronco leaning forward around 30 degrees or so and your cotovelos flared out slightly until you feel a slight stretch in the peito.
Once you feel the stretch, use your peito to bring your body costas to the posição inicial as you expire. Dica: Remember to squeeze the peito at the top of the movimento for a second.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need access to parallel bars. To get yourself into the starting position, hold your body at arms length (arms locked) above the bars.
While breathing in, lower yourself slowly with your torso leaning forward around 30 degrees or so and your elbows flared out slightly until you feel a slight stretch in the chest.
Once you feel the stretch, use your chest to bring your body back to the starting position as you breathe out. Tip: Remember to squeeze the chest at the top of the movement for a second.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To get into the posição inicial, hold your body at braço's length with your braços nearly locked above the bars.

Now, inhale and slowly lower yourself downward. Your tronco should remain upright and your cotovelos should stay close to your body. This helps to better focus on tricep involvement. Abaixe yourself until there is a 90 degree angle formed between the upper braço and forebraço.
Then, exhale and push your tronco costas up using your triceps to bring your body costas to the posição inicial.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: To get into the starting position, hold your body at arm's length with your arms nearly locked above the bars.

Now, inhale and slowly lower yourself downward. Your torso should remain upright and your elbows should stay close to your body. This helps to better focus on tricep involvement. Lower yourself until there is a 90 degree angle formed between the upper arm and forearm.
Then, exhale and push your torso back up using your triceps to bring your body back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need access to a donkey calf raise machine. Start by posiçãoing your lower costas and quadris under the padded lever provided. The tailbone area should be the one making contact with the pad.

Place both of your braços on the side mãoles and place the balls of your pés on the calf block with the heels extending off. Align the toes forward, inward or outward, depending on the area you wish to target, and straighten the joelhos without locking them. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your heels as you expire by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Segure the contracted posição by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inspire by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need access to a donkey calf raise machine. Start by positioning your lower back and hips under the padded lever provided. The tailbone area should be the one making contact with the pad.

Place both of your arms on the side handles and place the balls of your feet on the calf block with the heels extending off. Align the toes forward, inward or outward, depending on the area you wish to target, and straighten the knees without locking them. This will be your starting position.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Double com kettlebell Alternating Hang Clean
instrucoes: Place two kettlebells between your pés. To get in the posição inicial, push your butt costas and look straight ahead.
Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder and hold on to the other kettlebell.
With a fluid motion, lower the top kettlebell while driving the bottom kettlebell up.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells between your feet. To get in the starting position, push your butt back and look straight ahead.
Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder and hold on to the other kettlebell.
With a fluid motion, lower the top kettlebell while driving the bottom kettlebell up.

instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell by the mãole in each mão.

Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Dip your body by bending the joelhos, keeping your tronco upright.
Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum.
As you do so, press the kettlebells overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using your body's momentum to move the pesos.
Retorne your pés to the ground in a split fashion, with one foot forward and one foot costas.
Mantenhaing the pesos overhead, return to a standing posição, bringing your pés together. Abaixe the pesos to perform the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell by the handle in each hand.

Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward. This will be your starting position.
Dip your body by bending the knees, keeping your torso upright.
Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum.
As you do so, press the kettlebells overhead to lockout by extending the arms, using your body's momentum to move the weights.
Return your feet to the ground in a split fashion, with one foot forward and one foot back.
Keeping the weights overhead, return to a standing position, bringing your feet together. Lower the weights to perform the next repetition.

instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells to your ombros.
Squat down a few inches and reverse the motion rapidly. Use the momentum from the pernas to drive the kettlebells overhead.
Once the kettlebells are locked out, lower the kettlebells to your ombros and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders.
Squat down a few inches and reverse the motion rapidly. Use the momentum from the legs to drive the kettlebells overhead.
Once the kettlebells are locked out, lower the kettlebells to your shoulders and repeat.

instrucoes: Place two kettlebells behind your pés. Bend your joelhos and sit costas to pick up the kettlebells.
Swing the kettlebells between your pernas forcefully and reverse the direction.
Drive through with your quadris and lock the ketttlebells overhead in one uninterrupted motion.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells behind your feet. Bend your knees and sit back to pick up the kettlebells.
Swing the kettlebells between your legs forcefully and reverse the direction.
Drive through with your hips and lock the ketttlebells overhead in one uninterrupted motion.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell in front of your front foot and clean and press a kettlebell overhead with your opposite braço. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your ombros. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward.

Mantenhaing the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your pés out at a forty-five degree angle from the braço with the locked out kettlebell.

Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can retrieve the kettlebell from the chão. Mantenha your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Faça uma pausa for a second after retrieving the kettlebell from the ground and reverse the motion costas to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell in front of your front foot and clean and press a kettlebell overhead with your opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your feet out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm with the locked out kettlebell.
Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can retrieve the kettlebell from the floor. Keep your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Pause for a second after retrieving the kettlebell from the ground and reverse the motion back to the starting position.

instrucoes: Comece standing with your joelhos slightly bent.
Quickly squat a short distance, flexing the quadris and joelhos, and immediately extend to jump for maximum vertical height.
As you go up, tuck your heels by flexing the joelhos, attempting to touch the buttocks.
Finish the motion by landing with the joelhos only partially bent, using your pernas to absorb the impact.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing with your knees slightly bent.
Quickly squat a short distance, flexing the hips and knees, and immediately extend to jump for maximum vertical height.
As you go up, tuck your heels by flexing the knees, attempting to touch the buttocks.
Finish the motion by landing with the knees only partially bent, using your legs to absorb the impact.

instrucoes: Lie facedown on top of an exercise ball.
While resting on your stomach on the ball, walk your mãos forward along the chão and lift your pernas, extending your cotovelos and joelhos.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie facedown on top of an exercise ball.
While resting on your stomach on the ball, walk your hands forward along the floor and lift your legs, extending your elbows and knees.

instrucoes: Grab a barra with a supinated grip (palms facing forward) and get your cotovelos close to your tronco and costas. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale, curl the bar up while keeping the cotovelos to the costas as you "Drag" the bar up by keeping it in contact with your tronco. Dica: As you can see, you will not be keeping the cotovelos pinned to your sides, but instead you will be bringing them costas. Also, do not lift your ombros.
Lentamente go costas to the posição inicial as you keep the bar in contact with the tronco at all times.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing forward) and get your elbows close to your torso and back. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, curl the bar up while keeping the elbows to the back as you "Drag" the bar up by keeping it in contact with your torso. Tip: As you can see, you will not be keeping the elbows pinned to your sides, but instead you will be bringing them back. Also, do not lift your shoulders.
Slowly go back to the starting position as you keep the bar in contact with the torso at all times.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Position low boxes or other platforms 2-3 pés apart.
Move to a pushup posição between them, supporting yourself by placing your mãos on the boxes.
With good posture, drop from the platforms by pressing up and moving your mãos to shoulder width, cushioning your landing by absorbing the impact through the braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Position low boxes or other platforms 2-3 feet apart.
Move to a pushup position between them, supporting yourself by placing your hands on the boxes.
With good posture, drop from the platforms by pressing up and moving your hands to shoulder width, cushioning your landing by absorbing the impact through the arm.

instrucoes: Stand (tronco upright) with a halter in each mão held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco and the palms of your mão should be facing your thighs.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the right peso as you rotate the palm of the mãos until they are facing forward. At this point continue contraindo the biceps as you expire until your biceps is fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps. Dica: Only the forebraços should move.
Lentamente begin to bring the halter costas to the posição inicial as your inspire. Dica: Remember to twist the palms costas to the posição inicial (facing your thighs) as you come down.
Repita the movimento with the left mão. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand (torso upright) with a dumbbell in each hand held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso and the palms of your hand should be facing your thighs.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right weight as you rotate the palm of the hands until they are facing forward. At this point continue contracting the biceps as you breathe out until your biceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position as your breathe in. Tip: Remember to twist the palms back to the starting position (facing your thighs) as you come down.
Repeat the movement with the left hand. This equals one repetition.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench with a halter in each mão resting on top of your thighs. The palms of your mãos will be facing each other.
Then, using your thighs to help raise the halters up, lift the halters one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your mãos are facing away from you. The halters should be just to the sides of your peito, with your upper braço and forebraço creating a 90 degree angle. Be sure to maintain full control of the halters at all times. This will be your posição inicial.

Then, as you expire, use your peito to push the halters up. Lock your braços at the top of the lift and squeeze your peito, hold for a second and then begin coming down slowly. Dica: Ideally, lowering the peso should take about twice as long as raising it.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand resting on top of your thighs. The palms of your hands will be facing each other.
Then, using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells up, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. The dumbbells should be just to the sides of your chest, with your upper arm and forearm creating a 90 degree angle. Be sure to maintain full control of the dumbbells at all times. This will be your starting position.

Then, as you breathe out, use your chest to push the dumbbells up. Lock your arms at the top of the lift and squeeze your chest, hold for a second and then begin coming down slowly. Tip: Ideally, lowering the weight should take about twice as long as raising it.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.

nome: com halter supino with Neutral Grip
nomeOriginal: Dumbbell Bench Press with Neutral Grip
instrucoes: Take a halter in each mão and lay costas onto a flat bench. Your pés should be flat on the chão and your shoulder blades retracted.
Maintaining a neutral grip, palms facing each other, begin with your braços extended directly above you, perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing the elbow, lowering the upper braços to the side. Descend until the halters are to your tronco.
Faça uma pausa, then extend the elbow and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Take a dumbbell in each hand and lay back onto a flat bench. Your feet should be flat on the floor and your shoulder blades retracted.
Maintaining a neutral grip, palms facing each other, begin with your arms extended directly above you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the elbow, lowering the upper arms to the side. Descend until the dumbbells are to your torso.
Pause, then extend the elbow and return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with a halter in each mão at braço's length. Mantenha your cotovelos close to your tronco and rotate the palms of your mãos until they are facing forward. This will be your posição inicial.

Now, keeping the upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the pesos while contraindo your biceps. Continue to raise the pesos until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the halters costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand at arm's length. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece standing with a halter in each mão with your pés shoulder width apart.
Abaixe the pesos to the chão by flexing at the quadris and joelhos, pushing your quadris costas until the halters reach the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

To initiate the movimento, violently jump upward by extending the quadris, joelhos, and ankles to acclerate the pesos upward. Maintaining a neutral grip on the halters, keep the braços straight until full extension is reached.
After full extension, rebend the quadris and joelhos to receive the peso in a squat posição. Allow the braços to bend, guiding the halters to your ombros.
Upon receiving the peso in the squat posição, extend the quadris and joelhos to finish in a standing posição with the pesos on your ombros.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing with a dumbbell in each hand with your feet shoulder width apart.
Lower the weights to the floor by flexing at the hips and knees, pushing your hips back until the dumbbells reach the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, violently jump upward by extending the hips, knees, and ankles to acclerate the weights upward. Maintaining a neutral grip on the dumbbells, keep the arms straight until full extension is reached.
After full extension, rebend the hips and knees to receive the weight in a squat position. Allow the arms to bend, guiding the dumbbells to your shoulders.
Upon receiving the weight in the squat position, extend the hips and knees to finish in a standing position with the weights on your shoulders.

instrucoes: Lay on the chão holding halters in your mãos. Your joelhos can be bent. Comece with the pesos fully extended above you.
Abaixe the pesos until your upper braço comes in contact with the chão. You can tuck your cotovelos to emphasize triceps size and strength, or to focus on your peito angle your braços to the side.
Faça uma pausa at the bottom, and then bring the peso together at the top by extending through the cotovelos.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on the floor holding dumbbells in your hands. Your knees can be bent. Begin with the weights fully extended above you.
Lower the weights until your upper arm comes in contact with the floor. You can tuck your elbows to emphasize triceps size and strength, or to focus on your chest angle your arms to the side.
Pause at the bottom, and then bring the weight together at the top by extending through the elbows.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench with a halter on each mão resting on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.

Then using your thighs to help raise the halters, lift the halters one at a time so you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width with the palms of your mãos facing each other. Eleve the halters up like you're pressing them, but stop and hold just before you lock out. This will be your posição inicial.

With a slight bend on your cotovelos in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon, lower your braços out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha in mind that throughout the movimento, the braços should remain stationary; the movimento should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Retorne your braços costas to the posição inicial as you squeeze your peito muscles and expire. Dica: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the pesos.
Segure for a second at the contracted posição and repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell on each hand resting on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.

Then using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width with the palms of your hands facing each other. Raise the dumbbells up like you're pressing them, but stop and hold just before you lock out. This will be your starting position.

With a slight bend on your elbows in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon, lower your arms out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your chest. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the arms should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return your arms back to the starting position as you squeeze your chest muscles and breathe out. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the weights.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Using a neutral grip, lean into an incline bench.
Take a halter in each mão with a neutral grip, beginning with the braços straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Retract the shoulder blades and flex the cotovelos to row the halters to your side.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a neutral grip, lean into an incline bench.
Take a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip, beginning with the arms straight. This will be your starting position.
Retract the shoulder blades and flex the elbows to row the dumbbells to your side.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Sit on an Incline Bench while holding a halter on each mão on top of your thighs.

Levante your pernas up to kick the pesos to your ombros and lean costas. Position the halters above your ombros with your braços extended. The braços should be perpendicular to the chão with your palms facing forward and knuckles pointing towards the ceiling. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping the braços straight and locked, lift the halters by raising the ombros from the bench as you expire.
Bring costas the halters to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on an Incline Bench while holding a dumbbell on each hand on top of your thighs.

Lift your legs up to kick the weights to your shoulders and lean back. Position the dumbbells above your shoulders with your arms extended. The arms should be perpendicular to the floor with your palms facing forward and knuckles pointing towards the ceiling. This will be your starting position.
While keeping the arms straight and locked, lift the dumbbells by raising the shoulders from the bench as you breathe out.
Bring back the dumbbells to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your tronco upright holding two halters in your mãos by your sides. This will be your posição inicial.

Step forward with your right perna around 2 pés or so from the foot being left stationary behind and lower your upper body down, while keeping the tronco upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: As in the other exercises, do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. Make sure that you keep your front shin perpendicular to the ground.
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go costas to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita the movimento for the número recomendado de repetições and then perform with the left perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your torso upright holding two dumbbells in your hands by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Step forward with your right leg around 2 feet or so from the foot being left stationary behind and lower your upper body down, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Note: As in the other exercises, do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. Make sure that you keep your front shin perpendicular to the ground.
Using mainly the heel of your foot, push up and go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.

nome: com halter Lying One-Arm Rear Lateral elevação
nomeOriginal: Dumbbell Lying One-Arm Rear Lateral Raise
instrucoes: While holding a halter in one mão, lay with your peito down on a slightly inclined (around 15 degrees when measured from the chão) adjustable bench. The other mão can be used to hold to the perna of the bench for stability.
Position the palm of the mão that is holding the halter in a neutral manner (palms facing your tronco) as you keep the braço extended with the elbow slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.

Now raise the braço with the halter to the side until your elbow is at shoulder height and your braço is roughly parallel to the chão as you exhale. Dica: Maintain your braço perpendicular to the tronco while keeping your braço extended throughout the movimento. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Lentamente lower the halter to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a dumbbell in one hand, lay with your chest down on a slightly inclined (around 15 degrees when measured from the floor) adjustable bench. The other hand can be used to hold to the leg of the bench for stability.

Position the palm of the hand that is holding the dumbbell in a neutral manner (palms facing your torso) as you keep the arm extended with the elbow slightly bent. This will be your starting position.

Now raise the arm with the dumbbell to the side until your elbow is at shoulder height and your arm is roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain your arm perpendicular to the torso while keeping your arm extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbell to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on a flat bench face down with one braço holding a halter and the other mão on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the cotovelos of the braço holding the halter so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper braço and the forebraço.

Now raise the upper braço so that the forebraço is perpendicular to the chão and the upper braço is perpendicular to your tronco. Dica: The upper braço should be parallel to the chão and also creating a 90-degree angle with your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, externally rotate your forebraço so that the halter is lifted forward as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper braços and the forebraço. You will continue this external rotation until the forebraço is parallel to the chão. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you inspire, slowly go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on a flat bench face down with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm.

Now raise the upper arm so that the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the upper arm is perpendicular to your torso. Tip: The upper arm should be parallel to the floor and also creating a 90-degree angle with your torso. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, externally rotate your forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted forward as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper arms and the forearm. You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is parallel to the floor. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: com halter Lying Rear Lateral elevação
instrucoes: While holding a halter in each mão, lay with your peito down on a slightly inclined (around 15 degrees when measured from the chão) adjustable bench.
Position the palms of the mãos in a neutral manner (palms facing your tronco) as you keep the braços extended with the cotovelos slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.

Now raise the braços to the side until your cotovelos are at shoulder height and your braços are roughly parallel to the chão as you exhale. Dica: Maintain your braços perpendicular to the tronco while keeping them extended throughout the movimento. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Lentamente lower the halters to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a dumbbell in each hand, lay with your chest down on a slightly inclined (around 15 degrees when measured from the floor) adjustable bench.
Position the palms of the hands in a neutral manner (palms facing your torso) as you keep the arms extended with the elbows slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
