Now raise the arms to the side until your elbows are at shoulder height and your arms are roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain your arms perpendicular to the torso while keeping them extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbells to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch to the other arm.

instrucoes: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one braço holding a halter and the other mão on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the cotovelos of the braço holding the halter so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper braço and the forebraço.

Now raise the upper braço so that the forebraço is parallel to the chão and perpendicular to your tronco (Dica: So the forebraço will be directly in front of you). The upper braço will be stationary by your tronco and should be parallel to the chão (aligned with your tronco at all times). This will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, externally rotate your forebraço so that the halter is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper braços and the forebraço. You will continue this external rotation until the forebraço is perpendicular to the chão and the tronco pointing towards the ceiling. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you inspire, slowly go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm.

Now raise the upper arm so that the forearm is parallel to the floor and perpendicular to your torso (Tip: So the forearm will be directly in front of you). The upper arm will be stationary by your torso and should be parallel to the floor (aligned with your torso at all times). This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, externally rotate your forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper arms and the forearm. You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the torso pointing towards the ceiling. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch to the other arm.

nome: com halter One-Arm desenvolvimento de ombros
instrucoes: Grab a halter and either sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a costas support on it as you place the halters upright on top of your thighs or stand up straight.
Clean the halter up to bring it to shoulder height. The other mão can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist or grabbing a fixed surface.
Rotate the wrist so that the palm of your mão is facing forward. This is your posição inicial.
As you exhale, push the halter up until your braço is fully extended.
After a second pause, slowly come down costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then switch braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell and either sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a back support on it as you place the dumbbells upright on top of your thighs or stand up straight.
Clean the dumbbell up to bring it to shoulder height. The other hand can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist or grabbing a fixed surface.
Rotate the wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward. This is your starting position.
As you exhale, push the dumbbell up until your arm is fully extended.
After a second pause, slowly come down back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch arms.

instrucoes: Grab a halter and either sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a costas support on it as you place the halters upright on top of your thighs or stand up straight.

Clean the halter up to bring it to shoulder height and then extend the braço over your head so that the whole braço is perpendicular to the chão and next to your head. The halter should be on top of you. The other mão can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist, supporting the upper braço that has the halter or grabbing a fixed surface.
Rotate the wrist so that the palm of your mão is facing forward and the pinkie is facing the ceiling. This will be your posição inicial.
Lentamente lower the halter behind your head as you hold the upper braço stationary. Inhale as you perform this movimento and pause when your triceps are fully stretched.
Retorne to the posição inicial by flexing your triceps as you expire. Dica: It is imperative that only the forebraço moves. The upper braço should remain at all times stationary next to your head.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and switch braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell and either sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a back support on it as you place the dumbbells upright on top of your thighs or stand up straight.

Clean the dumbbell up to bring it to shoulder height and then extend the arm over your head so that the whole arm is perpendicular to the floor and next to your head. The dumbbell should be on top of you. The other hand can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist, supporting the upper arm that has the dumbbell or grabbing a fixed surface.
Rotate the wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward and the pinkie is facing the ceiling. This will be your starting position.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head as you hold the upper arm stationary. Inhale as you perform this movement and pause when your triceps are fully stretched.
Return to the starting position by flexing your triceps as you breathe out. Tip: It is imperative that only the forearm moves. The upper arm should remain at all times stationary next to your head.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and switch arms.

instrucoes: Grab a halter and stand up straight with your braço extended in front of you with a slight bend at the cotovelos and your costas straight. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: The halter should be resting on top of your thigh with the palm of your mãos facing your thighs.
Mantenha the other mão can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist or grabbing a fixed surface. This will be your posição inicial.

Use your side ombros to lift the halter as you exhale. The halter should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until the halter is nearly in line with your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion. As you lift the halter, your elbow should always be higher than your forebraço. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the halter costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and switch braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell and stand up straight with your arm extended in front of you with a slight bend at the elbows and your back straight. This will be your starting position. Tip: The dumbbell should be resting on top of your thigh with the palm of your hands facing your thighs.
Keep the other hand can be kept fully extended to the side, by the waist or grabbing a fixed surface. This will be your starting position.

Use your side shoulders to lift the dumbbell as you exhale. The dumbbell should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until the dumbbell is nearly in line with your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the dumbbell, your elbow should always be higher than your forearm. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and switch arms.

instrucoes: Grab a halter on each mão and lie face down on an incline bench with your ombros near top of the incline. Your joelhos can rest on the seat or your pernas can be straddled to the sides (my preferred way).
Let your braços extend and hang naturally in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the chão.
Now keep your cotovelos in by your side and face the palms forward. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve the halters by contraindo the biceps until your braços are fully flexed. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento and ensure that only the forebraços move. The upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Abaixe the halters until your braços are fully extended.
Repita for the recommended amount of times.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell on each hand and lie face down on an incline bench with your shoulders near top of the incline. Your knees can rest on the seat or your legs can be straddled to the sides (my preferred way).
Let your arms extend and hang naturally in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the floor.
Now keep your elbows in by your side and face the palms forward. This will be your starting position.

Raise the dumbbells by contracting the biceps until your arms are fully flexed. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and ensure that only the forearms move. The upper arms should remain stationary at all times.
Lower the dumbbells until your arms are fully extended.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

instrucoes: Grab a halter in each braço and stand up straight with your braços extended by your sides with a slight bend at the cotovelos and your costas straight. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: The halter should be next to your thighs with the palm of your mãos facing costas.

Use your side ombros to lift the halters as you exhale. The halters should be to the side of the body as you move them up. Continue to lift it until the halters are nearly in line with your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion. As you lift the halter, your elbow should always be higher than your forebraço. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the halters costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell in each arm and stand up straight with your arms extended by your sides with a slight bend at the elbows and your back straight. This will be your starting position. Tip: The dumbbell should be next to your thighs with the palm of your hands facing back.

Use your side shoulders to lift the dumbbells as you exhale. The dumbbells should be to the side of the body as you move them up. Continue to lift it until the dumbbells are nearly in line with your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the dumbbell, your elbow should always be higher than your forearm. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbells back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your tronco upright holding two halters in your mãos by your sides. This will be your posição inicial.

Step costasward with your right perna around two pés or so from the left foot and lower your upper body down, while keeping the tronco upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Dica: As in the other exercises, do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. Make sure that you keep your front shin perpendicular to the ground. Mantenha the tronco upright during the lunge; flexible hip flexors are important. A long lunge emphasizes the Gluteus Maximus; a short lunge emphasizes Quadriceps.
Push up and go costas to the posição inicial as you exhale. Dica: Use the ball of your pés to push in order to accentuate the quadriceps. To focus on the glutes, press with your heels.
Now repeat with the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your torso upright holding two dumbbells in your hands by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Step backward with your right leg around two feet or so from the left foot and lower your upper body down, while keeping the torso upright and maintaining balance. Inhale as you go down. Tip: As in the other exercises, do not allow your knee to go forward beyond your toes as you come down, as this will put undue stress on the knee joint. Make sure that you keep your front shin perpendicular to the ground. Keep the torso upright during the lunge; flexible hip flexors are important. A long lunge emphasizes the Gluteus Maximus; a short lunge emphasizes Quadriceps.
Push up and go back to the starting position as you exhale. Tip: Use the ball of your feet to push in order to accentuate the quadriceps. To focus on the glutes, press with your heels.
Now repeat with the opposite leg.

instrucoes: This corrective exercise strengthens the muscles that stabilize your shoulder blade. Segure a light peso in each mão, hanging at your sides. Your thumbs should pointing up.
Comece the movimento raising your braços out in front of you, about 30 degrees off center. Your braços should be fully extended as you perform the movimento.
Continue until your braços are parallel to the ground, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: This corrective exercise strengthens the muscles that stabilize your shoulder blade. Hold a light weight in each hand, hanging at your sides. Your thumbs should pointing up.
Begin the movement raising your arms out in front of you, about 30 degrees off center. Your arms should be fully extended as you perform the movement.
Continue until your arms are parallel to the ground, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Position a box a couple pés to the side of a bench. Segure a halter to your peito with both mãos and seat yourself on the bench facing the box. This will be your posição inicial.
Plant your pés firmly on the ground as you lean forward, extending through the quadris and joelhos to jump up and forward.
Land on the box with both pés, absorbing the impact by allowing the quadris and joelhos to bend.
Step down and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a box a couple feet to the side of a bench. Hold a dumbbell to your chest with both hands and seat yourself on the bench facing the box. This will be your starting position.
Plant your feet firmly on the ground as you lean forward, extending through the hips and knees to jump up and forward.
Land on the box with both feet, absorbing the impact by allowing the hips and knees to bend.
Step down and return to the starting position.

nome: com halter Seated One-Leg Calf elevação
instrucoes: Place a block on the chão about 12 inches from a flat bench.
Sit on a flat bench and place a halter on your upper left thigh about 3 inches above your knee.
Now place the ball of your left foot on the block. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve your toes up as high as possible as you exhale and you contract your calf muscle. Segure the contraction for a second.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial, stretching as far down as possible.
Repita for your prescribed number of repetitions and then repeat with the right perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a block on the floor about 12 inches from a flat bench.
Sit on a flat bench and place a dumbbell on your upper left thigh about 3 inches above your knee.
Now place the ball of your left foot on the block. This will be your starting position.
Raise your toes up as high as possible as you exhale and you contract your calf muscle. Hold the contraction for a second.
Slowly return to the starting position, stretching as far down as possible.
Repeat for your prescribed number of repetitions and then repeat with the right leg.

instrucoes: While holding a halter in each mão, sit on a military press bench or utility bench that has costas support. Place the halters upright on top of your thighs.
Now raise the halters to shoulder height one at a time using your thighs to help propel them up into posição.
Make sure to rotate your wrists so that the palms of your mãos are facing forward. This is your posição inicial.
Now, exhale and push the halters upward until they touch at the top.
Then, after a brief pause at the top contracted posição, slowly lower the pesos costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a dumbbell in each hand, sit on a military press bench or utility bench that has back support. Place the dumbbells upright on top of your thighs.
Now raise the dumbbells to shoulder height one at a time using your thighs to help propel them up into position.
Make sure to rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward. This is your starting position.
Now, exhale and push the dumbbells upward until they touch at the top.
Then, after a brief pause at the top contracted position, slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand erect with a halter on each mão (palms facing your tronco), braços extended on the sides.

Levante the halters by elevating the ombros as high as possible while you exhale. Segure the contraction at the top for a second. Dica: The braços should remain extended at all times. Refrain from using the biceps to help lift the halters. Only the ombros should be moving up and down.
Abaixe the halters costas to the original posição.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand erect with a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing your torso), arms extended on the sides.

Lift the dumbbells by elevating the shoulders as high as possible while you exhale. Hold the contraction at the top for a second. Tip: The arms should remain extended at all times. Refrain from using the biceps to help lift the dumbbells. Only the shoulders should be moving up and down.
Lower the dumbbells back to the original position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a halter on the left mão (palms facing the tronco) as you have the right mão holding your waist. Your pés should be placed at shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping your costas straight and your head up, bend only at the waist to the right as far as possible. Breathe in as you bend to the side. Then hold for a second and come costas up to the posição inicial as you exhale. Dica: Mantenha the rest of the body stationary.
Now repeat the movimento but bending to the left instead. Segure for a second and come costas to the posição inicial.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then change mãos.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell on the left hand (palms facing the torso) as you have the right hand holding your waist. Your feet should be placed at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.

While keeping your back straight and your head up, bend only at the waist to the right as far as possible. Breathe in as you bend to the side. Then hold for a second and come back up to the starting position as you exhale. Tip: Keep the rest of the body stationary.
Now repeat the movement but bending to the left instead. Hold for a second and come back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then change hands.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a halter on each mão (palms facing the side of your pernas).

Position your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Comece to slowly lower your tronco by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until your thighs are parallel to the chão. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise your tronco as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of your legs).

Position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Begin to slowly lower your torso by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until your thighs are parallel to the floor. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise your torso as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: com halter agachamento To A Bench
instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with a flat bench behind you while holding a halter on each mão (palms facing the side of your pernas).

Position your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Comece to slowly lower your tronco by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until you slightly touch the bench behind you. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with a flat bench behind you while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of your legs).

Position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section.

Begin to slowly lower your torso by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until you slightly touch the bench behind you. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding a halter on each mão (palms facing the side of your pernas).

Place the right foot on the elevated platform. Step on the platform by extending the hip and the knee of your right perna. Use the heel mainly to lift the rest of your body up and place the foot of the left perna on the platform as well. Breathe out as you execute the force required to come up.

Step down with the left perna by flexing the hip and knee of the right perna as you inhale. Retorne to the original standing posição by placing the right foot of to next to the left foot on the initial posição.
Repita with the right perna for the número recomendado de repetições and then perform with the left perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding a dumbbell on each hand (palms facing the side of your legs).

Place the right foot on the elevated platform. Step on the platform by extending the hip and the knee of your right leg. Use the heel mainly to lift the rest of your body up and place the foot of the left leg on the platform as well. Breathe out as you execute the force required to come up.

Step down with the left leg by flexing the hip and knee of the right leg as you inhale. Return to the original standing position by placing the right foot of to next to the left foot on the initial position.
Repeat with the right leg for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform with the left leg.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench holding two halters directly above your ombros. Your braços should be fully extended and form a 90 degree angle from your tronco and the chão.
The palms of your mãos should be facing forward, and your cotovelos should be tucked in. This will be your posição inicial.
Now, inhale and slowly lower the halters until they are near your ears. Be sure to keep your upper braços stationary and your cotovelos tucked in.
Then, exhale and use your triceps to return the peso to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench holding two dumbbells directly above your shoulders. Your arms should be fully extended and form a 90 degree angle from your torso and the floor.
The palms of your hands should be facing forward, and your elbows should be tucked in. This will be your starting position.
Now, inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells until they are near your ears. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in.
Then, exhale and use your triceps to return the weight to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your braços straight, swing them straight up in front of you 5-10 times, increasing the range of motion each time until your braços are above your head.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, swing them straight up in front of you 5-10 times, increasing the range of motion each time until your arms are above your head.

instrucoes: Stand with your mãos together, braços extended directly in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your braços straight, quickly move your braços costas as far as possible and costas in again, similar to an exaggerated clapping motion. Repita 5-10 times, increasing speed as you do so.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your hands together, arms extended directly in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, quickly move your arms back as far as possible and back in again, similar to an exaggerated clapping motion. Repeat 5-10 times, increasing speed as you do so.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight while holding an EZ curl bar at the wide outer mãole. The palms of your mãos should be facing forward and slightly tilted inward due to the shape of the bar. Mantenha your cotovelos close to your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Now, while keeping your upper braços stationary, exhale and curl the pesos forward while contraindo the biceps. Focus on only moving your forebraços.
Continue to raise the peso until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Segure the top contracted posição for a moment and squeeze the biceps.
Then inhale and slowly lower the bar costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight while holding an EZ curl bar at the wide outer handle. The palms of your hands should be facing forward and slightly tilted inward due to the shape of the bar. Keep your elbows close to your torso. This will be your starting position.
Now, while keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights forward while contracting the biceps. Focus on only moving your forearms.
Continue to raise the weight until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the top contracted position for a moment and squeeze the biceps.
Then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Using a close grip, lift the EZ bar and hold it with your cotovelos in as you lie on the bench. Your braços should be perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, lower the bar by allowing the cotovelos to flex. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Faça uma pausa once the bar is directly above the forehead.
Levante the bar costas to the posição inicial by extending the elbow and exhaling.
Repita.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a close grip, lift the EZ bar and hold it with your elbows in as you lie on the bench. Your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the upper arms stationary, lower the bar by allowing the elbows to flex. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Pause once the bar is directly above the forehead.
Lift the bar back to the starting position by extending the elbow and exhaling.
Repeat.

instrucoes: Sit or stand with your pés slightly apart.
Place your mãos on your ombros with your cotovelos at shoulder level and pointing out.
Lentamente make a circle with your cotovelos. Breathe out as you start the circle and inspire as you complete the circle.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit or stand with your feet slightly apart.
Place your hands on your shoulders with your elbows at shoulder level and pointing out.
Slowly make a circle with your elbows. Breathe out as you start the circle and breathe in as you complete the circle.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão, crossing your right perna across your bent left knee. Clasp your mãos behind your head, beginning with your shoulder blades on the ground. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the motion by flexing the spine and rotating your tronco to bring the left elbow to the right knee.
Retorne to the posição inicial and repeat the movimento for the número desejado de repetições before switching sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor, crossing your right leg across your bent left knee. Clasp your hands behind your head, beginning with your shoulder blades on the ground. This will be your starting position.
Perform the motion by flexing the spine and rotating your torso to bring the left elbow to the right knee.
Return to the starting position and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions before switching sides.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight.
Place both mãos on your lower costas, fingers pointing downward and cotovelos out.
Then gently pull your cotovelos costas aiming to touch them together.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight.
Place both hands on your lower back, fingers pointing downward and elbows out.
Then gently pull your elbows back aiming to touch them together.

instrucoes: Position a bar onto a rack at shoulder height loaded to an appropriate peso. Place a short, raised platform behind you.
Rack the bar onto your upper costas, keeping your costas arched and tight. Step onto your raised platform with both pés. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by stepping costaswards with one perna. Descend by flexing your quadris and joelhos until your knee touches the chão.
Faça uma pausa, and extend through the quadris and joelhos to rise up, returning all the way to the posição inicial before alternating.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar onto a rack at shoulder height loaded to an appropriate weight. Place a short, raised platform behind you.
Rack the bar onto your upper back, keeping your back arched and tight. Step onto your raised platform with both feet. This will be your starting position.
Begin by stepping backwards with one leg. Descend by flexing your hips and knees until your knee touches the floor.
Pause, and extend through the hips and knees to rise up, returning all the way to the starting position before alternating.

instrucoes: Get a platform of some sort (it can be an aerobics or calf raise platform) that is around 4-6 inches in height.
Place it on the seat of the cable row machine.
Sente-se on the machine and place your pés on the front platform or crossbar provided making sure that your joelhos are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of your costas and grab the V-bar mãoles.

With your braços extended pull costas until your tronco is at a 90-degree angle from your pernas. Your costas should be slightly arched and your peito should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on your lats as you hold the bar in front of you. This is the posição inicial of the exercise.

Mantenhaing the tronco stationary, pull the mãoles costas towards your tronco while keeping the braços close to it until you touch the abdominals. Breathe out as you perform that movimento. At that point you should be squeezing your costas muscles hard. Segure that contraction for a second and slowly go costas to the original posição while breathing in.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Get a platform of some sort (it can be an aerobics or calf raise platform) that is around 4-6 inches in height.
Place it on the seat of the cable row machine.
Sit down on the machine and place your feet on the front platform or crossbar provided making sure that your knees are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of your back and grab the V-bar handles.

With your arms extended pull back until your torso is at a 90-degree angle from your legs. Your back should be slightly arched and your chest should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on your lats as you hold the bar in front of you. This is the starting position of the exercise.

Keeping the torso stationary, pull the handles back towards your torso while keeping the arms close to it until you touch the abdominals. Breathe out as you perform that movement. At that point you should be squeezing your back muscles hard. Hold that contraction for a second and slowly go back to the original position while breathing in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, step onto the elliptical and select the desired option from the menu. Most ellipticals have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.
The mãoles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, step onto the elliptical and select the desired option from the menu. Most ellipticals have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.
The handles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

instrucoes: Lie on an exercise ball with your lower costas curvature pressed against the spherical surface of the ball. Your pés should be bent at the knee and pressed firmly against the chão. The upper tronco should be hanging off the top of the ball. The braços should either be kept alongside the body or crossed on top of your peito as these posiçãos avoid neck strains (as opposed to the mãos behind the costas of the head posição).
Abaixe your tronco into a stretch posição keeping the neck stationary at all times. This will be your posição inicial.

With the quadris stationary, flex the waist by contraindo the abdominals and curl the ombros and trunk upward until you feel a nice contraction on your abdominals. The braços should simply slide up the side of your pernas if you have them at the side or just stay on top of your peito if you have them crossed. The lower costas should always stay in contact with the ball. Exhale as you perform this movimento and hold the contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on an exercise ball with your lower back curvature pressed against the spherical surface of the ball. Your feet should be bent at the knee and pressed firmly against the floor. The upper torso should be hanging off the top of the ball. The arms should either be kept alongside the body or crossed on top of your chest as these positions avoid neck strains (as opposed to the hands behind the back of the head position).
Lower your torso into a stretch position keeping the neck stationary at all times. This will be your starting position.

With the hips stationary, flex the waist by contracting the abdominals and curl the shoulders and trunk upward until you feel a nice contraction on your abdominals. The arms should simply slide up the side of your legs if you have them at the side or just stay on top of your chest if you have them crossed. The lower back should always stay in contact with the ball. Exhale as you perform this movement and hold the contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place an exercise ball nearby and lay on the chão in front of it with your mãos on the chão shoulder width apart in a push-up posição.

Now place your lower shins on top of an exercise ball. Dica: At this point your pernas should be fully extended with the shins on top of the ball and the upper body should be in a push-up type of posição being supported by your two extended braços in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping your costas completely straight and the upper body stationary, pull your joelhos in towards your peito as you exhale, allowing the ball to roll forward under your ankles. Squeeze your abs and hold that posição for a second.
Now slowly straighten your pernas, rolling the ball costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place an exercise ball nearby and lay on the floor in front of it with your hands on the floor shoulder width apart in a push-up position.

Now place your lower shins on top of an exercise ball. Tip: At this point your legs should be fully extended with the shins on top of the ball and the upper body should be in a push-up type of position being supported by your two extended arms in front of you. This will be your starting position.

While keeping your back completely straight and the upper body stationary, pull your knees in towards your chest as you exhale, allowing the ball to roll forward under your ankles. Squeeze your abs and hold that position for a second.
Now slowly straighten your legs, rolling the ball back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Extended Range One-Arm com kettlebell Floor press
nomeOriginal: Extended Range One-Arm Kettlebell Floor Press
instrucoes: Lie on the chão and posição a kettlebell for one braço to press. The kettlebell should be held by the mãole. The perna on the same side that you are pressing should be bent, with the knee crossing over the midline of the body.
Press the kettlebell by extending the elbow and adducting the braço, pressing it above your body. Retorne to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor and position a kettlebell for one arm to press. The kettlebell should be held by the handle. The leg on the same side that you are pressing should be bent, with the knee crossing over the midline of the body.
Press the kettlebell by extending the elbow and adducting the arm, pressing it above your body. Return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one braço holding a halter and the other mão on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the cotovelos of the braço holding the halter so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper braço and the forebraço. Dica: Mantenha the braço parallel to your tronco.

Now bend the elbow while keeping the upper braço stationary. In this manner, the forebraço will be parallel to the chão and perpendicular to your tronco (Dica: So the forebraço will be directly in front of you). The upper braço will be stationary by your tronco and should be parallel to the chão (aligned with your tronco at all times). This will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, externally rotate your forebraço so that the halter is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper braços and the forebraço. You will continue this external rotation until the forebraço is perpendicular to the chão and the tronco pointing towards the ceiling. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you inspire, slowly go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm. Tip: Keep the arm parallel to your torso.

Now bend the elbow while keeping the upper arm stationary. In this manner, the forearm will be parallel to the floor and perpendicular to your torso (Tip: So the forearm will be directly in front of you). The upper arm will be stationary by your torso and should be parallel to the floor (aligned with your torso at all times). This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, externally rotate your forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper arms and the forearm. You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the torso pointing towards the ceiling. At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch to the other arm.

instrucoes: Choke the band around a post. The band should be at the same height as your elbow. Stand with your left side to the band a couple of pés away.
Grasp the end of the band with your right mão, and keep your elbow pressed firmly to your side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with your elbow to keep it firmly in posição.
With your upper braço in posição, your elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with your mão reaching across the front of your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Execute the movimento by rotating your braço in a costasmão motion, keeping your elbow in place.
Continue as far as you are able, pause, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Choke the band around a post. The band should be at the same height as your elbow. Stand with your left side to the band a couple of feet away.
Grasp the end of the band with your right hand, and keep your elbow pressed firmly to your side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with your elbow to keep it firmly in position.
With your upper arm in position, your elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with your hand reaching across the front of your torso. This will be your starting position.
Execute the movement by rotating your arm in a backhand motion, keeping your elbow in place.
Continue as far as you are able, pause, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Adjust the cable to the same height as your elbow. Stand with your left side to the band a couple of pés away.
Grasp the mãole with your right mão, and keep your elbow pressed firmly to your side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with your elbow to keep it firmly in posição.
With your upper braço in posição, your elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with your mão reaching across the front of your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Execute the movimento by rotating your braço in a costasmão motion, keeping your elbow in place.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the cable to the same height as your elbow. Stand with your left side to the band a couple of feet away.
Grasp the handle with your right hand, and keep your elbow pressed firmly to your side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with your elbow to keep it firmly in position.
With your upper arm in position, your elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with your hand reaching across the front of your torso. This will be your starting position.
Execute the movement by rotating your arm in a backhand motion, keeping your elbow in place.

instrucoes: Facing a high pulley with a rope or dual mãoles attached, pull the peso directly towards your face, separating your mãos as you do so. Mantenha your upper braços parallel to the ground.
instrucoesOriginais: Facing a high pulley with a rope or dual handles attached, pull the weight directly towards your face, separating your hands as you do so. Keep your upper arms parallel to the ground.

instrucoes: There are various implements that can be used for the fbraçoers walk. These can also be performed with heavy halters or short bars if these implements aren't available. Comece by standing between the implements.
After gripping the mãoles, lift them up by driving through your heels, keeping your costas straight and your head up.
Walk taking short, quick steps, and don't forget to breathe. Move for a given distance, typically 50-100 pés, as fast as possible.
instrucoesOriginais: There are various implements that can be used for the farmers walk. These can also be performed with heavy dumbbells or short bars if these implements aren't available. Begin by standing between the implements.
After gripping the handles, lift them up by driving through your heels, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Walk taking short, quick steps, and don't forget to breathe. Move for a given distance, typically 50-100 feet, as fast as possible.

instrucoes: Start in a relaxed posição with one perna slightly forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Skip by executing a step-hop pattern of right-right-step to left-left-step, and so on, alternating costas and forth.
Perform fast skips by maintaining close contact with the ground and reduce air time, moving as quickly as possible.
instrucoesOriginais: Start in a relaxed position with one leg slightly forward. This will be your starting position.
Skip by executing a step-hop pattern of right-right-step to left-left-step, and so on, alternating back and forth.
Perform fast skips by maintaining close contact with the ground and reduce air time, moving as quickly as possible.

instrucoes: Segure a barra with both mãos and your palms facing up; mãos spaced about shoulder width.
Place your pés flat on the chão, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar as far as possible by extending the fingers. Allowing the bar to roll down the mãos, catch the bar with the final joint in the fingers.
Now curl bar up as high as possible by closing your mãos while exhaling. Segure the contraction at the top.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a barbell with both hands and your palms facing up; hands spaced about shoulder width.
Place your feet flat on the floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Lower the bar as far as possible by extending the fingers. Allowing the bar to roll down the hands, catch the bar with the final joint in the fingers.
Now curl bar up as high as possible by closing your hands while exhaling. Hold the contraction at the top.

instrucoes: Position a flat bench between two low pulleys so that when you are laying on it, your peito will be lined up with the cable pulleys.
Lay flat on the bench and keep your pés on the ground.
Have someone mão you the mãoles on each mão. You will grab each single mãole attachment with a palms up grip.

Extend your braços by your side with a slight bend on your cotovelos. Dica: You will keep this bend constant through the whole movimento. Your braços should be parallel to the chão. This is your posição inicial.

Now start lifting the braços in a semi-circle motion directly in front of you by pulling the cables together until both mãos meet at the top of the movimento. Squeeze your peito as you perform this motion and expire during this movimento. Also, hold the contraction for a second at the top. Dica: When performed correctly, at the top posição of this movimento, your braços should be perpendicular to your tronco and the chão touching above your peito.
Lentamente come costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a flat bench between two low pulleys so that when you are laying on it, your chest will be lined up with the cable pulleys.
Lay flat on the bench and keep your feet on the ground.
Have someone hand you the handles on each hand. You will grab each single handle attachment with a palms up grip.

Extend your arms by your side with a slight bend on your elbows. Tip: You will keep this bend constant through the whole movement. Your arms should be parallel to the floor. This is your starting position.

Now start lifting the arms in a semi-circle motion directly in front of you by pulling the cables together until both hands meet at the top of the movement. Squeeze your chest as you perform this motion and breathe out during this movement. Also, hold the contraction for a second at the top. Tip: When performed correctly, at the top position of this movement, your arms should be perpendicular to your torso and the floor touching above your chest.
Slowly come back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on an exercise mat or a flat bench with your pernas off the end.

Place your mãos either under your glutes with your palms down or by the sides holding on to the bench (or with palms down by the side on an exercise mat). Also extend your pernas straight out. This will be your posição inicial.
Bend your joelhos and pull your upper thighs into your midsection as you expire. Continue this movimento until your joelhos are near your peito. Segure the contracted posição for a second.
As you inspire, slowly return to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on an exercise mat or a flat bench with your legs off the end.

Place your hands either under your glutes with your palms down or by the sides holding on to the bench (or with palms down by the side on an exercise mat). Also extend your legs straight out. This will be your starting position.
Bend your knees and pull your upper thighs into your midsection as you breathe out. Continue this movement until your knees are near your chest. Hold the contracted position for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie with your costas flat on a bench and your pernas extended in front of you off the end.
Place your mãos either under your glutes with your palms down or by the sides holding on to the bench. This will be your posição inicial.

As you keep your pernas extended, straight as possible with your joelhos slightly bent but locked raise your pernas until they make a 90-degree angle with the chão. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento and hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Now, as you inhale, slowly lower your pernas costas down to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie with your back flat on a bench and your legs extended in front of you off the end.
Place your hands either under your glutes with your palms down or by the sides holding on to the bench. This will be your starting position.

As you keep your legs extended, straight as possible with your knees slightly bent but locked raise your legs until they make a 90-degree angle with the floor. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Now, as you inhale, slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.

instrucoes: Segure the halter towards the side farther from you so that you have more peso on the side closest to you. (This can be done for a good effect on all bicep halter exercises). Now do a normal incline halter curl, but keep your wrists as far costas as possible so as to neutralize any stress that is placed on them.
Sit on an incline bench that is angled at 45-degrees while holding a halter on each mão.

Let your braços hang down on your sides, with the cotovelos in, and turn the palms of your mãos forward with the thumbs pointing away from the body. Dica: You will keep this mão posição throughout the movimento as there should not be any twisting of the mãos as they come up. This will be your posição inicial.

Curl up the two halters at the same time until your biceps are fully contracted and exhale. Dica: Do not swing the braços or use momentum. Mantenha a controlled motion at all times. Segure the contracted posição for a second at the top.
As you inhale, slowly go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold the dumbbell towards the side farther from you so that you have more weight on the side closest to you. (This can be done for a good effect on all bicep dumbbell exercises). Now do a normal incline dumbbell curl, but keep your wrists as far back as possible so as to neutralize any stress that is placed on them.
Sit on an incline bench that is angled at 45-degrees while holding a dumbbell on each hand.

Let your arms hang down on your sides, with the elbows in, and turn the palms of your hands forward with the thumbs pointing away from the body. Tip: You will keep this hand position throughout the movement as there should not be any twisting of the hands as they come up. This will be your starting position.

Curl up the two dumbbells at the same time until your biceps are fully contracted and exhale. Tip: Do not swing the arms or use momentum. Keep a controlled motion at all times. Hold the contracted position for a second at the top.
As you inhale, slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: You can use a partner for this exercise or brace your pés under something stable.
Comece on your joelhos with your upper pernas and tronco upright. If using a partner, they will firmly hold your pés to keep you in posição. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe yourself by extending at the knee, taking care to NOT flex the quadris as you go forward.

Place your mãos in front of you as you reach the chão. This movimento is very difficult and you may be unable to do it unaided. Use your braços to lightly push off the chão to aid your return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: You can use a partner for this exercise or brace your feet under something stable.
Begin on your knees with your upper legs and torso upright. If using a partner, they will firmly hold your feet to keep you in position. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by extending at the knee, taking care to NOT flex the hips as you go forward.

Place your hands in front of you as you reach the floor. This movement is very difficult and you may be unable to do it unaided. Use your arms to lightly push off the floor to aid your return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. Comece lying on the chão with your head near the end of a power rack. Mantenhaing your shoulder blades pulled together; pull the bar off of the hooks.

Abaixe the bar towards the bottom of your peito or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck your cotovelos throughout the movimento. Abaixe the bar until your upper braço contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the peso.
Press the bar costas up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, your wrists, and cotovelos in line as you do so.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. Begin lying on the floor with your head near the end of a power rack. Keeping your shoulder blades pulled together; pull the bar off of the hooks.

Lower the bar towards the bottom of your chest or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck your elbows throughout the movement. Lower the bar until your upper arm contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the weight.
Press the bar back up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, your wrists, and elbows in line as you do so.

instrucoes: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. For this exercise, drape the chains directly over the end of the bar, trying to keep the ends away from the plates.
Comece lying on the chão with your head near the end of a power rack. Mantenhaing your shoulder blades pulled together, pull the bar off of the hooks.

Abaixe the bar towards the bottom of your peito or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck your cotovelos throughout the movimento. Abaixe the bar until your upper braço contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the peso.
Press the bar costas up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, your wrists, and cotovelos in line as you do so.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the j-hooks so they are at the appropriate height to rack the bar. For this exercise, drape the chains directly over the end of the bar, trying to keep the ends away from the plates.
Begin lying on the floor with your head near the end of a power rack. Keeping your shoulder blades pulled together, pull the bar off of the hooks.

Lower the bar towards the bottom of your chest or upper stomach, squeezing the bar and attempting to pull it apart as you do so. Ensure that you tuck your elbows throughout the movement. Lower the bar until your upper arm contacts the ground and pause, preventing any slamming or bouncing of the weight.
Press the bar back up as fast as you can, keeping the bar, your wrists, and elbows in line as you do so.

instrucoes: On a flat bench lie facedown with the quadris on the edge of the bench, the pernas straight with toes high off the chão and with the braços on top of the bench holding on to the front edge.
Squeeze your glutes and hamstrings and straighten the pernas until they are level with the quadris. This will be your posição inicial.
Start the movimento by lifting the left perna higher than the right perna.
Then lower the left perna as you lift the right perna.

Continue alternating in this manner (as though you are doing a flutter kick in water) until you have done the número recomendado de repetições for each perna. Make sure that you keep a controlled movimento at all times. Dica: You will breathe normally as you perform this movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: On a flat bench lie facedown with the hips on the edge of the bench, the legs straight with toes high off the floor and with the arms on top of the bench holding on to the front edge.
Squeeze your glutes and hamstrings and straighten the legs until they are level with the hips. This will be your starting position.
Start the movement by lifting the left leg higher than the right leg.
Then lower the left leg as you lift the right leg.

Continue alternating in this manner (as though you are doing a flutter kick in water) until you have done the recommended amount of repetitions for each leg. Make sure that you keep a controlled movement at all times. Tip: You will breathe normally as you perform this movement.

instrucoes: This exercise stretches the fascia of the muscles in the pés. Start off seated with your shoes removed. Using a foot roller or a similar object, such as a small section of pvc pipe, place your foot against the roller across the arch of your foot. This will be your posição inicial.
Press down firmly, rolling across the arch of your foot. Segure for 10-30 seconds, and then switch pés.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise stretches the fascia of the muscles in the feet. Start off seated with your shoes removed. Using a foot roller or a similar object, such as a small section of pvc pipe, place your foot against the roller across the arch of your foot. This will be your starting position.
Press down firmly, rolling across the arch of your foot. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch feet.

instrucoes: Attach a dual mãoled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a mãole in each mão.

Comece the movimento by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the pernas and quadris to move, pausing with each step to extend through the cotovelos, pressing your mãos forward. Step forward until you return to the start posição prepared to press.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a dual handled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a handle in each hand.

Begin the movement by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the legs and hips to move, pausing with each step to extend through the elbows, pressing your hands forward. Step forward until you return to the start position prepared to press.

instrucoes: This drill teaches you the proper posiçãoing of both the bar and your body during the clean and front squat.

Place the barra on the front of the ombros, releasing your grip and extending your braços out in front of you. The ombros should be pushed forward to create a shelf, and the bar should be in contact with the throat. Ensure that you only move your shoulder blades forward; don't round the thoracic spine.

Squat by flexing the joelhos and quadris, sitting in between your pernas. Mantenha the tronco upright, the braços up, and the ombros forward, and the bar should stay in place. Go to the bottom of the squat, until your hamstrings contact your calves.
Retorne to the upright posição by driving through the front of the heel and extending the joelhos and quadris.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill teaches you the proper positioning of both the bar and your body during the clean and front squat.

Place the barbell on the front of the shoulders, releasing your grip and extending your arms out in front of you. The shoulders should be pushed forward to create a shelf, and the bar should be in contact with the throat. Ensure that you only move your shoulder blades forward; don't round the thoracic spine.

Squat by flexing the knees and hips, sitting in between your legs. Keep the torso upright, the arms up, and the shoulders forward, and the bar should stay in place. Go to the bottom of the squat, until your hamstrings contact your calves.
Return to the upright position by driving through the front of the heel and extending the knees and hips.

instrucoes: Cross your braços over your peito.
With your head up and your costas straight, posição your pés at shoulder width.
Mantenhaing your costas straight and peito up, squat down as you inhale until your upper thighs are parallel, or lower, to the chão.
Now pressing mainly with the ball of your pés, jump straight up in the air as high as possible, using the thighs like springs. Exhale during this portion of the movimento.
When you touch the chão again, immediately squat down and jump again.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Cross your arms over your chest.
With your head up and your back straight, position your feet at shoulder width.
Keeping your back straight and chest up, squat down as you inhale until your upper thighs are parallel, or lower, to the floor.
Now pressing mainly with the ball of your feet, jump straight up in the air as high as possible, using the thighs like springs. Exhale during this portion of the movement.
When you touch the floor again, immediately squat down and jump again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your mãos behind your head, and squat down keeping your tronco upright and your head up. This will be your posição inicial.
Jump forward several pés, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As your pés contact the ground, absorb the impact through your pernas, and jump again. Repita this action 5-10 times.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your hands behind your head, and squat down keeping your torso upright and your head up. This will be your starting position.
Jump forward several feet, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As your feet contact the ground, absorb the impact through your legs, and jump again. Repeat this action 5-10 times.

instrucoes: Lie with your costas flat on the chão (or exercise mat) and your pernas extended in front of you.
Now bend at the joelhos and place your outer thighs by the chão (or mat) as you make the soles of your pés touch each other.

Now try pushing both soles and bringing them up as near you as possible while you keep the outer thighs on the chão (or at least almost touching it). Dica: In this posição your pernas should create a diamond shape.
Now, cross your braços in front of you by touching the opposite ombros. This will be your posição inicial.
As you exhale flatten your lower costas to the chão while curling the tronco upwards. Dica: This will be like performing the first 1/4 movimento of a sit up. Segure at the top posição for a second.
As you inhale, slowly lower costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie with your back flat on the floor (or exercise mat) and your legs extended in front of you.
Now bend at the knees and place your outer thighs by the floor (or mat) as you make the soles of your feet touch each other.

Now try pushing both soles and bringing them up as near you as possible while you keep the outer thighs on the floor (or at least almost touching it). Tip: In this position your legs should create a diamond shape.
Now, cross your arms in front of you by touching the opposite shoulders. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale flatten your lower back to the floor while curling the torso upwards. Tip: This will be like performing the first 1/4 movement of a sit up. Hold at the top position for a second.
As you inhale, slowly lower back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring your braços up under the bar while keeping the cotovelos high and the upper braço slightly above parallel to the chão. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross your braços while grasping the bar for total control.
Levante the bar off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot posiçãoing section).

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão mainly with the middle of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring your arms up under the bar while keeping the elbows high and the upper arm slightly above parallel to the floor. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross your arms while grasping the bar for total control.
Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the middle of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Front com barra agachamento To A Bench
nomeOriginal: Front Barbell Squat To A Bench
instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set a flat bench behind you and set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring your braços up under the bar while keeping the cotovelos high and the upper braço slightly above parallel to the chão. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross your braços while grasping the bar for total control.
Levante the bar off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot posiçãoing section).

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until you touch the bench with your glutes. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set a flat bench behind you and set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring your arms up under the bar while keeping the elbows high and the upper arm slightly above parallel to the floor. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross your arms while grasping the bar for total control.
Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until you touch the bench with your glutes. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with a box of an appropriate height 1-2 pés in front of you. Stand with your pés should width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform a short squat in preparation for jumping, swinging your braços behind you.
Rebound out of this posição, extending through the quadris, joelhos, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your braços forward and up.
Land on the box with the joelhos bent, absorbing the impact through the pernas. You can jump from the box costas to the ground, or preferably step down one perna at a time.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a box of an appropriate height 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet should width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for jumping, swinging your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Land on the box with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs. You can jump from the box back to the ground, or preferably step down one leg at a time.

instrucoes: Select the peso on a low pulley machine and grasp the single mão cable attachment that is attached to the low pulley with your left mão.

Face away from the pulley and put your braço straight down with the mão cable attachment in front of your thighs at braços' length with the palms of the mão facing your thighs. This will be your posição inicial.

While maintaining the tronco stationary (no swinging), lift the left braço to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the mão always faces down. Continue to go up until you braço is slightly above parallel to the chão. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movimento and pause for a second at the top.
Now as you inhale lower the braço costas down slowly to the posição inicial.
Once all of the número recomendado de repetições have been performed for this braço, switch braços and perform the exercise with the right one.
instrucoesOriginais: Select the weight on a low pulley machine and grasp the single hand cable attachment that is attached to the low pulley with your left hand.

Face away from the pulley and put your arm straight down with the hand cable attachment in front of your thighs at arms' length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left arm to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hand always faces down. Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
Now as you inhale lower the arm back down slowly to the starting position.
Once all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for this arm, switch arms and perform the exercise with the right one.

instrucoes: Set up a row of cones or other small barriers, placing them a few pés apart.
Stand in front of the first cone with your pés shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by jumping with both pés over the first cone, swinging both braços as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the joelhos, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next cone.
