Continue until you have jumped over all of the cones.
instrucoesOriginais: Set up a row of cones or other small barriers, placing them a few feet apart.
Stand in front of the first cone with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin by jumping with both feet over the first cone, swinging both arms as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next cone.
Continue until you have jumped over all of the cones.

instrucoes: Pick a couple of halters and stand with a straight tronco and the halters on front of your thighs at braços length with the palms of the mão facing your thighs. This will be your posição inicial.

While maintaining the tronco stationary (no swinging), lift the left halter to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the mãos always facing down. Continue to go up until you braço is slightly above parallel to the chão. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movimento and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the halter costas down slowly to the posição inicial as you simultaneously lift the right halter.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the número recomendado de repetições have been performed for each braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down. Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.

instrucoes: Sente-se on an incline bench with the incline set anywhere between 30 to 60 degrees while holding a halter on each mão. Dica: You can change the angle to hit the muscle a little differently each time.
Extend your braços straight in front of you and have your palms facing down with the halters raised about 1 inch above your thighs. This will be your posição inicial.

Lentamente raise the halters straight up until they are slightly above your ombros, while keeping your cotovelos locked. Squeeze at the top for a second and make sure you expire during this portion of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha your head resting down against the bench and your pernas on the chão at all times.
Abaixe the braços costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on an incline bench with the incline set anywhere between 30 to 60 degrees while holding a dumbbell on each hand. Tip: You can change the angle to hit the muscle a little differently each time.
Extend your arms straight in front of you and have your palms facing down with the dumbbells raised about 1 inch above your thighs. This will be your starting position.

Slowly raise the dumbbells straight up until they are slightly above your shoulders, while keeping your elbows locked. Squeeze at the top for a second and make sure you breathe out during this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep your head resting down against the bench and your legs on the floor at all times.
Lower the arms back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand next to a chair or other support, holding on with one mão.
Swing your perna forward, keeping the perna straight. Continue with a downward swing, bringing the perna as far costas as your flexibility allows. Repita 5-10 times, and then switch pernas.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand next to a chair or other support, holding on with one hand.
Swing your leg forward, keeping the leg straight. Continue with a downward swing, bringing the leg as far back as your flexibility allows. Repeat 5-10 times, and then switch legs.

instrucoes: While standing straight, hold a barra plate in both mãos at the 3 and 9 o'clock posiçãos. Your palms should be facing each other and your braços should be extended and locked with a slight bend at the cotovelos and the plate should be down near your waist in front of you as far as you can go. Dica: The braços will remain in this posição throughout the exercise. This will be your posição inicial.

Lentamente raise the plate as you exhale until it is a little above shoulder level. Segure the contraction for a second. Dica: make sure that you do not swing the peso or bend at the cotovelos. Your tronco should remain stationary throughout the movimento as well.
As you inhale, slowly lower the plate costas down to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: While standing straight, hold a barbell plate in both hands at the 3 and 9 o'clock positions. Your palms should be facing each other and your arms should be extended and locked with a slight bend at the elbows and the plate should be down near your waist in front of you as far as you can go. Tip: The arms will remain in this position throughout the exercise. This will be your starting position.

Slowly raise the plate as you exhale until it is a little above shoulder level. Hold the contraction for a second. Tip: make sure that you do not swing the weight or bend at the elbows. Your torso should remain stationary throughout the movement as well.
As you inhale, slowly lower the plate back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on a flat bench while holding a barra using a palms down grip that is about 15 inches apart.
Place the bar on your upper thighs, extend your braços and lock them while keeping a slight bend on the cotovelos. This will be your posição inicial.

Now raise the peso using a semicircular motion and keeping your braços straight as you inhale. Continue the same movimento until the bar is on the other side above your head . (Dica: the bar will travel approximately 180-degrees). At this point your braços should be parallel to the chão with the palms of your mãos facing the ceiling.
Now return the barra to the posição inicial by reversing the motion as you exhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on a flat bench while holding a barbell using a palms down grip that is about 15 inches apart.
Place the bar on your upper thighs, extend your arms and lock them while keeping a slight bend on the elbows. This will be your starting position.

Now raise the weight using a semicircular motion and keeping your arms straight as you inhale. Continue the same movement until the bar is on the other side above your head . (Tip: the bar will travel approximately 180-degrees). At this point your arms should be parallel to the floor with the palms of your hands facing the ceiling.
Now return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, first set the bar in a rack slightly below shoulder level. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids, pushing into the clavicles, and lightly touching the throat. Your mãos should be in a clean grip, touching the bar only with your fingers to help keep it in posição.

Levante the bar off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco. Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head and cotovelos up at all times. This will be your posição inicial.

Bend at the joelhos, sitting down between your pernas. Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Mantenha your joelhos aligned with your pés by consciously using your abductors to push your joelhos out as you squat.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão mainly with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, first set the bar in a rack slightly below shoulder level. Rest the bar on top of the deltoids, pushing into the clavicles, and lightly touching the throat. Your hands should be in a clean grip, touching the bar only with your fingers to help keep it in position.

Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso. Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head and elbows up at all times. This will be your starting position.

Bend at the knees, sitting down between your legs. Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Keep your knees aligned with your feet by consciously using your abductors to push your knees out as you squat.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the legs again and return to the starting position.

nome: Front agachamentos With Two com kettlebells
instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells to your ombros. Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so.

Looking straight ahead at all times, squat as low as you can and pause at the bottom. As you squat down, push your joelhos out. You should squat between your pernas, keeping an upright tronco, with your head and peito up.
Rise costas up by driving through your heels and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so.

Looking straight ahead at all times, squat as low as you can and pause at the bottom. As you squat down, push your knees out. You should squat between your legs, keeping an upright torso, with your head and chest up.
Rise back up by driving through your heels and repeat.

instrucoes: Pick a couple of halters and stand with a straight tronco and the halters on front of your thighs at braços length with the palms of the mão facing your thighs. This will be your posição inicial.

While maintaining the tronco stationary (no swinging), lift the halters to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the mãos always facing down. Continue to go up until you braços are slightly above parallel to the chão. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movimento and pause for a second at the top.
As you inhale, lower the halters costas down slowly to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the dumbbells to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down. Continue to go up until you arms are slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells back down slowly to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Either standing or seated on a high bench, grasp two stirrup cables that are attached to the high pulleys. Grab with the opposing mão so your braços are crisscrossed about you and your palms are facing forward.

Mantenhaing your peito up and maintaining a slight arch in your lower costas, pull the mãoles down as if you were doing a regular pulldown. The range of motion will be more of an arc. During the movimento, rotate your mãos so that in the bottom posição your palms face each other rather than forward. Retorne slowly to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Either standing or seated on a high bench, grasp two stirrup cables that are attached to the high pulleys. Grab with the opposing hand so your arms are crisscrossed about you and your palms are facing forward.

Keeping your chest up and maintaining a slight arch in your lower back, pull the handles down as if you were doing a regular pulldown. The range of motion will be more of an arc. During the movement, rotate your hands so that in the bottom position your palms face each other rather than forward. Return slowly to the starting position and repeat.

instrucoes: Grasp the pull-up bar with a shoulder width undermão grip.
Now hang with your braços fully extended and stick your peito out and lean costas. Dica: You will be leaning costas throughout the entire movimento. This will be your posição inicial.

Start pulling yourself towards the bar with your spine arched throughout the movimento and your head leaning costas as far away from the bar as possible. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: At the upper end of the movimento, your quadris and pernas will be at about a 45-degree angle to the chão.

Mantenha pulling until your collarbone passes the bar and your lower peito or sternum area touches it. Segure that contraction for a second. Dica: By the time you've completed this portion of the movimento; your head will be parallel to the chão.
Lentamente start going costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grasp the pull-up bar with a shoulder width underhand grip.
Now hang with your arms fully extended and stick your chest out and lean back. Tip: You will be leaning back throughout the entire movement. This will be your starting position.

Start pulling yourself towards the bar with your spine arched throughout the movement and your head leaning back as far away from the bar as possible. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: At the upper end of the movement, your hips and legs will be at about a 45-degree angle to the floor.

Keep pulling until your collarbone passes the bar and your lower chest or sternum area touches it. Hold that contraction for a second. Tip: By the time you've completed this portion of the movement; your head will be parallel to the floor.
Slowly start going back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece by adjusting the equipment to fit your body. Place your pés against the footplate in between the rollers as you lie facedown. Your joelhos should be just behind the pad.

Start from the bottom of the movimento. Mantenha your costas arched as you begin the movimento by flexing the joelhos. Drive your toes into the foot plate as you do so. Mantenha your upper body straight, and continue until your body is upright.
Retorne to the posição inicial, keeping your descent under control.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by adjusting the equipment to fit your body. Place your feet against the footplate in between the rollers as you lie facedown. Your knees should be just behind the pad.

Start from the bottom of the movement. Keep your back arched as you begin the movement by flexing the knees. Drive your toes into the foot plate as you do so. Keep your upper body straight, and continue until your body is upright.
Return to the starting position, keeping your descent under control.

instrucoes: Kneel on the chão or an exercise mat and bend at the waist with your braços extended in front of you (perpendicular to the tronco) in order to get into a kneeling push-up posição but with the braços spaced at shoulder width. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the joelhos should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale, lift up your right perna until the hamstrings are in line with the costas while maintaining the 90-degree angle bend. Contract the glutes throughout this movimento and hold the contraction at the top for a second. Dica: At the end of the movimento the upper perna should be parallel to the chão while the calf should be perpendicular to it.
Go costas to the initial posição as you inhale and now repeat with the left perna.
Continue to alternate pernas until all of the recommended repetitions have been performed.
instrucoesOriginais: Kneel on the floor or an exercise mat and bend at the waist with your arms extended in front of you (perpendicular to the torso) in order to get into a kneeling push-up position but with the arms spaced at shoulder width. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift up your right leg until the hamstrings are in line with the back while maintaining the 90-degree angle bend. Contract the glutes throughout this movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second. Tip: At the end of the movement the upper leg should be parallel to the floor while the calf should be perpendicular to it.
Go back to the initial position as you inhale and now repeat with the left leg.
Continue to alternate legs until all of the recommended repetitions have been performed.

instrucoes: Stand holding a light kettlebell by the horns close to your peito. This will be your posição inicial.
Squat down between your pernas until your hamstrings are on your calves. Mantenha your peito and head up and your costas straight.
At the bottom posição, pause and use your cotovelos to push your joelhos out. Retorne to the posição inicial, and repeat for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand holding a light kettlebell by the horns close to your chest. This will be your starting position.
Squat down between your legs until your hamstrings are on your calves. Keep your chest and head up and your back straight.
At the bottom position, pause and use your elbows to push your knees out. Return to the starting position, and repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with a bar on a rack at shoulder height. Rack the bar across the rear of your ombros as you would a power squat, not on top of your ombros. Mantenha your costas tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your joelhos slightly bent. Step costas from the rack.
Comece by bending at the quadris, moving them costas as you bend over to near parallel. Mantenha your costas arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Reverse the motion by extending through the quadris with your glutes and hamstrings. Continue until you have returned to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a bar on a rack at shoulder height. Rack the bar across the rear of your shoulders as you would a power squat, not on top of your shoulders. Keep your back tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your knees slightly bent. Step back from the rack.
Begin by bending at the hips, moving them back as you bend over to near parallel. Keep your back arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Reverse the motion by extending through the hips with your glutes and hamstrings. Continue until you have returned to the starting position.

instrucoes: Comece with a bar on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of your ombros as you would a power squat, not on top of your ombros. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the chão when bent over. Mantenha your costas tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your joelhos slightly bent. Mantenha your costas arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Comece the motion by extending through the quadris with your glutes and hamstrings, and you are standing with the peso. Lentamente lower the peso costas to the pins returning to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a bar on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of your shoulders as you would a power squat, not on top of your shoulders. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the floor when bent over. Keep your back tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your knees slightly bent. Keep your back arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Begin the motion by extending through the hips with your glutes and hamstrings, and you are standing with the weight. Slowly lower the weight back to the pins returning to the starting position.

instrucoes: Hang from a chin-up bar using an undermão grip (palms facing you) that is slightly wider than shoulder width.
Now flexione os joelhos at a 90 degree angle so that the calves are parallel to the chão while the thighs remain perpendicular to it. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale, pull yourself up while crunching your joelhos up at the same time until your joelhos are at peito level. You will stop going up as soon as your nose is at the same level as the bar. Dica: When you get to this point you should also be finishing the crunch at the same time.
Lentamente start to inhale as you return to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hang from a chin-up bar using an underhand grip (palms facing you) that is slightly wider than shoulder width.
Now bend your knees at a 90 degree angle so that the calves are parallel to the floor while the thighs remain perpendicular to it. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, pull yourself up while crunching your knees up at the same time until your knees are at chest level. You will stop going up as soon as your nose is at the same level as the bar. Tip: When you get to this point you should also be finishing the crunch at the same time.
Slowly start to inhale as you return to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on the chão with your joelhos bent and pés together.
Interlock your fingers behind your head. This will be your posição inicial.
Curl downwards, bringing your cotovelos to the inside of your thighs. After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial with your head up and your costas straight. Repita for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on the floor with your knees bent and feet together.
Interlock your fingers behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Curl downwards, bringing your elbows to the inside of your thighs. After a brief pause, return to the starting position with your head up and your back straight. Repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece in a pushup posição on the chão. This will be your posição inicial.
Using both pernas, jump forward landing with your pés next to your mãos. Mantenha your head up as you do so.
Retorne to the posição inicial and immediately repeat the movimento, continuing for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a pushup position on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Using both legs, jump forward landing with your feet next to your hands. Keep your head up as you do so.
Return to the starting position and immediately repeat the movement, continuing for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: Place the costas of your tronco against the costas pad of the machine and hook your ombros under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your pernas in the platform using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Dica: Mantenha your head up at all times and also maintain the costas on the pad at all times.
Place your braços on the side mãoles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side mãoles from a facing front posição to a diagonal posição).

Now straighten your pernas without locking the joelhos. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot posiçãoing section).

Comece to slowly lower the unit by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (costas on the pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the chão with mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.
Position your legs in the platform using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).

Now straighten your legs without locking the knees. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright and a halter on each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco.
The palms of the mãos should be facing your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

Now, while holding your upper braço stationary, exhale and curl the peso forward while contraindo the biceps. Continue to raise the peso until the biceps are fully contracted and the halter is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a brief moment as you squeeze the biceps. Dica: Focus on keeping the elbow stationary and only moving your forebraço.
After the brief pause, inhale and slowly begin the lower the halters costas down to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright and a dumbbell on each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
The palms of the hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight forward while contracting the biceps. Continue to raise the weight until the biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief moment as you squeeze the biceps. Tip: Focus on keeping the elbow stationary and only moving your forearm.
After the brief pause, inhale and slowly begin the lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nomeOriginal: Hammer Grip Incline DB Bench Press
instrucoes: Lie costas on an incline bench with a halter on each mão on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.
By using your thighs to help you get the halters up, clean the halters one braço at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, keep the palms of your mãos with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Mantenha your cotovelos flared out with the upper braços in line with the ombros (perpendicular to the tronco) and the cotovelos bent creating a 90-degree angle between the upper braço and the forebraço. This will be your posição inicial.
Now bring down the pesos slowly to your side as you inspire. Mantenha full control of the halters at all times.

As you expire, push the halters up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the halters costas in your thighs and then on the chão. This is the safest manner to dispose of the halters.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on an incline bench with a dumbbell on each hand on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.
By using your thighs to help you get the dumbbells up, clean the dumbbells one arm at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, keep the palms of your hands with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Keep your elbows flared out with the upper arms in line with the shoulders (perpendicular to the torso) and the elbows bent creating a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm. This will be your starting position.
Now bring down the weights slowly to your side as you breathe in. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the dumbbells back in your thighs and then on the floor. This is the safest manner to dispose of the dumbbells.

instrucoes: In a seated posição, extend your pernas over a foam roll so that it is posição on the costas of the upper pernas. Place your mãos to the side or behind you to help support your peso. This will be your posição inicial.
Using your mãos, lift your quadris off of the chão and shift your peso on the foam roll to one perna. Relax the hamstrings of the perna you are stretching.
Roll over the foam from below the hip to above the costas of the knee, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repita for the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: In a seated position, extend your legs over a foam roll so that it is position on the back of the upper legs. Place your hands to the side or behind you to help support your weight. This will be your starting position.
Using your hands, lift your hips off of the floor and shift your weight on the foam roll to one leg. Relax the hamstrings of the leg you are stretching.
Roll over the foam from below the hip to above the back of the knee, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat for the other leg.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with one perna extended above you, with the hip at ninety degrees. Mantenha the other perna flat on the chão.
Loop a belt, band, or rope over the ball of your foot. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull on the belt to create tension in the calves and hamstrings. Segure this stretch for 10-30 seconds, and repeat with the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with one leg extended above you, with the hip at ninety degrees. Keep the other leg flat on the floor.
Loop a belt, band, or rope over the ball of your foot. This will be your starting position.
Pull on the belt to create tension in the calves and hamstrings. Hold this stretch for 10-30 seconds, and repeat with the other leg.

instrucoes: With your costas to the wall bend at the waist and place both mãos on the chão at shoulder width.

Kick yourself up against the wall with your braços straight. Your body should be upside down with the braços and pernas fully extended. Mantenha your whole body as straight as possible. Dica: If doing this for the first time, have a spotter help you. Also, make sure that you keep facing the wall with your head, rather than looking down.
Lentamente lower yourself to the ground as you inhale until your head almost touches the chão. Dica: It is of utmost importance that you come down slow in order to avoid head injury.
Push yourself costas up slowly as you exhale until your cotovelos are nearly locked.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: With your back to the wall bend at the waist and place both hands on the floor at shoulder width.

Kick yourself up against the wall with your arms straight. Your body should be upside down with the arms and legs fully extended. Keep your whole body as straight as possible. Tip: If doing this for the first time, have a spotter help you. Also, make sure that you keep facing the wall with your head, rather than looking down.
Slowly lower yourself to the ground as you inhale until your head almost touches the floor. Tip: It is of utmost importance that you come down slow in order to avoid head injury.
Push yourself back up slowly as you exhale until your elbows are nearly locked.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with a shoulder width, double overmão or hook grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh posição. Your costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Comece by aggressively extending through the quadris, joelhos and ankles, driving the peso upward. As you do so, shrug your ombros towards your ears.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the tronco upright and cotovelos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh position. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the weight upward. As you do so, shrug your shoulders towards your ears.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.

instrucoes: Comece with a shoulder width, double overmão or hook grip, with the bar hanging just below the joelhos. Your costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Comece by aggressively extending through the quadris, joelhos and ankles, driving the peso upward. As you do so, shrug your ombros towards your ears. As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços with the cotovelos up and out.

At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your cotovelos under the bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front squat posição, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat with the mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat posição, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the tronco upright and cotovelos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, with the bar hanging just below the knees. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the weight upward. As you do so, shrug your shoulders towards your ears. As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out.

At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front squat position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.

instrucoes: Comece with a wide grip on the bar, with an overmão or hook grip. The pés should be directly below the quadris with the pés turned out. Your joelhos should be slightly bent, and the tronco inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be at the quadris. This will be your posição inicial.
Aggressively extend through the pernas and quadris. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the cotovelos to flex to the side.

As you move your pés into the receiving posição, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Retorne to a standing posição with the peso overhead. Follow by returning the peso to the ground under control.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a wide grip on the bar, with an overhand or hook grip. The feet should be directly below the hips with the feet turned out. Your knees should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be at the hips. This will be your starting position.
Aggressively extend through the legs and hips. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight overhead. Follow by returning the weight to the ground under control.

instrucoes: Comece with a wide grip on the bar, with an overmão or hook grip. The pés should be directly below the quadris with the pés turned out. Your joelhos should be slightly bent, and the tronco inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be just below the joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Aggressively extend through the pernas and quadris. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the cotovelos to flex to the side.

As you move your pés into the receiving posição, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Retorne to a standing posição with the peso overhead, and then return the peso to the chão under control.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a wide grip on the bar, with an overhand or hook grip. The feet should be directly below the hips with the feet turned out. Your knees should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be just below the knees. This will be your starting position.
Aggressively extend through the legs and hips. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight overhead, and then return the weight to the floor under control.

instrucoes: Comece with a bar on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Suspend the bar using chains or suspension straps.

Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of your ombros as you would a power squat, not on top of your traps. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the chão when bent over. Mantenha your costas tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your joelhos slightly bent. Mantenha your costas arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Comece the motion by extending through the quadris with your glutes and hamstrings, and you are standing with the peso.
Lentamente lower the peso costas to the posição inicial, where it is supported by the chains.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a bar on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Suspend the bar using chains or suspension straps.

Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of your shoulders as you would a power squat, not on top of your traps. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the floor when bent over. Keep your back tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your knees slightly bent. Keep your back arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Begin the motion by extending through the hips with your glutes and hamstrings, and you are standing with the weight.
Slowly lower the weight back to the starting position, where it is supported by the chains.

instrucoes: Hang from a chin-up bar with both braços extended at braços length in top of you using either a wide grip or a medium grip. The pernas should be straight down with the pelvis rolled slightly costaswards. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve your pernas until the tronco makes a 90-degree angle with the pernas. Exhale as you perform this movimento and hold the contraction for a second or so.
Go costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hang from a chin-up bar with both arms extended at arms length in top of you using either a wide grip or a medium grip. The legs should be straight down with the pelvis rolled slightly backwards. This will be your starting position.
Raise your legs until the torso makes a 90-degree angle with the legs. Exhale as you perform this movement and hold the contraction for a second or so.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Hang from a chin-up bar with your pernas and pés together using an overmão grip (palms facing away from you) that is slightly wider than shoulder width. Dica: You may use wrist wraps in order to facilitate holding on to the bar.

Now flexione os joelhos at a 90 degree angle and bring the upper pernas forward so that the calves are perpendicular to the chão while the thighs remain parallel to it. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull your pernas up as you exhale until you almost touch your shins with the bar above you. Dica: Try to straighten your pernas as much as possible while at the top.
Abaixe your pernas as slowly as possible until you reach the posição inicial. Dica: Avoid swinging and using momentum at all times.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hang from a chin-up bar with your legs and feet together using an overhand grip (palms facing away from you) that is slightly wider than shoulder width. Tip: You may use wrist wraps in order to facilitate holding on to the bar.

Now bend your knees at a 90 degree angle and bring the upper legs forward so that the calves are perpendicular to the floor while the thighs remain parallel to it. This will be your starting position.
Pull your legs up as you exhale until you almost touch your shins with the bar above you. Tip: Try to straighten your legs as much as possible while at the top.
Lower your legs as slowly as possible until you reach the starting position. Tip: Avoid swinging and using momentum at all times.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: This drill helps you learn the snatch. Comece by holding a light peso across the costas of the ombros. Your pés should be slightly wider than hip width apart with the pés turned out, the same posição that you would perform a squat with.
Comece by dipping with the joelhos slightly, and popping costas up to briefly unload the bar. Drive yourself underneath the bar, elevating it overhead as you descend into a full squat.
Retorne to a standing posição.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill helps you learn the snatch. Begin by holding a light weight across the back of the shoulders. Your feet should be slightly wider than hip width apart with the feet turned out, the same position that you would perform a squat with.
Begin by dipping with the knees slightly, and popping back up to briefly unload the bar. Drive yourself underneath the bar, elevating it overhead as you descend into a full squat.
Return to a standing position.

instrucoes: Utilize a heavy bag for this exercise. Assume an upright stance next to the bag, with your pés staggered, fairly wide apart. Place your mão on the bag at about peito height. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by twisting at the waist, pushing the bag forward as hard as possible. Perform this move quickly, pushing the bag away from your body.
Receive the bag as it swings costas by reversing these steps.
instrucoesOriginais: Utilize a heavy bag for this exercise. Assume an upright stance next to the bag, with your feet staggered, fairly wide apart. Place your hand on the bag at about chest height. This will be your starting position.
Begin by twisting at the waist, pushing the bag forward as hard as possible. Perform this move quickly, pushing the bag away from your body.
Receive the bag as it swings back by reversing these steps.

instrucoes: Stand between a couple of high pulleys and grab a mãole in each braço. Position your upper braços in a way that they are parallel to the chão with the palms of your mãos facing you. This will be your posição inicial.

Curl the mãoles towards you until they are next to your ears. Make sure that as you do so you flex your biceps and exhale. The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forebraços should move. Segure for a second in the contracted posição as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente bring costas the braços to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand between a couple of high pulleys and grab a handle in each arm. Position your upper arms in a way that they are parallel to the floor with the palms of your hands facing you. This will be your starting position.

Curl the handles towards you until they are next to your ears. Make sure that as you do so you flex your biceps and exhale. The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Hold for a second in the contracted position as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly bring back the arms to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Position yourself on your mãos and joelhos on the ground. Maintaining good posture, raise one bent knee off of the ground. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing the knee in a bent posição, rotate the femur in an arc, attempting to make a big circle with your knee.
Perform this slowly for a number of repetitions, and repeat on the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Position yourself on your hands and knees on the ground. Maintaining good posture, raise one bent knee off of the ground. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the knee in a bent position, rotate the femur in an arc, attempting to make a big circle with your knee.
Perform this slowly for a number of repetitions, and repeat on the other side.

instrucoes: Secure one end of the band to the lower portion of a post and attach the other to one ankle.
Facing the attachment point of the band, hold on to the column to stabilize yourself.
Mantenhaing your head and your peito up, move the resisted perna costas as far as you can while keeping the knee straight.
Retorne the perna to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure one end of the band to the lower portion of a post and attach the other to one ankle.
Facing the attachment point of the band, hold on to the column to stabilize yourself.
Keeping your head and your chest up, move the resisted leg back as far as you can while keeping the knee straight.
Return the leg to the starting position.

instrucoes: Secure one end of the band to the lower portion of a post and attach the other to one ankle.
Face away from the attachment point of the band.
Mantenhaing your head and your peito up, raise your knee up to 90 degrees and pause.
Retorne the perna to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure one end of the band to the lower portion of a post and attach the other to one ankle.
Face away from the attachment point of the band.
Keeping your head and your chest up, raise your knee up to 90 degrees and pause.
Return the leg to the starting position.

instrucoes: After choosing a suitable band, lay down in the middle of the rack, after securing the band on either side of you. If your rack doesn't have pegs, the band can be secured using heavy halters or similar objects, just ensure they won't move.
Adjust your posição so that the band is directly over your quadris. Bend your joelhos and place your pés flat on the chão. Your mãos can be on the chão or holding the band in posição.
Mantenhaing your ombros on the ground, drive through your heels to raise your quadris, pushing into the band as high as you can.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: After choosing a suitable band, lay down in the middle of the rack, after securing the band on either side of you. If your rack doesn't have pegs, the band can be secured using heavy dumbbells or similar objects, just ensure they won't move.
Adjust your position so that the band is directly over your hips. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor. Your hands can be on the floor or holding the band in position.
Keeping your shoulders on the ground, drive through your heels to raise your hips, pushing into the band as high as you can.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Seat yourself on the chão.
Straddle an exercise ball between both pernas and lower your quadris down toward the chão.

Hug your braços around the ball to support your body. Adjust your pernas so that your pés are flat on the chão and your joelhos line up over your ankles. Mantenha a good grip on the ball so it doesn't roll away from you and send you costas onto your buttocks.
instrucoesOriginais: Seat yourself on the floor.
Straddle an exercise ball between both legs and lower your hips down toward the floor.

Hug your arms around the ball to support your body. Adjust your legs so that your feet are flat on the floor and your knees line up over your ankles. Keep a good grip on the ball so it doesn't roll away from you and send you back onto your buttocks.

instrucoes: Deite-se on your costas and pull both joelhos up to your peito.
Segure your braços under the joelhos, not over (that would put to much pressure on your knee joints).
Lentamente pull the joelhos toward your ombros. This also stretches your buttocks muscles.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on your back and pull both knees up to your chest.
Hold your arms under the knees, not over (that would put to much pressure on your knee joints).
Slowly pull the knees toward your shoulders. This also stretches your buttocks muscles.

instrucoes: Set up a row of hurdles or other small barriers, placing them a few pés apart.
Stand in front of the first hurdle with your pés shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by jumping with both pés over the first hurdle, swinging both braços as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the joelhos, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next hurdle. Continue until you have jumped over all of the hurdles.
instrucoesOriginais: Set up a row of hurdles or other small barriers, placing them a few feet apart.
Stand in front of the first hurdle with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin by jumping with both feet over the first hurdle, swinging both arms as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next hurdle. Continue until you have jumped over all of the hurdles.

instrucoes: Lie face down on a hyperextension bench, tucking your ankles securely under the footpads.
Adjust the upper pad if possible so your upper thighs lie flat across the wide pad, leaving enough room for you to bend at the waist without any restriction.

With your body straight, cross your braços in front of you (my preference) or behind your head. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: You can also hold a peso plate for extra resistance in front of you under your crossed braços.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping your costas flat. Inhale as you perform this movimento. Mantenha moving forward until you feel a nice stretch on the hamstrings and you can no longer keep going without a rounding of the costas. Dica: Never round the costas as you perform this exercise. Also, some people can go farther than others. The key thing is that you go as far as your body allows you to without rounding the costas.

Lentamente raise your tronco costas to the initial posição as you inhale. Dica: Avoid the temptation to arch your costas past a straight line. Also, do not swing the tronco at any time in order to protect the costas from injury.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face down on a hyperextension bench, tucking your ankles securely under the footpads.
Adjust the upper pad if possible so your upper thighs lie flat across the wide pad, leaving enough room for you to bend at the waist without any restriction.

With your body straight, cross your arms in front of you (my preference) or behind your head. This will be your starting position. Tip: You can also hold a weight plate for extra resistance in front of you under your crossed arms.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping your back flat. Inhale as you perform this movement. Keep moving forward until you feel a nice stretch on the hamstrings and you can no longer keep going without a rounding of the back. Tip: Never round the back as you perform this exercise. Also, some people can go farther than others. The key thing is that you go as far as your body allows you to without rounding the back.

Slowly raise your torso back to the initial position as you inhale. Tip: Avoid the temptation to arch your back past a straight line. Also, do not swing the torso at any time in order to protect the back from injury.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: With someone holding down your pernas, slide yourself down to the edge a flat bench until your quadris hang off the end of the bench. Dica: Your entire upper body should be hanging down towards the chão. Also, you will be in the same posição as if you were on a hyperextension bench but the range of motion will be shorter due to the height of the flat bench vs. that of the hyperextension bench.

With your body straight, cross your braços in front of you (my preference) or behind your head. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: You can also hold a peso plate for extra resistance in front of you under your crossed braços.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping your costas flat. Inhale as you perform this movimento. Mantenha moving forward until you almost touch the chão or you feel a nice stretch on the hamstrings (whichever comes first). Dica: Never round the costas as you perform this exercise.

Lentamente raise your tronco costas to the initial posição as you exhale. Dica: Avoid the temptation to arch your costas past a straight line. Also, do not swing the tronco at any time in order to protect the costas from injury.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: With someone holding down your legs, slide yourself down to the edge a flat bench until your hips hang off the end of the bench. Tip: Your entire upper body should be hanging down towards the floor. Also, you will be in the same position as if you were on a hyperextension bench but the range of motion will be shorter due to the height of the flat bench vs. that of the hyperextension bench.

With your body straight, cross your arms in front of you (my preference) or behind your head. This will be your starting position. Tip: You can also hold a weight plate for extra resistance in front of you under your crossed arms.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping your back flat. Inhale as you perform this movement. Keep moving forward until you almost touch the floor or you feel a nice stretch on the hamstrings (whichever comes first). Tip: Never round the back as you perform this exercise.

Slowly raise your torso back to the initial position as you exhale. Tip: Avoid the temptation to arch your back past a straight line. Also, do not swing the torso at any time in order to protect the back from injury.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: IT com elástico and Glute Stretch
instrucoes: Loop a belt, rope, or band around one of your pés, and swing that perna across your body to the opposite side, keeping the perna extended as you lay on the ground. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your foot off of the chão, pull on the belt, using the tension to pull the toes up. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and repeat on the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Loop a belt, rope, or band around one of your feet, and swing that leg across your body to the opposite side, keeping the leg extended as you lay on the ground. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your foot off of the floor, pull on the belt, using the tension to pull the toes up. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and repeat on the other side.

instrucoes: Lay on your side, with the bottom perna placed onto a foam roller between the hip and the knee. The other perna can be crossed in front of you.
Place as much of your peso as is tolerable onto your bottom perna; there is no need to keep your bottom perna in contact with the ground. Be sure to relax the muscles of the perna you are stretching.
Roll your perna over the foam from you hip to your knee, pausing for 10-30 seconds at points of tension. Repita with the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on your side, with the bottom leg placed onto a foam roller between the hip and the knee. The other leg can be crossed in front of you.
Place as much of your weight as is tolerable onto your bottom leg; there is no need to keep your bottom leg in contact with the ground. Be sure to relax the muscles of the leg you are stretching.
Roll your leg over the foam from you hip to your knee, pausing for 10-30 seconds at points of tension. Repeat with the opposite leg.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés close together. Mantenhaing your pernas straight, stretch down and put your mãos on the chão directly in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by walking your mãos forward slowly, alternating your left and your right. As you do so, bend only at the hip, keeping your pernas straight.
Mantenha going until your body is parallel to the ground in a pushup posição.
Now, keep your mãos in place and slowly take short steps with your pés, moving only a few inches at a time.
Continue walking until your pés are by hour mãos, keeping your pernas straight as you do so.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet close together. Keeping your legs straight, stretch down and put your hands on the floor directly in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Begin by walking your hands forward slowly, alternating your left and your right. As you do so, bend only at the hip, keeping your legs straight.
Keep going until your body is parallel to the ground in a pushup position.
Now, keep your hands in place and slowly take short steps with your feet, moving only a few inches at a time.
Continue walking until your feet are by hour hands, keeping your legs straight as you do so.

instrucoes: Segure a barra with an overmão grip (palms down) that is a little closer together than shoulder width.
Lie costas on an incline bench set at any angle between 45-75-degrees.
Bring the bar overhead with your braços extended and cotovelos in. The braços should be in line with the tronco above the head. This will be your posição inicial.

Now lower the bar in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forebraços touch your biceps. Inhale as you perform this movimento. Dica: Mantenha your upper braços stationary and close to your head at all times. Only the forebraços should move.
Retorne to the posição inicial as you expire and you contract the triceps. Segure the contraction for a second.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a barbell with an overhand grip (palms down) that is a little closer together than shoulder width.
Lie back on an incline bench set at any angle between 45-75-degrees.
Bring the bar overhead with your arms extended and elbows in. The arms should be in line with the torso above the head. This will be your starting position.

Now lower the bar in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Inhale as you perform this movement. Tip: Keep your upper arms stationary and close to your head at all times. Only the forearms should move.
Return to the starting position as you breathe out and you contract the triceps. Hold the contraction for a second.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab a halter in each mão and lie face down on an incline bench that is set to an incline that is approximately 30 degrees.
Let the braços hang to your sides fully extended as they point to the chão.
Turn the wrists until your mãos have a pronated (palms down) grip.
Now flare the cotovelos out. This will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, start to pull the halters up as if you are doing a reverse bench press. You will do this by bending at the cotovelos and bringing the upper braços up as you let the forebraços hang. Continue this motion until the upper braços are at the same level as your costas. Dica: The cotovelos will come out to the side and your upper braços and tronco should make the letter "T" at the top of the movimento. Segure the contraction at the top for a second.
Lentamente go costas down to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lie face down on an incline bench that is set to an incline that is approximately 30 degrees.
Let the arms hang to your sides fully extended as they point to the floor.
Turn the wrists until your hands have a pronated (palms down) grip.
Now flare the elbows out. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, start to pull the dumbbells up as if you are doing a reverse bench press. You will do this by bending at the elbows and bringing the upper arms up as you let the forearms hang. Continue this motion until the upper arms are at the same level as your back. Tip: The elbows will come out to the side and your upper arms and torso should make the letter "T" at the top of the movement. Hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly go back down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the mãoles. Your upper braços should be about 45 degrees to the body, with your head and peito up. The cotovelos should be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by extending through the elbow, pressing the mãoles together straight in front of you. Mantenha your shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movimento.
After pausing at full extension, return to the posição inicial, keeping tension on the cables.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the weight to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Your upper arms should be about 45 degrees to the body, with your head and chest up. The elbows should be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together straight in front of you. Keep your shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movement.
After pausing at full extension, return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cables.

instrucoes: To get yourself into the posição inicial, set the pulleys at the chão level (lowest level possible on the machine that is below your tronco).
Place an incline bench (set at 45 degrees) in between the pulleys, select a peso on each one and grab a pulley on each mão.
With a mãole on each mão, lie on the incline bench and bring your mãos together at braços length in front of your face. This will be your posição inicial.

With a slight bend of your cotovelos (in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon), lower your braços out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha in mind that throughout the movimento, the braços should remain stationary. The movimento should only occur at the shoulder joint.

Retorne your braços costas to the posição inicial as you squeeze your peito muscles and exhale. Segure the contracted posição for a second. Dica: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the pesos.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: To get yourself into the starting position, set the pulleys at the floor level (lowest level possible on the machine that is below your torso).
Place an incline bench (set at 45 degrees) in between the pulleys, select a weight on each one and grab a pulley on each hand.
With a handle on each hand, lie on the incline bench and bring your hands together at arms length in front of your face. This will be your starting position.

With a slight bend of your elbows (in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon), lower your arms out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your chest. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the arms should remain stationary. The movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.

Return your arms back to the starting position as you squeeze your chest muscles and exhale. Hold the contracted position for a second. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the weights.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

nome: Incline com halter Bench With Palms Facing In
nomeOriginal: Incline Dumbbell Bench With Palms Facing In
instrucoes: Lie costas on an incline bench with a halter on each mão on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.
By using your thighs to help you get the halters up, clean the halters one braço at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, keep the palms of your mãos with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Mantenha your cotovelos flared out with the upper braços in line with the ombros (perpendicular to the tronco) and the cotovelos bent creating a 90-degree angle between the upper braço and the forebraço. This will be your posição inicial.
Now bring down the pesos slowly to your side as you inspire. Mantenha full control of the halters at all times.

As you expire, push the halters up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the halters costas in your thighs and then on the chão. This is the safest manner to dispose of the halters.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on an incline bench with a dumbbell on each hand on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.
By using your thighs to help you get the dumbbells up, clean the dumbbells one arm at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.

Once at shoulder width, keep the palms of your hands with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Keep your elbows flared out with the upper arms in line with the shoulders (perpendicular to the torso) and the elbows bent creating a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm. This will be your starting position.
Now bring down the weights slowly to your side as you breathe in. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the dumbbells back in your thighs and then on the floor. This is the safest manner to dispose of the dumbbells.

instrucoes: Sit costas on an incline bench with a halter in each mão held at braços length. Mantenha your cotovelos close to your tronco and rotate the palms of your mãos until they are facing forward. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the pesos forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit back on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand held at arms length. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the weights forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Segure a halter on each mão and lie on an incline bench that is set to an incline angle of no more than 30 degrees.
Extend your braços above you with a slight bend at the cotovelos.
Now rotate the wrists so that the palms of your mãos are facing you. Dica: The pinky fingers should be next to each other. This will be your posição inicial.

As you inspire, start to slowly lower the braços to the side while keeping the braços extended and while rotating the wrists until the palms of the mão are facing each other. Dica: At the end of the movimento the braços will be by your side with the palms facing the ceiling.

As you exhale start to bring the halters costas up to the posição inicial by reversing the motion and rotating the mãos so that the pinky fingers are next to each other again. Dica: Mantenha in mind that the movimento will only happen at the shoulder joint and at the wrist. There is no motion that happens at the elbow joint.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a dumbbell on each hand and lie on an incline bench that is set to an incline angle of no more than 30 degrees.
Extend your arms above you with a slight bend at the elbows.
Now rotate the wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing you. Tip: The pinky fingers should be next to each other. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe in, start to slowly lower the arms to the side while keeping the arms extended and while rotating the wrists until the palms of the hand are facing each other. Tip: At the end of the movement the arms will be by your side with the palms facing the ceiling.

As you exhale start to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position by reversing the motion and rotating the hands so that the pinky fingers are next to each other again. Tip: Keep in mind that the movement will only happen at the shoulder joint and at the wrist. There is no motion that happens at the elbow joint.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Incline com halter Flyes - With A Twist
nomeOriginal: Incline Dumbbell Flyes - With A Twist
instrucoes: Segure a halter in each mão and lie on an incline bench that is set to an incline angle of no more than 30 degrees.
Extend your braços above you with a slight bend at the cotovelos.
Now rotate the wrists so that the palms of your mãos are facing you. Dica: The pinky fingers should be next to each other. This will be your posição inicial.

As you inspire, start to slowly lower the braços to the side while keeping the braços extended and while rotating the wrists until the palms of the mão are facing each other. Dica: At the end of the movimento the braços will be by your side with the palms facing the ceiling.

As you exhale start to bring the halters costas up to the posição inicial by reversing the motion and rotating the mãos so that the pinky fingers are next to each other again. Dica: Mantenha in mind that the movimento will only happen at the shoulder joint and at the wrist. There is no motion that happens at the elbow joint.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie on an incline bench that is set to an incline angle of no more than 30 degrees.
Extend your arms above you with a slight bend at the elbows.
Now rotate the wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing you. Tip: The pinky fingers should be next to each other. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe in, start to slowly lower the arms to the side while keeping the arms extended and while rotating the wrists until the palms of the hand are facing each other. Tip: At the end of the movement the arms will be by your side with the palms facing the ceiling.

As you exhale start to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position by reversing the motion and rotating the hands so that the pinky fingers are next to each other again. Tip: Keep in mind that the movement will only happen at the shoulder joint and at the wrist. There is no motion that happens at the elbow joint.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie costas on an incline bench with a halter in each mão atop your thighs. The palms of your mãos will be facing each other.
Then, using your thighs to help push the halters up, lift the halters one at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.
Once you have the halters raised to shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your mãos are facing away from you. This will be your posição inicial.
Be sure to keep full control of the halters at all times. Then expire and push the halters up with your peito.
Lock your braços at the top, hold for a second, and then start slowly lowering the peso. Tip Ideally, lowering the pesos should take about twice as long as raising them.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the halters costas on your thighs and then on the chão. This is the safest manner to release the halters.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand atop your thighs. The palms of your hands will be facing each other.
Then, using your thighs to help push the dumbbells up, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them at shoulder width.
Once you have the dumbbells raised to shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Be sure to keep full control of the dumbbells at all times. Then breathe out and push the dumbbells up with your chest.
Lock your arms at the top, hold for a second, and then start slowly lowering the weight. Tip Ideally, lowering the weights should take about twice as long as raising them.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the dumbbells back on your thighs and then on the floor. This is the safest manner to release the dumbbells.

instrucoes: Seat yourself on an incline bench with a halter in each mão. You should pressed firmly against he costas with your pés together. Allow the halters to hang straight down at your side, holding them with a neutral grip. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by flexing at the elbow, attempting to keep the upper braço stationary.
Continue to the top of the movimento and pause, then slowly return to the start posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Seat yourself on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. You should pressed firmly against he back with your feet together. Allow the dumbbells to hang straight down at your side, holding them with a neutral grip. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by flexing at the elbow, attempting to keep the upper arm stationary.
Continue to the top of the movement and pause, then slowly return to the start position.

instrucoes: Segure a halter in each mão and lie costas on an incline bench.
The halters should be at braço's length hanging at your sides and your palms should be facing out. This will be your posição inicial.

Now as you exhale curl the peso outward and up while keeping your forebraços in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the halters are at shoulder height and to the sides of your deltoids. Dica: The end of the movimento should look similar to a double biceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movimento, start to inhale and slowly lower the pesos costas to the posição inicial using the same path used to bring them up.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie back on an incline bench.
The dumbbells should be at arm's length hanging at your sides and your palms should be facing out. This will be your starting position.

Now as you exhale curl the weight outward and up while keeping your forearms in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the dumbbells are at shoulder height and to the sides of your deltoids. Tip: The end of the movement should look similar to a double biceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, start to inhale and slowly lower the weights back to the starting position using the same path used to bring them up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand facing bench or sturdy elevated platform. Place mãos on edge of bench or platform, slightly wider than shoulder width.
