Position forefoot costas from bench or platform with braços and body straight. Arms should be perpendicular to body. Mantenhaing body straight, lower peito to edge of box or platform by bending braços.
Push body up until braços are extended. Repita.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand facing bench or sturdy elevated platform. Place hands on edge of bench or platform, slightly wider than shoulder width.
Position forefoot back from bench or platform with arms and body straight. Arms should be perpendicular to body. Keeping body straight, lower chest to edge of box or platform by bending arms.
Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

instrucoes: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your mãos next to one another on the bar.
Position your pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your body straight, lower your peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos, pressing yourself costas up.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands next to one another on the bar.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.

instrucoes: For this drill you will need a box about 12 inches high, and two thick mats or aerobics steps.
Place the steps just outside of your ombros, and place your pés on top of the box so that you are in an incline pushup posição, your mãos just inside the steps. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece by bending at the cotovelos to lower your body, quickly reversing posição to push your body off of the ground. As you leave the ground, move your mãos onto the steps, bending your cotovelos to absorb the impact.
Repita the motion to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: For this drill you will need a box about 12 inches high, and two thick mats or aerobics steps.

Place the steps just outside of your shoulders, and place your feet on top of the box so that you are in an incline pushup position, your hands just inside the steps. This will be your starting position.

Begin by bending at the elbows to lower your body, quickly reversing position to push your body off of the ground. As you leave the ground, move your hands onto the steps, bending your elbows to absorb the impact.
Repeat the motion to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your mãos on the bar, with your mãos about shoulder width apart.
Position your pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your body straight, lower your peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos, pressing yourself costas up.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands on the bar, with your hands about shoulder width apart.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.

instrucoes: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your mãos on the bar palms up, with your mãos about shoulder width apart.
Position your pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your body straight, lower your peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos, pressing yourself costas up.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands on the bar palms up, with your hands about shoulder width apart.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.

instrucoes: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your mãos on the bar, with your mãos wider than shoulder width.
Position your pés costas from the bar with braços and body straight. Your braços should be perpendicular to the body. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your body straight, lower your peito to the bar by bending the braços.
Retorne to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos, pressing yourself costas up.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands on the bar, with your hands wider than shoulder width.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. Your arms should be perpendicular to the body. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your pernas extended. Loop a belt, rope, or band around one of your pés, and swing that perna as far to the side as you can. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull gently on the belt to create tension in your groin and hamstring muscles. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and repeat on the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Loop a belt, rope, or band around one of your feet, and swing that leg as far to the side as you can. This will be your starting position.
Pull gently on the belt to create tension in your groin and hamstring muscles. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and repeat on the other side.

nome: Intermediate Hip Flexor and Quad Stretch
nomeOriginal: Intermediate Hip Flexor and Quad Stretch
instrucoes: Lie face down on the chão, with a rope, belt, or band looped around one foot.

Flex the knee and extend the hip of the perna to be stretched, using both mãos to pull on the belt. Your knee and your hip should come off of the chão, creating tension in the hip flexors and quadriceps. Segure the stretch for 10-20 seconds, and repeat on the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face down on the floor, with a rope, belt, or band looped around one foot.

Flex the knee and extend the hip of the leg to be stretched, using both hands to pull on the belt. Your knee and your hip should come off of the floor, creating tension in the hip flexors and quadriceps. Hold the stretch for 10-20 seconds, and repeat on the other leg.

instrucoes: Choke the band around a post. The band should be at the same height as your elbow. Stand with your right side to the band a couple of pés away.
Grasp the end of the band with your right mão, and keep your elbow pressed firmly to your side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with your elbow to keep it firmly in posição.
With your upper braço in posição, your elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with your mão reaching away from your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Execute the movimento by rotating your braço in a foremão motion, keeping your elbow in place.
Continue as far as you are able, pause, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Choke the band around a post. The band should be at the same height as your elbow. Stand with your right side to the band a couple of feet away.
Grasp the end of the band with your right hand, and keep your elbow pressed firmly to your side. We recommend you hold a pad or foam roll in place with your elbow to keep it firmly in position.
With your upper arm in position, your elbow should be flexed to 90 degrees with your hand reaching away from your torso. This will be your starting position.
Execute the movement by rotating your arm in a forehand motion, keeping your elbow in place.
Continue as far as you are able, pause, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Position a bar in a rack to about waist height. You can also use a smith machine.

Take a wider than shoulder width grip on the bar and posição yourself hanging underneath the bar. Your body should be straight with your heels on the ground with your braços fully extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by flexing the elbow, pulling your peito towards the bar. Retract your shoulder blades as you perform the movimento.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start posição.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar in a rack to about waist height. You can also use a smith machine.

Take a wider than shoulder width grip on the bar and position yourself hanging underneath the bar. Your body should be straight with your heels on the ground with your arms fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling your chest towards the bar. Retract your shoulder blades as you perform the movement.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Hang a rope or suspension straps from a rack or other stable object. Grasp the ends and posição yourself in a supine posição hanging from the ropes. Your body should be straight with your heels on the ground with your braços fully extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by flexing the elbow, pulling your peito to your mãos. Retract your shoulder blades as you perform the movimento.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start posição.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hang a rope or suspension straps from a rack or other stable object. Grasp the ends and position yourself in a supine position hanging from the ropes. Your body should be straight with your heels on the ground with your arms fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling your chest to your hands. Retract your shoulder blades as you perform the movement.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie face down on the chão, with your braços extended out to your side, palms pressed to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.
To begin, flex one knee and bring that perna across the costas of your body, attempting to touch it to the ground near the opposite mão.
Promptly return the perna to the starting postion, and quickly repeat with the other perna. Continue alternating for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face down on the floor, with your arms extended out to your side, palms pressed to the floor. This will be your starting position.
To begin, flex one knee and bring that leg across the back of your body, attempting to touch it to the ground near the opposite hand.
Promptly return the leg to the starting postion, and quickly repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: While either seating or standing, bend your braços at a 90-degree angle and place the palms of your mãos together in front of your peito. Dica: Your mãos should be open with the palms together and fingers facing forward (perpendicular to your tronco).
Push both mãos against each other as you contract your peito. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Mantenha breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Segure for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: While either seating or standing, bend your arms at a 90-degree angle and place the palms of your hands together in front of your chest. Tip: Your hands should be open with the palms together and fingers facing forward (perpendicular to your torso).
Push both hands against each other as you contract your chest. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat.

nome: Isometric Neck Exercise - Front And Back
nomeOriginal: Isometric Neck Exercise - Front And Back
instrucoes: With your head and neck in a neutral posição (normal posição with head erect facing forward), place both of your mãos on the front side of your head.

Now gently push forward as you contract the neck muscles but resisting any movimento of your head. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Mantenha breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Segure for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your mãos placed on the costas side of your head.
instrucoesOriginais: With your head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place both of your hands on the front side of your head.
Now gently push forward as you contract the neck muscles but resisting any movement of your head. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your hands placed on the back side of your head.

instrucoes: With your head and neck in a neutral posição (normal posição with head erect facing forward), place your left mão on the left side of your head.

Now gently push towards the left as you contract the left neck muscles but resisting any movimento of your head. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Mantenha breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Segure for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your right mão placed on the right side of your head.
instrucoesOriginais: With your head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place your left hand on the left side of your head.

Now gently push towards the left as you contract the left neck muscles but resisting any movement of your head. Start with slow tension and increase slowly. Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your right hand placed on the right side of your head.

instrucoes: Assume a push-up posição, supporting your peso on your mãos and toes while keeping your body straight. Your mãos should be just outside of shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by shifting your body peso as far to one side as possible, allowing the elbow on that side to flex as you lower your body.
Reverse the motion by extending the flexed braço, pushing yourself up and then dropping to the other side.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a push-up position, supporting your weight on your hands and toes while keeping your body straight. Your hands should be just outside of shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Begin by shifting your body weight as far to one side as possible, allowing the elbow on that side to flex as you lower your body.
Reverse the motion by extending the flexed arm, pushing yourself up and then dropping to the other side.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start the exercise the same way you would a close grip bench press. You will lie on a flat bench while holding a barra at braços length (fully extended) with the cotovelos in. However, instead of having the braços perpendicular to the tronco, make sure the bar is set in a direct line above the upper peito. This will be your posição inicial.

Now beginning from a fully extended posição lower the bar down as if performing a lying triceps extension. Inhale as you perform this movimento. When you reach the half way point, let the bar roll costas about one inch by moving the upper braços towards your pernas until they are perpendicular to the tronco. Dica: Mantenha the bend at the cotovelos constant as you bring the upper braços forward.
As you exhale, press the bar costas up by using the triceps to perform a close grip bench press.
Now go costas to the posição inicial and start over.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start the exercise the same way you would a close grip bench press. You will lie on a flat bench while holding a barbell at arms length (fully extended) with the elbows in. However, instead of having the arms perpendicular to the torso, make sure the bar is set in a direct line above the upper chest. This will be your starting position.

Now beginning from a fully extended position lower the bar down as if performing a lying triceps extension. Inhale as you perform this movement. When you reach the half way point, let the bar roll back about one inch by moving the upper arms towards your legs until they are perpendicular to the torso. Tip: Keep the bend at the elbows constant as you bring the upper arms forward.
As you exhale, press the bar back up by using the triceps to perform a close grip bench press.
Now go back to the starting position and start over.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie flat on the chão (or exercise mat) on your costas with your braços extended straight costas behind your head and your pernas extended also. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale, bend at the waist while simultaneously raising your pernas and braços to meet in a jackknife posição. Dica: The pernas should be extended and lifted at approximately a 35-45 degree angle from the chão and the braços should be extended and parallel to your pernas. The upper tronco should be off the chão.
While inhaling, lower your braços and pernas costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on the floor (or exercise mat) on your back with your arms extended straight back behind your head and your legs extended also. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, bend at the waist while simultaneously raising your legs and arms to meet in a jackknife position. Tip: The legs should be extended and lifted at approximately a 35-45 degree angle from the floor and the arms should be extended and parallel to your legs. The upper torso should be off the floor.
While inhaling, lower your arms and legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Position your body on the chão in the basic sit-up posição; joelhos to a ninety degree angle with pés flat on the chão and braços either crossed over your peito or to the sides. This will be your posição inicial.

As you strongly tighten your glutes and hamstrings, fill your lungs with air and in a slow (three to six second count) ascent, slowly exhale. Dica: It is important to tighten the glutes and hamstrings as this will cause the hip flexors to be inactivated in a process called reciprocal inhibition, which basically means that opposite muscles to the contracted ones will relax.
As you inhale, slowly go costas in a controlled manner to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Position your body on the floor in the basic sit-up position; knees to a ninety degree angle with feet flat on the floor and arms either crossed over your chest or to the sides. This will be your starting position.

As you strongly tighten your glutes and hamstrings, fill your lungs with air and in a slow (three to six second count) ascent, slowly exhale. Tip: It is important to tighten the glutes and hamstrings as this will cause the hip flexors to be inactivated in a process called reciprocal inhibition, which basically means that opposite muscles to the contracted ones will relax.
As you inhale, slowly go back in a controlled manner to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a barra on the chão.
Stand in the middle of the bar length wise.
Bend down by bending at the joelhos and keeping your costas straight and grasp the front of the bar with your right mão. Your palm should be in (neutral grip) facing the left side.

Grasp the rear of the bar with your left mão. The palm of your mão should be in neutral grip alignment (palms facing the right side). Dica: Ensure that your grip is even on the bar. Your tronco should be posiçãoed right in the middle of the bar and the distance between your tronco and your right mão (which should be at the front) should be the same as the distance between your tronco and your left mão (which should be to your costas).
Now stand straight up with the peso. Dica: Your pés should be shoulder width apart and your toes slightly pointed out.

Squat down by bending at the joelhos and keeping your costas straight until your upper thighs are parallel with the chão. Dica: Mantenha your costas as vertical as possible with the chão and your head up. Also remember to not let your joelhos go past your toes. Inhale during this portion of the movimento.

Now drive yourself costas up to the posição inicial by pushing with the pés . Dica: Mantenha the bar hanging at braço's length and your cotovelos locked with a slight bend. The braços only serve as hooks. Avoid doing any lifting with them. Do the lifting with your thighs; not your braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a barbell on the floor.
Stand in the middle of the bar length wise.
Bend down by bending at the knees and keeping your back straight and grasp the front of the bar with your right hand. Your palm should be in (neutral grip) facing the left side.

Grasp the rear of the bar with your left hand. The palm of your hand should be in neutral grip alignment (palms facing the right side). Tip: Ensure that your grip is even on the bar. Your torso should be positioned right in the middle of the bar and the distance between your torso and your right hand (which should be at the front) should be the same as the distance between your torso and your left hand (which should be to your back).
Now stand straight up with the weight. Tip: Your feet should be shoulder width apart and your toes slightly pointed out.

Squat down by bending at the knees and keeping your back straight until your upper thighs are parallel with the floor. Tip: Keep your back as vertical as possible with the floor and your head up. Also remember to not let your knees go past your toes. Inhale during this portion of the movement.

Now drive yourself back up to the starting position by pushing with the feet . Tip: Keep the bar hanging at arm's length and your elbows locked with a slight bend. The arms only serve as hooks. Avoid doing any lifting with them. Do the lifting with your thighs; not your arms.

instrucoes: This drill helps you learn to drive yourself low enough during the jerk and corrects those who move costasward during the movimento. Comece with the bar racked in the jerk posição, with the ombros forward, tronco upright, and the pés split slightly apart.
Initiate the movimento as you would a normal jerk, dipping at the joelhos while keeping your tronco vertical, and driving costas up forcefully, using momentum and not your braços to elevate the peso.
Mantenha the rear foot in place, using it to drive your body forward into a full split as you jerk the peso. Recover by standing up with the peso overhead.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill helps you learn to drive yourself low enough during the jerk and corrects those who move backward during the movement. Begin with the bar racked in the jerk position, with the shoulders forward, torso upright, and the feet split slightly apart.
Initiate the movement as you would a normal jerk, dipping at the knees while keeping your torso vertical, and driving back up forcefully, using momentum and not your arms to elevate the weight.
Keep the rear foot in place, using it to drive your body forward into a full split as you jerk the weight. Recover by standing up with the weight overhead.

instrucoes: This movimento strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Comece with the bar racked in the jerk posição, with the ombros forward to create a shelf and the bar lightly contacting the throat. The pés should be directly under the quadris, with the pés turned out as is comfortable.

Mantenhaing the tronco vertical, dip by flexing the joelhos, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the quadris to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Retorne the peso to the posição inicial by driving forcefully though the pés.
instrucoesOriginais: This movement strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Begin with the bar racked in the jerk position, with the shoulders forward to create a shelf and the bar lightly contacting the throat. The feet should be directly under the hips, with the feet turned out as is comfortable.

Keeping the torso vertical, dip by flexing the knees, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the hips to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Return the weight to the starting position by driving forcefully though the feet.

instrucoes: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than jogging outside. A 150 lb person will burn almost 250 calories jogging for 30 minutes, compared to more than 450 calories running. Maintain proper posture as you jog, and only hold onto the mãoles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking your heart rate.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than jogging outside. A 150 lb person will burn almost 250 calories jogging for 30 minutes, compared to more than 450 calories running. Maintain proper posture as you jog, and only hold onto the handles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking your heart rate.

instrucoes: To load kegs, place the desired number a distance from the loading platform, typically 30-50 pés.
Comece by grabbing the close mãole of the first keg, tilting it onto its side to grab the opposite edge of the bottom of the keg. Levante the keg up to your peito.

The higher you can place the keg, the faster you should be able to move to the platform. Shouldering is usually not allowed. Be sure to keep a firm hold on the keg. Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your quadris, joelhos, and ankles to get it as high as possible.
Retorne to the posição inicial to retrieve the next keg, and repeat until the event is completed.
instrucoesOriginais: To load kegs, place the desired number a distance from the loading platform, typically 30-50 feet.
Begin by grabbing the close handle of the first keg, tilting it onto its side to grab the opposite edge of the bottom of the keg. Lift the keg up to your chest.

The higher you can place the keg, the faster you should be able to move to the platform. Shouldering is usually not allowed. Be sure to keep a firm hold on the keg. Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible.
Return to the starting position to retrieve the next keg, and repeat until the event is completed.

instrucoes: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The palm should be facing inward.
Looking straight ahead, press the kettlebell out and overhead, rotating your wrist so that your palm faces forward at the top of the motion.
Retorne the kettlebell to the posição inicial, with the palm facing in.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The palm should be facing inward.
Looking straight ahead, press the kettlebell out and overhead, rotating your wrist so that your palm faces forward at the top of the motion.
Return the kettlebell to the starting position, with the palm facing in.

instrucoes: Place kettlebell between your pés. To get in the posição inicial, push your butt costas and look straight ahead.

Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Abaixe the kettlebell, keeping the hamstrings loaded by keeping your costas straight and your butt out.
instrucoesOriginais: Place kettlebell between your feet. To get in the starting position, push your butt back and look straight ahead.

Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Lower the kettlebell, keeping the hamstrings loaded by keeping your back straight and your butt out.

instrucoes: Place one kettlebell between your pernas and take a wider than shoulder width stance. Bend over by pushing your butt out and keeping your costas flat.
Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to your other mão between your pernas. The receiving mão should reach from behind the pernas. Go costas and forth for several repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Place one kettlebell between your legs and take a wider than shoulder width stance. Bend over by pushing your butt out and keeping your back flat.
Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to your other hand between your legs. The receiving hand should reach from behind the legs. Go back and forth for several repetitions.

instrucoes: Place kettlebell between your pés. To get in the posição inicial, push your butt costas and look straight ahead.

Clean kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Abaixe kettlebell to a hanging posição between your pernas while keeping the hamstrings loaded. Mantenha your head up at all times.
instrucoesOriginais: Place kettlebell between your feet. To get in the starting position, push your butt back and look straight ahead.

Clean kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Lower kettlebell to a hanging position between your legs while keeping the hamstrings loaded. Keep your head up at all times.

instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell by the mãole in one mão. Stand on one perna, on the same side that you hold the kettlebell.
Mantenhaing that knee slightly bent, perform a stiff pernaged deadlift by bending at the hip, extending your free perna behind you for balance.
Continue lowering the kettlebell until you are parallel to the ground, and then return to the upright posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell by the handle in one hand. Stand on one leg, on the same side that you hold the kettlebell.
Keeping that knee slightly bent, perform a stiff legged deadlift by bending at the hip, extending your free leg behind you for balance.
Continue lowering the kettlebell until you are parallel to the ground, and then return to the upright position.

nome: com kettlebell Pass Between The Legs
instrucoes: Place one kettlebell between your pernas and take a comfortable stance. Bend over by pushing your butt out and keeping your costas flat.
Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to your other mão between your pernas, in the fashion of a "W". Go costas and forth for several repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Place one kettlebell between your legs and take a comfortable stance. Bend over by pushing your butt out and keeping your back flat.
Pick up a kettlebell and pass it to your other hand between your legs, in the fashion of a "W". Go back and forth for several repetitions.

instrucoes: With a wide stance, hold a kettlebell with both mãos. Allow it to hang at waist level with your braços extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by turning to one side, swinging the kettlebell to head height. Briefly pause at the top of the motion.
Allow the bell to drop as you rotate to the opposite side, again raising the kettlebell to head height.
Repita for the desired amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: With a wide stance, hold a kettlebell with both hands. Allow it to hang at waist level with your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by turning to one side, swinging the kettlebell to head height. Briefly pause at the top of the motion.
Allow the bell to drop as you rotate to the opposite side, again raising the kettlebell to head height.
Repeat for the desired amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Pick up a kettlebell with two mãos and hold it by the horns. Segure one perna off of the chão and squat down on the other.
Squat down by flexing the knee and sitting costas with the quadris, holding the kettlebell up in front of you.
Segure the bottom posição for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the heel and keeping your head and peito up.
Abaixe yourself again and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Pick up a kettlebell with two hands and hold it by the horns. Hold one leg off of the floor and squat down on the other.
Squat down by flexing the knee and sitting back with the hips, holding the kettlebell up in front of you.
Hold the bottom position for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the heel and keeping your head and chest up.
Lower yourself again and repeat.

instrucoes: Sit on the chão and spread your pernas out comfortably.
Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder.
Press the kettlebell up and out until it is locked out overhead. Retorne to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on the floor and spread your legs out comfortably.
Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder.
Press the kettlebell up and out until it is locked out overhead. Return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells two your ombros.
Press one kettlebell.
Abaixe the kettlebell and immediately press the other kettlebell. Make sure to do the same amount of reps on both sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells two your shoulders.
Press one kettlebell.
Lower the kettlebell and immediately press the other kettlebell. Make sure to do the same amount of reps on both sides.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell on the ground between your pés. Position your pés in a wide stance, and grasp the kettlebell with two mãos. Set your quadris costas as far as possible, with your joelhos bent. Mantenha your peito and head up. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by extending the quadris and joelhos, simultaneously pulling the kettlebell to your ombros, raising your cotovelos as you do so. Reverse the motion to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell on the ground between your feet. Position your feet in a wide stance, and grasp the kettlebell with two hands. Set your hips back as far as possible, with your knees bent. Keep your chest and head up. This will be your starting position.
Begin by extending the hips and knees, simultaneously pulling the kettlebell to your shoulders, raising your elbows as you do so. Reverse the motion to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells to your ombros. Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece to squat by flexing your quadris and joelhos, lowering your quadris between your pernas. Maintain an upright, straight costas as you descend as low as you can.

At the bottom, reverse direction and squat by extending your joelhos and quadris, driving through your heels. As you do so, press both kettlebells overhead by extending your braços straight up, using the momentum from the squat to help drive the pesos upward.
As you begin the next repetition, return the pesos to the ombros.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so. This will be your starting position.
Begin to squat by flexing your hips and knees, lowering your hips between your legs. Maintain an upright, straight back as you descend as low as you can.

At the bottom, reverse direction and squat by extending your knees and hips, driving through your heels. As you do so, press both kettlebells overhead by extending your arms straight up, using the momentum from the squat to help drive the weights upward.
As you begin the next repetition, return the weights to the shoulders.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas on the chão and press a kettlebell to the top posição by extending the elbow. Bend the knee on the same side as the kettlebell.

Mantenhaing the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use your non- working braço to assist you in driving forward to the lunge posição. Using your free mão, push yourself to a seated posição, then progressing to one knee.
While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion costas to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back on the floor and press a kettlebell to the top position by extending the elbow. Bend the knee on the same side as the kettlebell.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use your non- working arm to assist you in driving forward to the lunge position. Using your free hand, push yourself to a seated position, then progressing to one knee.
While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion back to the starting position and repeat.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas on the chão and press a kettlebell to the top posição by extending the elbow. Bend the knee on the same side as the kettlebell.
Mantenhaing the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use your non- working braço to assist you in driving forward to the lunge posição.
Using your free mão, push yourself to a seated posição, then progressing to your pés. While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion costas to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back on the floor and press a kettlebell to the top position by extending the elbow. Bend the knee on the same side as the kettlebell.
Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use your non- working arm to assist you in driving forward to the lunge position.

Using your free hand, push yourself to a seated position, then progressing to your feet. While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion back to the starting position and repeat.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell in front of your lead foot and clean and press it overhead with your opposite braço. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your ombros. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Press it overhead by extending the elbow.

Mantenhaing the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your pés out at a forty-five degree angle from the braço with the locked out kettlebell. Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can touch the chão with your free mão. Mantenha your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Faça uma pausa for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion costas to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell in front of your lead foot and clean and press it overhead with your opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Press it overhead by extending the elbow.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your feet out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm with the locked out kettlebell. Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can touch the floor with your free hand. Keep your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Pause for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion back to the starting position.

instrucoes: Grip the rings using a false grip, with the base of your palms on top of the rings.
Comece with a movimento swinging your pernas costasward slightly.

Counter that movimento by swinging your pernas forward and up, jerking your chin and peito costas, pulling yourself up with both braços as you do so. As you reach the top posição of the pull-up, pull the rings to your braçopits as you roll your ombros forward, allowing your cotovelos to move straight costas behind you. This puts you into the proper posição to continue into the dip portion of the movimento.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.
instrucoesOriginais: Grip the rings using a false grip, with the base of your palms on top of the rings.
Begin with a movement swinging your legs backward slightly.

Counter that movement by swinging your legs forward and up, jerking your chin and chest back, pulling yourself up with both arms as you do so. As you reach the top position of the pull-up, pull the rings to your armpits as you roll your shoulders forward, allowing your elbows to move straight back behind you. This puts you into the proper position to continue into the dip portion of the movement.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.

instrucoes: Deite-se on the chão with your right perna straight. Bend your left perna and lower it across your body, holding the knee down toward the chão with your right mão. (The knee doesn't need to touch the chão if you're tight.)

Place your left braço comfortably beside you and turn your head to the left. Imagine you have a peso tied to your tailbone. let your tailbone fall costas toward the chão as your peito reaches in the opposite direction to stretch your lower costas. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on the floor with your right leg straight. Bend your left leg and lower it across your body, holding the knee down toward the floor with your right hand. (The knee doesn't need to touch the floor if you're tight.)

Place your left arm comfortably beside you and turn your head to the left. Imagine you have a weight tied to your tailbone. let your tailbone fall back toward the floor as your chest reaches in the opposite direction to stretch your lower back. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Stand with your pernas together and mãos by your waist.
Now move your joelhos in a circular motion as you breathe normally.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your legs together and hands by your waist.
Now move your knees in a circular motion as you breathe normally.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Position your body on the vertical perna raise bench so that your forebraços are resting on the pads next to the tronco and holding on to the mãoles. Your braços will be bent at a 90 degree angle.
The tronco should be straight with the lower costas pressed against the pad of the machine and the pernas extended pointing towards the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

Now as you expire, lift your pernas up as you keep them extended. Continue this movimento until your pernas are roughly parallel to the chão and then hold the contraction for a second. Dica: Do not use any momentum or swinging as you perform this exercise.
Lentamente go costas to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Position your body on the vertical leg raise bench so that your forearms are resting on the pads next to the torso and holding on to the handles. Your arms will be bent at a 90 degree angle.
The torso should be straight with the lower back pressed against the pad of the machine and the legs extended pointing towards the floor. This will be your starting position.

Now as you breathe out, lift your legs up as you keep them extended. Continue this movement until your legs are roughly parallel to the floor and then hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Do not use any momentum or swinging as you perform this exercise.
Slowly go back to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece in a comfortable standing posição with your joelhos slightly bent. Segure your mãos in front of you, palms down with your fingertips together at peito height. This will be your posição inicial.
Rapidly dip down into a quarter squat and immediately explode upward. Drive the joelhos towards the peito, attempting to touch them to the palms of the mãos.
Jump as high as you can, raising your joelhos up, and then ensure a good land be re-extending your pernas, absorbing impact through be allowing the joelhos to rebend.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a comfortable standing position with your knees slightly bent. Hold your hands in front of you, palms down with your fingertips together at chest height. This will be your starting position.
Rapidly dip down into a quarter squat and immediately explode upward. Drive the knees towards the chest, attempting to touch them to the palms of the hands.
Jump as high as you can, raising your knees up, and then ensure a good land be re-extending your legs, absorbing impact through be allowing the knees to rebend.

instrucoes: This drill helps increase braço efficiency during the run. Comece kneeling, left foot in front, right knee down. Apply pressure through the front heel to keep your glutes and hamstrings activated.
Comece by blocking the braços in long, pendulum like swings. Close the braço angle, blocking with the braços as you would when jogging, progressing to a run and finally a sprint.
As soon as your mãos pass the hip, accelerate them forward during the sprinting motion to move them as quickly as possible.
Switch joelhos and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill helps increase arm efficiency during the run. Begin kneeling, left foot in front, right knee down. Apply pressure through the front heel to keep your glutes and hamstrings activated.
Begin by blocking the arms in long, pendulum like swings. Close the arm angle, blocking with the arms as you would when jogging, progressing to a run and finally a sprint.
As soon as your hands pass the hip, accelerate them forward during the sprinting motion to move them as quickly as possible.
Switch knees and repeat.

nome: Kneeling no cabo abdominal With Alternating Oblique Twists
nomeOriginal: Kneeling Cable Crunch With Alternating Oblique Twists
instrucoes: Connect a rope attachment to a high pulley cable and posição a mat on the chão in front of it.
Grab the rope with both mãos and kneel approximately two pés costas from the tower.
Position the rope behind your head with your mãos by your ears.
Mantenha your mãos in the same place, contract your abs and pull downward on the rope in a crunching movimento until your cotovelos reach your joelhos.
Faça uma pausa briefly at the bottom and rise up in a slow and controlled manner until you reach the posição inicial.
Repita the same downward movimento until you're halfway down, at which time you'll begin rotating one of your cotovelos to the opposite knee.
Again, pause briefly at the bottom and rise up in a slow and controlled manner until you reach the posição inicial.
Repita the same movimento as before, but alternate the other elbow to the opposite knee.
Continue this series of movimentos to failure.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a rope attachment to a high pulley cable and position a mat on the floor in front of it.
Grab the rope with both hands and kneel approximately two feet back from the tower.
Position the rope behind your head with your hands by your ears.
Keep your hands in the same place, contract your abs and pull downward on the rope in a crunching movement until your elbows reach your knees.
Pause briefly at the bottom and rise up in a slow and controlled manner until you reach the starting position.
Repeat the same downward movement until you're halfway down, at which time you'll begin rotating one of your elbows to the opposite knee.
Again, pause briefly at the bottom and rise up in a slow and controlled manner until you reach the starting position.
Repeat the same movement as before, but alternate the other elbow to the opposite knee.
Continue this series of movements to failure.

instrucoes: Place a bench sideways in front of a high pulley machine.
Segure a straight bar attachment above your head with your mãos about 6 inches apart with your palms facing down.
Face away from the machine and kneel.
Place your head and the costas of your upper braços on the bench. Your cotovelos should be bent with the forebraços pointing towards the high pulley. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping your upper braços close to your head at all times with the cotovelos in, press the bar out in a semicircular motion until the cotovelos are locked and your braços are parallel to the chão. Contract the triceps hard and keep this posição for a second. Exhale as you perform this movimento.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a bench sideways in front of a high pulley machine.
Hold a straight bar attachment above your head with your hands about 6 inches apart with your palms facing down.
Face away from the machine and kneel.
Place your head and the back of your upper arms on the bench. Your elbows should be bent with the forearms pointing towards the high pulley. This will be your starting position.

While keeping your upper arms close to your head at all times with the elbows in, press the bar out in a semicircular motion until the elbows are locked and your arms are parallel to the floor. Contract the triceps hard and keep this position for a second. Exhale as you perform this movement.
Slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start by kneeling on a mat with your palms flat and your fingers pointing costas toward your joelhos.
Lentamente lean costas keeping your palms flat on the chão until you feel a stretch in your wrists and forebraços. Segure for 20-30 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by kneeling on a mat with your palms flat and your fingers pointing back toward your knees.
Slowly lean back keeping your palms flat on the floor until you feel a stretch in your wrists and forearms. Hold for 20-30 seconds.

instrucoes: Select the appropriate peso using a pulley that is above your head. Attach a rope to the cable and kneel a couple of pés away, holding the rope out in front of you with both braços extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by flexing the cotovelos and fully retracting your ombros, pulling the rope toward your upper peito with your cotovelos out.
After pausing briefly, slowly return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Select the appropriate weight using a pulley that is above your head. Attach a rope to the cable and kneel a couple of feet away, holding the rope out in front of you with both arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by flexing the elbows and fully retracting your shoulders, pulling the rope toward your upper chest with your elbows out.
After pausing briefly, slowly return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Kneel on a mat and bring your right knee up so the bottom of your foot is on the chão and extend your left perna out behind you so the top of your foot is on the chão.
Shift your peso forward until you feel a stretch in your hip. Segure for 15 seconds, then repeat for your other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Kneel on a mat and bring your right knee up so the bottom of your foot is on the floor and extend your left leg out behind you so the top of your foot is on the floor.
Shift your weight forward until you feel a stretch in your hip. Hold for 15 seconds, then repeat for your other side.

instrucoes: Comece kneeling on the chão with a barra racked across the costas of your ombros, or you can use your body peso for this exercise. This can be done inside of a power rack to make unracking easier.
Sit costas with your quadris until your glutes touch your pés, keeping your head and peito up.
Explode up with your quadris, generating enough power to land with your pés flat on the chão.
Continue with the squat by driving through your heels and extending the joelhos to come to a standing posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin kneeling on the floor with a barbell racked across the back of your shoulders, or you can use your body weight for this exercise. This can be done inside of a power rack to make unracking easier.
Sit back with your hips until your glutes touch your feet, keeping your head and chest up.
Explode up with your hips, generating enough power to land with your feet flat on the floor.
Continue with the squat by driving through your heels and extending the knees to come to a standing position.

instrucoes: Attach a single mãole to a high pulley and make your peso selection.
Kneel in front of the cable tower, taking the cable with one mão with your braço extended. This will be your posição inicial.

Starting with your palm facing forward, pull the peso down to your tronco by flexing the elbow and retract the shoulder blade. As you do so, rotate the wrist so that at the completion of the movimento, your palm is now facing you.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a single handle to a high pulley and make your weight selection.
Kneel in front of the cable tower, taking the cable with one hand with your arm extended. This will be your starting position.

Starting with your palm facing forward, pull the weight down to your torso by flexing the elbow and retract the shoulder blade. As you do so, rotate the wrist so that at the completion of the movement, your palm is now facing you.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Set the bar to the proper height in a power rack. Kneel behind the bar; it may be beneficial to put a mat down to pad your joelhos. Slide under the bar, racking it across the costas of your ombros. Your shoulder blades should be retracted and the bar tight across your costas. Unrack the peso.
With your head looking forward, sit costas with your butt until you touch your calves.
Reverse the motion, returning the tronco to an upright posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Set the bar to the proper height in a power rack. Kneel behind the bar; it may be beneficial to put a mat down to pad your knees. Slide under the bar, racking it across the back of your shoulders. Your shoulder blades should be retracted and the bar tight across your back. Unrack the weight.
With your head looking forward, sit back with your butt until you touch your calves.
Reverse the motion, returning the torso to an upright position.

instrucoes: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate peso.
Eleve the bar from the chão, taking it to shoulder height with both mãos with your braços extended in front of you. Adopt a wide stance. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the movimento by rotating the trunk and quadris as you swing the peso all the way down to one side. Mantenha your braços extended throughout the exercise.
Reverse the motion to swing the peso all the way to the opposite side.
Continue alternating the movimento until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate weight.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking it to shoulder height with both hands with your arms extended in front of you. Adopt a wide stance. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by rotating the trunk and hips as you swing the weight all the way down to one side. Keep your arms extended throughout the exercise.
Reverse the motion to swing the weight all the way to the opposite side.
Continue alternating the movement until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Position a bar into landmine or, lacking one, securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate peso and posição the mãole attachment on the bar.
Eleve the bar from the chão, taking the mãoles to your ombros. This will be your posição inicial.
In an athletic stance, squat by flexing your quadris and setting your quadris costas, keeping your braços flexed.

Reverse the motion by powerfully extending through the quadris, joelhos, and ankles, while also extending the cotovelos to straighten the braços. This movimento should be done explosively, coming out of the squat to full extension as powerfully as possible.
Retorne à posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar into landmine or, lacking one, securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate weight and position the handle attachment on the bar.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking the handles to your shoulders. This will be your starting position.
In an athletic stance, squat by flexing your hips and setting your hips back, keeping your arms flexed.

Reverse the motion by powerfully extending through the hips, knees, and ankles, while also extending the elbows to straighten the arms. This movement should be done explosively, coming out of the squat to full extension as powerfully as possible.
Return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Assume a half squat posição facing 90 degrees from your direction of travel. This will be your posição inicial.
Allow your lead perna to do a countermovimento inward as you shift your peso to the outside perna.
Immediately push off and extend, attempting to bound to the side as far as possible.
Upon landing, immediately push off in the opposite direction, returning to your original start posição.
Continue costas and forth for several repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a half squat position facing 90 degrees from your direction of travel. This will be your starting position.
Allow your lead leg to do a countermovement inward as you shift your weight to the outside leg.
Immediately push off and extend, attempting to bound to the side as far as possible.
Upon landing, immediately push off in the opposite direction, returning to your original start position.
Continue back and forth for several repetitions.

instrucoes: Assume a comfortable standing posição, with a short box posiçãoed next to you. This will be your posição inicial.
Quickly dip into a quarter squat to initiate the stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to jump up and to the side.
Bring your joelhos high enough to ensure your pés have good clearance over the box.
Land on the center of the box, using your pernas to absorb the impact.
Carefully jump down to the other side of the box, and continue going costas and forth for several repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a comfortable standing position, with a short box positioned next to you. This will be your starting position.
Quickly dip into a quarter squat to initiate the stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to jump up and to the side.
Bring your knees high enough to ensure your feet have good clearance over the box.
Land on the center of the box, using your legs to absorb the impact.
Carefully jump down to the other side of the box, and continue going back and forth for several repetitions.

instrucoes: Position a number of cones in a row several pés apart.
Stand next to the end of the cones, facing 90 degrees to the direction of travel. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the jump by dipping with the joelhos to initiate a stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to push off the ground, jumping up and sideways over the cone.
Use your pernas to absorb impact upon landing, and rebound into the next jump, continuing down the row of cones.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a number of cones in a row several feet apart.
Stand next to the end of the cones, facing 90 degrees to the direction of travel. This will be your starting position.
Begin the jump by dipping with the knees to initiate a stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to push off the ground, jumping up and sideways over the cone.
Use your legs to absorb impact upon landing, and rebound into the next jump, continuing down the row of cones.

instrucoes: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at braço's length. Grasp the mãoles using a pronated (palms facing your thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The mãoles should be resting on the sides of your thighs. Your braços should be extended with a slight bend at the cotovelos and your costas should be straight. This will be your posição inicial.

Use your side ombros to lift the mãoles to the sides as you exhale. Continue to lift the mãoles until they are slightly above parallel. Dica: As you lift the mãoles, slightly tilt the mão as if you were pouring water and keep your braços extended. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the mãoles costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at arm's length. Grasp the handles using a pronated (palms facing your thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The handles should be resting on the sides of your thighs. Your arms should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and your back should be straight. This will be your starting position.

Use your side shoulders to lift the handles to the sides as you exhale. Continue to lift the handles until they are slightly above parallel. Tip: As you lift the handles, slightly tilt the hand as if you were pouring water and keep your arms extended. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the handles back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: While lying on the chão, place a foam roll under your costas and to one side, just behind your braço pit. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenha the braço of the side being stretched behind and to the side of you as you shift your peso onto your lats, keeping your upper body off of the ground. Segure for 10-30 seconds, and switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: While lying on the floor, place a foam roll under your back and to one side, just behind your arm pit. This will be your starting position.
Keep the arm of the side being stretched behind and to the side of you as you shift your weight onto your lats, keeping your upper body off of the ground. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and switch sides.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão with one kettlebell in place on your peito, holding it by the mãole. Extend perna on working side over perna on non-working side.Your free braço can be extended out to your side for support.
Press the kettlebll into a locked out posição.
Abaixe the peso until the elbow touches the ground, keeping the kettlebell above the elbow. Repita for the número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor with one kettlebell in place on your chest, holding it by the handle. Extend leg on working side over leg on non-working side.Your free arm can be extended out to your side for support.
Press the kettlebll into a locked out position.
Lower the weight until the elbow touches the ground, keeping the kettlebell above the elbow. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie flat on your costas, bend one knee, and put that foot flat on the chão to stabilize your spine.

Extend the other perna in the air. If you're tight, you wont be able to straighten it. That's okay. Extend the knee so that the sole of the lifted foot faces the ceiling (or as close as you can get it).
Lentamente straighten the pernas as much as possible and then pull the perna toward your nose. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on your back, bend one knee, and put that foot flat on the floor to stabilize your spine.

Extend the other leg in the air. If you're tight, you wont be able to straighten it. That's okay. Extend the knee so that the sole of the lifted foot faces the ceiling (or as close as you can get it).
Slowly straighten the legs as much as possible and then pull the leg toward your nose. Switch sides.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need to use a perna extension machine. First choose your peso and sit on the machine with your pernas under the pad (pés pointed forward) and the mãos holding the side bars. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: You will need to adjust the pad so that it falls on top of your lower perna (just above your pés). Also, make sure that your pernas form a 90-degree angle between the lower and upper perna. If the angle is less than 90-degrees then that means the knee is over the toes which in turn creates undue stress at the knee joint. If the machine is designed that way, either look for another machine or just make sure that when you start executing the exercise you stop going down once you hit the 90-degree angle.
Using your quadriceps, extend your pernas to the maximum as you exhale. Ensure that the rest of the body remains stationary on the seat. Faça uma pausa a second on the contracted posição.
Lentamente lower the peso costas to the original posição as you inhale, ensuring that you do not go past the 90-degree angle limit.
Repita for the recommended amount of times.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need to use a leg extension machine. First choose your weight and sit on the machine with your legs under the pad (feet pointed forward) and the hands holding the side bars. This will be your starting position. Tip: You will need to adjust the pad so that it falls on top of your lower leg (just above your feet). Also, make sure that your legs form a 90-degree angle between the lower and upper leg. If the angle is less than 90-degrees then that means the knee is over the toes which in turn creates undue stress at the knee joint. If the machine is designed that way, either look for another machine or just make sure that when you start executing the exercise you stop going down once you hit the 90-degree angle.
Using your quadriceps, extend your legs to the maximum as you exhale. Ensure that the rest of the body remains stationary on the seat. Pause a second on the contracted position.
Slowly lower the weight back to the original position as you inhale, ensuring that you do not go past the 90-degree angle limit.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

instrucoes: While standing up straight with both pés next to each other at around shoulder width, grab a sturdy surface such as the sides of a squat rack or the top of a chair to brace yourself and keep balance.
With or without an ankle peso, lift one perna behind you as if performing a perna curl but standing up while keeping the other perna straight. Breathe out as you perform this movimento.
Lentamente bring the raised perna costas to the chão as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Repita the movimento with the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: While standing up straight with both feet next to each other at around shoulder width, grab a sturdy surface such as the sides of a squat rack or the top of a chair to brace yourself and keep balance.
With or without an ankle weight, lift one leg behind you as if performing a leg curl but standing up while keeping the other leg straight. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
Slowly bring the raised leg back to the floor as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Repeat the movement with the opposite leg.

instrucoes: Using a perna press machine, sit down on the machine and place your pernas on the platform directly in front of you at a medium (shoulder width) foot stance. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot posiçãoing section).

Abaixe the safety bars holding the pesoed platform in place and press the platform all the way up until your pernas are fully extended in front of you. Dica: Make sure that you do not lock your joelhos. Your tronco and the pernas should make a perfect 90-degree angle. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until your upper and lower pernas make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly with the heels of your pés and using the quadriceps go costas to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a leg press machine, sit down on the machine and place your legs on the platform directly in front of you at a medium (shoulder width) foot stance. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Lower the safety bars holding the weighted platform in place and press the platform all the way up until your legs are fully extended in front of you. Tip: Make sure that you do not lock your knees. Your torso and the legs should make a perfect 90-degree angle. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly with the heels of your feet and using the quadriceps go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.

instrucoes: Lie on an exercise mat with your pernas extended and your mãos either palms facing down next to you or under your glutes. Dica: My preference is with the mãos next to me. This will be your posição inicial.

Bend your joelhos and pull your upper thighs into your midsection as you expire. Continue the motion until your joelhos are around peito level. Contract your abs as you execute this movimento and hold for a second at the top. Dica: As you perform the motion, the lower pernas (calves) should always remain parallel to the chão.
Retorne to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on an exercise mat with your legs extended and your hands either palms facing down next to you or under your glutes. Tip: My preference is with the hands next to me. This will be your starting position.

Bend your knees and pull your upper thighs into your midsection as you breathe out. Continue the motion until your knees are around chest level. Contract your abs as you execute this movement and hold for a second at the top. Tip: As you perform the motion, the lower legs (calves) should always remain parallel to the floor.
Return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The mãoles should be near the bottom or middle of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion.
Your peito and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your posição inicial.
Press the mãoles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso just above the start posição, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The handles should be near the bottom or middle of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion.
Your chest and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your starting position.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the weight just above the start position, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the weight to the stops until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Load the pins to an appropriate peso. Position yourself directly between the mãoles. Grasp the bottom mãoles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your quadris as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your peito up. This will be your posição inicial.
Retorne the peso to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles. Grasp the bottom handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up. This will be your starting position.
Return the weight to the starting position.

instrucoes: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The mãoles should be near the bottom of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Your peito and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your posição inicial.
Press the mãoles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso just above the start posição, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The handles should be near the bottom of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Your chest and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your starting position.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the weight just above the start position, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the weight to the stops until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that you can just reach the mãoles above you. Adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the mãoles with a pronated grip. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull the mãoles towards your tronco, retracting your shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.
Faça uma pausa at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the mãoles to the posição inicial.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the peso to the stops to keep tension on the muscles being worked.
instrucoesOriginais: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that you can just reach the handles above you. Adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip. This will be your starting position.
Pull the handles towards your torso, retracting your shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handles to the starting position.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the weight to the stops to keep tension on the muscles being worked.

instrucoes: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The mãoles should be near the top of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Your peito and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your posição inicial.
Press the mãoles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso just above the start posição, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The handles should be near the top of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Your chest and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your starting position.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the weight just above the start position, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the weight to the stops until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that the mãoles are at peito level. Grasp the mãoles with either a neutral or pronated grip. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull the mãoles towards your tronco, retracting your shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.

Faça uma pausa at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the mãoles to the posição inicial. For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the peso to the stops to keep tension on the muscles being worked.
instrucoesOriginais: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that the handles are at chest level. Grasp the handles with either a neutral or pronated grip. This will be your starting position.
Pull the handles towards your torso, retracting your shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.

Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handles to the starting position. For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the weight to the stops to keep tension on the muscles being worked.

instrucoes: Load an appropriate peso onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The mãoles should be near the top of the ombros at the beginning of the motion. Your peito and head should be up and mãoles held with a pronated grip. This will be your posição inicial.
Press the mãoles upward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the peso to just above the start posição, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the peso to the stops until the set is complete.
