instrucoesOriginais: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The handles should be near the top of the shoulders at the beginning of the motion. Your chest and head should be up and handles held with a pronated grip. This will be your starting position.
Press the handles upward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the weight to just above the start position, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the weight to the stops until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Load the pins to an appropriate peso. Position yourself directly between the mãoles.
Grasp the top mãoles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your quadris as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your peito up.

Drive through the chão with your heels, extending your quadris and joelhos as you rise to a standing posição. Mantenha your braços straight throughout the movimento, finishing with your ombros costas. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve the peso by shrugging the ombros towards your ears, moving straight up and down.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and then return the peso to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles.
Grasp the top handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up.

Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back. This will be your starting position.
Raise the weight by shrugging the shoulders towards your ears, moving straight up and down.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then return the weight to the starting position.

instrucoes: This drill helps you accelerate as quickly as possible into a sprint from a dead stop. It helps to use a line to start from. Comece with two pés on the line. Place your left foot with the toe next to your right ankle. Place your right foot 4-6 inches behind the left.
Place your right mão onto the line, and thing bring your nose close to your left knee.
Squat down as you lean foward, your head being lower than your quadris and your peso loaded onto the left perna. This will be your posição inicial.
Take your left mão up so that it is parallel to the ground, pointing behind you, and explode out when ready.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill helps you accelerate as quickly as possible into a sprint from a dead stop. It helps to use a line to start from. Begin with two feet on the line. Place your left foot with the toe next to your right ankle. Place your right foot 4-6 inches behind the left.
Place your right hand onto the line, and thing bring your nose close to your left knee.
Squat down as you lean foward, your head being lower than your hips and your weight loaded onto the left leg. This will be your starting position.
Take your left hand up so that it is parallel to the ground, pointing behind you, and explode out when ready.

instrucoes: Lean at around 45 degrees against a wall. Your pés should be together, glutes contracted.
Comece by lifting your right knee quickly, pausing, and then driving it straight down into the ground.
Switch pernas, raising the opposite knee, and then attacking the ground straight down.
Repita once more with your right perna, and as soon as the right foot strikes the ground hammer them out rapidly, alternating left and right as fast as you can.
instrucoesOriginais: Lean at around 45 degrees against a wall. Your feet should be together, glutes contracted.
Begin by lifting your right knee quickly, pausing, and then driving it straight down into the ground.
Switch legs, raising the opposite knee, and then attacking the ground straight down.
Repeat once more with your right leg, and as soon as the right foot strikes the ground hammer them out rapidly, alternating left and right as fast as you can.

instrucoes: You will need two boxes or benches spaced a few pés away from each other. Comece by standing on one box facing towards the other platform.
To initiate the movimento, gently drop down to the ground between your platforms, allowing the joelhos and quadris to flex.
Reverse the motion by exploding, extending through the quadris, joelhos, and ankles to jump onto the other platform.
Land softly, asborbing the impact through the pernas.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need two boxes or benches spaced a few feet away from each other. Begin by standing on one box facing towards the other platform.
To initiate the movement, gently drop down to the ground between your platforms, allowing the knees and hips to flex.
Reverse the motion by exploding, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump onto the other platform.
Land softly, asborbing the impact through the legs.

instrucoes: Comece standing with the log in front of you. Grasp the mãoles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into your peito. Extend through the quadris and joelhos to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push your head costas and look up, creating a shelf on your peito to rest the log. Comece the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the joelhos and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the cotovelos to press the log above your head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push your head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repita as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing with the log in front of you. Grasp the handles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into your chest. Extend through the hips and knees to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push your head back and look up, creating a shelf on your chest to rest the log. Begin the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the knees and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the elbows to press the log above your head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push your head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repeat as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.

instrucoes: Attach a climbing rope to a high beam or cross member. Below it, ensure that the smith machine bar is locked in place with the safeties and cannot move. Alternatively, a secure box could also be utilized.
Stand on the bar, using the rope to balance yourself. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your body straight, lean costas and lower your body by slowly going mão over mão with the rope. Continue until you are perpendicular to the ground.
Mantenhaing your body straight, reverse the motion, going mão over mão costas to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a climbing rope to a high beam or cross member. Below it, ensure that the smith machine bar is locked in place with the safeties and cannot move. Alternatively, a secure box could also be utilized.
Stand on the bar, using the rope to balance yourself. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lean back and lower your body by slowly going hand over hand with the rope. Continue until you are perpendicular to the ground.
Keeping your body straight, reverse the motion, going hand over hand back to the starting position.

instrucoes: Kneel on the chão, holding your heels with both mãos.
Levante your buttocks up and forward while bringing your head costas to look up at the ceiling, to give an arch in your costas.
instrucoesOriginais: Kneel on the floor, holding your heels with both hands.
Lift your buttocks up and forward while bringing your head back to look up at the ceiling, to give an arch in your back.

instrucoes: To move into the posição inicial, place the pulleys at the low posição, select the resistance to be used and grasp a mãole in each mão.
Step forward, gaining tension in the pulleys. Your palms should be facing forward, mãos below the waist, and your braços straight. This will be your posição inicial.
With a slight bend in your braços, draw your mãos upward and toward the midline of your body. Your mãos should come together in front of your peito, palms facing up.
Retorne your braços costas to the posição inicial after a brief pause.
instrucoesOriginais: To move into the starting position, place the pulleys at the low position, select the resistance to be used and grasp a handle in each hand.
Step forward, gaining tension in the pulleys. Your palms should be facing forward, hands below the waist, and your arms straight. This will be your starting position.
With a slight bend in your arms, draw your hands upward and toward the midline of your body. Your hands should come together in front of your chest, palms facing up.
Return your arms back to the starting position after a brief pause.

instrucoes: Select the desired peso and lay down face up on the bench of a seated row machine that has a rope attached to it. Your head should be pointing towards the attachment.
Grab the outside of the rope ends with your palms facing each other (neutral grip).

Position your cotovelos so that they are bent at a 90 degree angle and your upper braços are perpendicular (90 degree angle) to your tronco. Dica: Mantenha the cotovelos in and make sure that the upper braços point to the ceiling while your forebraços point towards the pulley above your head. This will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, extend your lower braços until they are straight and vertical. The upper braços and cotovelos remain stationary throughout the movimento. Only the forebraços should move. Contract the triceps hard for a second.
As you inspire slowly return to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Select the desired weight and lay down face up on the bench of a seated row machine that has a rope attached to it. Your head should be pointing towards the attachment.
Grab the outside of the rope ends with your palms facing each other (neutral grip).

Position your elbows so that they are bent at a 90 degree angle and your upper arms are perpendicular (90 degree angle) to your torso. Tip: Keep the elbows in and make sure that the upper arms point to the ceiling while your forearms point towards the pulley above your head. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, extend your lower arms until they are straight and vertical. The upper arms and elbows remain stationary throughout the movement. Only the forearms should move. Contract the triceps hard for a second.
As you breathe in slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on a low pulley row machine with a rope attachment.

Grab the ends of the rope using a palms-down grip and sit with your costas straight and your joelhos slightly bent. Dica: Mantenha your costas almost completely vertical and your braços fully extended in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.

While keeping your tronco stationary, lift your cotovelos and start bending them as you pull the rope towards your neck while exhaling. Throughout the movimento your upper braços should remain parallel to the chão. Dica: Continue this motion until your mãos are almost next to your ears (the forebraços will not be parallel to the chão at the end of the movimento as they will be angled a bit upwards) and your cotovelos are out away from your sides.
After holding for a second or so at the contracted posição, come costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inhale. Dica: Again, during no part of the movimento should the tronco move.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a low pulley row machine with a rope attachment.

Grab the ends of the rope using a palms-down grip and sit with your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Tip: Keep your back almost completely vertical and your arms fully extended in front of you. This will be your starting position.

While keeping your torso stationary, lift your elbows and start bending them as you pull the rope towards your neck while exhaling. Throughout the movement your upper arms should remain parallel to the floor. Tip: Continue this motion until your hands are almost next to your ears (the forearms will not be parallel to the floor at the end of the movement as they will be angled a bit upwards) and your elbows are out away from your sides.
After holding for a second or so at the contracted position, come back slowly to the starting position as you inhale. Tip: Again, during no part of the movement should the torso move.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: In a seated posição, place a foam roll under your lower costas. Cross your braços in front of you and protract your ombros. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your quadris off of the chão and lean costas, keeping your peso on your lower costas. Now shift your peso slightly to one side, keeping your peso off of the spine and on the muscles to the side of it. Roll over your lower costas, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repita on the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: In a seated position, place a foam roll under your lower back. Cross your arms in front of you and protract your shoulders. This will be your starting position.

Raise your hips off of the floor and lean back, keeping your weight on your lower back. Now shift your weight slightly to one side, keeping your weight off of the spine and on the muscles to the side of it. Roll over your lower back, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat on the other side.

instrucoes: Lie on your stomach with your braços out to your sides. This will be your posição inicial.

Using your lower costas muscles, extend your spine lifting your peito off of the ground. Do not use your braços to push yourself up. Mantenha your head up during the movimento. Repita for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your stomach with your arms out to your sides. This will be your starting position.
Using your lower back muscles, extend your spine lifting your chest off of the ground. Do not use your arms to push yourself up. Keep your head up during the movement. Repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your tronco upright holding a kettlebell in your right mão. This will be your posição inicial.
Step forward with your left foot and lower your upper body down by flexing the hip and the knee, keeping the tronco upright. Abaixe your costas knee until it nearly touches the ground.
As you lunge, pass the kettlebell under your front perna to your opposite mão.
Pressing through the heel of your foot, return to the posição inicial.
Repita the movimento for the número recomendado de repetições, alternating pernas.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your torso upright holding a kettlebell in your right hand. This will be your starting position.
Step forward with your left foot and lower your upper body down by flexing the hip and the knee, keeping the torso upright. Lower your back knee until it nearly touches the ground.
As you lunge, pass the kettlebell under your front leg to your opposite hand.
Pressing through the heel of your foot, return to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions, alternating legs.

instrucoes: Adjust a bar in a Smith machine to an appropriate height. Position yourself under the bar, racking it across the costas of your ombros. Unrack the bar, and then split your pés, moving one foot forward and one foot costas. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe your costas knee nearly to the ground, flexing the joelhos and lowering your quadris as you do so.

At the bottom of the descent, immediately reverse direction. Explosively drive through the heel of your front foot with light pressure from your costas foot. Jump up and reverse the posição of your pernas.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust a bar in a Smith machine to an appropriate height. Position yourself under the bar, racking it across the back of your shoulders. Unrack the bar, and then split your feet, moving one foot forward and one foot back. This will be your starting position.
Lower your back knee nearly to the ground, flexing the knees and lowering your hips as you do so.

At the bottom of the descent, immediately reverse direction. Explosively drive through the heel of your front foot with light pressure from your back foot. Jump up and reverse the position of your legs.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your joelhos bent and the soles of the pés pressed together. Have your partner hold your joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to squeeze your joelhos together, while your partner prevents any movimento from occurring.
After 10-20 seconds, relax your muscles as your partner gently pushes your joelhos towards the chão. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your knees bent and the soles of the feet pressed together. Have your partner hold your knees. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your knees together, while your partner prevents any movement from occurring.
After 10-20 seconds, relax your muscles as your partner gently pushes your knees towards the floor. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

instrucoes: Grab a straight bar or E-Z bar attachment that is attached to the low pulley with both mãos, using an undermão (palms facing up) shoulder-width grip.
Lie flat on your costas on top of an exercise mat in front of the peso stack with your pés flat against the frame of the pulley machine and your pernas straight.
With your braços extended and your cotovelos close to your body slightly bend your braços. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping your upper braços stationary and the cotovelos close to your body, curl the bar up slowly toward your peito as you expire and you squeeze the biceps.
After a second squeeze at the top of the movimento, slowly return to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a straight bar or E-Z bar attachment that is attached to the low pulley with both hands, using an underhand (palms facing up) shoulder-width grip.
Lie flat on your back on top of an exercise mat in front of the weight stack with your feet flat against the frame of the pulley machine and your legs straight.
With your arms extended and your elbows close to your body slightly bend your arms. This will be your starting position.
While keeping your upper arms stationary and the elbows close to your body, curl the bar up slowly toward your chest as you breathe out and you squeeze the biceps.
After a second squeeze at the top of the movement, slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a cambered bar underneath an exercise bench.
Lie face down on the exercise bench and grab the bar using a palms down (pronated grip) that is wider than shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.
As you exhale row the bar up as you keep the cotovelos close to your body to either your peito, in order to target the upper mid costas, or to your stomach if targeting the lats is your goal.
After a second hold at the top, lower costas down to the posição inicial slowly as you inhale.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a cambered bar underneath an exercise bench.
Lie face down on the exercise bench and grab the bar using a palms down (pronated grip) that is wider than shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale row the bar up as you keep the elbows close to your body to either your chest, in order to target the upper mid back, or to your stomach if targeting the lats is your goal.
After a second hold at the top, lower back down to the starting position slowly as you inhale.

nome: Lying Close-Grip Bar rosca On High Pulley
nomeOriginal: Lying Close-Grip Bar Curl On High Pulley
instrucoes: Place a flat bench in front of a high pulley or lat pulldown machine.
Segure the straight bar attachment using an undermão grip (palms up) that is about shoulder width.
Deite-se de costas with your head over the end of the bench.
Now extend your braços straight above your ombros. Your tronco and your braços should make a 90-degree angle and the cotovelos should be in. This will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, curl the bar down in a semicircular motion until it touches your chin. Squeeze the biceps for a second at the top contracted posição. Dica: As you execute this motion only the forebraços should move. At no time should the upper braços be moving at all. They are to remain perpendicular throughout the movimento.
Retorne to posição inicial slowly.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a flat bench in front of a high pulley or lat pulldown machine.
Hold the straight bar attachment using an underhand grip (palms up) that is about shoulder width.
Lie on your back with your head over the end of the bench.
Now extend your arms straight above your shoulders. Your torso and your arms should make a 90-degree angle and the elbows should be in. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, curl the bar down in a semicircular motion until it touches your chin. Squeeze the biceps for a second at the top contracted position. Tip: As you execute this motion only the forearms should move. At no time should the upper arms be moving at all. They are to remain perpendicular throughout the movement.
Return to starting position slowly.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Lying Close-Grip com barra Triceps Extension Behind The Head
nomeOriginal: Lying Close-Grip Barbell Triceps Extension Behind The Head
instrucoes: While holding a barra or EZ Curl bar with a pronated grip (palms facing forward), lie on your costas on a flat bench with your head close to the end of the bench. Dica: If you are holding a barra grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner mãoles.

Extend your braços in front of you and slowly bring the bar costas in a semi circular motion (while keeping the braços extended) to a posição over your head. At the end of this step your braços should be overhead and parallel to the chão. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: Mantenha your cotovelos in at all times.
As you inhale, lower the bar by bending at the cotovelos and while keeping the upper braço stationary. Mantenha lowering the bar until your forebraços are perpendicular to the chão.

As you exhale bring the bar costas up to the posição inicial by pushing the bar up in a semi-circular motion until the lower braços are also parallel to the chão. Contract the triceps hard at the top of the movimento for a second. Dica: Again, only the forebraços should move. The upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a barbell or EZ Curl bar with a pronated grip (palms facing forward), lie on your back on a flat bench with your head close to the end of the bench. Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner handles.

Extend your arms in front of you and slowly bring the bar back in a semi circular motion (while keeping the arms extended) to a position over your head. At the end of this step your arms should be overhead and parallel to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows in at all times.
As you inhale, lower the bar by bending at the elbows and while keeping the upper arm stationary. Keep lowering the bar until your forearms are perpendicular to the floor.

As you exhale bring the bar back up to the starting position by pushing the bar up in a semi-circular motion until the lower arms are also parallel to the floor. Contract the triceps hard at the top of the movement for a second. Tip: Again, only the forearms should move. The upper arms should remain stationary at all times.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Lying Close-Grip com barra Triceps press To Chin
nomeOriginal: Lying Close-Grip Barbell Triceps Press To Chin
instrucoes: While holding a barra or EZ Curl bar with a pronated grip (palms facing forward), lie on your costas on a flat bench with your head off the end of the bench. Dica: If you are holding a barra grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner mãoles.
Extend your braços in front of you as you hold the barra over your peito. The braços should be perpendicular to your tronco (90-degree angle). This will be your posição inicial.

As you inhale, lower the bar in a semi-circular motion by bending at the cotovelos and while keeping the upper braço stationary and cotovelos in. Mantenha lowering the bar until it lightly touches your chin.

As you exhale bring the bar costas up to the posição inicial by pushing the bar up in a semi-circular motion. Contract the triceps hard at the top of the movimento for a second. Dica: Again, only the forebraços should move. The upper braços should remain stationary at all times.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a barbell or EZ Curl bar with a pronated grip (palms facing forward), lie on your back on a flat bench with your head off the end of the bench. Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner handles.
Extend your arms in front of you as you hold the barbell over your chest. The arms should be perpendicular to your torso (90-degree angle). This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, lower the bar in a semi-circular motion by bending at the elbows and while keeping the upper arm stationary and elbows in. Keep lowering the bar until it lightly touches your chin.

As you exhale bring the bar back up to the starting position by pushing the bar up in a semi-circular motion. Contract the triceps hard at the top of the movement for a second. Tip: Again, only the forearms should move. The upper arms should remain stationary at all times.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your pernas extended.

Cross one perna over your body with the knee bent, attempting to touch the knee to the ground. Your partner should kneel beside you, holding your shoulder down with one mão and controlling the crossed perna with the other. this will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to raise the bent knee off of the ground as your partner prevents any actual movimento.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the perna as your partner gently presses the knee towards the chão. Repita with the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your legs extended.

Cross one leg over your body with the knee bent, attempting to touch the knee to the ground. Your partner should kneel beside you, holding your shoulder down with one hand and controlling the crossed leg with the other. this will be your starting position.
Attempt to raise the bent knee off of the ground as your partner prevents any actual movement.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the leg as your partner gently presses the knee towards the floor. Repeat with the other side.

instrucoes: Lie on a flat bench while holding two halters directly in front of you. Your braços should be fully extended at a 90-degree angle from your tronco and the chão. The palms should be facing in and the cotovelos should be tucked in. This is the posição inicial.
As you inspire and you keep the upper braços stationary with the cotovelos in, slowly lower the peso until the halters are near your ears.
At that point, while keeping the cotovelos in and the upper braços stationary, use the triceps to bring the peso costas up to the posição inicial as you expire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on a flat bench while holding two dumbbells directly in front of you. Your arms should be fully extended at a 90-degree angle from your torso and the floor. The palms should be facing in and the elbows should be tucked in. This is the starting position.
As you breathe in and you keep the upper arms stationary with the elbows in, slowly lower the weight until the dumbbells are near your ears.
At that point, while keeping the elbows in and the upper arms stationary, use the triceps to bring the weight back up to the starting position as you breathe out.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Lying Face Down Plate Neck Resistance
nomeOriginal: Lying Face Down Plate Neck Resistance
instrucoes: Lie face down with your whole body straight on a flat bench while holding a peso plate behind your head. Dica: You will need to posição yourself so that your ombros are slightly above the end of a flat bench in order for the upper peito, neck and face to be off the bench. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping the plate secure on the costas of your head slowly lower your head (as in saying "yes") as you inspire.
Eleve your head costas up to the posição inicial in a semi-circular motion as you expire. Segure the contraction for a second.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face down with your whole body straight on a flat bench while holding a weight plate behind your head. Tip: You will need to position yourself so that your shoulders are slightly above the end of a flat bench in order for the upper chest, neck and face to be off the bench. This will be your starting position.
While keeping the plate secure on the back of your head slowly lower your head (as in saying "yes") as you breathe in.
Raise your head back up to the starting position in a semi-circular motion as you breathe out. Hold the contraction for a second.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Lying Face Up Plate Neck Resistance
nomeOriginal: Lying Face Up Plate Neck Resistance
instrucoes: Lie face up with your whole body straight on a flat bench while holding a peso plate on top of your forehead. Dica: You will need to posição yourself so that your ombros are slightly above the end of a flat bench in order for the traps, neck and head to be off the bench. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping the plate secure on your forehead slowly lower your head costas in a semi-circular motion as you inspire.
Eleve your head costas up to the posição inicial in a semi-circular motion as you expire. Segure the contraction for a second.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face up with your whole body straight on a flat bench while holding a weight plate on top of your forehead. Tip: You will need to position yourself so that your shoulders are slightly above the end of a flat bench in order for the traps, neck and head to be off the bench. This will be your starting position.
While keeping the plate secure on your forehead slowly lower your head back in a semi-circular motion as you breathe in.
Raise your head back up to the starting position in a semi-circular motion as you breathe out. Hold the contraction for a second.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one perna, raising it off of the chão. Rotate the perna so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower perna perpendicular to your body. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to push your perna towards your partner, who should be preventing any actual movimento of the perna.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as your partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards your peito. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one leg, raising it off of the floor. Rotate the leg so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower leg perpendicular to your body. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your leg towards your partner, who should be preventing any actual movement of the leg.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as your partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards your chest. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your pernas extended. Your partner should be kneeling beside you. Eleve one perna up towards the ceiling and have your partner hold the ankle. Your partner can use their shoulder to brace your perna if necessary. This will be your posição inicial.
With your partner holding your perna in place, attempt to flex the knee, contraindo the hamstrings for 10-20 seconds.

Then relax your perna, allowing your partner to gently push the perna towards your head. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Your partner should be kneeling beside you. Raise one leg up towards the ceiling and have your partner hold the ankle. Your partner can use their shoulder to brace your leg if necessary. This will be your starting position.
With your partner holding your leg in place, attempt to flex the knee, contracting the hamstrings for 10-20 seconds.

Then relax your leg, allowing your partner to gently push the leg towards your head. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.

nome: Lying High Bench com barra rosca
instrucoes: Lie face forward on a tall flat bench while holding a barra with a supinated grip (palms facing up). Dica: If you are holding a barra grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner mãoles. Your upper body should be posiçãoed in a way that the upper peito is over the end of the bench and the barra is hanging in front of you with the braços extended and perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.
While keeping the cotovelos in and the upper braços stationary, curl the peso up in a semi-circular motion as you contract the biceps and exhale. Segure at the top of the movimento for a second.

As you inhale, slowly go costas to the posição inicial. Dica: Maintain full control of the peso at all times and avoid any swinging. Remember, only the forebraços should move throughout the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie face forward on a tall flat bench while holding a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up). Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner handles. Your upper body should be positioned in a way that the upper chest is over the end of the bench and the barbell is hanging in front of you with the arms extended and perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
While keeping the elbows in and the upper arms stationary, curl the weight up in a semi-circular motion as you contract the biceps and exhale. Hold at the top of the movement for a second.
As you inhale, slowly go back to the starting position. Tip: Maintain full control of the weight at all times and avoid any swinging. Remember, only the forearms should move throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie face down on the perna curl machine with the pad of the lever on the costas of your pernas (just a few inches under the calves). Dica: Preferably use a perna curl machine that is angled as opposed to flat since an angled posição is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment.

Mantenhaing the tronco flat on the bench, ensure your pernas are fully stretched and grab the side mãoles of the machine. Position your toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances described on the foot posiçãoing section). This will be your posição inicial.
As you exhale, curl your pernas up as far as possible without lifting the upper pernas from the pad. Once you hit the fully contracted posição, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the pernas costas to the initial posição. Repita for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie face down on the leg curl machine with the pad of the lever on the back of your legs (just a few inches under the calves). Tip: Preferably use a leg curl machine that is angled as opposed to flat since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment.

Keeping the torso flat on the bench, ensure your legs are fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine. Position your toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances described on the foot positioning section). This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting the upper legs from the pad. Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the legs back to the initial position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the perna machine to a height that will allow you to get inside it with your joelhos bent and the thighs slightly below parallel.

Once you select the peso, posição yourself inside the machine face up with the joelhos bent and thighs slightly below parallel to the platform. Make sure that the joelhos do not go past the toes. The angle created between the hamstrings and the calves should be one that is slightly less than 90 degrees (since your posição inicial requires you to start slightly below parallel). Your costas and your head should be resting on the machine while your ombros are pressed under the shoulder pads.
Place your mãos by the mãoles and posição your pés slightly pointing out at a shoulder width posição. This will be your posição inicial.

While pressing with the balls of the pés as you expire, make your whole body erect as you squeeze the quads. Segure the contracted posição for a second. Dica: Since you are starting below parallel, you can opt to use your mãos to help you up by pressing on your thighs only on the first repetition.

Lentamente squat down as you inhale but instead of going all the way down to the posição inicial, just stop once your thighs are parallel to the platform. The angle between your hamstrings and calves should be a 90-degree angle.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the leg machine to a height that will allow you to get inside it with your knees bent and the thighs slightly below parallel.

Once you select the weight, position yourself inside the machine face up with the knees bent and thighs slightly below parallel to the platform. Make sure that the knees do not go past the toes. The angle created between the hamstrings and the calves should be one that is slightly less than 90 degrees (since your starting position requires you to start slightly below parallel). Your back and your head should be resting on the machine while your shoulders are pressed under the shoulder pads.
Place your hands by the handles and position your feet slightly pointing out at a shoulder width position. This will be your starting position.

While pressing with the balls of the feet as you breathe out, make your whole body erect as you squeeze the quads. Hold the contracted position for a second. Tip: Since you are starting below parallel, you can opt to use your hands to help you up by pressing on your thighs only on the first repetition.

Slowly squat down as you inhale but instead of going all the way down to the starting position, just stop once your thighs are parallel to the platform. The angle between your hamstrings and calves should be a 90-degree angle.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: While holding a halter in one mão, lay with your peito down on a flat bench. The other mão can be used to hold to the perna of the bench for stability.
Position the palm of the mão that is holding the halter in a neutral manner (palms facing your tronco) as you keep the braço extended with the elbow slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.

Now raise the braço with the halter to the side until your elbow is at shoulder height and your braço is roughly parallel to the chão as you exhale. Dica: Maintain your braço perpendicular to the tronco while keeping your braço extended throughout the movimento. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Lentamente lower the halter to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a dumbbell in one hand, lay with your chest down on a flat bench. The other hand can be used to hold to the leg of the bench for stability.

Position the palm of the hand that is holding the dumbbell in a neutral manner (palms facing your torso) as you keep the arm extended with the elbow slightly bent. This will be your starting position.

Now raise the arm with the dumbbell to the side until your elbow is at shoulder height and your arm is roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain your arm perpendicular to the torso while keeping your arm extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbell to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lay face down on the chão with your partner kneeling beside you. Flex one knee and raise that perna off the ground, attempting to touch your glutes with your foot. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to extend your knee while your partner prevents any actual movimento.
After 10-20 seconds, relax your muscles as your partner gently pushes the foot towards your glutes, further stretching the quadriceps and hip flexors.
After 10-20 seconds, switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay face down on the floor with your partner kneeling beside you. Flex one knee and raise that leg off the ground, attempting to touch your glutes with your foot. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to extend your knee while your partner prevents any actual movement.
After 10-20 seconds, relax your muscles as your partner gently pushes the foot towards your glutes, further stretching the quadriceps and hip flexors.
After 10-20 seconds, switch sides.

instrucoes: While holding a halter in each mão, lay with your peito down on a flat bench.
Position the palms of the mãos in a neutral manner (palms facing your tronco) as you keep the braços extended with the cotovelos slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.

Now raise the braços to the side until your cotovelos are at shoulder height and your braços are roughly parallel to the chão as you exhale. Dica: Maintain your braços perpendicular to the tronco while keeping them extended throughout the movimento. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Lentamente lower the halters to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then switch to the other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: While holding a dumbbell in each hand, lay with your chest down on a flat bench.
Position the palms of the hands in a neutral manner (palms facing your torso) as you keep the arms extended with the elbows slightly bent. This will be your starting position.

Now raise the arms to the side until your elbows are at shoulder height and your arms are roughly parallel to the floor as you exhale. Tip: Maintain your arms perpendicular to the torso while keeping them extended throughout the movement. Also, keep the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly lower the dumbbells to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch to the other arm.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench face up while holding a halter in each braço on top of your thighs.
Bring the halters to the sides with the braços extended and the palms of the mãos facing your thighs (neutral grip).

While keeping the braços close to your tronco and cotovelos in, slowly lower your braços (as you keep them extended with a slight bend at the cotovelos) as far down towards the chão as you can go. Once you cannot go down any further, lock your upper braços in that posição and that will be your posição inicial.

As you expire, slowly begin to curl the pesos up as you simultaneously rotate your wrists so that the palms of the mãos face up. Continue curling the peso until your biceps are fully contracted and squeeze hard at the top posição for a second. Dica: Only the forebraços should move. Upper braços should remain stationary and cotovelos should stay in throughout the movimento.
Retorne costas to the posição inicial very slowly.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench face up while holding a dumbbell in each arm on top of your thighs.
Bring the dumbbells to the sides with the arms extended and the palms of the hands facing your thighs (neutral grip).

While keeping the arms close to your torso and elbows in, slowly lower your arms (as you keep them extended with a slight bend at the elbows) as far down towards the floor as you can go. Once you cannot go down any further, lock your upper arms in that position and that will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, slowly begin to curl the weights up as you simultaneously rotate your wrists so that the palms of the hands face up. Continue curling the weight until your biceps are fully contracted and squeeze hard at the top position for a second. Tip: Only the forearms should move. Upper arms should remain stationary and elbows should stay in throughout the movement.
Return back to the starting position very slowly.

instrucoes: Load up the T-bar Row Machine with the desired peso and adjust the perna height so that your upper peito is at the top of the pad. Dica: In some machines all you can do is stand on the appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper peito at the top of the pad.
Lay face down on the pad and grab the mãoles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in posição depending on what part of your costas you want to emphasize.
Levante the bar off the rack and extend your braços in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale slowly pull the peso up and squeeze your costas at the top of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha the upper braços as close to the tronco as possible throughout the movimento in order to better engage the costas muscles. Also, do not lift your body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the biceps to lift the peso.
After a second contraction at the top of the movimento, as you inhale, slowly go costas down to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Load up the T-bar Row Machine with the desired weight and adjust the leg height so that your upper chest is at the top of the pad. Tip: In some machines all you can do is stand on the appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper chest at the top of the pad.
Lay face down on the pad and grab the handles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in position depending on what part of your back you want to emphasize.
Lift the bar off the rack and extend your arms in front of you. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale slowly pull the weight up and squeeze your back at the top of the movement. Tip: Keep the upper arms as close to the torso as possible throughout the movement in order to better engage the back muscles. Also, do not lift your body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the biceps to lift the weight.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, as you inhale, slowly go back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on a flat bench with either an e-z bar (my preference) or a straight bar placed on the chão behind your head and your pés on the chão.

Grab the bar behind you, using a medium overmão (pronated) grip, and raise the bar in front of you at braços length. Dica: The braços should be perpendicular to the tronco and the chão. The cotovelos should be tucked in. This is the posição inicial.
As you inspire, slowly lower the peso until the bar lightly touches your forehead while keeping the upper braços and cotovelos stationary.
At that point, use the triceps to bring the peso costas up to the posição inicial as you expire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on a flat bench with either an e-z bar (my preference) or a straight bar placed on the floor behind your head and your feet on the floor.

Grab the bar behind you, using a medium overhand (pronated) grip, and raise the bar in front of you at arms length. Tip: The arms should be perpendicular to the torso and the floor. The elbows should be tucked in. This is the starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the weight until the bar lightly touches your forehead while keeping the upper arms and elbows stationary.
At that point, use the triceps to bring the weight back up to the starting position as you breathe out.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sente-se on the Chest Press Machine and select the peso.
Step on the lever provided by the machine since it will help you to bring the mãoles forward so that you can grab the mãoles and fully extend the braços.

Grab the mãoles with a palms-down grip and lift your cotovelos so that your upper braços are parallel to the chão to the sides of your tronco. Dica: Your forebraços will be pointing forward since you are grabbing the mãoles. Once you bring the mãoles forward and extend the braços you will be at the posição inicial.
Now bring the mãoles costas towards you as you inspire.
Push the mãoles away from you as you flex your pecs and you expire. Segure the contraction for a second before going costas to the posição inicial.
Repita for the recommended amount of reps.
When finished step on the lever again and slowly get the mãoles costas to their original place.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on the Chest Press Machine and select the weight.
Step on the lever provided by the machine since it will help you to bring the handles forward so that you can grab the handles and fully extend the arms.

Grab the handles with a palms-down grip and lift your elbows so that your upper arms are parallel to the floor to the sides of your torso. Tip: Your forearms will be pointing forward since you are grabbing the handles. Once you bring the handles forward and extend the arms you will be at the starting position.
Now bring the handles back towards you as you breathe in.
Push the handles away from you as you flex your pecs and you breathe out. Hold the contraction for a second before going back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of reps.
When finished step on the lever again and slowly get the handles back to their original place.

instrucoes: Adjust the seat to the appropriate height and make your peso selection. Place your upper braços against the pads and grasp the mãoles. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the movimento by flexing the elbow, pulling your lower braço towards your upper braço.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the movimento, and then slowly return the peso to the posição inicial.
Avoid returning the peso all the way to the stops until the set is complete to keep tension on the muscles being worked.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the seat to the appropriate height and make your weight selection. Place your upper arms against the pads and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by flexing the elbow, pulling your lower arm towards your upper arm.
Pause at the top of the movement, and then slowly return the weight to the starting position.
Avoid returning the weight all the way to the stops until the set is complete to keep tension on the muscles being worked.

instrucoes: Sente-se on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the peso.

Place the costas of your upper braços (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the mãoles using an undermão grip (palms facing up). Dica: Make sure that when you place the braços on the pad you keep the cotovelos in. This will be your posição inicial.

Now lift the mãoles as you exhale and you contract the biceps. At the top of the posição make sure that you hold the contraction for a second. Dica: Only the forebraços should move. The upper braços should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Abaixe the mãoles slowly costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the weight.

Place the back of your upper arms (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up). Tip: Make sure that when you place the arms on the pad you keep the elbows in. This will be your starting position.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the biceps. At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second. Tip: Only the forearms should move. The upper arms should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sente-se on the Shoulder Press Machine and select the peso.
Grab the mãoles to your sides as you keep the cotovelos bent and in line with your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Now lift the mãoles as you exhale and you extend the braços fully. At the top of the posição make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.
Abaixe the mãoles slowly costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on the Shoulder Press Machine and select the weight.
Grab the handles to your sides as you keep the elbows bent and in line with your torso. This will be your starting position.
Now lift the handles as you exhale and you extend the arms fully. At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the seat to the appropriate height and make your peso selection. Place your upper braços against the pads and grasp the mãoles. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the movimento by extending the elbow, pulling your lower braço away from your upper braço.
Faça uma pausa at the completion of the movimento, and then slowly return the peso to the posição inicial.
Avoid returning the peso all the way to the stops until the set is complete to keep tension on the muscles being worked.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the seat to the appropriate height and make your weight selection. Place your upper arms against the pads and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by extending the elbow, pulling your lower arm away from your upper arm.
Pause at the completion of the movement, and then slowly return the weight to the starting position.
Avoid returning the weight all the way to the stops until the set is complete to keep tension on the muscles being worked.

instrucoes: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lacking one, this movimento can be performed against a wall.
Comece facing your partner holding the medicine ball at your tronco with both mãos.
Pull the ball to your peito, and reverse the motion by extending through the cotovelos. For sports applications, you can take a step as you throw.
Your partner should catch the ball, and throw it costas to you.
Receive the throw with both mãos at peito height.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lacking one, this movement can be performed against a wall.
Begin facing your partner holding the medicine ball at your torso with both hands.
Pull the ball to your chest, and reverse the motion by extending through the elbows. For sports applications, you can take a step as you throw.
Your partner should catch the ball, and throw it back to you.
Receive the throw with both hands at chest height.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need a medicine ball and a partner. Stand costas to costas with your partner, spaced 2-3 pés apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Segure the ball in front of the trunk. Open the quadris and turn the ombros at the same time as your partner.
For full rotation, you and your partner should twist in the same direction, i.e. counter-clockwise.
Pass the ball to your partner, and both of you can now twist in the opposite direction to repeat the procedure.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need a medicine ball and a partner. Stand back to back with your partner, spaced 2-3 feet apart. This will be your starting position.
Hold the ball in front of the trunk. Open the hips and turn the shoulders at the same time as your partner.
For full rotation, you and your partner should twist in the same direction, i.e. counter-clockwise.
Pass the ball to your partner, and both of you can now twist in the opposite direction to repeat the procedure.

instrucoes: Assume a semisquat stance with a medicine ball in your mãos. Your braços should hang so the ball is near your pés.
Comece by thrusting the quadris forward as you extend through the pernas, jumping up.
As you do, swing your braços up and over your head, keeping them extended, releasing the ball at the peak of your movimento. The goal is to throw the ball the greatest distance behind you.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a semisquat stance with a medicine ball in your hands. Your arms should hang so the ball is near your feet.
Begin by thrusting the hips forward as you extend through the legs, jumping up.
As you do, swing your arms up and over your head, keeping them extended, releasing the ball at the peak of your movement. The goal is to throw the ball the greatest distance behind you.

instrucoes: Lie facedown on an incline bench while holding a halter in each mão. Your braços should be fully extended hanging down and pointing towards the chão. The palms of your mãos should be facing each other. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale, squeeze your shoulder blades together and hold the contraction for a full second. Dica: This movimento is just like the reverse action of a hug, or trying to perform rear laterals as if you had no braços.
As you inhale go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie facedown on an incline bench while holding a dumbbell in each hand. Your arms should be fully extended hanging down and pointing towards the floor. The palms of your hands should be facing each other. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, squeeze your shoulder blades together and hold the contraction for a full second. Tip: This movement is just like the reverse action of a hug, or trying to perform rear laterals as if you had no arms.
As you inhale go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand so your pés are shoulder width apart and your mãos are on your quadris.
Twist at your waist until you feel a stretch. Segure for 10 to 15 seconds, then twist to the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand so your feet are shoulder width apart and your hands are on your hips.
Twist at your waist until you feel a stretch. Hold for 10 to 15 seconds, then twist to the other side.

instrucoes: Using a spacing that is just about 1 inch wider than shoulder width, grab a pull-up bar with the palms of one mão facing forward and the palms of the other mão facing towards you. This will be your posição inicial.

Now start to pull yourself up as you exhale. Dica: With the braço that has the palms facing up concentrate on using the costas muscles in order to perform the movimento. The elbow of that braço should remain close to the tronco. With the other braço that has the palms facing forward, the cotovelos will be away but in line with the tronco. You will concentrate on using the lats to pull your body up.
After a second contraction at the top, start to slowly come down as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.

On the following set, switch grips; so if you had the right mão with the palms facing you and the left one with the palms facing forward, on the next set you will have the palms facing forward for the right mão and facing you for the left.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a spacing that is just about 1 inch wider than shoulder width, grab a pull-up bar with the palms of one hand facing forward and the palms of the other hand facing towards you. This will be your starting position.

Now start to pull yourself up as you exhale. Tip: With the arm that has the palms facing up concentrate on using the back muscles in order to perform the movement. The elbow of that arm should remain close to the torso. With the other arm that has the palms facing forward, the elbows will be away but in line with the torso. You will concentrate on using the lats to pull your body up.
After a second contraction at the top, start to slowly come down as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

On the following set, switch grips; so if you had the right hand with the palms facing you and the left one with the palms facing forward, on the next set you will have the palms facing forward for the right hand and facing you for the left.

instrucoes: Place a band around both ankles and another around both joelhos. There should be enough tension that they are tight when your pés are shoulder width apart.
To begin, take short steps forward alternating your left and right foot.
After several steps, do just the opposite and walk costasward to where you started.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a band around both ankles and another around both knees. There should be enough tension that they are tight when your feet are shoulder width apart.
To begin, take short steps forward alternating your left and right foot.
After several steps, do just the opposite and walk backward to where you started.

instrucoes: Comece in a pushup posição, with your peso supported by your mãos and toes. Flexing the knee and hip, bring one perna until the knee is approximately under the hip. This will be your posição inicial.

Explosively reverse the posiçãos of your pernas, extending the bent perna until the perna is straight and supported by the toe, and bringing the other foot up with the hip and knee flexed. Repita in an alternating fashion for 20-30 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a pushup position, with your weight supported by your hands and toes. Flexing the knee and hip, bring one leg until the knee is approximately under the hip. This will be your starting position.

Explosively reverse the positions of your legs, extending the bent leg until the leg is straight and supported by the toe, and bringing the other foot up with the hip and knee flexed. Repeat in an alternating fashion for 20-30 seconds.

instrucoes: This move helps prepare your running form to help you excel at sprinting. As you run, be sure to flex the knee, aiming to kick your glutes as the hip extends.
Reload the quad as the perna moves costas forward, attacking the ground on the next step.
Ensure that as you run, you block with the braços, punching through in a rapid 1-2 motion.
instrucoesOriginais: This move helps prepare your running form to help you excel at sprinting. As you run, be sure to flex the knee, aiming to kick your glutes as the hip extends.
Reload the quad as the leg moves back forward, attacking the ground on the next step.
Ensure that as you run, you block with the arms, punching through in a rapid 1-2 motion.

instrucoes: Comece with a loaded barra held at the mid thigh posição with a wide grip. The pés should be directly below the quadris, with the pés turned out as needed. Abaixe the quadris, with the peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar. This will be the posição inicial.

Comece the pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar. Transition into the second pull by extending through the quadris joelhos and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body.
Continue raising the bar to the overhead posição, without rebending the joelhos.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a loaded barbell held at the mid thigh position with a wide grip. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.

Begin the pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar. Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body.
Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, without rebending the knees.

instrucoes: Grip the rings using a false grip, with the base of your palms on top of the rings. Initiate a pull up by pulling the cotovelos down to your side, flexing the cotovelos.

As you reach the top posição of the pull-up, pull the rings to your braçopits as you roll your ombros forward, allowing your cotovelos to move straight costas behind you. This puts you into the proper posição to continue into the dip portion of the movimento.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.
instrucoesOriginais: Grip the rings using a false grip, with the base of your palms on top of the rings. Initiate a pull up by pulling the elbows down to your side, flexing the elbows.

As you reach the top position of the pull-up, pull the rings to your armpits as you roll your shoulders forward, allowing your elbows to move straight back behind you. This puts you into the proper position to continue into the dip portion of the movement.
Maintaining control and stability, extend through the elbow to complete the motion.
Use care when lowering yourself to the ground.

instrucoes: Place the costas of your tronco against the costas pad of the machine and hook your ombros under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your pernas in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Your pés should be around 3 inches or less apart. Dica: Mantenha your head up at all times and also maintain the costas on the pad at all times.
Place your braços on the side mãoles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side mãoles from a facing front posição to a diagonal posição).
Now straighten your pernas without locking the joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece to slowly lower the unit by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (costas on the pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Comece to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the chão with mainly with the heels of your pés as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your legs in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Your feet should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).
Now straighten your legs without locking the knees. This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times). Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heels of your feet as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Using a perna press machine, sit down on the machine and place your pernas on the platform directly in front of you at a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Your pés should be around 3 inches or less apart. Dica: Mantenha your head up at all times and also maintain the costas on the pad at all times.

Abaixe the safety bars holding the pesoed platform in place and press the platform all the way up until your pernas are fully extended in front of you. Dica: Make sure that you do not lock your joelhos. Your tronco and the pernas should make a perfect 90-degree angle. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until your upper and lower pernas make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly with the heels of your pés and using the quadriceps go costas to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a leg press machine, sit down on the machine and place your legs on the platform directly in front of you at a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Your feet should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.

Lower the safety bars holding the weighted platform in place and press the platform all the way up until your legs are fully extended in front of you. Tip: Make sure that you do not lock your knees. Your torso and the legs should make a perfect 90-degree angle. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
Pushing mainly with the heels of your feet and using the quadriceps go back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done. You do not want that platform falling on you fully loaded.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Feet should be around 3-6 inches apart. Mantenha your head up at all times (looking down will get you off balance) and maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Feet should be around 3-6 inches apart. Keep your head up at all times (looking down will get you off balance) and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Using the perna pad of a lat pulldown machine or a preacher bench, posição yourself so that your ankles are under the pads, joelhos on the seat, and you are facing away from the machine. You should be upright and maintaining good posture.
This will be your posição inicial. Abaixe yourself under control until your joelhos are almost completely straight.
Remaining in control, raise yourself costas up to the posição inicial.
If you are unable to complete a rep, use a band, a partner, or push off of a box to aid in completing a repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Using the leg pad of a lat pulldown machine or a preacher bench, position yourself so that your ankles are under the pads, knees on the seat, and you are facing away from the machine. You should be upright and maintaining good posture.
This will be your starting position. Lower yourself under control until your knees are almost completely straight.
Remaining in control, raise yourself back up to the starting position.
If you are unable to complete a rep, use a band, a partner, or push off of a box to aid in completing a repetition.

instrucoes: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind your head and against your neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. This will be your posição inicial.
Starting at the top of your neck, slowly roll down the muscles of your neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind your head and against your neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. This will be your starting position.
Starting at the top of your neck, slowly roll down the muscles of your neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.

instrucoes: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a medium-width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movimento between the forebraços and the upper braços), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over your neck with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your neck.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços and squeeze your peito in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up).
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on a flat bench. Using a medium-width grip (a grip that creates a 90-degree angle in the middle of the movement between the forearms and the upper arms), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over your neck with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your neck.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up).
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Lie flat on the chão with your lower costas pressed to the ground. For this exercise, you will need to put one mão beside your head and the other to the side against the chão.
Make sure your pés are elevated and resting on a flat surface.
Now lift the shoulder in which your mão is touching your head.
