Simply elevate your shoulder and body upward until you touch your knee. For example, if you have your right mão besides your head, then you want to elevate your body upwards until your right elbow touches your left knee. The same variation can be applied doing the inverse and using your left elbow to touch your right knee.
After your knee touches your elbow, lower your body until you have reached the posição inicial.
Remember to inspire during the eccentric (lowering) part of the exercise and to expire during the concentric (upward) part of the exercise.
Continue alternating in this manner until all of the recommended repetitions for each side have been completed.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on the floor with your lower back pressed to the ground. For this exercise, you will need to put one hand beside your head and the other to the side against the floor.
Make sure your feet are elevated and resting on a flat surface.
Now lift the shoulder in which your hand is touching your head.

Simply elevate your shoulder and body upward until you touch your knee. For example, if you have your right hand besides your head, then you want to elevate your body upwards until your right elbow touches your left knee. The same variation can be applied doing the inverse and using your left elbow to touch your right knee.
After your knee touches your elbow, lower your body until you have reached the starting position.
Remember to breathe in during the eccentric (lowering) part of the exercise and to breathe out during the concentric (upward) part of the exercise.
Continue alternating in this manner until all of the recommended repetitions for each side have been completed.

instrucoes: Start out by lying on your right side with your pernas lying on top of each other. Make sure your joelhos are bent a little bit.
Place your left mão behind your head.
Once you are in this set posição, begin by moving your left elbow up as you would perform a normal crunch except this time the main emphasis is on your obliques.
Crunch as high as you can, hold the contraction for a second and then slowly drop costas down into the posição inicial.
Remember to inspire during the eccentric (lowering) part of the exercise and to expire during the concentric (elevation) part of the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by lying on your right side with your legs lying on top of each other. Make sure your knees are bent a little bit.
Place your left hand behind your head.
Once you are in this set position, begin by moving your left elbow up as you would perform a normal crunch except this time the main emphasis is on your obliques.
Crunch as high as you can, hold the contraction for a second and then slowly drop back down into the starting position.
Remember to breathe in during the eccentric (lowering) part of the exercise and to breathe out during the concentric (elevation) part of the exercise.

instrucoes: Comece with a barra supported on top of the traps. The peito should be up, and the head facing forward. Adopt a hip width stance with the pés turned out as needed.

Descend by flexing the joelhos, refraining from moving the quadris costas as much as possible. This requires that the joelhos travel forward; ensure that they stay aligned with the pés. The goal is to keep the tronco as upright as possible. Continue all the way down, keeping the peso on the front of the heel.
At the moment the upper pernas contact the lower, reverse the motion, driving the peso upward.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a barbell supported on top of the traps. The chest should be up, and the head facing forward. Adopt a hip width stance with the feet turned out as needed.

Descend by flexing the knees, refraining from moving the hips back as much as possible. This requires that the knees travel forward; ensure that they stay aligned with the feet. The goal is to keep the torso as upright as possible. Continue all the way down, keeping the weight on the front of the heel.
At the moment the upper legs contact the lower, reverse the motion, driving the weight upward.

instrucoes: Lie on a flat bench or step, and hang one perna and braço over the side.
Bend the knee and hold the top of the foot. As you do this, be careful not to arch your lower costas.
Pull the belly button to the spine to stay in neutral. Press your foot down and into your mão. To add the hip stretch, lift the hip of the perna you're holding up toward the ceiling.
Troque de lado.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on a flat bench or step, and hang one leg and arm over the side.
Bend the knee and hold the top of the foot. As you do this, be careful not to arch your lower back.
Pull the belly button to the spine to stay in neutral. Press your foot down and into your hand. To add the hip stretch, lift the hip of the leg you're holding up toward the ceiling.
Switch sides.

instrucoes: Start off by lying on your right side, with your right knee bent at a 90-degree angle resting on the chão in front of you (this stabilizes the tronco).
Bend your left knee behind you and hold your left foot with your left mão. To stretch your hip flexor, press your left hip forward as you push your left foot costas into your mão. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Start off by lying on your right side, with your right knee bent at a 90-degree angle resting on the floor in front of you (this stabilizes the torso).
Bend your left knee behind you and hold your left foot with your left hand. To stretch your hip flexor, press your left hip forward as you push your left foot back into your hand. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Choose a flat bench and place a halter on each side of it.

Place the right perna on top of the end of the bench, bend your tronco forward from the waist until your upper body is parallel to the chão, and place your right mão on the other end of the bench for support.
Use the left mão to pick up the halter on the chão and hold the peso while keeping your lower costas straight. The palm of the mão should be facing your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

Pull the resistance straight up to the side of your peito, keeping your upper braço close to your side and keeping the tronco stationary. Breathe out as you perform this step. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. Also, make sure that the force is performed with the costas muscles and not the braços. Finally, the upper tronco should remain stationary and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work except for holding the halter; therefore do not try to pull the halter up using the forebraços.
Abaixe the resistance straight down to the posição inicial. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita the movimento for the specified amount of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat again with the other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Choose a flat bench and place a dumbbell on each side of it.

Place the right leg on top of the end of the bench, bend your torso forward from the waist until your upper body is parallel to the floor, and place your right hand on the other end of the bench for support.

Use the left hand to pick up the dumbbell on the floor and hold the weight while keeping your lower back straight. The palm of the hand should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Pull the resistance straight up to the side of your chest, keeping your upper arm close to your side and keeping the torso stationary. Breathe out as you perform this step. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. Also, make sure that the force is performed with the back muscles and not the arms. Finally, the upper torso should remain stationary and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work except for holding the dumbbell; therefore do not try to pull the dumbbell up using the forearms.
Lower the resistance straight down to the starting position. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repeat the movement for the specified amount of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat again with the other arm.

nome: One-Arm Flat Bench com halter Flye
instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench with a halter in one mão resting on top of your thigh. The palm of your mão with the halter in it should be at a neutral grip.

By using your thighs to help you get the halter up, clean the halter so that you can hold it in front of you with your lifting braço being fully extended. Remember to maintain a neutral grip with this exercise. Your non lifting mão should be to the side holding the flat bench for better support. This will be your posição inicial.

Your braço with the peso should have a slight bend on your elbow in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon. Comece by lowering your braço with the peso in it out in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your peito. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Mantenha in mind that throughout the movimento, your lifting braço should remain stationary; the movimento should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Retorne your lifting braço costas to the posição inicial as you squeeze your peito muscles and expire. Dica: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the pesos.
Segure for a second at the contracted posição and repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand resting on top of your thigh. The palm of your hand with the dumbbell in it should be at a neutral grip.

By using your thighs to help you get the dumbbell up, clean the dumbbell so that you can hold it in front of you with your lifting arm being fully extended. Remember to maintain a neutral grip with this exercise. Your non lifting hand should be to the side holding the flat bench for better support. This will be your starting position.

Your arm with the weight should have a slight bend on your elbow in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon. Begin by lowering your arm with the weight in it out in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your chest. Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, your lifting arm should remain stationary; the movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.
Return your lifting arm back to the starting position as you squeeze your chest muscles and breathe out. Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the weights.
Hold for a second at the contracted position and repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

nome: One-Arm High-Pulley no cabo Side Bends
instrucoes: Connect a standard mãole to a tower. Move cable to highest pulley posição.
Stand with side to cable. With one mão, reach up and grab mãole with undermão grip.
Pull down cable until elbow touches your side and the mãole is by your shoulder.
Position pés hip-width apart. Place free mão on hip to help gauge pivot point.
Mantenha braço in static posição. Contract oblique to bring the peso down in a side crunch.
Once you reach maximum contraction, slowly release the peso to the posição inicial. The peso stack should never be unloaded in a resting posição. The aim is constant tension during the set.
Repita to failure.
Then, reposição and repeat the same series of movimentos on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a standard handle to a tower. Move cable to highest pulley position.
Stand with side to cable. With one hand, reach up and grab handle with underhand grip.
Pull down cable until elbow touches your side and the handle is by your shoulder.
Position feet hip-width apart. Place free hand on hip to help gauge pivot point.
Keep arm in static position. Contract oblique to bring the weight down in a side crunch.
Once you reach maximum contraction, slowly release the weight to the starting position. The weight stack should never be unloaded in a resting position. The aim is constant tension during the set.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements on the opposite side.

instrucoes: Deite-se sideways on an incline bench press with a halter in the mão. Make sure the shoulder is pressing against the incline bench and the braço is lying across your body with the palm around your navel.
Segure a halter in your uppermost braço while keeping it extended in front of you parallel to the chão. This is your posição inicial.

While keeping the halter parallel to the chão at all times, perform a lateral raise. Your braço should travel straight up until it is pointing at the ceiling. Dica: Exhale as you perform this movimento. Segure the halter in the posição and feel the contraction in the ombros for a second.
While inhaling lower the peso across your body costas into the posição inicial.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down sideways on an incline bench press with a dumbbell in the hand. Make sure the shoulder is pressing against the incline bench and the arm is lying across your body with the palm around your navel.
Hold a dumbbell in your uppermost arm while keeping it extended in front of you parallel to the floor. This is your starting position.

While keeping the dumbbell parallel to the floor at all times, perform a lateral raise. Your arm should travel straight up until it is pointing at the ceiling. Tip: Exhale as you perform this movement. Hold the dumbbell in the position and feel the contraction in the shoulders for a second.
While inhaling lower the weight across your body back into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell between your pés. As you bend down to grab the kettlebell, push your butt costas and keep your eyes looking forward.
Clean the kettlebell to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Retorne the peso to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell between your feet. As you bend down to grab the kettlebell, push your butt back and keep your eyes looking forward.
Clean the kettlebell to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so.
Return the weight to the starting position.

nome: One-Arm com kettlebell Clean and Jerk
instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell by the mãole.
Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward.
Dip your body by bending the joelhos, keeping your tronco upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using your body's momentum to move the peso.
Receive the peso overhead by returning to a squat posição underneath the peso.
Mantenhaing the peso overhead, return to a standing posição. Abaixe the peso to the chão to perform the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell by the handle.
Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward.
Dip your body by bending the knees, keeping your torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the arms, using your body's momentum to move the weight.
Receive the weight overhead by returning to a squat position underneath the weight.
Keeping the weight overhead, return to a standing position. Lower the weight to the floor to perform the next repetition.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão holding a kettlebell with one mão, with your upper braço supported by the chão. The palm should be facing in.
Press the kettlebell straight up toward the ceiling, rotating your wrist.
Abaixe the kettlebell costas to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor holding a kettlebell with one hand, with your upper arm supported by the floor. The palm should be facing in.
Press the kettlebell straight up toward the ceiling, rotating your wrist.
Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position and repeat.

instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell by the mãole. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Dip your body by bending the joelhos, keeping your tronco upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using your body's momentum to move the peso. Receive the peso overhead by returning to a squat posição underneath the peso. Mantenhaing the peso overhead, return to a standing posição.
Abaixe the peso to perform the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell by the handle. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your starting position.
Dip your body by bending the knees, keeping your torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the arms, using your body's momentum to move the weight. Receive the weight overhead by returning to a squat position underneath the weight. Keeping the weight overhead, return to a standing position.
Lower the weight to perform the next repetition.

nome: One-Arm com kettlebell Military press To The Side
nomeOriginal: One-Arm Kettlebell Military Press To The Side
instrucoes: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. This will be your posição inicial.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Abaixe the kettlebell costas to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. This will be your starting position.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.

instrucoes: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Segure the kettlebell with the elbow out to the side, and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Abaixe the kettlebell costas to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your starting position.
Hold the kettlebell with the elbow out to the side, and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.

instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell by the mãole. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Dip your body by bending the joelhos, keeping your tronco upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using your body's momentum to move the peso. Abaixe the peso to perform the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell by the handle. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your starting position.
Dip your body by bending the knees, keeping your torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the arms, using your body's momentum to move the weight. Lower the weight to perform the next repetition.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell in front of your pés. Bend your joelhos slightly and then push your butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the posição inicial. Grab the kettlebell and pull it to your stomach, retracting your shoulder blade and flexing the elbow. Mantenha your costas straight. Abaixe and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell in front of your feet. Bend your knees slightly and then push your butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the starting position. Grab the kettlebell and pull it to your stomach, retracting your shoulder blade and flexing the elbow. Keep your back straight. Lower and repeat.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell between your pés. Bend your joelhos and push your butt costas to get in the proper posição inicial.
Look straight ahead and swing the kettlebell costas between your pernas.

Immediately reverse the direction and drive through with your quadris and joelhos, accelerating the kettlebell upward. As the kettlebell rises to your shoulder rotate your mão and punch straight up, using momentum to receive the peso locked out overhead.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell between your feet. Bend your knees and push your butt back to get in the proper starting position.
Look straight ahead and swing the kettlebell back between your legs.

Immediately reverse the direction and drive through with your hips and knees, accelerating the kettlebell upward. As the kettlebell rises to your shoulder rotate your hand and punch straight up, using momentum to receive the weight locked out overhead.

instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell by the mãole. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Dip your body by bending the joelhos, keeping your tronco upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the braços, using your body's momentum to move the peso.
Receive the peso overhead by returning to a squat posição underneath the peso, posiçãoing one perna in front of you and one perna behind you.
Mantenhaing the peso overhead, return to a standing posição and bring your pés together. Abaixe the peso to perform the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell by the handle. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. This will be your starting position.
Dip your body by bending the knees, keeping your torso upright.

Immediately reverse direction, driving through the heels, in essence jumping to create momentum. As you do so, press the kettlebell overhead to lockout by extending the arms, using your body's momentum to move the weight.
Receive the weight overhead by returning to a squat position underneath the weight, positioning one leg in front of you and one leg behind you.
Keeping the weight overhead, return to a standing position and bring your feet together. Lower the weight to perform the next repetition.

instrucoes: Segure a kettlebell in one mão by the mãole.
Squat towards the chão, and then reverse the motion, extending the quadris, joelhos, and finally the ankles, to raise the kettlebell overhead.

After fully extending the body, descend into a lunge posição to receive the pesos overhead, one perna forward and one perna costas. Ensure you drive through with your quadris and lock the ketttlebells overhead in one uninterrupted motion.
Retorne to a standing posição, holding the peso overhead, and bring the pés together. Abaixe the peso to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a kettlebell in one hand by the handle.
Squat towards the floor, and then reverse the motion, extending the hips, knees, and finally the ankles, to raise the kettlebell overhead.

After fully extending the body, descend into a lunge position to receive the weights overhead, one leg forward and one leg back. Ensure you drive through with your hips and lock the ketttlebells overhead in one uninterrupted motion.
Return to a standing position, holding the weight overhead, and bring the feet together. Lower the weight to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Position a bar into a landmine or in a corner to keep it from moving. Load an appropriate peso onto your end.
Stand next to the bar, and take a grip with one mão close to the collar. Using your quadris and pernas, rise to a standing posição.
Assume a bent-knee stance with your quadris costas and your peito up. Your braço should be extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull the peso to your side by retracting the shoulder and flexing the elbow. Do not jerk the peso or cheat during the movimento.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar into a landmine or in a corner to keep it from moving. Load an appropriate weight onto your end.
Stand next to the bar, and take a grip with one hand close to the collar. Using your hips and legs, rise to a standing position.
Assume a bent-knee stance with your hips back and your chest up. Your arm should be extended. This will be your starting position.
Pull the weight to your side by retracting the shoulder and flexing the elbow. Do not jerk the weight or cheat during the movement.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Start in a standing posição with a staggered, athletic stance. Segure a medicine ball in one mão, on the same side as your costas perna. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by winding the braço, raising the medicine ball above your head. As you do so, extend through the quadris, joelhos, and ankles to load up for the slam.
At peak extension, flex the ombros, spine, and quadris to throw the ball hard into the ground directly in front of you.
Catch the ball on the bounce and continue for the número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start in a standing position with a staggered, athletic stance. Hold a medicine ball in one hand, on the same side as your back leg. This will be your starting position.
Begin by winding the arm, raising the medicine ball above your head. As you do so, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles to load up for the slam.
At peak extension, flex the shoulders, spine, and hips to throw the ball hard into the ground directly in front of you.
Catch the ball on the bounce and continue for the desired number of repetitions.

nome: One-Arm Open Palm com kettlebell Clean
instrucoes: Place one kettlebell between your pés.
Grab the mãole with one mão and raise the kettlebell rapidly, let it flip so that the ball of the kettlebell lands in the palm of your mão.
Throw the kettlebell out in front of you and catch the mãole with one mão.
Take the kettlebell to the chão and repeat. Make sure to work both braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Place one kettlebell between your feet.
Grab the handle with one hand and raise the kettlebell rapidly, let it flip so that the ball of the kettlebell lands in the palm of your hand.
Throw the kettlebell out in front of you and catch the handle with one hand.
Take the kettlebell to the floor and repeat. Make sure to work both arms.

instrucoes: Clean and press a kettlebell with one braço. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the pernas and quadris as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so. Press the peso overhead by extending through the elbow.This will be your posição inicial.
Looking straight ahead and keeping a kettlebell locked out above you, flex the joelhos and quadris and lower your tronco between your pernas, keeping your head and peito up.
Faça uma pausa at the bottom posição for a second before rising costas to the top, driving through the heels of your pés.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean and press a kettlebell with one arm. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so. Press the weight overhead by extending through the elbow.This will be your starting position.
Looking straight ahead and keeping a kettlebell locked out above you, flex the knees and hips and lower your torso between your legs, keeping your head and chest up.
Pause at the bottom position for a second before rising back to the top, driving through the heels of your feet.

instrucoes: Stand to the side of a barra next to its center. Bend your joelhos and lower your body until you are able to reach the barra.
Grasp the bar as if you were grabbing a briefcase (palms facing you since the bar is sideways). You may need a wrist wrap if you are using a significant amount of peso. This is your posição inicial.
Use your pernas to help lift the barra up while exhaling. Your braços should extend fully as bring the barra up until you are in a standing posição.
Lentamente bring the barra costas down while inhaling. Dica: Make sure to flexione os joelhos while lowering the peso to avoid any injury from occurring.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand to the side of a barbell next to its center. Bend your knees and lower your body until you are able to reach the barbell.

Grasp the bar as if you were grabbing a briefcase (palms facing you since the bar is sideways). You may need a wrist wrap if you are using a significant amount of weight. This is your starting position.
Use your legs to help lift the barbell up while exhaling. Your arms should extend fully as bring the barbell up until you are in a standing position.
Slowly bring the barbell back down while inhaling. Tip: Make sure to bend your knees while lowering the weight to avoid any injury from occurring.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Pick a halter and place it in one of your mãos. Your non lifting mão should be used to grab something steady such as an incline bench press. Lean towards your lifting braço and away from the mão that is gripping the incline bench as this will allow you to keep your balance.
Stand with a straight tronco and have the halter by your side at braço's length with the palm of the mão facing you. This will be your posição inicial.

While maintaining the tronco stationary (no swinging), lift the halter to your side with a slight bend on the elbow and your mão slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you braço is parallel to the chão. Exhale as you execute this movimento and pause for a second at the top.
Abaixe the halter costas down slowly to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Pick a dumbbell and place it in one of your hands. Your non lifting hand should be used to grab something steady such as an incline bench press. Lean towards your lifting arm and away from the hand that is gripping the incline bench as this will allow you to keep your balance.
Stand with a straight torso and have the dumbbell by your side at arm's length with the palm of the hand facing you. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the dumbbell to your side with a slight bend on the elbow and your hand slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you arm is parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this movement and pause for a second at the top.
Lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

instrucoes: Hook a leather ankle cuff to a low cable pulley and then attach the cuff to your ankle.
Face the peso stack from a distance of about two pés, grasping the steel frame for support.

While keeping your joelhos and quadris bent slightly and your abs tight, contract your glutes to slowly "kick" the working perna costas in a semicircular arc as high as it will comfortably go as you expire. Dica: At full extension, squeeze your glutes for a second in order to achieve a peak contraction.
Now slowly bring your working perna forward, resisting the pull of the cable until you reach the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch pernas and repeat the movimento for the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Hook a leather ankle cuff to a low cable pulley and then attach the cuff to your ankle.
Face the weight stack from a distance of about two feet, grasping the steel frame for support.

While keeping your knees and hips bent slightly and your abs tight, contract your glutes to slowly "kick" the working leg back in a semicircular arc as high as it will comfortably go as you breathe out. Tip: At full extension, squeeze your glutes for a second in order to achieve a peak contraction.
Now slowly bring your working leg forward, resisting the pull of the cable until you reach the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch legs and repeat the movement for the other side.

instrucoes: From a standing posição, place a bent braço against a wall or doorway.
Lentamente lean toward your braço until you feel a stretch in your lats.
instrucoesOriginais: From a standing position, place a bent arm against a wall or doorway.
Slowly lean toward your arm until you feel a stretch in your lats.

instrucoes: For this exercise, start out by placing a towel around a chin up bar.
Grab the chin-up bar with your palm facing you. One mão will be grabbing the chin-up bar and the other will be grabbing the towel.
Bring your tronco costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This is your posição inicial.v

Pull your tronco up until the bar touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted posição, start to inhale and slowly lower your tronco costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repita this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise, start out by placing a towel around a chin up bar.
Grab the chin-up bar with your palm facing you. One hand will be grabbing the chin-up bar and the other will be grabbing the towel.
Bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out. This is your starting position.v

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench with a halter in one mão on top of your thigh.

By using your thigh to help you get the halter up, clean the halter up so that you can hold it in front of you at shoulder width. Use the mão you are not lifting with to help posição the halter over you properly.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrist forward so that the palm of your mão is facing away from you. This will be your posição inicial.

Bring down the pesos slowly to your side as you inspire. Mantenha full control of the halter at all times. Dica: Use the mão that you are not lifting with to help keep the halter balance as you may struggle a bit at first. Only use your non-lifting mão if it is needed. Otherwise, keep it resting to the side.

As you expire, push the halters up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, squeeze your peito, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand on top of your thigh.

By using your thigh to help you get the dumbbell up, clean the dumbbell up so that you can hold it in front of you at shoulder width. Use the hand you are not lifting with to help position the dumbbell over you properly.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrist forward so that the palm of your hand is facing away from you. This will be your starting position.

Bring down the weights slowly to your side as you breathe in. Keep full control of the dumbbell at all times. Tip: Use the hand that you are not lifting with to help keep the dumbbell balance as you may struggle a bit at first. Only use your non-lifting hand if it is needed. Otherwise, keep it resting to the side.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using your pectoral muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, squeeze your chest, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

nome: One Arm com halter Preacher rosca
instrucoes: Grab a halter with the right braço and place the upper braço on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The halter should be held at shoulder length. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, slowly lower the halter until your upper braço is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.

As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the peso up until your biceps is fully contracted and the halter is at shoulder height. Again, remember that to ensure full contraction you need to bring that small finger higher than the thumb.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted posição and repeat for the número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell with the right arm and place the upper arm on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The dumbbell should be held at shoulder length. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbell until your upper arm is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.

As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the weight up until your biceps is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder height. Again, remember that to ensure full contraction you need to bring that small finger higher than the thumb.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat surface with your costas pressing against the chão or an exercise mat. Make sure your joelhos are bent.

Have a partner mão you the bar on one mão. When starting, your braço should be just about fully extended, similar to the posição inicial of a barra bench press. However, this time your grip will be neutral (palms facing your tronco).
Make sure the mão you are not using to lift the peso is placed by your side.
Comece the exercise by lowering the barra until your elbow touches the ground. Make sure to inspire as this is the eccentric (lowering part of the exercise).
Then start lifting the barra costas up to the original posição inicial. Remember to expire during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repita until you have performed your recommended repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat surface with your back pressing against the floor or an exercise mat. Make sure your knees are bent.

Have a partner hand you the bar on one hand. When starting, your arm should be just about fully extended, similar to the starting position of a barbell bench press. However, this time your grip will be neutral (palms facing your torso).
Make sure the hand you are not using to lift the weight is placed by your side.
Begin the exercise by lowering the barbell until your elbow touches the ground. Make sure to breathe in as this is the eccentric (lowering part of the exercise).
Then start lifting the barbell back up to the original starting position. Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed your recommended repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Select an appropriate peso and adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the mãole with a pronated grip. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull the mãole down, squeezing your elbow to your side as you flex the elbow.
Faça uma pausa at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the mãole to the posição inicial.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the peso to keep tension on the muscles being worked.
instrucoesOriginais: Select an appropriate weight and adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the handle with a pronated grip. This will be your starting position.
Pull the handle down, squeezing your elbow to your side as you flex the elbow.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handle to the starting position.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the weight to keep tension on the muscles being worked.

nome: One Arm Pronated com halter Triceps Extension
nomeOriginal: One Arm Pronated Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instrucoes: Lie flat on a bench while holding a halter at braços length. Your braço should be perpendicular to your body. The palm of your mão should be facing towards your pés as a pronated grip is required to perform this exercise.
Place your non lifting mão on your bicep for support.
Lentamente begin to lower the halter down as you inspire.
Then, begin lifting the halter upward as you contract the triceps. Remember to expire during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repita until you have performed your set repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on a bench while holding a dumbbell at arms length. Your arm should be perpendicular to your body. The palm of your hand should be facing towards your feet as a pronated grip is required to perform this exercise.
Place your non lifting hand on your bicep for support.
Slowly begin to lower the dumbbell down as you breathe in.
Then, begin lifting the dumbbell upward as you contract the triceps. Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed your set repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.

nome: One Arm Supinated com halter Triceps Extension
nomeOriginal: One Arm Supinated Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instrucoes: Lie flat on a bench while holding a halter at braços length. Your braço should be perpendicular to your body. The palm of your mão should be facing towards your face as a supinated grip is required to perform this exercise.
Place your non lifting mão on your bicep for support.
Lentamente begin to lower the halter down as you inspire.
Then, begin lifting the halter upward as you contract the triceps. Remember to expire during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repita until you have performed your set repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the movimento.
Switch braços again and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on a bench while holding a dumbbell at arms length. Your arm should be perpendicular to your body. The palm of your hand should be facing towards your face as a supinated grip is required to perform this exercise.
Place your non lifting hand on your bicep for support.
Slowly begin to lower the dumbbell down as you breathe in.
Then, begin lifting the dumbbell upward as you contract the triceps. Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed your set repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.
Switch arms again and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Lie facedown on the chão.
Put your left mão under your left hipbone to pad your hip and pubic bone.
Bend your right knee so you can hold the foot in your right mão.

Levante the foot in the air and simultaneously lift your ombros off the chão. This also stretches the right hip flexor and the peito and ombros. Switch sides. If it doesn't bother your costas, you can try it with both braços and pernas at the same time.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie facedown on the floor.
Put your left hand under your left hipbone to pad your hip and pubic bone.
Bend your right knee so you can hold the foot in your right hand.

Lift the foot in the air and simultaneously lift your shoulders off the floor. This also stretches the right hip flexor and the chest and shoulders. Switch sides. If it doesn't bother your back, you can try it with both arms and legs at the same time.

instrucoes: Grab onto a chinup bar with one mão, using a pronated grip. Mantenha your pés on the chão or a step. Allow the majority of your peso to hang from that mão, while keeping your pés on the ground. Segure for 10-20 seconds and switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab onto a chinup bar with one hand, using a pronated grip. Keep your feet on the floor or a step. Allow the majority of your weight to hang from that hand, while keeping your feet on the ground. Hold for 10-20 seconds and switch sides.

instrucoes: Start off by lying on the chão.
Extend one perna straight and pull the other knee to your peito. Segure under the knee joint to protect the kneecap.
Gently tug that knee toward your nose.
Switch sides. This stretches the buttocks and lower costas of the bent perna and the hip flexor of the straight perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Start off by lying on the floor.
Extend one leg straight and pull the other knee to your chest. Hold under the knee joint to protect the kneecap.
Gently tug that knee toward your nose.
Switch sides. This stretches the buttocks and lower back of the bent leg and the hip flexor of the straight leg.

instrucoes: Start by standing about 2 to 3 pés in front of a flat bench with your costas facing the bench. Have a barra in front of you on the chão. Dica: Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other.
Bend the joelhos and use a pronated grip with your mãos being wider than shoulder width apart from each other to lift the barra up until you can rest it on your peito.

Then lift the barra over your head and rest it on the base of your neck. Move one foot costas so that your toe is resting on the flat bench. Your other foot should be stationary in front of you. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. Dica: Make sure your costas is straight and peito is out while performing this exercise.
As you inhale, slowly lower your perna until your thigh is parallel to the chão. At this point, your knee should be over your toes. Your peito should be directly above the middle of your thigh.
Leading with the peito and quadris and contraindo the quadriceps, elevate your perna costas to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch pernas and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by standing about 2 to 3 feet in front of a flat bench with your back facing the bench. Have a barbell in front of you on the floor. Tip: Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.
Bend the knees and use a pronated grip with your hands being wider than shoulder width apart from each other to lift the barbell up until you can rest it on your chest.

Then lift the barbell over your head and rest it on the base of your neck. Move one foot back so that your toe is resting on the flat bench. Your other foot should be stationary in front of you. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. Tip: Make sure your back is straight and chest is out while performing this exercise.
As you inhale, slowly lower your leg until your thigh is parallel to the floor. At this point, your knee should be over your toes. Your chest should be directly above the middle of your thigh.
Leading with the chest and hips and contracting the quadriceps, elevate your leg back to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch legs and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Place one kettlebell between your pés. Clean the kettlebell by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebell towards your ombros.
Release the kettlebell as it comes up, and let it flip so that the ball of the kettlebell lands in the palms of your mãos.
Release the kettlebell out in front of you and catch the mãole with both mãos. Abaixe the kettlebell to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Place one kettlebell between your feet. Clean the kettlebell by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulders.
Release the kettlebell as it comes up, and let it flip so that the ball of the kettlebell lands in the palms of your hands.
Release the kettlebell out in front of you and catch the handle with both hands. Lower the kettlebell to the starting position and repeat.

instrucoes: Secure your pés and lay costas on the chão. Your joelhos should be bent. Segure a peso with both mãos to your peito. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by flexing the quadris and spine to raise your tronco up from the ground.
As you move up, press the peso up so that it is above your head at the top of the movimento.
Retorne the peso to your peito as you reverse the sit-up motion, ensuring not to go all the way down to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure your feet and lay back on the floor. Your knees should be bent. Hold a weight with both hands to your chest. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by flexing the hips and spine to raise your torso up from the ground.
As you move up, press the weight up so that it is above your head at the top of the movement.
Return the weight to your chest as you reverse the sit-up motion, ensuring not to go all the way down to the floor.

instrucoes: To begin, set a peso that is comfortable on each side of the pulley machine. Note: Make sure that the amount of peso selected is the same on each side.
Now adjust the height of the pulleys on each side and make sure that they are posiçãoed at a height higher than that of your ombros.

Stand in the middle of both sides and use an undermão grip (palms facing towards the ceiling) to grab each mãole. Your braços should be fully extended and parallel to the chão with your pés posiçãoed shoulder width apart from each other. Your body should be evenly aligned the mãoles. This is the posição inicial.
While exhaling, slowly squeeze the biceps on each side until your forebraços and biceps touch.
While inhaling, move your forebraços costas to the posição inicial. Note: Your entire body is stationary during this exercise except for the forebraços.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições prescribed in your program.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, set a weight that is comfortable on each side of the pulley machine. Note: Make sure that the amount of weight selected is the same on each side.
Now adjust the height of the pulleys on each side and make sure that they are positioned at a height higher than that of your shoulders.

Stand in the middle of both sides and use an underhand grip (palms facing towards the ceiling) to grab each handle. Your arms should be fully extended and parallel to the floor with your feet positioned shoulder width apart from each other. Your body should be evenly aligned the handles. This is the starting position.
While exhaling, slowly squeeze the biceps on each side until your forearms and biceps touch.
While inhaling, move your forearms back to the starting position. Note: Your entire body is stationary during this exercise except for the forearms.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.

instrucoes: Sit upright on the chão with your partner behind you. Eleve one braço straight up, and flex the elbow, attempting to touch your mão to your costas. Your parner should hold your tricep and wrist. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to pull your upper braço to your side as your partner prevents you from doing actually doing so.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the braço and allow your partner to further stretch the lat by applying gentle pressure to the tricep. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit upright on the floor with your partner behind you. Raise one arm straight up, and flex the elbow, attempting to touch your hand to your back. Your parner should hold your tricep and wrist. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to pull your upper arm to your side as your partner prevents you from doing actually doing so.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the arm and allow your partner to further stretch the lat by applying gentle pressure to the tricep. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Segure a medine ball with both mãos and stand with your pés at shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the countermovimento by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both mãos on the bounce and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a medine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both hands on the bounce and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Start out by having a barra in front of you on the chão. Your pés should be wider than shoulder width apart from each other.

Bend the joelhos and use a pronated grip (palms facing you) to grab the barra. Your mãos should be at a wider than shoulder width apart from each other before lifting. Once you are posiçãoed, lift the barra up until you can rest it on your peito.

Move the barra over and slightly behind your head and make sure your braços are fully extended. Mantenha your head up at all times and also maintain a straight costas. Retract your shoulder blades. This is your posição inicial.

Lentamente lower the peso by bending your joelhos until your thighs are parallel to the ground while inhaling. Dica: Mantenha your costas straight while performing this exercise to avoid any injuries and your braços should remain extended and over your head at all times.
Now use your pés and pernas to help bring the peso costas up to the posição inicial while exhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by having a barbell in front of you on the floor. Your feet should be wider than shoulder width apart from each other.

Bend the knees and use a pronated grip (palms facing you) to grab the barbell. Your hands should be at a wider than shoulder width apart from each other before lifting. Once you are positioned, lift the barbell up until you can rest it on your chest.

Move the barbell over and slightly behind your head and make sure your arms are fully extended. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. Retract your shoulder blades. This is your starting position.

Slowly lower the weight by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground while inhaling. Tip: Keep your back straight while performing this exercise to avoid any injuries and your arms should remain extended and over your head at all times.
Now use your feet and legs to help bring the weight back up to the starting position while exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Standing straight up, lace your fingers together and open your palms to the ceiling. Mantenha your ombros down as you extend your braços up.
To create a full tronco stretch, pull your tailbone down and stabilize your tronco as you do this. Stretch the muscles on both the front and the costas of the tronco.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing straight up, lace your fingers together and open your palms to the ceiling. Keep your shoulders down as you extend your arms up.
To create a full torso stretch, pull your tailbone down and stabilize your torso as you do this. Stretch the muscles on both the front and the back of the torso.

instrucoes: Sit upright on the chão with your partner behind you. Eleve one braço straight up, and flex the elbow, attempting to touch your mão to your costas. Your parner should hold your elbow and wrist. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to extend the braço straight into the air as your partner prevents you from doing actually doing so.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the braço and allow your partner to further stretch the tricep by applying gentle pressure to the wrist. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit upright on the floor with your partner behind you. Raise one arm straight up, and flex the elbow, attempting to touch your hand to your back. Your parner should hold your elbow and wrist. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to extend the arm straight into the air as your partner prevents you from doing actually doing so.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the arm and allow your partner to further stretch the tricep by applying gentle pressure to the wrist. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Connect a standard mãole to a tower, and—if possible—posição the cable to shoulder height. If not, a low pulley will suffice.
With your side to the cable, grab the mãole with both mãos and step away from the tower. You should be approximately braço's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the peso on the cable.
With your pés posiçãoed hip-width apart and joelhos slightly bent, hold the cable to the middle of your peito. This will be your posição inicial.
Press the cable away from your peito, fully extending both braços. You core should be tight and engaged.
Segure the repetition for several seconds before returning to the posição inicial.
At the conclusion of the set, repeat facing the other direction.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a standard handle to a tower, and—if possible—position the cable to shoulder height. If not, a low pulley will suffice.
With your side to the cable, grab the handle with both hands and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the weight on the cable.
With your feet positioned hip-width apart and knees slightly bent, hold the cable to the middle of your chest. This will be your starting position.
Press the cable away from your chest, fully extending both arms. You core should be tight and engaged.
Hold the repetition for several seconds before returning to the starting position.
At the conclusion of the set, repeat facing the other direction.

instrucoes: Connect a standard mãole to a tower, and posição the cable to shoulder height.

With your side to the cable, grab the mãole with one mão and step away from the tower. You should be approximately braço's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the peso on the cable. Align outstretched braço with cable.
With your pés posiçãoed hip-width apart, pull the cable into your peito and grab the mãole with your other mão. Both mãos should be on the mãole at this time.
Facing forward, press the cable away from your peito. You core should be tight and engaged.
Mantenhaing your quadris straight, twist your tronco away from the pulley until you get a full quarter rotation.
Maintain your rigid stance and straight braços. Retorne to the neutral posição in a slow and controlled manner. Your braços should be extended in front of you.
With the side tension still engaging your core, bring your mãos to your peito and immediately press outward to a fully extended posição. This constitutes one rep.
Repita to failure.
Then, reposição and repeat the same series of movimentos on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a standard handle to a tower, and position the cable to shoulder height.

With your side to the cable, grab the handle with one hand and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the weight on the cable. Align outstretched arm with cable.
With your feet positioned hip-width apart, pull the cable into your chest and grab the handle with your other hand. Both hands should be on the handle at this time.
Facing forward, press the cable away from your chest. You core should be tight and engaged.
Keeping your hips straight, twist your torso away from the pulley until you get a full quarter rotation.
Maintain your rigid stance and straight arms. Return to the neutral position in a slow and controlled manner. Your arms should be extended in front of you.
With the side tension still engaging your core, bring your hands to your chest and immediately press outward to a fully extended position. This constitutes one rep.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements on the opposite side.

nome: Palms-Down com halter Wrist rosca Over A Bench
nomeOriginal: Palms-Down Dumbbell Wrist Curl Over A Bench
instrucoes: Start out by placing two halters on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your joelhos so that your body is facing the flat bench.

Use your braços to grab both of the halters with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and bring them up so that your forebraços are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Lentamente lower your wrists costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Your forebraços should be stationary as your wrist is the only movimento needed to perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by placing two dumbbells on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your knees so that your body is facing the flat bench.

Use your arms to grab both of the dumbbells with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and bring them up so that your forearms are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Your forearms should be stationary as your wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Palms-Down Wrist rosca Over A Bench
nomeOriginal: Palms-Down Wrist Curl Over A Bench
instrucoes: Start out by placing a barra on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your joelhos so that your body is facing the flat bench.
Use your braços to grab the barra with a pronated grip (palms down) and bring them up so that your forebraços are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Lentamente lower your wrists costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Your forebraços should be stationary as your wrist is the only movimento needed to perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by placing a barbell on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your knees so that your body is facing the flat bench.
Use your arms to grab the barbell with a pronated grip (palms down) and bring them up so that your forearms are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Your forearms should be stationary as your wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Palms-Up com barra Wrist rosca Over A Bench
nomeOriginal: Palms-Up Barbell Wrist Curl Over A Bench
instrucoes: Start out by placing a barra on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your joelhos so that your body is facing the flat bench.
Use your braços to grab the barra with a supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that your forebraços are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Lentamente lower your wrists costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Your forebraços should be stationary as your wrist is the only movimento needed to perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by placing a barbell on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your knees so that your body is facing the flat bench.
Use your arms to grab the barbell with a supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that your forearms are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Your forearms should be stationary as your wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Palms-Up com halter Wrist rosca Over A Bench
nomeOriginal: Palms-Up Dumbbell Wrist Curl Over A Bench
instrucoes: Start out by placing two halters on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your joelhos so that your body is facing the flat bench.
Use your braços to grab both of the halters with a supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that your forebraços are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Lentamente lower your wrists costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise.
Your forebraços should be stationary as your wrist is the only movimento needed to perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by placing two dumbbells on one side of a flat bench.
Kneel down on both of your knees so that your body is facing the flat bench.
Use your arms to grab both of the dumbbells with a supinated grip (palms up) and bring them up so that your forearms are resting against the flat bench. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.
Slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise.
Your forearms should be stationary as your wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a mão on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the posição inicial with your braços locked out.
Comece by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your braços break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself costas up into the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se with your pés on the chão, heels directly under your joelhos.
Levante only your tailbone to the ceiling to stretch your lower costas. (Don't lift the entire spine yet.) Pull in your stomach.
To go into a bridge, lift the entire spine except the neck.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down with your feet on the floor, heels directly under your knees.
Lift only your tailbone to the ceiling to stretch your lower back. (Don't lift the entire spine yet.) Pull in your stomach.
To go into a bridge, lift the entire spine except the neck.

instrucoes: Lay on your side, supporting your peso on your forebraço and on a foam roller placed on the outside of your lower perna. Your upper perna can either be on top of your lower perna, or you can cross it in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve your quadris off of the ground and begin to roll from below the knee to above the ankle on the side of your perna, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repita on the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on your side, supporting your weight on your forearm and on a foam roller placed on the outside of your lower leg. Your upper leg can either be on top of your lower leg, or you can cross it in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Raise your hips off of the ground and begin to roll from below the knee to above the ankle on the side of your leg, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat on the other leg.

instrucoes: In a seated posição, loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. This will be your posição inicial.

With the perna extended and the heel off of the ground, pull on the belt so that the foot is inverted, with the inside of the foot being pulled towards you. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: In a seated position, loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. This will be your starting position.

With the leg extended and the heel off of the ground, pull on the belt so that the foot is inverted, with the inside of the foot being pulled towards you. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Lay on a ball so that your upper costas is on the ball with your quadris unsupported. Both pés should be flat on the chão, hip width apart or wider. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by extending the quadris using your glutes and hamstrings, raising your quadris upward as you bridge.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on a ball so that your upper back is on the ball with your hips unsupported. Both feet should be flat on the floor, hip width apart or wider. This will be your starting position.
Begin by extending the hips using your glutes and hamstrings, raising your hips upward as you bridge.
Pause at the top of the motion and return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Pin presses remove the eccentric phase of the bench press, developing starting strength. They also allow you to train a desired range of motion.

The bench should be set up in a power rack. Set the pins to the desired point in your range of motion, whether it just be lockout or an inch off of your peito. The bar should be moved to the pins and prepared for lifting.

Comece by lying on the bench, with the bar directly above the contact point during your regular bench. Tuck your pés underneath you and arch your costas. Using the bar to help support your peso, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your pés to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body posição throughout the movimento.
You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The cotovelos should be tucked in until lockout.
Retorne the bar to the pins, pausing before beginning the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Pin presses remove the eccentric phase of the bench press, developing starting strength. They also allow you to train a desired range of motion.

The bench should be set up in a power rack. Set the pins to the desired point in your range of motion, whether it just be lockout or an inch off of your chest. The bar should be moved to the pins and prepared for lifting.

Begin by lying on the bench, with the bar directly above the contact point during your regular bench. Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.
You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
Return the bar to the pins, pausing before beginning the next repetition.

instrucoes: Sit with your buttocks on top of a foam roll. Bend your joelhos, and then cross one perna so that the ankle is over the knee. This will be your posição inicial.

Shift your peso to the side of the crossed perna, rolling over the buttocks until you feel tension in your upper glute. You may assist the stretch by using one mão to pull the bent knee towards your peito. Segure this posição for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit with your buttocks on top of a foam roll. Bend your knees, and then cross one leg so that the ankle is over the knee. This will be your starting position.

Shift your weight to the side of the crossed leg, rolling over the buttocks until you feel tension in your upper glute. You may assist the stretch by using one hand to pull the bent knee towards your chest. Hold this position for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Get into a prone posição on the chão, supporting your peso on your toes and your forebraços. Your braços are bent and directly below the shoulder.
Mantenha your body straight at all times, and hold this posição as long as possible. To increase difficulty, an braço or perna can be raised.
instrucoesOriginais: Get into a prone position on the floor, supporting your weight on your toes and your forearms. Your arms are bent and directly below the shoulder.
Keep your body straight at all times, and hold this position as long as possible. To increase difficulty, an arm or leg can be raised.

instrucoes: Grab two wide-rimmed plates and put them together with the smooth sides facing outward
Use your fingers to grip the outside part of the plate and your thumb for the other side thus holding both plates together. This is the posição inicial.
Squeeze the plate with your fingers and thumb. Segure this posição for as long as you can.
Repita for the recommended amount of sets prescribed in your program.
Switch braços and repeat the movimentos.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab two wide-rimmed plates and put them together with the smooth sides facing outward
Use your fingers to grip the outside part of the plate and your thumb for the other side thus holding both plates together. This is the starting position.
Squeeze the plate with your fingers and thumb. Hold this position for as long as you can.
Repeat for the recommended amount of sets prescribed in your program.
Switch arms and repeat the movements.

instrucoes: Deite-se on the chão or an exercise mat with your pernas fully extended and your upper body upright. Grab the plate by its sides with both mãos out in front of your abdominals with your braços slightly bent.

Lentamente cross your pernas near your ankles and lift them up off the ground. Your joelhos should also be bent slightly. Note: Move your upper body costas slightly to help keep you balanced turning this exercise. This is the posição inicial.
Move the plate to the left side and touch the chão with it. Breathe out as you perform that movimento.

Come costas to the posição inicial as you inspire and then repeat the movimento but this time to the right side of the body. Dica: Use a slow controlled movimento at all times. Jerking motions can injure the costas.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on the floor or an exercise mat with your legs fully extended and your upper body upright. Grab the plate by its sides with both hands out in front of your abdominals with your arms slightly bent.

Slowly cross your legs near your ankles and lift them up off the ground. Your knees should also be bent slightly. Note: Move your upper body back slightly to help keep you balanced turning this exercise. This is the starting position.
Move the plate to the left side and touch the floor with it. Breathe out as you perform that movement.

Come back to the starting position as you breathe in and then repeat the movement but this time to the right side of the body. Tip: Use a slow controlled movement at all times. Jerking motions can injure the back.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
