instrucoes: For this movimento a wooden chão or similar is needed. Lay on your costas with your pernas extended. Place a gym towel or a light peso underneath your heel. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing the knee, keeping your other perna straight.
Continue bringing the heel closer to you, sliding it on the chão.
At full knee flexion, reverse the movimento to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: For this movement a wooden floor or similar is needed. Lay on your back with your legs extended. Place a gym towel or a light weight underneath your heel. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the knee, keeping your other leg straight.
Continue bringing the heel closer to you, sliding it on the floor.
At full knee flexion, reverse the movement to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Segure a halter at the base with both mãos and stand straight up. Move your pernas so that they are wider than shoulder width apart from each other with your joelhos slightly bent.
Your toes should be facing out. Note: Your braços should be stationary while performing the exercise. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente bend the joelhos and lower your pernas until your thighs are parallel to the chão. Make sure to inhale as this is the eccentric part of the exercise.
Press mainly with the heel of the foot to bring the body costas to the posição inicial while exhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a dumbbell at the base with both hands and stand straight up. Move your legs so that they are wider than shoulder width apart from each other with your knees slightly bent.
Your toes should be facing out. Note: Your arms should be stationary while performing the exercise. This is the starting position.
Slowly bend the knees and lower your legs until your thighs are parallel to the floor. Make sure to inhale as this is the eccentric part of the exercise.
Press mainly with the heel of the foot to bring the body back to the starting position while exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a kettlebell on the chão. Place yourself in a pushup posição, on your toes with one mão on the ground and one mão holding the kettlebell, with your cotovelos extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by lowering yourself as low as you can, keeping your costas straight.

Quickly and forcefully reverse direction, pushing yourself up to the other side of the kettlebell, switching mãos as you do so. Continue the movimento by descending and repeating the movimento costas and forth.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a kettlebell on the floor. Place yourself in a pushup position, on your toes with one hand on the ground and one hand holding the kettlebell, with your elbows extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by lowering yourself as low as you can, keeping your back straight.

Quickly and forcefully reverse direction, pushing yourself up to the other side of the kettlebell, switching hands as you do so. Continue the movement by descending and repeating the movement back and forth.

instrucoes: Move into a prone posição on the chão, supporting your peso on your mãos and toes.
Your braços should be fully extended with the mãos around shoulder width. Mantenha your body straight throughout the movimento. This will be your posição inicial.
Descend by flexing at the elbow, lowering your peito towards the ground.
At the bottom, reverse the motion by pushing yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible. Attempt to push your upper body up until your mãos leave the ground.
Retorne to the posição inicial and repeat the exercise.
For added difficulty, add claps into the movimento while you are air borne.
instrucoesOriginais: Move into a prone position on the floor, supporting your weight on your hands and toes.
Your arms should be fully extended with the hands around shoulder width. Keep your body straight throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.
Descend by flexing at the elbow, lowering your chest towards the ground.
At the bottom, reverse the motion by pushing yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible. Attempt to push your upper body up until your hands leave the ground.
Return to the starting position and repeat the exercise.
For added difficulty, add claps into the movement while you are air borne.

instrucoes: In a seated posição, loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. This will be your posição inicial.

With the perna extended and the heel off of the ground, pull on the belt so that the foot is everted, with the outside of the foot being pulled towards you. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: In a seated position, loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. This will be your starting position.

With the leg extended and the heel off of the ground, pull on the belt so that the foot is everted, with the outside of the foot being pulled towards you. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés slightly wider than shoulder width apart and toes pointing out slightly.
Squat down and grasp bar with a closed, pronated grip. Your mãos should be slightly wider than shoulder width apart outside joelhos with cotovelos fully extended.
Place the bar about 1 inch in front of your shins and over the balls of your pés.
Your costas should be flat or slightly arched, your peito held up and out and your shoulder blades should be retracted.
Mantenha your head in a neutral posição (in line with vertebral column and not tilted or rotated) with your eyes focused straight ahead. Inhale during this phase.

Levante the bar from the chão by forcefully extending the quadris and the joelhos as you exhale. Dica: The upper tronco should maintain the same angle. Do not bend at the waist yet and do not let the quadris rise before the ombros (this would have the effect of pushing the glutes in the air and stretching the hamstrings.
Mantenha cotovelos fully extended with the head in a neutral posição and the ombros over the bar.
As the bar raises keep it as close to the shins as possible.
As the bar passes the joelhos, thrust your quadris forward and slightly bend the joelhos to avoid locking them. Dica: At this point your thighs should be against the bar.
Mantenha the costas flat or slightly arched, cotovelos fully extended and your head neutral. Dica: You will hold your breath until the next phase.
Inhale and then forcefully and quickly extend your quadris and joelhos and stand on your toes.

Mantenha the bar as close to your body as possible. Dica: Your costas should be flat with the cotovelos pointed out to the sides and your head in a neutral posição. Also, keep your ombros over the bar and braços straight as long as possible.
When your lower body joints are fully extended, shrug the ombros upward rapidly without letting the cotovelos flex yet. Exhale during this portion of the movimento.
As the ombros reach their highest elevation flex your cotovelos to begin pulling your body under the bar.

Continue to pull the braços as high and as long as possible. Dica: Due to the explosive nature of this phase, your tronco will be erect or with an arched costas, your head will be tilted costas slightly and your pés may lose contact with the chão.
After the lower body has fully extended and the bar reaches near maximal height, pull your body under the bar and rotate the braços around and under the bar.
Simultaneously, flex the quadris and joelhos into a quarter squat posição.
Once the braços are under the bar, inhale and then lift your cotovelos to posição the upper braços parallel to the chão. Rack the bar across the front of your collar bones and front shoulder muscles.
Catch the bar with an erect and tight tronco, a neutral head posição and flat pés. Exhale during this movimento.
Fique em pé by extending the quadris and joelhos to a fully erect posição.
Abaixe the bar by gradually reducing the muscular tension of the braços to allow a controlled descent of the bar to the thighs. Inhale during this movimento.
Simultaneously flex the quadris and joelhos to cushion the impact of the bar on the thighs.
Squat down with the cotovelos fully extended until the bar touches the chão.
Start over at Phase 1 and repeat for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet slightly wider than shoulder width apart and toes pointing out slightly.
Squat down and grasp bar with a closed, pronated grip. Your hands should be slightly wider than shoulder width apart outside knees with elbows fully extended.
Place the bar about 1 inch in front of your shins and over the balls of your feet.
Your back should be flat or slightly arched, your chest held up and out and your shoulder blades should be retracted.
Keep your head in a neutral position (in line with vertebral column and not tilted or rotated) with your eyes focused straight ahead. Inhale during this phase.

Lift the bar from the floor by forcefully extending the hips and the knees as you exhale. Tip: The upper torso should maintain the same angle. Do not bend at the waist yet and do not let the hips rise before the shoulders (this would have the effect of pushing the glutes in the air and stretching the hamstrings.
Keep elbows fully extended with the head in a neutral position and the shoulders over the bar.
As the bar raises keep it as close to the shins as possible.
As the bar passes the knees, thrust your hips forward and slightly bend the knees to avoid locking them. Tip: At this point your thighs should be against the bar.
Keep the back flat or slightly arched, elbows fully extended and your head neutral. Tip: You will hold your breath until the next phase.
Inhale and then forcefully and quickly extend your hips and knees and stand on your toes.

Keep the bar as close to your body as possible. Tip: Your back should be flat with the elbows pointed out to the sides and your head in a neutral position. Also, keep your shoulders over the bar and arms straight as long as possible.
When your lower body joints are fully extended, shrug the shoulders upward rapidly without letting the elbows flex yet. Exhale during this portion of the movement.
As the shoulders reach their highest elevation flex your elbows to begin pulling your body under the bar.

Continue to pull the arms as high and as long as possible. Tip: Due to the explosive nature of this phase, your torso will be erect or with an arched back, your head will be tilted back slightly and your feet may lose contact with the floor.
After the lower body has fully extended and the bar reaches near maximal height, pull your body under the bar and rotate the arms around and under the bar.
Simultaneously, flex the hips and knees into a quarter squat position.
Once the arms are under the bar, inhale and then lift your elbows to position the upper arms parallel to the floor. Rack the bar across the front of your collar bones and front shoulder muscles.
Catch the bar with an erect and tight torso, a neutral head position and flat feet. Exhale during this movement.
Stand up by extending the hips and knees to a fully erect position.
Lower the bar by gradually reducing the muscular tension of the arms to allow a controlled descent of the bar to the thighs. Inhale during this movement.
Simultaneously flex the hips and knees to cushion the impact of the bar on the thighs.
Squat down with the elbows fully extended until the bar touches the floor.
Start over at Phase 1 and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: With a barra on boxes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the pernas. Abaixe your quadris with the peso focused on the heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with your ombros just in front of the bar. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your joelhos. Your costas angle should stay the same, and your braços should remain straight. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh posição, begin extending through the quadris.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the quadris, joelhos, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, with the braços still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços with the cotovelos up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself under the bar far enough that it can be racked onto the ombros, rotating your cotovelos under the bar as you do so. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat with the mãos relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the tronco upright and cotovelos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posição, and complete the repetition by returning the peso to the boxes.
instrucoesOriginais: With a barbell on boxes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the legs. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back, with the arms still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself under the bar far enough that it can be racked onto the shoulders, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position, and complete the repetition by returning the weight to the boxes.

instrucoes: Standing with the peso racked on the front of the ombros, begin with the dip. With your pés directly under your quadris, flex the joelhos without moving the quadris costasward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros.

At this moment as the pés leave the chão, the pés must be placed into the receiving posição as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should be moved to a slightly wider stance, with the joelhos partially bent.
Receive the bar with the braços locked out overhead.
Retorne to a standing posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders.

At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should be moved to a slightly wider stance, with the knees partially bent.
Receive the bar with the arms locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright and a halter on each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco.
The palms of the mãos should be facing your tronco. Your pés should be about shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your braços straight and the tronco stationary, lift the pesos out to your sides until they are about shoulder level height while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to lower the pesos costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling. Dica: Mantenha the palms facing down with the little finger slightly higher while lifting and lowering the pesos as it will concentrate the stress on your ombros mainly.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright and a dumbbell on each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
The palms of the hands should be facing your torso. Your feet should be about shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight and the torso stationary, lift the weights out to your sides until they are about shoulder level height while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to lower the weights back down to the starting position while inhaling. Tip: Keep the palms facing down with the little finger slightly higher while lifting and lowering the weights as it will concentrate the stress on your shoulders mainly.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with a loaded barra on the chão. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The pés should be directly below the quadris, with the pés turned out as needed. Abaixe the quadris, with the peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar. This will be the posição inicial.
Comece the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The costas angle should stay the same until the bar passes the joelhos.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the quadris joelhos and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the cotovelos to flex to the side.

As you move your pés into the receiving posição, a slightly wider posição, pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The bar should be received in a partial squat. Continue raising the bar to the overhead posição, receiving the bar locked out overhead.
Retorne to a standing posição with the peso over head.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a loaded barbell on the floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The back angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, a slightly wider position, pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The bar should be received in a partial squat. Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, receiving the bar locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight over head.

instrucoes: Comece with a loaded barra on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The pés should be directly below the quadris, with the pés turned out as needed. Abaixe the quadris, with the peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar, with the cotovelos pointed out. This will be the posição inicial.
Comece the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the quadris joelhos and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the cotovelos to flex to the side.

As you move your pés into the receiving posição, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The pés should move to just outside the quadris, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar above a full squat and with the braços fully extended overhead.
Mantenhaing the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and peito up, drive through heels of the pés to move to a standing posição. Carefully return the peso to the boxes.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar, with the elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar above a full squat and with the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to the boxes.

instrucoes: In the power stairs, implements are moved up a staircase. For training purposes, these can be performed with a tire or box.

Comece by taking the implement with both mãos. Set your pés wide, with your head and peito up. Drive through the ground with your heels, extending your joelhos and quadris to raise the peso from the ground.
As you lean costas, attempt to swing the peso onto the stairs, which are usually around 16-18" high. You can use your pernas to help push the peso onto the stair.
Repita for 3-5 repetitions, and continue with a heavier peso, moving as fast as possible.
instrucoesOriginais: In the power stairs, implements are moved up a staircase. For training purposes, these can be performed with a tire or box.

Begin by taking the implement with both hands. Set your feet wide, with your head and chest up. Drive through the ground with your heels, extending your knees and hips to raise the weight from the ground.
As you lean back, attempt to swing the weight onto the stairs, which are usually around 16-18" high. You can use your legs to help push the weight onto the stair.
Repeat for 3-5 repetitions, and continue with a heavier weight, moving as fast as possible.

instrucoes: To perform this movimento you will need a preacher bench and an E-Z bar. Grab the E-Z curl bar at the close inner mãole (either have someone mão you the bar which is preferable or grab the bar from the front bar rest provided by most preacher benches). The palm of your mãos should be facing forward and they should be slightly tilted inwards due to the shape of the bar.
With the upper braços posiçãoed against the preacher bench pad and the peito against it, hold the E-Z Curl Bar at shoulder length. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, slowly lower the bar until your upper braço is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the peso up until your biceps is fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder height. Squeeze the biceps hard and hold this posição for a second.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To perform this movement you will need a preacher bench and an E-Z bar. Grab the E-Z curl bar at the close inner handle (either have someone hand you the bar which is preferable or grab the bar from the front bar rest provided by most preacher benches). The palm of your hands should be facing forward and they should be slightly tilted inwards due to the shape of the bar.
With the upper arms positioned against the preacher bench pad and the chest against it, hold the E-Z Curl Bar at shoulder length. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the bar until your upper arm is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the weight up until your biceps is fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder height. Squeeze the biceps hard and hold this position for a second.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place the upper part of both braços on top of the preacher bench as you hold a halter in each mão with the palms facing each other (neutral grip).
As you inspire, slowly lower the halters until your upper braço is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the peso up until your biceps is fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder height.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted posição and repeat for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place the upper part of both arms on top of the preacher bench as you hold a dumbbell in each hand with the palms facing each other (neutral grip).
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells until your upper arm is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the weight up until your biceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder height.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on a bench with a barra resting on your peito. Position your pernas so they are secure on the extension of the abdominal bench. This is the posição inicial.

While inhaling, tighten your abdominals and glutes. Simultaneously curl your tronco as you do when performing a sit-up and press the barra to an overhead posição while exhaling. Dica: Use your braços to push the barra out as you perform this exercise while still focusing on the abdominal muscles.
Abaixe your upper body costas down to the posição inicial while bringing the barra costas down to your tronco. Remember to inspire while lowering the body.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on a bench with a barbell resting on your chest. Position your legs so they are secure on the extension of the abdominal bench. This is the starting position.

While inhaling, tighten your abdominals and glutes. Simultaneously curl your torso as you do when performing a sit-up and press the barbell to an overhead position while exhaling. Tip: Use your arms to push the barbell out as you perform this exercise while still focusing on the abdominal muscles.
Lower your upper body back down to the starting position while bringing the barbell back down to your torso. Remember to breathe in while lowering the body.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lay face down with your pernas straight. Your assistant will place their mão on your heel.

To begin, flex the knee to curl your perna up. Your partner should provide resistance, starting light and increasing the pressure as the movimento is completed. Communicate with your partner to monitor appropriate resistance levels.
Faça uma pausa at the top, returning the perna to the posição inicial as your partner provides resistance going the other direction.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lay face down with your legs straight. Your assistant will place their hand on your heel.

To begin, flex the knee to curl your leg up. Your partner should provide resistance, starting light and increasing the pressure as the movement is completed. Communicate with your partner to monitor appropriate resistance levels.
Pause at the top, returning the leg to the starting position as your partner provides resistance going the other direction.

instrucoes: Place your sled on an appropriate surface, loaded to a suitable peso. The sled should provide enough resistance to require effort, but not so heavy that you are significantly slowed down.
You may use the upright or the low mãoles for this exercise. Place your mãos on the mãoles with your braços extended, leaning into the implement.
With good posture, drive through the ground with alternating, short steps. Move as fast as you can for a short distance.
instrucoesOriginais: Place your sled on an appropriate surface, loaded to a suitable weight. The sled should provide enough resistance to require effort, but not so heavy that you are significantly slowed down.
You may use the upright or the low handles for this exercise. Place your hands on the handles with your arms extended, leaning into the implement.
With good posture, drive through the ground with alternating, short steps. Move as fast as you can for a short distance.

instrucoes: Comece standing a few pés in front of a low pulley with a rope or mãole attached. Face away from the machine, straddling the cable, with your pés set wide apart.

Comece the movimento by reaching through your pernas as far as possible, bending at the quadris. Mantenha your joelhos slightly bent. Mantenhaing your braços straight, extend through the hip to stand straight up. Avoid pulling upward through the ombros; all of the motion should originate through the quadris.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing a few feet in front of a low pulley with a rope or handle attached. Face away from the machine, straddling the cable, with your feet set wide apart.

Begin the movement by reaching through your legs as far as possible, bending at the hips. Keep your knees slightly bent. Keeping your arms straight, extend through the hip to stand straight up. Avoid pulling upward through the shoulders; all of the motion should originate through the hips.

instrucoes: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, your mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than your shoulder width. For a medium grip, your mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to your shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than your shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your tronco costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This is your posição inicial.

Pull your tronco up until the bar touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted posição, start to inhale and slowly lower your tronco costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repita this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, your hands need to be spaced out at a distance wider than your shoulder width. For a medium grip, your hands need to be spaced out at a distance equal to your shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than your shoulder width.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out. This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: With your mãos wide apart, support your body on your toes and mãos in a plank posição. Your cotovelos should be extended and your body straight. Do not allow your quadris to sag. This will be your posição inicial.
To begin, allow the cotovelos to flex, lowering your peito to the chão as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial by extending the cotovelos. Exhale as you perform this step.
After pausing at the contracted posição, repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: With your hands wide apart, support your body on your toes and hands in a plank position. Your elbows should be extended and your body straight. Do not allow your hips to sag. This will be your starting position.
To begin, allow the elbows to flex, lowering your chest to the floor as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position by extending the elbows. Exhale as you perform this step.
After pausing at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão face down and place your mãos closer than shoulder width for a close mão posição. Make sure that you are holding your tronco up at braços' length.
Abaixe yourself until your peito almost touches the chão as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial and squeeze your peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted posição, repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding your torso up at arms' length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão face down and place your mãos about 36 inches apart from each other holding your tronco up at braços length.
Place your toes on top of a flat bench. This will allow your body to be elevated. Note: The higher the elevation of the flat bench, the higher the resistance of the exercise is.
Abaixe yourself until your peito almost touches the chão as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial and squeeze your peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted posição, repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands about 36 inches apart from each other holding your torso up at arms length.
Place your toes on top of a flat bench. This will allow your body to be elevated. Note: The higher the elevation of the flat bench, the higher the resistance of the exercise is.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

nome: flexãos With Feet On An Exercise Ball
nomeOriginal: Push-Ups With Feet On An Exercise Ball
instrucoes: Lie on the chão face down and place your mãos about 36 inches apart from each other holding your tronco up at braços length.
Place your toes on top of an exercise ball. This will allow your body to be elevated.
Abaixe yourself until your peito almost touches the chão as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial and squeeze your peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted posição, repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands about 36 inches apart from each other holding your torso up at arms length.
Place your toes on top of an exercise ball. This will allow your body to be elevated.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Standing with the peso racked on the costas of the ombros, begin with the dip. With your pés directly under your quadris, flex the joelhos without moving the quadris costasward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, moving the bar in a vertical path.
Using the momentum generated, finish pressing the peso overhead be extending through the braços.
Retorne to the posição inicial, using your pernas to absorb the impact.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing with the weight racked on the back of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, moving the bar in a vertical path.
Using the momentum generated, finish pressing the weight overhead be extending through the arms.
Return to the starting position, using your legs to absorb the impact.

instrucoes: Get into pushup posição on the toes with your mãos just outside of shoulder width.
Perform a pushup by allowing the cotovelos to flex. As you descend, keep your body straight.
Do one pushup and as you come up, shift your peso on the left side of the body, twist to the side while bringing the right braço up towards the ceiling in a side plank.
Abaixe the braço costas to the chão for another pushup and then twist to the other side.
Repita the series, alternating each side, for 10 or more reps.
instrucoesOriginais: Get into pushup position on the toes with your hands just outside of shoulder width.
Perform a pushup by allowing the elbows to flex. As you descend, keep your body straight.
Do one pushup and as you come up, shift your weight on the left side of the body, twist to the side while bringing the right arm up towards the ceiling in a side plank.
Lower the arm back to the floor for another pushup and then twist to the other side.
Repeat the series, alternating each side, for 10 or more reps.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão face down and place your mãos about 36 inches apart while holding your tronco up at braços length.
Next, lower yourself downward until your peito almost touches the chão as you inhale.
Now expire and press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial while squeezing your peito.
After a brief pause at the top contracted posição, you can begin to lower yourself downward again for as many repetitions as needed.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands about 36 inches apart while holding your torso up at arms length.
Next, lower yourself downward until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Now breathe out and press your upper body back up to the starting position while squeezing your chest.
After a brief pause at the top contracted position, you can begin to lower yourself downward again for as many repetitions as needed.

instrucoes: Lie on the chão face down and body straight with your toes on the chão and the mãos wider than shoulder width for a wide mão posição and closer than shoulder width for a close mão posição. Make sure you are holding your tronco up at braços length.
Abaixe yourself until your peito almost touches the chão as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body costas up to the posição inicial and squeeze your peito. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted posição, repeat the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on the floor face down and body straight with your toes on the floor and the hands wider than shoulder width for a wide hand position and closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure you are holding your torso up at arms length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start off by rolling your tronco forward onto the ball so your quadris rest on top of the ball and become the highest point of your body.

Rest your mãos and pés on the chão. Your braços and pernas can be slightly bent or straight, depending on the size of the ball, your flexibility, and the length of your limbs. This also helps develop stabilizing strength in your tronco and ombros.
instrucoesOriginais: Start off by rolling your torso forward onto the ball so your hips rest on top of the ball and become the highest point of your body.

Rest your hands and feet on the floor. Your arms and legs can be slightly bent or straight, depending on the size of the ball, your flexibility, and the length of your limbs. This also helps develop stabilizing strength in your torso and shoulders.

instrucoes: Lay on your side. Loop a belt, rope, or band around your top foot. Flex the knee and extend your hip, attempting to touch your glutes with your foot, and holding the belt with your mãos. This will be your posição inicial.
With the belt being held over the shoulder or overhead, gently pull to increase the stretch in the quadriceps. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on your side. Loop a belt, rope, or band around your top foot. Flex the knee and extend your hip, attempting to touch your glutes with your foot, and holding the belt with your hands. This will be your starting position.
With the belt being held over the shoulder or overhead, gently pull to increase the stretch in the quadriceps. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: Lay facedown on the chão with your peso supported by your mãos or forebraços. Place a foam roll underneath one perna on the quadriceps, and keep the foot off of the ground. Make sure to relax the perna as much as possible. This will be your posição inicial.
Shifting as much peso onto the perna to be stretched as is tolerable, roll over the foam from above the knee to below the hip, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay facedown on the floor with your weight supported by your hands or forearms. Place a foam roll underneath one leg on the quadriceps, and keep the foot off of the ground. Make sure to relax the leg as much as possible. This will be your starting position.
Shifting as much weight onto the leg to be stretched as is tolerable, roll over the foam from above the knee to below the hip, holding points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Switch sides.

instrucoes: You will need a box for this exerise.
Comece facing the box standing 1-2 pés from its edge.
By utilizing your quadris, hop onto the box, landing on both pernas. Ensure that you land with your pernas bent and your pés flat.
Immediately upon landing, fully extend through the entire body and swing your braços overhead to explode off of the box. Use your pernas to absorb the impact of landing.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need a box for this exerise.
Begin facing the box standing 1-2 feet from its edge.
By utilizing your hips, hop onto the box, landing on both legs. Ensure that you land with your legs bent and your feet flat.
Immediately upon landing, fully extend through the entire body and swing your arms overhead to explode off of the box. Use your legs to absorb the impact of landing.

instrucoes: This drill teaches the delivery of the barra to the rack posição on the ombros. Comece holding a bar in the scarecrow posição, with the upper braços parallel to the chão, and the forebraços hanging down. Use a hook grip, with your fingers wrapped over your thumbs.

Comece by rotating the cotovelos around the bar, delivering the bar to the ombros. As your cotovelos come forward, relax your grip. The ombros should be protracted, providing a shelf for the bar, which should lightly contact the throat.

It is important that the bar stay close to the body at all times, as with a heavier load any distance will result in an unwanted collision. As the movimento becomes smoother, speed and load can be increased before progressing further.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill teaches the delivery of the barbell to the rack position on the shoulders. Begin holding a bar in the scarecrow position, with the upper arms parallel to the floor, and the forearms hanging down. Use a hook grip, with your fingers wrapped over your thumbs.

Begin by rotating the elbows around the bar, delivering the bar to the shoulders. As your elbows come forward, relax your grip. The shoulders should be protracted, providing a shelf for the bar, which should lightly contact the throat.

It is important that the bar stay close to the body at all times, as with a heavier load any distance will result in an unwanted collision. As the movement becomes smoother, speed and load can be increased before progressing further.

instrucoes: Set up in a power rack with the bar on the pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the joelhos, just above, or in the mid thigh posição. Attach bands to the base of the rack, or secure them with halters. Attach the other end to the bar. You may need to choke the bands to provide tension.

Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting posição. Your pés should be under your quadris, your grip shoulder width, costas arched, and quadris costas to engage the hamstrings. Since the peso is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the peso.

With your head looking forward, extend through the quadris and joelhos, pulling the peso up and costas until lockout. Be sure to pull your ombros costas as you complete the movimento. Retorne the peso to the pins and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Set up in a power rack with the bar on the pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the knees, just above, or in the mid thigh position. Attach bands to the base of the rack, or secure them with dumbbells. Attach the other end to the bar. You may need to choke the bands to provide tension.

Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting position. Your feet should be under your hips, your grip shoulder width, back arched, and hips back to engage the hamstrings. Since the weight is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the weight.

With your head looking forward, extend through the hips and knees, pulling the weight up and back until lockout. Be sure to pull your shoulders back as you complete the movement. Return the weight to the pins and repeat.

instrucoes: Set up in a power rack with the bar on the pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the joelhos, just above, or in the mid thigh posição. Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting posição. Your pés should be under your quadris, your grip shoulder width, costas arched, and quadris costas to engage the hamstrings. Since the peso is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the peso.
With your head looking forward, extend through the quadris and joelhos, pulling the peso up and costas until lockout. Be sure to pull your ombros costas as you complete the movimento.
Retorne the peso to the pins and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Set up in a power rack with the bar on the pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the knees, just above, or in the mid thigh position. Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting position. Your feet should be under your hips, your grip shoulder width, back arched, and hips back to engage the hamstrings. Since the weight is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the weight.
With your head looking forward, extend through the hips and knees, pulling the weight up and back until lockout. Be sure to pull your shoulders back as you complete the movement.
Return the weight to the pins and repeat.

instrucoes: Place yourself on your mãos joelhos on an exercise mat. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the joelhos should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your posição inicial.
Extend one perna up and behind you. The knee and hip should both extend. Repita for 5-10 repetitions, and then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Place yourself on your hands knees on an exercise mat. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your starting position.
Extend one leg up and behind you. The knee and hip should both extend. Repeat for 5-10 repetitions, and then switch sides.

instrucoes: To begin, seat yourself on the bike and adjust the seat to your height.

Select the desired option from the menu. You may have to start pedaling to turn it on. You can use the manual setting, or you can select a program to use. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. The level of resistance can be changed throughout the workout. The mãoles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Recumbent bikes offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and have less impact than other activities. A 150 lb person will burn about 230 calories cycling at a moderate rate for 30 minutes, compared to 450 calories or more running.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, seat yourself on the bike and adjust the seat to your height.

Select the desired option from the menu. You may have to start pedaling to turn it on. You can use the manual setting, or you can select a program to use. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. The level of resistance can be changed throughout the workout. The handles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Recumbent bikes offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and have less impact than other activities. A 150 lb person will burn about 230 calories cycling at a moderate rate for 30 minutes, compared to 450 calories or more running.

instrucoes: You will need a partner for this drill.
Comece in an athletic 2 or 3 point stance.
At the signal, move into a posição to receive the pass from your partner.
Catch the medicine ball with both mãos and immediately throw it costas to your partner.
You can modify this drill by running different routes.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need a partner for this drill.
Begin in an athletic 2 or 3 point stance.
At the signal, move into a position to receive the pass from your partner.
Catch the medicine ball with both hands and immediately throw it back to your partner.
You can modify this drill by running different routes.

instrucoes: Position a bench inside a power rack, with the bar set to the correct height. Comece by anchoring bands either to band pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be posição properly under the bands. Attach the other end to the barra.

Lie on the bench, tuck your pés underneath you and arch your costas. Using the bar to help support your peso, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your pés to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body posição throughout the movimento. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your ombros. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Abaixe the bar to your lower peito or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Faça uma pausa when the barra touches your tronco, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The cotovelos should be tucked in until lockout.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bench inside a power rack, with the bar set to the correct height. Begin by anchoring bands either to band pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be position properly under the bands. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Lie on the bench, tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

instrucoes: Comece in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Set up the bands either on band pegs or attached to the top of the rack, ensuring they will be directly above the bar during the squat. Attach the other end to the bar.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wider for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Mantenha your head facing forward.

With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Faça uma pausa when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barra to the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Set up the bands either on band pegs or attached to the top of the rack, ensuring they will be directly above the bar during the squat. Attach the other end to the bar.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barbell to the rack.

instrucoes: Set the bar up in a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either bands pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over your pés. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overmão grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your pés, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your quadris and bend the joelhos until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your peito up and your costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward.
After the bar passes the joelhos, aggressively pull the bar costas, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your quadris forward into the bar.
Abaixe the bar by bending at the quadris and guiding it to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Set the bar up in a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either bands pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your feet, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and bend the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

instrucoes: Comece in a power rack with the pins and bar set at the appropriate height. After loading the bar, attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wide for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings.

Mantenha your head facing forward. With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Abaixe bar posição necessitates a greater tronco lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a power rack with the pins and bar set at the appropriate height. After loading the bar, attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings.

Keep your head facing forward. With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

nome: Reverse com elástico Sumo levantamento terra
instrucoes: Comece with a bar loaded on the chão inside of a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end to the barra.

Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the quadris to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the ombros, which in effect lengthens your braços.

Take a breath, and then lower your quadris, looking forward with your head with your peito up. Drive through the chão, spreading your pés apart, with your peso on the costas half of your pés. Extend through the quadris and joelhos.
As the bar passes through the joelhos, lean costas and drive the quadris into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Retorne the peso to the ground by bending at the quadris and controlling the peso on the way down.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a bar loaded on the floor inside of a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the shoulders, which in effect lengthens your arms.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright while holding a barra at shoulder width with the cotovelos close to the tronco. The palm of your mãos should be facing down (pronated grip). This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Lentamente begin to bring the bar costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright while holding a barbell at shoulder width with the elbows close to the torso. The palm of your hands should be facing down (pronated grip). This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the bar back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab an EZ-bar using a shoulder width and palms down (pronated) grip.
Now place the upper part of both braços on top of the preacher bench and have your braços extended. This will be your posição inicial.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the peso up until your biceps are fully contracted and the barra is at shoulder height. Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted posição.
As you inspire, slowly lower the barra until your upper braços are extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab an EZ-bar using a shoulder width and palms down (pronated) grip.
Now place the upper part of both arms on top of the preacher bench and have your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the weight up until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder height. Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the barbell until your upper arms are extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright while holding a bar attachment that is attached to a low pulley using a pronated (palms down) and shoulder width grip. Make sure also that you keep the cotovelos close to the tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Lentamente begin to bring the bar costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright while holding a bar attachment that is attached to a low pulley using a pronated (palms down) and shoulder width grip. Make sure also that you keep the elbows close to the torso. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the bar back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se on the chão with your pernas fully extended and braços to the side of your tronco with the palms on the chão. Your braços should be stationary for the entire exercise.
Move your pernas up so that your thighs are perpendicular to the chão and pés are together and parallel to the chão. This is the posição inicial.
While inhaling, move your pernas towards the tronco as you roll your pelvis costaswards and you raise your quadris off the chão. At the end of this movimento your joelhos will be touching your peito.
Segure the contraction for a second and move your pernas costas to the posição inicial while exhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on the floor with your legs fully extended and arms to the side of your torso with the palms on the floor. Your arms should be stationary for the entire exercise.
Move your legs up so that your thighs are perpendicular to the floor and feet are together and parallel to the floor. This is the starting position.
While inhaling, move your legs towards the torso as you roll your pelvis backwards and you raise your hips off the floor. At the end of this movement your knees will be touching your chest.
Hold the contraction for a second and move your legs back to the starting position while exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on an incline bench with the peito and stomach pressing against the incline. Have the halters in each mão with the palms facing each other (neutral grip).

Extend the braços in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. The pernas should be stationary while applying pressure with the ball of your toes. This is the posição inicial.

Maintaining the slight bend of the cotovelos, move the pesos out and away from each other (to the side) in an arc motion while exhaling. Dica: Try to squeeze your shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The braços should be elevated until they are parallel to the chão.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the pesos costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on an incline bench with the chest and stomach pressing against the incline. Have the dumbbells in each hand with the palms facing each other (neutral grip).

Extend the arms in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. The legs should be stationary while applying pressure with the ball of your toes. This is the starting position.

Maintaining the slight bend of the elbows, move the weights out and away from each other (to the side) in an arc motion while exhaling. Tip: Try to squeeze your shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The arms should be elevated until they are parallel to the floor.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on an incline bench set at a 30-degree angle with the peito and stomach pressing against the incline.

Have the halters in each mão with the palms facing down to the chão. Your braços should be in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. Dica: Your cotovelos should have a slight bend. The pernas should be stationary while applying pressure with the ball of your toes (your heels should not be touching the chão). This is the posição inicial.
Maintaining the slight bend of the cotovelos, move the pesos out and away from each other in an arc motion while exhaling.

As you lift the peso, your wrist should externally rotate by 90-degrees so that you go from a palms down (pronated) grip to a palms facing each other (neutral) grip. Dica: Try to squeeze your shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The braços should be elevated until they are level with the head.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the pesos costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on an incline bench set at a 30-degree angle with the chest and stomach pressing against the incline.

Have the dumbbells in each hand with the palms facing down to the floor. Your arms should be in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. Tip: Your elbows should have a slight bend. The legs should be stationary while applying pressure with the ball of your toes (your heels should not be touching the floor). This is the starting position.
Maintaining the slight bend of the elbows, move the weights out and away from each other in an arc motion while exhaling.

As you lift the weight, your wrist should externally rotate by 90-degrees so that you go from a palms down (pronated) grip to a palms facing each other (neutral) grip. Tip: Try to squeeze your shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The arms should be elevated until they are level with the head.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand erect while holding a barra with a supinated grip (palms facing up).

Bend your joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Dica: Make sure that you keep the head up. The barra should hang directly in front of you as your braços hang perpendicular to the chão and your tronco. This is your posição inicial.

While keeping the tronco stationary, lift the barra as you expire, keeping the cotovelos close to the body and not doing any force with the forebraço other than holding the pesos. On the top contracted posição, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Lentamente lower the peso again to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand erect while holding a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up).

Bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up. The barbell should hang directly in front of you as your arms hang perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the barbell as you breathe out, keeping the elbows close to the body and not doing any force with the forearm other than holding the weights. On the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start by setting a bar attachment (straight or e-z) on a high pulley machine.

Facing the bar attachment, grab it with the palms facing up (supinated grip) at shoulder width. Abaixe the bar by using your lats until your braços are fully extended by your sides. Dica: Elbows should be in by your sides and your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente elevate the bar attachment up as you inhale so it is aligned with your peito. Only the forebraços should move and the cotovelos/upper braços should be stationary by your side at all times.
Then begin to lower the cable bar costas down to the original staring posição while exhaling and contraindo the triceps hard.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by setting a bar attachment (straight or e-z) on a high pulley machine.

Facing the bar attachment, grab it with the palms facing up (supinated grip) at shoulder width. Lower the bar by using your lats until your arms are fully extended by your sides. Tip: Elbows should be in by your sides and your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.
Slowly elevate the bar attachment up as you inhale so it is aligned with your chest. Only the forearms should move and the elbows/upper arms should be stationary by your side at all times.
Then begin to lower the cable bar back down to the original staring position while exhaling and contracting the triceps hard.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place your pés between the pads after loading an appropriate peso. Lay on the top pad, allowing your quadris to hang off the costas, while grasping the mãoles to hold your posição.
To begin the movimento, flex the quadris, pulling the pernas forward.
Reverse the motion by extending the quadris, kicking the perna costas. It is very important not to over-extend the hip on this movimento, stopping short of your full range of motion.
Retorne by again flexing the hip, pulling the carriage forward as far as you can.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place your feet between the pads after loading an appropriate weight. Lay on the top pad, allowing your hips to hang off the back, while grasping the handles to hold your position.
To begin the movement, flex the hips, pulling the legs forward.
Reverse the motion by extending the hips, kicking the leg back. It is very important not to over-extend the hip on this movement, stopping short of your full range of motion.
Return by again flexing the hip, pulling the carriage forward as far as you can.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the mãoles so that they are fully to the rear. Make an appropriate peso selection and adjust the seat height so the mãoles are at shoulder level. Grasp the mãoles with your mãos facing inwards. This will be your posição inicial.
In a semicircular motion, pull your mãos out to your side and costas, contraindo your rear delts.
Mantenha your braços slightly bent throughout the movimento, with all of the motion occurring at the shoulder joint.
Faça uma pausa at the rear of the movimento, and slowly return the peso to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the handles so that they are fully to the rear. Make an appropriate weight selection and adjust the seat height so the handles are at shoulder level. Grasp the handles with your hands facing inwards. This will be your starting position.
In a semicircular motion, pull your hands out to your side and back, contracting your rear delts.
Keep your arms slightly bent throughout the movement, with all of the motion occurring at the shoulder joint.
Pause at the rear of the movement, and slowly return the weight to the starting position.

instrucoes: Start by standing straight with a pesoed plate held by both mãos and braços fully extended. Use a pronated grip (palms facing down) and make sure your fingers grab the rough side of the plate while your thumb grabs the smooth side. Note: For the best results, grab the pesoed plate at an 11:00 and 1:00 o'clock posição.
Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other and the pesoed plate should be near the groin area. This is the posição inicial.

Lentamente lift the plate up while keeping the cotovelos in and the upper braços stationary until your biceps and forebraços touch while exhaling. The plate should be evenly aligned with your tronco at this point.
Feel the contraction for a second and begin to lower the peso costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by standing straight with a weighted plate held by both hands and arms fully extended. Use a pronated grip (palms facing down) and make sure your fingers grab the rough side of the plate while your thumb grabs the smooth side. Note: For the best results, grab the weighted plate at an 11:00 and 1:00 o'clock position.
Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other and the weighted plate should be near the groin area. This is the starting position.
