Slowly lift the plate up while keeping the elbows in and the upper arms stationary until your biceps and forearms touch while exhaling. The plate should be evenly aligned with your torso at this point.
Feel the contraction for a second and begin to lower the weight back down to the starting position while inhaling
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie costas on a flat bench. Using a close, supinated grip (around shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked extended in front of you and perpendicular to the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle peito. Dica: Make sure that as opposed to a regular bench press, you keep the cotovelos close to the tronco at all times in order to maximize triceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your triceps muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on a flat bench. Using a close, supinated grip (around shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked extended in front of you and perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle chest. Tip: Make sure that as opposed to a regular bench press, you keep the elbows close to the torso at all times in order to maximize triceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your triceps muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Lay down with your costas on the chão. Place a foam roll underneath your upper costas, and cross your braços in front of you, protracting your ombros. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your quadris off of the ground, placing your peso onto the foam roll. Shift your peso to one side at a time, rolling over your middle and upper costas. Faça uma pausa at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay down with your back on the floor. Place a foam roll underneath your upper back, and cross your arms in front of you, protracting your shoulders. This will be your starting position.

Raise your hips off of the ground, placing your weight onto the foam roll. Shift your weight to one side at a time, rolling over your middle and upper back. Pause at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.

instrucoes: Position the frame at the starting point, and load with the appropriate peso. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the mãoles and driving through your heels to lift the frame. Ensure your peito and head are up and your costas is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Mantenha your peito up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.
instrucoesOriginais: Position the frame at the starting point, and load with the appropriate weight. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the handles and driving through your heels to lift the frame. Ensure your chest and head are up and your back is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Keep your chest up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.

instrucoes: Load the frame with the desired peso. Center yourself between the mãoles. You pés should be about hip width apart. Bend at the quadris to grip the mãoles, allowing your shoulder blades to protract.

With your pés and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your quadris and flex the joelhos. Look forward with your head, keep your peito up and your costas arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the peso upward. As the peso comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your quadris forward.
Abaixe the peso by bending at the quadris and guiding it to the ground.
instrucoesOriginais: Load the frame with the desired weight. Center yourself between the handles. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hips to grip the handles, allowing your shoulder blades to protract.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the ground.

instrucoes: Grip a ring in each mão, and then take a small jump to help you get into the posição inicial with your braços locked out.
Comece by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your braços break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself costas up into the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grip a ring in each hand, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece in a relaxed stance with your pés shoulder width apart and hold your braços close to the body.
To initiate the move, squat down halfway and explode costas up as high as possible.
Fully extend your entire body, reaching overhead as far as possible. As you land, absorb your impact through the pernas.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a relaxed stance with your feet shoulder width apart and hold your arms close to the body.
To initiate the move, squat down halfway and explode back up as high as possible.
Fully extend your entire body, reaching overhead as far as possible. As you land, absorb your impact through the legs.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place it on the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck).
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance. Also maintain a straight costas and keep the joelhos with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your heels as you expire by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending (other than the slight initial bend we created during posiçãoing) at any time. Segure the contracted posição by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inspire by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Now lift your toes by contraindo the tibia muscles in the front of the calves as you expire.
Segure for a second and bring them costas down as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place it on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance. Also maintain a straight back and keep the knees with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your starting position.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending (other than the slight initial bend we created during positioning) at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Now lift your toes by contracting the tibia muscles in the front of the calves as you breathe out.
Hold for a second and bring them back down as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your tronco costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This is your posição inicial.

Pull your tronco up until the bar touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted posição, start to inhale and slowly lower your tronco costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.

Now repeat the same movimentos as described above except this time your tronco will remain straight as you go up and the bar will touch the costas of the neck instead of the upper peito. Dica: Use the head to lean forward slightly as it will help you properly execute this portion of the exercise.
Once you have lowered yourself costas down to the posição inicial, repeat the exercise for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out. This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.

Now repeat the same movements as described above except this time your torso will remain straight as you go up and the bar will touch the back of the neck instead of the upper chest. Tip: Use the head to lean forward slightly as it will help you properly execute this portion of the exercise.
Once you have lowered yourself back down to the starting position, repeat the exercise for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.

instrucoes: Put a barra in front of you on the ground and grab it using a pronated (palms facing down) grip that a little wider than shoulder width. Dica: Depending on the peso used, you may need wrist wraps to perform the exercise and also a raised platform in order to allow for better range of motion.
Bend the joelhos slightly and keep the shins vertical, quadris costas and costas straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your costas and braços completely straight at all times, use your quadris to lift the bar as you exhale. Dica: The movimento should not be fast but steady and under control.

Once you are standing completely straight up, lower the bar by pushing the quadris costas, only slightly bending the joelhos, unlike when squatting. Dica: Take a deep breath at the start of the movimento and keep your peito up. Segure your breath as you lower and exhale as you complete the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Put a barbell in front of you on the ground and grab it using a pronated (palms facing down) grip that a little wider than shoulder width. Tip: Depending on the weight used, you may need wrist wraps to perform the exercise and also a raised platform in order to allow for better range of motion.
Bend the knees slightly and keep the shins vertical, hips back and back straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your back and arms completely straight at all times, use your hips to lift the bar as you exhale. Tip: The movement should not be fast but steady and under control.

Once you are standing completely straight up, lower the bar by pushing the hips back, only slightly bending the knees, unlike when squatting. Tip: Take a deep breath at the start of the movement and keep your chest up. Hold your breath as you lower and exhale as you complete the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece standing while holding a bar at braço's length in front of you. You can stand on a raised platform to increase the range of motion.

Comece by flexing the joelhos slightly, and then flex at the hip, moving your butt costas as far as possible, lowering the tronco as far as flexibility allows. The costas should remain in absolute extension at all times, and the bar should remain in contact with the pernas. If done properly, there should be heavy tension felt in the hamstrings.
Reverse the motion to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing while holding a bar at arm's length in front of you. You can stand on a raised platform to increase the range of motion.

Begin by flexing the knees slightly, and then flex at the hip, moving your butt back as far as possible, lowering the torso as far as flexibility allows. The back should remain in absolute extension at all times, and the bar should remain in contact with the legs. If done properly, there should be heavy tension felt in the hamstrings.
Reverse the motion to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Grab the rope with both mãos above your head. Pull down on the rope as you take a small jump.
Wrap the rope around one perna, using your pés to pinch the rope. Reach up as high as possible with your braços, gripping the rope tightly.
Release the rope from your pés as you pull yourself up with your braços, bringing your joelhos towards your peito.
Resecure your pés on the rope, and then stand up to take another high hold on the rope. Continue until you reach the top of the rope.
To lower yourself, loosen the grip of your pés on the rope as you slide down using a mão over mão motion.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab the rope with both hands above your head. Pull down on the rope as you take a small jump.
Wrap the rope around one leg, using your feet to pinch the rope. Reach up as high as possible with your arms, gripping the rope tightly.
Release the rope from your feet as you pull yourself up with your arms, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Resecure your feet on the rope, and then stand up to take another high hold on the rope. Continue until you reach the top of the rope.
To lower yourself, loosen the grip of your feet on the rope as you slide down using a hand over hand motion.

instrucoes: Kneel 1-2 pés in front of a cable system with a rope attached.
After selecting an appropriate peso, grasp the rope with both mãos reaching overhead. Your tronco should be upright in the posição inicial.
To begin, flex at the spine, attempting to bring your rib cage to your pernas as you pull the cable down.
Faça uma pausa at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return to the posição inicial.
These can be done with twists or to the side to hit the obliques.
instrucoesOriginais: Kneel 1-2 feet in front of a cable system with a rope attached.
After selecting an appropriate weight, grasp the rope with both hands reaching overhead. Your torso should be upright in the starting position.
To begin, flex at the spine, attempting to bring your rib cage to your legs as you pull the cable down.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return to the starting position.
These can be done with twists or to the side to hit the obliques.

instrucoes: Segure an end of the rope in each mão. Position the rope behind you on the ground. Eleve your braços up and turn the rope over your head bringing it down in front of you. When it reaches the ground, jump over it. Find a good turning pace that can be maintained. Different speeds and techniques can be used to introduce variation.
Rope jumping is exciting, challenges your coordination, and requires a lot of energy. A 150 lb person will burn about 350 calories jumping rope for 30 minutes, compared to over 450 calories running.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold an end of the rope in each hand. Position the rope behind you on the ground. Raise your arms up and turn the rope over your head bringing it down in front of you. When it reaches the ground, jump over it. Find a good turning pace that can be maintained. Different speeds and techniques can be used to introduce variation.
Rope jumping is exciting, challenges your coordination, and requires a lot of energy. A 150 lb person will burn about 350 calories jumping rope for 30 minutes, compared to over 450 calories running.

instrucoes: Attach a rope to a high pulley and make your peso selection. Stand a couple pés costas from the pulley with your pés staggered and take the rope with both mãos. Lean forward from the hip, keeping your costas straight, with your braços extended up in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your braços straight, extend the shoulder to pull the rope down to your thighs.
Faça uma pausa at the bottom of the motion, squeezing your lats.
Retorne to the posição inicial without allowing the peso to fully rest on the stack.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a rope to a high pulley and make your weight selection. Stand a couple feet back from the pulley with your feet staggered and take the rope with both hands. Lean forward from the hip, keeping your back straight, with your arms extended up in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, extend the shoulder to pull the rope down to your thighs.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, squeezing your lats.
Return to the starting position without allowing the weight to fully rest on the stack.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with your pernas together, holding a bodybar or broomstick.
Segure the pole behind your quadris with a wider than shoulder width grip. Your palms should be down and your thumbs facing out.
Lentamente lift your braços up behind your head. Don't force it if it gets hard to lift further.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with your legs together, holding a bodybar or broomstick.
Hold the pole behind your hips with a wider than shoulder width grip. Your palms should be down and your thumbs facing out.
Slowly lift your arms up behind your head. Don't force it if it gets hard to lift further.

instrucoes: To begin, seat yourself on the rower. Make sure that your heels are resting comfortably against the base of the foot pedals and that the straps are secured. Select the program that you wish to use, if applicable. Sit up straight and bend forward at the quadris.

There are three phases of movimento when using a rower. The first phase is when you come forward on the rower. Your joelhos are bent and against your peito. Your upper body is leaning slightly forward while still maintaining good posture. Next, push against the foot pedals and extend your pernas while bringing your mãos to your upper abdominal area, squeezing your ombros costas as you do so. To avoid straining your costas, use primarily your perna and hip muscles.
The recovery phase simply involves straightening your braços, bending the joelhos, and bringing your body forward again as you transition costas into the first phase.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, seat yourself on the rower. Make sure that your heels are resting comfortably against the base of the foot pedals and that the straps are secured. Select the program that you wish to use, if applicable. Sit up straight and bend forward at the hips.

There are three phases of movement when using a rower. The first phase is when you come forward on the rower. Your knees are bent and against your chest. Your upper body is leaning slightly forward while still maintaining good posture. Next, push against the foot pedals and extend your legs while bringing your hands to your upper abdominal area, squeezing your shoulders back as you do so. To avoid straining your back, use primarily your leg and hip muscles.
The recovery phase simply involves straightening your arms, bending the knees, and bringing your body forward again as you transition back into the first phase.

instrucoes: It's easiest to get into this stretch if you start standing up, put one perna behind you, and slowly lower your tronco down to the chão.
Mantenha the front heel on the chão (if it lifts up, scoot your other perna further costas).

Place your mãos on either side of your front perna. To get more out of this stretch, push your butt up toward the ceiling, and then gradually lower it costas toward the chão. You'll Stretch the hip flexor of the costas perna and the hamstring and buttocks of the front.
instrucoesOriginais: It's easiest to get into this stretch if you start standing up, put one leg behind you, and slowly lower your torso down to the floor.
Keep the front heel on the floor (if it lifts up, scoot your other leg further back).

Place your hands on either side of your front leg. To get more out of this stretch, push your butt up toward the ceiling, and then gradually lower it back toward the floor. You'll Stretch the hip flexor of the back leg and the hamstring and buttocks of the front.

instrucoes: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. A 150 lb person will burn over 450 calories running 8 miles per hour for 30 minutes. Maintain proper posture as you run, and only hold onto the mãoles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking your heart rate.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. A 150 lb person will burn over 450 calories running 8 miles per hour for 30 minutes. Maintain proper posture as you run, and only hold onto the handles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking your heart rate.

instrucoes: Deite-se on the chão placing your pés either under something that will not move or by having a partner hold them. Your pernas should be bent at the joelhos.

Elevate your upper body so that it creates an imaginary V-shape with your thighs. Your braços should be fully extended in front of you perpendicular to your tronco and with the mãos clasped. This is the posição inicial.
Twist your tronco to the right side until your braços are parallel with the chão while breathing out.
Segure the contraction for a second and move costas to the posição inicial while breathing out. Now move to the opposite side performing the same techniques you applied to the right side.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on the floor placing your feet either under something that will not move or by having a partner hold them. Your legs should be bent at the knees.

Elevate your upper body so that it creates an imaginary V-shape with your thighs. Your arms should be fully extended in front of you perpendicular to your torso and with the hands clasped. This is the starting position.
Twist your torso to the right side until your arms are parallel with the floor while breathing out.
Hold the contraction for a second and move back to the starting position while breathing out. Now move to the opposite side performing the same techniques you applied to the right side.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To load sandbags or other objects, begin with the implements placed a distance from the loading platform, typically 50 pés.

Comece by lifting the sandbag. Sandbags are extremely awkward, and the manner of lifting them can vary depending on the particular sandbag used. Reach as far around it as possible, extending through the quadris and joelhos to pull it up high. Shouldering is usually not allowed.
Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your quadris, joelhos, and ankles to get it as high as possible. Place it onto the platform, ensuring it doesn't fall off.
Retorne to the posição inicial to retrieve the next sandbag, and repeat until the event is completed.
instrucoesOriginais: To load sandbags or other objects, begin with the implements placed a distance from the loading platform, typically 50 feet.

Begin by lifting the sandbag. Sandbags are extremely awkward, and the manner of lifting them can vary depending on the particular sandbag used. Reach as far around it as possible, extending through the hips and knees to pull it up high. Shouldering is usually not allowed.
Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible. Place it onto the platform, ensuring it doesn't fall off.
Return to the starting position to retrieve the next sandbag, and repeat until the event is completed.

instrucoes: Take a pronated grip on a pull-up bar.
From a hanging posição, raise yourself a few inches without using your braços. Do this by depressing your shoulder girdle in a reverse shrugging motion.
Faça uma pausa at the completion of the movimento, and then slowly return to the posição inicial before performing more repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Take a pronated grip on a pull-up bar.
From a hanging position, raise yourself a few inches without using your arms. Do this by depressing your shoulder girdle in a reverse shrugging motion.
Pause at the completion of the movement, and then slowly return to the starting position before performing more repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down with your costas pressed against the chão or on an exercise mat (optional). Your braços should be fully extended to the sides with your palms facing down. Note: The braços should be stationary the entire time.
With a slight bend at the joelhos, lift your pernas up so that your heels are about 6 inches off the ground. This is the posição inicial.
Now lift your left perna up to about a 45 degree angle while your right perna is lowered until the heel is about 2-3 inches from the ground.
Switch movimentos by raising your right perna up and lowering your left perna. Remember to breathe while performing this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down with your back pressed against the floor or on an exercise mat (optional). Your arms should be fully extended to the sides with your palms facing down. Note: The arms should be stationary the entire time.
With a slight bend at the knees, lift your legs up so that your heels are about 6 inches off the ground. This is the starting position.
Now lift your left leg up to about a 45 degree angle while your right leg is lowered until the heel is about 2-3 inches from the ground.
Switch movements by raising your right leg up and lowering your left leg. Remember to breathe while performing this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Assume a lunge stance posição with one foot forward with the knee bent, and the rear knee nearly touching the ground.
Ensure that the front knee is over the midline of the foot. Extending through both pernas, jump as high as possible, swinging your braços to gain lift.
As you jump as high as you can, switch the posição of your pernas, moving your front perna to the costas and the rear perna to the front.
As you land, absorb the impact through the pernas by adopting the lunge posição, and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a lunge stance position with one foot forward with the knee bent, and the rear knee nearly touching the ground.
Ensure that the front knee is over the midline of the foot. Extending through both legs, jump as high as possible, swinging your arms to gain lift.
As you jump as high as you can, switch the position of your legs, moving your front leg to the back and the rear leg to the front.
As you land, absorb the impact through the legs by adopting the lunge position, and repeat.

instrucoes: Secure a band close to the ground and place a bench a couple pés away from it.
Seat yourself on the bench and secure the band behind your ankles, beginning with your pernas straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Flex the joelhos, bringing your pés towards the bench. You may need to lean costas slightly to keep your pés from striking the chão.
Faça uma pausa at the completion of the movimento, and then slowly return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure a band close to the ground and place a bench a couple feet away from it.
Seat yourself on the bench and secure the band behind your ankles, beginning with your legs straight. This will be your starting position.
Flex the knees, bringing your feet towards the bench. You may need to lean back slightly to keep your feet from striking the floor.
Pause at the completion of the movement, and then slowly return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Sit on a Military Press Bench with a bar behind your head and either have a spotter give you the bar (better on the rotator cuff this way) or pick it up yourself carefully with a pronated grip (palms facing forward). Dica: Your grip should be wider than shoulder width and it should create a 90-degree angle between the forebraço and the upper braço as the barra goes down.

Once you pick up the barra with the correct grip length, lift the bar up over your head by locking your braços. Segure at about shoulder level and slightly in front of your head. This is your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar down to the collarbone slowly as you inhale.
Levante the bar costas up to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a Military Press Bench with a bar behind your head and either have a spotter give you the bar (better on the rotator cuff this way) or pick it up yourself carefully with a pronated grip (palms facing forward). Tip: Your grip should be wider than shoulder width and it should create a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm as the barbell goes down.

Once you pick up the barbell with the correct grip length, lift the bar up over your head by locking your arms. Hold at about shoulder level and slightly in front of your head. This is your starting position.
Lower the bar down to the collarbone slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar back up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start out by sitting at the end of a flat bench with a barra placed on top of your thighs. Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other.
Grip the bar with your palms facing down and make sure your mãos are wider than shoulder width apart from each other. Comece to lift the barra up over your head until your braços are fully extended.
Now lower the barra behind your head until it is resting along the base of your neck. This is the posição inicial.

While keeping your pés and head stationary, move your waist from side to side so that your oblique muscles feel the contraction. Only move from side to side as far as your waist will allow you to go. Stretching or moving too far can cause an injury to occur. Dica: Use a slow and controlled motion.
Remember to expire while twisting your body to the side and in when moving costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by sitting at the end of a flat bench with a barbell placed on top of your thighs. Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.
Grip the bar with your palms facing down and make sure your hands are wider than shoulder width apart from each other. Begin to lift the barbell up over your head until your arms are fully extended.
Now lower the barbell behind your head until it is resting along the base of your neck. This is the starting position.

While keeping your feet and head stationary, move your waist from side to side so that your oblique muscles feel the contraction. Only move from side to side as far as your waist will allow you to go. Stretching or moving too far can cause an injury to occur. Tip: Use a slow and controlled motion.
Remember to breathe out while twisting your body to the side and in when moving back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated Bent-Over One-Arm com halter Triceps Extension
nomeOriginal: Seated Bent-Over One-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instrucoes: Sente-se at the end of a flat bench with a halter in one braço using a neutral grip (palms of the mão facing you).
Bend your joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper braço with the halter should be close to the tronco and aligned with it (lifted up until it is parallel to the chão while the forebraços are pointing towards the chão as the mãos hold the pesos). Dica: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forebraços and the upper braço. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the upper braço stationary, use the triceps to lift the peso as you exhale until the forebraço is parallel to the chão and the whole braço is extended. Like many other braço exercises, only the forebraço moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the halter costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down at the end of a flat bench with a dumbbell in one arm using a neutral grip (palms of the hand facing you).
Bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arm with the dumbbell should be close to the torso and aligned with it (lifted up until it is parallel to the floor while the forearms are pointing towards the floor as the hands hold the weights). Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearms and the upper arm. This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arm stationary, use the triceps to lift the weight as you exhale until the forearm is parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

instrucoes: Place a couple of halters looking forward in front of a flat bench.
Sit on the end of the bench with your pernas together and the halters behind your calves.
Bend at the waist while keeping the costas straight in order to pick up the halters. The palms of your mãos should be facing each other as you pick them. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your tronco forward and stationary, and the braços slightly bent at the cotovelos, lift the halters straight to the side until both braços are parallel to the chão. Exhale as you lift the pesos. (Note: avoid swinging the tronco or bringing the braços costas as opposed to the side.)
After a one second contraction at the top, slowly lower the halters costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a couple of dumbbells looking forward in front of a flat bench.
Sit on the end of the bench with your legs together and the dumbbells behind your calves.
Bend at the waist while keeping the back straight in order to pick up the dumbbells. The palms of your hands should be facing each other as you pick them. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your torso forward and stationary, and the arms slightly bent at the elbows, lift the dumbbells straight to the side until both arms are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you lift the weights. (Note: avoid swinging the torso or bringing the arms back as opposed to the side.)
After a one second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated Bent-Over Two-Arm com halter Triceps Extension
nomeOriginal: Seated Bent-Over Two-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instrucoes: Sente-se at the end of a flat bench with a halter in both braços using a neutral grip (palms of the mão facing you).
Bend your joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper braços with the halters should be close to the tronco and aligned with it (lifted up until they are parallel to the chão while the forebraços are pointing towards the chão as the mãos hold the pesos). Dica: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forebraços and the upper braço. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, use the triceps to lift the peso as you exhale until the forebraços are parallel to the chão and the whole braço is extended. Like many other braço exercises, only the forebraço moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the halters costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down at the end of a flat bench with a dumbbell in both arms using a neutral grip (palms of the hand facing you).
Bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arms with the dumbbells should be close to the torso and aligned with it (lifted up until they are parallel to the floor while the forearms are pointing towards the floor as the hands hold the weights). Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearms and the upper arm. This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arms stationary, use the triceps to lift the weight as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on the chão with your joelhos bent and your partner standing behind you. Extend your braços straight behind you with your palms facing each other. Your partner will hold your wrists for you. This will be the posição inicial.
Attempt to flex your cotovelos, while your partner prevents any actual movimento.

After 10-20 seconds, relax your braços while your partner gently pulls your wrists up to stretch your biceps. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is appropriate to prevent injury or overstretching.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on the floor with your knees bent and your partner standing behind you. Extend your arms straight behind you with your palms facing each other. Your partner will hold your wrists for you. This will be the starting position.
Attempt to flex your elbows, while your partner prevents any actual movement.

After 10-20 seconds, relax your arms while your partner gently pulls your wrists up to stretch your biceps. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is appropriate to prevent injury or overstretching.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need access to a low pulley row machine with a V-bar. Note: The V-bar will enable you to have a neutral grip where the palms of your mãos face each other. To get into the posição inicial, first sit down on the machine and place your pés on the front platform or crossbar provided making sure that your joelhos are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of your costas and grab the V-bar mãoles.

With your braços extended pull costas until your tronco is at a 90-degree angle from your pernas. Your costas should be slightly arched and your peito should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on your lats as you hold the bar in front of you. This is the posição inicial of the exercise.

Mantenhaing the tronco stationary, pull the mãoles costas towards your tronco while keeping the braços close to it until you touch the abdominals. Breathe out as you perform that movimento. At that point you should be squeezing your costas muscles hard. Segure that contraction for a second and slowly go costas to the original posição while breathing in.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need access to a low pulley row machine with a V-bar. Note: The V-bar will enable you to have a neutral grip where the palms of your hands face each other. To get into the starting position, first sit down on the machine and place your feet on the front platform or crossbar provided making sure that your knees are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of your back and grab the V-bar handles.

With your arms extended pull back until your torso is at a 90-degree angle from your legs. Your back should be slightly arched and your chest should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on your lats as you hold the bar in front of you. This is the starting position of the exercise.

Keeping the torso stationary, pull the handles back towards your torso while keeping the arms close to it until you touch the abdominals. Breathe out as you perform that movement. At that point you should be squeezing your back muscles hard. Hold that contraction for a second and slowly go back to the original position while breathing in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated no cabo desenvolvimento de ombros
instrucoes: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the mãoles. Your upper braços should be about 90 degrees to the body, with your head and peito up. The cotovelos should also be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by extending through the elbow, pressing the mãoles together above your head.
After pausing at the top, return the mãoles to the posição inicial. Ensure that you maintain tension on the cables.
You can also execute this movimento with your costas off the pad and alternate mãos.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the weight to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Your upper arms should be about 90 degrees to the body, with your head and chest up. The elbows should also be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together above your head.
After pausing at the top, return the handles to the starting position. Ensure that you maintain tension on the cables.
You can also execute this movement with your back off the pad and alternate hands.

instrucoes: Sit on the machine and place your toes on the lower portion of the platform provided with the heels extending off. Choose the toe posiçãoing of your choice (forward, in, or out) as per the beginning of this chapter.

Place your lower thighs under the lever pad, which will need to be adjusted according to the height of your thighs. Now place your mãos on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping forward.
Levante the lever slightly by pushing your heels up and release the safety bar. This will be your posição inicial.
Lentamente lower your heels by bending at the ankles until the calves are fully stretched. Inhale as you perform this movimento.
Eleve the heels by extending the ankles as high as possible as you contract the calves and expire. Segure the top contraction for a second.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on the machine and place your toes on the lower portion of the platform provided with the heels extending off. Choose the toe positioning of your choice (forward, in, or out) as per the beginning of this chapter.

Place your lower thighs under the lever pad, which will need to be adjusted according to the height of your thighs. Now place your hands on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping forward.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing your heels up and release the safety bar. This will be your starting position.
Slowly lower your heels by bending at the ankles until the calves are fully stretched. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Raise the heels by extending the ankles as high as possible as you contract the calves and breathe out. Hold the top contraction for a second.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit up straight on an exercise mat.
Bend one knee and put that foot on the chão to stabilize the tronco.
Straighten your other perna and flex your ankle.
Using a band, towel, or your mão if you can reach, pull the toes toward you. Segure for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit up straight on an exercise mat.
Bend one knee and put that foot on the floor to stabilize the torso.
Straighten your other leg and flex your ankle.
Using a band, towel, or your hand if you can reach, pull the toes toward you. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.

nome: Seated Close-Grip Concentration com barra rosca
instrucoes: Sente-se on a flat bench with a barra or E-Z Bar in front of you in between your pernas. Your pernas should be spread with the joelhos bent and the pés on the chão.

Use your braços to pick the barra up and place the costas of your upper braços on top of your inner thighs (around three and a half inches away from the front of the knee). A supinated grip closer than shoulder width is needed to perform this exercise. Dica: Your braço should be extended at braços length and the barra should be above the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente begin to bring the barra costas to posição inicial as your inspire. Dica: Avoid swinging motions at any time.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a flat bench with a barbell or E-Z Bar in front of you in between your legs. Your legs should be spread with the knees bent and the feet on the floor.

Use your arms to pick the barbell up and place the back of your upper arms on top of your inner thighs (around three and a half inches away from the front of the knee). A supinated grip closer than shoulder width is needed to perform this exercise. Tip: Your arm should be extended at arms length and the barbell should be above the floor. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to starting position as your breathe in. Tip: Avoid swinging motions at any time.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on a flat bench with a halter on each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco.
Rotate the palms of the mãos so that they are facing your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the pesos and start twisting the wrists once the halters pass your thighs so that the palms of your mãos face forward at the end of the movimento. Make sure that you contract the biceps as you expire and make sure that only the forebraços move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to the posição inicial as your inspire and as you rotate the wrists costas to a neutral grip.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell on each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
Rotate the palms of the hands so that they are facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the weights and start twisting the wrists once the dumbbells pass your thighs so that the palms of your hands face forward at the end of the movement. Make sure that you contract the biceps as you breathe out and make sure that only the forearms move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in and as you rotate the wrists back to a neutral grip.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated com halter Inner Biceps rosca
instrucoes: Sit on the end of a flat bench with a halter in each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco.
Rotate the palms of the mãos so that they are facing inward in a neutral posição. This will be your posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the halters out and up, turning the palms out as you lift and keeping your forebraços in line with your outer deltoids. Tips:

Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to the posição inicial as your inspire. Remember to rotate your braços as you lower the halters so that you can switch costas to a neutral grip.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on the end of a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
Rotate the palms of the hands so that they are facing inward in a neutral position. This will be your starting position.
While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells out and up, turning the palms out as you lift and keeping your forearms in line with your outer deltoids. Tips:

Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in. Remember to rotate your arms as you lower the dumbbells so that you can switch back to a neutral grip.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated com halter Palms-Down Wrist rosca
instrucoes: Start out by placing two halters on the chão in front of a flat bench.
Sente-se on the edge of the flat bench with your pernas at about shoulder width apart. Make sure to keep your pés on the chão.

Use your braços to grab both of the halters and bring them up so that your forebraços are resting against your thighs with the palms of the mãos facing down. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge of your thighs.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.

Lentamente lower your wrists costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise. Dica: Your forebraços should be stationary as your wrist is the only movimento needed to perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
When finished, simply lower the halters to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by placing two dumbbells on the floor in front of a flat bench.
Sit down on the edge of the flat bench with your legs at about shoulder width apart. Make sure to keep your feet on the floor.

Use your arms to grab both of the dumbbells and bring them up so that your forearms are resting against your thighs with the palms of the hands facing down. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge of your thighs.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.

Slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise. Tip: Your forearms should be stationary as your wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When finished, simply lower the dumbbells to the floor.

nome: Seated com halter Palms-Up Wrist rosca
instrucoes: Start out by placing two halters on the chão in front of a flat bench.
Sente-se on the edge of the flat bench with your pernas at about shoulder width apart. Make sure to keep your pés on the chão.

Use your braços to grab both of the halters and bring them up so that your forebraços are resting against your thighs with the palms of the mãos facing up. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge of your thighs.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.

Lentamente lower your wrists costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise. Dica: Your forebraços should be stationary as your wrist is the only movimento needed to perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
When finished, simply lower the halters to the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by placing two dumbbells on the floor in front of a flat bench.
Sit down on the edge of the flat bench with your legs at about shoulder width apart. Make sure to keep your feet on the floor.

Use your arms to grab both of the dumbbells and bring them up so that your forearms are resting against your thighs with the palms of the hands facing up. Your wrists should be hanging over the edge of your thighs.
Start out by curling your wrist upwards and exhaling.

Slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position while inhaling. Make sure to inhale during this part of the exercise. Tip: Your forearms should be stationary as your wrist is the only movement needed to perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When finished, simply lower the dumbbells to the floor.

instrucoes: Grab a couple of halters and sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a costas support on it as you place the halters upright on top of your thighs.
Clean the halters up one at a time by using your thighs to bring the halters up to shoulder height at each side.
Rotate the wrists so that the palms of your mãos are facing forward. This is your posição inicial.
As you exhale, push the halters up until they touch at the top.
After a second pause, slowly come down costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a couple of dumbbells and sit on a military press bench or a utility bench that has a back support on it as you place the dumbbells upright on top of your thighs.
Clean the dumbbells up one at a time by using your thighs to bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height at each side.
Rotate the wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward. This is your starting position.
As you exhale, push the dumbbells up until they touch at the top.
After a second pause, slowly come down back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on a bench with the pernas stretched out in front of you slightly below parallel and your braços holding on to the sides of the bench. Your tronco should be leaning costaswards around a 45-degree angle from the bench. This will be your posição inicial.
Bring the joelhos in toward you as you move your tronco closer to them at the same time. Breathe out as you perform this movimento.
After a second pause, go costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a bench with the legs stretched out in front of you slightly below parallel and your arms holding on to the sides of the bench. Your torso should be leaning backwards around a 45-degree angle from the bench. This will be your starting position.
Bring the knees in toward you as you move your torso closer to them at the same time. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
After a second pause, go back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on a mat with your right perna extended in front of you and your left perna bent with your foot against your right inner thigh.
Lean forward from your quadris and reach for your ankle until you feel a stretch in your hamstring. Segure for 15 seconds, then repeat for your other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a mat with your right leg extended in front of you and your left leg bent with your foot against your right inner thigh.
Lean forward from your hips and reach for your ankle until you feel a stretch in your hamstring. Hold for 15 seconds, then repeat for your other side.

instrucoes: Sit upright on the chão with your pernas bent, your partner standing behind you. Stick your braços straight out to your sides, with your palms facing the ground. Attempt to move them as far behind you as possible, as your assistant holds your wrists. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your cotovelos straight, attempt to move your braços to the front, with your partner gently restraining you to prevent any actual movimento for 10-20 seconds.
Now, relax your muscles and allow your partner to gently increase the stretch on the ombros and peito. Segure for 10 to 20 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit upright on the floor with your legs bent, your partner standing behind you. Stick your arms straight out to your sides, with your palms facing the ground. Attempt to move them as far behind you as possible, as your assistant holds your wrists. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your elbows straight, attempt to move your arms to the front, with your partner gently restraining you to prevent any actual movement for 10-20 seconds.
Now, relax your muscles and allow your partner to gently increase the stretch on the shoulders and chest. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

instrucoes: In a seated posição with your joelhos bent, cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Your partner will stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your ombros with their mãos. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to push your tronco costas for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movimento of your tronco.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your tronco forward for 10-20 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: In a seated position with your knees bent, cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Your partner will stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your shoulders with their hands. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your torso back for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movement of your torso.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your torso forward for 10-20 seconds.

instrucoes: Set up a box in a power rack. The pins should be set at an appropriate height. Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros, not on top of your traps. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros.

Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas. Mantenha your head facing forward. With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris until you are seated on the box. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing the bar tight, bend forward at the quadris as much as possible. If you set the pins to what would be parallel, you not only have a safety if you fail, but know when to stop.
Faça uma pausa just above the pins and reverse the motion until your tronco it upright.
instrucoesOriginais: Set up a box in a power rack. The pins should be set at an appropriate height. Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders, not on top of your traps. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders.

Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back. Keep your head facing forward. With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the bar tight, bend forward at the hips as much as possible. If you set the pins to what would be parallel, you not only have a safety if you fail, but know when to stop.
Pause just above the pins and reverse the motion until your torso it upright.

instrucoes: In a seated posição with your pernas extended, have your partner stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your ombros with their mãos. This will be your posição inicial.
Attempt to push your tronco costas for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movimento of your tronco.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your tronco forward for 10-20 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: In a seated position with your legs extended, have your partner stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your shoulders with their hands. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your torso back for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movement of your torso.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your torso forward for 10-20 seconds.

instrucoes: Loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. Sente-se with both pernas extended . This will be your posição inicial.
Leaning forward slightly, pull on the belt to draw the toes of your foot costas. Segure this posição for 10-20 seconds and then repeat with the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Loop a belt, rope, or band around one foot. Sit down with both legs extended . This will be your starting position.
Leaning forward slightly, pull on the belt to draw the toes of your foot back. Hold this position for 10-20 seconds and then repeat with the other leg.

instrucoes: Place a neck strap on the chão at the end of a flat bench. Once you have selected the pesos, sit at the end of the flat bench with your pés wider than shoulder width apart from each other. Your toes should be pointed out.

Lentamente move your tronco forward until it is almost parallel with the chão. Using both mãos, securely posição the neck strap around your head. Dica: Make sure the pesos are still lying on the chão to prevent any strain on the neck. Now grab the peso with both mãos while elevating your tronco costas until it is almost perpendicular to the chão. Note: Your head and tronco needs to be slightly tilted forward to perform this exercise.
Now place both mãos on top of your joelhos. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente lower your neck down until your chin touches the upper part of your peito while breathing in.
While exhaling, bring your neck costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a neck strap on the floor at the end of a flat bench. Once you have selected the weights, sit at the end of the flat bench with your feet wider than shoulder width apart from each other. Your toes should be pointed out.

Slowly move your torso forward until it is almost parallel with the floor. Using both hands, securely position the neck strap around your head. Tip: Make sure the weights are still lying on the floor to prevent any strain on the neck. Now grab the weight with both hands while elevating your torso back until it is almost perpendicular to the floor. Note: Your head and torso needs to be slightly tilted forward to perform this exercise.
Now place both hands on top of your knees. This is the starting position.
Slowly lower your neck down until your chin touches the upper part of your chest while breathing in.
While exhaling, bring your neck back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and sit on the machine with your costas against the costas support pad.

Place the costas of lower perna on top of padded lever (just a few inches under the calves) and secure the lap pad against your thighs, just above the joelhos. Then grasp the side mãoles on the machine as you point your toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances) and ensure that the pernas are fully straight right in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.

As you exhale, pull the machine lever as far as possible to the costas of your thighs by flexing at the joelhos. Mantenha your tronco stationary at all times. Segure the contracted posição for a second.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and sit on the machine with your back against the back support pad.

Place the back of lower leg on top of padded lever (just a few inches under the calves) and secure the lap pad against your thighs, just above the knees. Then grasp the side handles on the machine as you point your toes straight (or you can also use any of the other two stances) and ensure that the legs are fully straight right in front of you. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, pull the machine lever as far as possible to the back of your thighs by flexing at the knees. Keep your torso stationary at all times. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit on a bench with the pernas stretched out in front of you slightly below parallel and your braços holding on to the sides of the bench. Your tronco should be leaning costaswards around a 45-degree angle from the bench. This will be your posição inicial.
Bring the joelhos in toward you as you move your tronco closer to them at the same time. Breathe out as you perform this movimento.
After a second pause, go costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a bench with the legs stretched out in front of you slightly below parallel and your arms holding on to the sides of the bench. Your torso should be leaning backwards around a 45-degree angle from the bench. This will be your starting position.
Bring the knees in toward you as you move your torso closer to them at the same time. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
After a second pause, go back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated One-Arm com halter Palms-Down Wrist rosca
nomeOriginal: Seated One-Arm Dumbbell Palms-Down Wrist Curl
instrucoes: Sit on a flat bench with a halter in your right mão.
Place your pés flat on the chão, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place your right forebraço on top of your upper right thigh with your palm down. Dica: Make sure that the costas of the wrist lies on top of your joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the halter as far as possible as you keep a tight grip on the halter. Inhale as you perform this movimento.

Now curl the halter as high as possible as you contract the forebraços and as you exhale. Mantenha the contraction for a second before you lower again. Dica: The only movimento should happen at the wrist.
Perform for the número recomendado de repetições, switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in your right hand.
Place your feet flat on the floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place your right forearm on top of your upper right thigh with your palm down. Tip: Make sure that the back of the wrist lies on top of your knees. This will be your starting position.
Lower the dumbbell as far as possible as you keep a tight grip on the dumbbell. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Now curl the dumbbell as high as possible as you contract the forearms and as you exhale. Keep the contraction for a second before you lower again. Tip: The only movement should happen at the wrist.
Perform for the recommended amount of repetitions, switch arms and repeat the movement.

nome: Seated One-Arm com halter Palms-Up Wrist rosca
nomeOriginal: Seated One-Arm Dumbbell Palms-Up Wrist Curl
instrucoes: Sit on a flat bench with a halter in your right mão.
Place your pés flat on the chão, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place your right forebraço on top of your upper right thigh with your palm up. Dica: Make sure that the front of the wrist lies on top of your joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the halter as far as possible as you keep a tight grip on the halter. Inhale as you perform this movimento.

Now curl the halter as high as possible as you contract the forebraços and as you exhale. Mantenha the contraction for a second before you lower again. Dica: The only movimento should happen at the wrist.
Perform for the número recomendado de repetições, switch braços and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in your right hand.
Place your feet flat on the floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.

Lean forward and place your right forearm on top of your upper right thigh with your palm up. Tip: Make sure that the front of the wrist lies on top of your knees. This will be your starting position.
Lower the dumbbell as far as possible as you keep a tight grip on the dumbbell. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Now curl the dumbbell as high as possible as you contract the forearms and as you exhale. Keep the contraction for a second before you lower again. Tip: The only movement should happen at the wrist.
Perform for the recommended amount of repetitions, switch arms and repeat the movement.

nome: Seated One-arm no cabo Pulley remadas
instrucoes: To get into the posição inicial, first sit down on the machine and place your pés on the front platform or crossbar provided making sure that your joelhos are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of your costas and grab the single mãole attachment with your left braço using a palms-down grip.

With your braço extended pull costas until your tronco is at a 90-degree angle from your pernas. Your costas should be slightly arched and your peito should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on your lat as you hold the bar in front of you. The right braço can be kept by the waist. This is the posição inicial of the exercise.

Mantenhaing the tronco stationary, pull the mãoles costas towards your tronco while keeping the braços close to it as you rotate the wrist, so that by the time your mão is by your abdominals it is in a neutral posição (palms facing the tronco). Breathe out as you perform that movimento. At that point you should be squeezing your costas muscles hard.

Segure that contraction for a second and slowly go costas to the original posição while breathing in. Dica: Remember to rotate the wrist as you go costas to the posição inicial so that the palms are facing down again.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições and then perform the same movimento with the right mão.
instrucoesOriginais: To get into the starting position, first sit down on the machine and place your feet on the front platform or crossbar provided making sure that your knees are slightly bent and not locked.
Lean over as you keep the natural alignment of your back and grab the single handle attachment with your left arm using a palms-down grip.

With your arm extended pull back until your torso is at a 90-degree angle from your legs. Your back should be slightly arched and your chest should be sticking out. You should be feeling a nice stretch on your lat as you hold the bar in front of you. The right arm can be kept by the waist. This is the starting position of the exercise.

Keeping the torso stationary, pull the handles back towards your torso while keeping the arms close to it as you rotate the wrist, so that by the time your hand is by your abdominals it is in a neutral position (palms facing the torso). Breathe out as you perform that movement. At that point you should be squeezing your back muscles hard.

Hold that contraction for a second and slowly go back to the original position while breathing in. Tip: Remember to rotate the wrist as you go back to the starting position so that the palms are facing down again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then perform the same movement with the right hand.

instrucoes: Sit up straight on an exercise mat.
Touch the soles of your pés together with your pés six to eight inches in front of your quadris.
Place one mão on the chão beside you and your other mão behind your head.
Levante your elbow to the ceiling as you incline your tronco to the other side. Segure for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit up straight on an exercise mat.
Touch the soles of your feet together with your feet six to eight inches in front of your hips.
Place one hand on the floor beside you and your other hand behind your head.
Lift your elbow to the ceiling as you incline your torso to the other side. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.

nome: Seated Palm-Up com barra Wrist rosca
instrucoes: Segure a barra with both mãos and your palms facing up; mãos spaced about shoulder width.
Place your pés flat on the chão, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
Lean forward and place your forebraços on top of your upper thighs with your palms up. Dica: Make sure that the front of the wrists lay on top of your joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar as far as possible while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl bar up as high as possible while flexing the forebraços and exhaling. Segure the contraction at the top for a second and Dica: Only the wrist should move.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a barbell with both hands and your palms facing up; hands spaced about shoulder width.
Place your feet flat on the floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
Lean forward and place your forearms on top of your upper thighs with your palms up. Tip: Make sure that the front of the wrists lay on top of your knees. This will be your starting position.
Lower the bar as far as possible while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl bar up as high as possible while flexing the forearms and exhaling. Hold the contraction at the top for a second and Tip: Only the wrist should move.

nome: Seated Palms-Down com barra Wrist rosca
instrucoes: Segure a barra with both mãos and your palms facing down; mãos spaced about shoulder width.
Place your pés flat on the chão, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
Lean forward and place your forebraços on top of your upper thighs with your palms down. Dica: Make sure that the costas of the wrists lay on top of your joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar as far as possible while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl bar up as high as possible while flexing the forebraços and exhaling. Segure the contraction at the top for a second and Dica: Only the wrist should move.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a barbell with both hands and your palms facing down; hands spaced about shoulder width.
Place your feet flat on the floor, at a distance that is slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
Lean forward and place your forearms on top of your upper thighs with your palms down. Tip: Make sure that the back of the wrists lay on top of your knees. This will be your starting position.
Lower the bar as far as possible while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl bar up as high as possible while flexing the forearms and exhaling. Hold the contraction at the top for a second and Tip: Only the wrist should move.

instrucoes: Pick a couple of halters and sit at the end of a flat bench with your pés firmly on the chão. Segure the halters with your palms facing in and your braços straight down at your sides at braços' length. This will be your posição inicial.

While maintaining the tronco stationary (no swinging), lift the halters to your side with a slight bend on the elbow and the mãos slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you braços are parallel to the chão. Exhale as you execute this movimento and pause for a second at the top.
