Abaixe the halters costas down slowly to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Pick a couple of dumbbells and sit at the end of a flat bench with your feet firmly on the floor. Hold the dumbbells with your palms facing in and your arms straight down at your sides at arms' length. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the dumbbells to your side with a slight bend on the elbow and the hands slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you arms are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this movement and pause for a second at the top.
Lower the dumbbells back down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sente-se on a bench with costas support and grasp a halter with both mãos and hold it overhead at braço's length. Dica: a better way is to have somebody mão it to you especially if it is very heavy. The resistance should be resting in the palms of your mãos with your thumbs around it. The palm of the mão should be facing inward. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your upper braços close to your head (cotovelos in) and perpendicular to the chão, lower the resistance in a semi-circular motion behind your head until your forebraços touch your biceps. Dica: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forebraços should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the posição inicial by using the triceps to raise the halter. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a bench with back support and grasp a dumbbell with both hands and hold it overhead at arm's length. Tip: a better way is to have somebody hand it to you especially if it is very heavy. The resistance should be resting in the palms of your hands with your thumbs around it. The palm of the hand should be facing inward. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arms close to your head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semi-circular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the dumbbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Seated Two-Arm Palms-Up Low-Pulley Wrist rosca
nomeOriginal: Seated Two-Arm Palms-Up Low-Pulley Wrist Curl
instrucoes: Put a bench in front of a low pulley machine that has a barra or EZ Curl attachment on it.
Move the bench far enough away so that when you bring the mãole to the top of your thighs tension is created on the cable due to the peso stack being moved up.
Now hold the mãole with both mãos, palms up, using a shoulder-width grip.
Step costas and sit on the bench with your pés about shoulder width apart, firmly on the chão.
Lean forward and place the forebraços on your thighs with the costas of your wrists over your joelhos. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar as far as possible, while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl the bar up as high as possible while contraindo the forebraços. Dica: Only the wrist should move; not the forebraços.
After a second contraction at the top go costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Put a bench in front of a low pulley machine that has a barbell or EZ Curl attachment on it.
Move the bench far enough away so that when you bring the handle to the top of your thighs tension is created on the cable due to the weight stack being moved up.
Now hold the handle with both hands, palms up, using a shoulder-width grip.
Step back and sit on the bench with your feet about shoulder width apart, firmly on the floor.
Lean forward and place the forearms on your thighs with the back of your wrists over your knees. This will be your starting position.
Lower the bar as far as possible, while inhaling and keeping a tight grip.
Now curl the bar up as high as possible while contracting the forearms. Tip: Only the wrist should move; not the forearms.
After a second contraction at the top go back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab a halter with each mão and stand up erect.

Clean (lift) the halters to the peito/shoulder level and then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing towards you as if you were getting ready to perform an Arnold Press. This will be your posição inicial.

Now start extending your left braço overhead as you rotate the wrist so that the palm of your mão faces forward as you go up. Your cotovelos should come out also as you lift the peso. Simultaneously, you will also be bending from your hip to your opposite side. Dica: If you perform the exercise correctly, is should look as if you are trying to reach for something overhead on the right mão side of your body, but with your left braço. Breathe out as you perform this movimento.
Once you reach the top posição inspire. Then, with the peso fully extended overhead and you bent over to your right mão side, begin the movimento to the left side.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell with each hand and stand up erect.

Clean (lift) the dumbbells to the chest/shoulder level and then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing towards you as if you were getting ready to perform an Arnold Press. This will be your starting position.

Now start extending your left arm overhead as you rotate the wrist so that the palm of your hand faces forward as you go up. Your elbows should come out also as you lift the weight. Simultaneously, you will also be bending from your hip to your opposite side. Tip: If you perform the exercise correctly, is should look as if you are trying to reach for something overhead on the right hand side of your body, but with your left arm. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
Once you reach the top position breathe in. Then, with the weight fully extended overhead and you bent over to your right hand side, begin the movement to the left side.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Attach a single mãole to a low cable.
After selecting the correct peso, stand a couple pés costas with a wide-split stance. Your braço should be extended and your shoulder forward. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the movimento by retracting the shoulder and flexing the elbow. As you pull, supinate the wrist, turning the palm upward as you go.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a single handle to a low cable.
After selecting the correct weight, stand a couple feet back with a wide-split stance. Your arm should be extended and your shoulder forward. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by retracting the shoulder and flexing the elbow. As you pull, supinate the wrist, turning the palm upward as you go.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: With ombros relaxed and braços resting loosely at your sides (or in your lap if you're seated), gently roll your ombros forward, up, costas, and down.
Reverse direction. You can do this exercise alternating ombros or both at the same time.
instrucoesOriginais: With shoulders relaxed and arms resting loosely at your sides (or in your lap if you're seated), gently roll your shoulders forward, up, back, and down.
Reverse direction. You can do this exercise alternating shoulders or both at the same time.

nome: desenvolvimento de ombros - With com elásticos
instrucoes: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at braço's length. Grasp the mãoles and lift them so that the mãos are at shoulder height at each side.
Rotate the wrists so that the palms of your mãos are facing forward. Your cotovelos should be bent, with the upper braços and forebraços in line to the tronco. This is your posição inicial.
As you exhale, lift the mãoles up until your braços are fully extended overhead.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at arm's length. Grasp the handles and lift them so that the hands are at shoulder height at each side.
Rotate the wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward. Your elbows should be bent, with the upper arms and forearms in line to the torso. This is your starting position.
As you exhale, lift the handles up until your arms are fully extended overhead.

instrucoes: Relax your braços to your sides and raise your ombros up toward your ears, then costas down.
instrucoesOriginais: Relax your arms to your sides and raise your shoulders up toward your ears, then back down.

instrucoes: Reach your left braço across your body and hold it straight.
instrucoesOriginais: Reach your left arm across your body and hold it straight.

instrucoes: First lie on your left side, bending your left knee in front of you to stabilize your tronco (use your abdominal muscles as well to hold you upright).

Straighten your right perna and rest the right foot on the chão behind your left. Straighten your right braço over your head and gently pull on your right wrist to stretch the entire right side of the body. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: First lie on your left side, bending your left knee in front of you to stabilize your torso (use your abdominal muscles as well to hold you upright).

Straighten your right leg and rest the right foot on the floor behind your left. Straighten your right arm over your head and gently pull on your right wrist to stretch the entire right side of the body. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle.
Comece this drill by hopping sideways over the obstacle, rebounding out of your landing to hop costas to where you started.
Hop for a prescribed number or repetitions as quickly as possible, and finish this drill by sprinting a short distance upon landing the last hop.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle.
Begin this drill by hopping sideways over the obstacle, rebounding out of your landing to hop back to where you started.
Hop for a prescribed number or repetitions as quickly as possible, and finish this drill by sprinting a short distance upon landing the last hop.

instrucoes: Pick a couple of halters and stand with a straight tronco and the halters by your side at braços length with the palms of the mão facing you. This will be your posição inicial.

While maintaining the tronco in a stationary posição (no swinging), lift the halters to your side with a slight bend on the elbow and the mãos slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you braços are parallel to the chão. Exhale as you execute this movimento and pause for a second at the top.
Abaixe the halters costas down slowly to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells by your side at arms length with the palms of the hand facing you. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso in a stationary position (no swinging), lift the dumbbells to your side with a slight bend on the elbow and the hands slightly tilted forward as if pouring water in a glass. Continue to go up until you arms are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this movement and pause for a second at the top.
Lower the dumbbells back down slowly to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: In a standing posição, hold a pair of halters at your side. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your cotovelos slightly bent, raise the pesos directly in front of you to shoulder height, avoiding any swinging or cheating.
At the top of the exercise move the pesos out in front of you, keeping your braços extended.
Abaixe the pesos with a controlled motion.
On the next repetition, raise the pesos in front of you to shoulder height before moving the pesos laterally to your sides.
Abaixe the pesos to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: In a standing position, hold a pair of dumbbells at your side. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your elbows slightly bent, raise the weights directly in front of you to shoulder height, avoiding any swinging or cheating.
At the top of the exercise move the weights out in front of you, keeping your arms extended.
Lower the weights with a controlled motion.
On the next repetition, raise the weights in front of you to shoulder height before moving the weights laterally to your sides.
Lower the weights to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand next to a chair, which you may hold onto as a support. Stand on one perna. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your perna straight, raise it as far out to the side as possible, and swing it costas down, allowing it to cross the opposite perna.
Repita this swinging motion 5-10 times, increasing the range of motion as you do so.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand next to a chair, which you may hold onto as a support. Stand on one leg. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your leg straight, raise it as far out to the side as possible, and swing it back down, allowing it to cross the opposite leg.
Repeat this swinging motion 5-10 times, increasing the range of motion as you do so.

instrucoes: Start off by lying on your right side and bend your right knee in front of you to stabilize the tronco.
Rest your head on your right mão or shoulder. Levante your left perna upward and hold it by the costas of the knee (easier) or the foot (harder).
Pull your left knee in toward your left shoulder and simultaneously press your foot or knee down to the chão. To intensify this stretch, straighten your left perna. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Start off by lying on your right side and bend your right knee in front of you to stabilize the torso.
Rest your head on your right hand or shoulder. Lift your left leg upward and hold it by the back of the knee (easier) or the foot (harder).
Pull your left knee in toward your left shoulder and simultaneously press your foot or knee down to the floor. To intensify this stretch, straighten your left leg. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Start with your ombros relaxed, gently tilt your head towards your shoulder.
Assist stretch with a gentle pull on the side of the head.
instrucoesOriginais: Start with your shoulders relaxed, gently tilt your head towards your shoulder.
Assist stretch with a gentle pull on the side of the head.

instrucoes: Comece standing with your pés hip width apart in an athletic stance. Your head and peito should be up, joelhos and quadris slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.
Leaning to your right, extend through your quadris, joelhos, and ankles to jump into the air. Block with the braços to lead the movimento, jumping as far to your right as you can.
Land facing the same direction with your pés hip width apart, absorbing the impact through your lower body.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing with your feet hip width apart in an athletic stance. Your head and chest should be up, knees and hips slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
Leaning to your right, extend through your hips, knees, and ankles to jump into the air. Block with the arms to lead the movement, jumping as far to your right as you can.
Land facing the same direction with your feet hip width apart, absorbing the impact through your lower body.

instrucoes: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at a wide grip, bring your tronco costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This is your posição inicial.

Pull your tronco up while leaning to the left mão side until the bar almost touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary as it moves through space (no swinging) and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go costas to the posição inicial.

Now, pull your tronco up while leaning to the right mão side until the bar almost touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita steps 3-6 until you have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions for each side.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at a wide grip, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out. This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up while leaning to the left hand side until the bar almost touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space (no swinging) and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go back to the starting position.

Now, pull your torso up while leaning to the right hand side until the bar almost touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go back to the starting position.
Repeat steps 3-6 until you have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions for each side.

instrucoes: This stretch works best standing. Cross your left braço over the midline of your body and hold the left wrist in your right mão down at the level of your quadris. Start the stretch with a bent left braço.
Lentamente straighten, pull, and lift it up to shoulder height, as pictured. Feel this stretch originate in your costas, not your ombros, and don't pull too hard on the ombros joint. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: This stretch works best standing. Cross your left arm over the midline of your body and hold the left wrist in your right hand down at the level of your hips. Start the stretch with a bent left arm.
Slowly straighten, pull, and lift it up to shoulder height, as pictured. Feel this stretch originate in your back, not your shoulders, and don't pull too hard on the shoulders joint. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Stand to one side of the box with your left foot resting on the middle of it.
To begin, jump up and over to the other side of the box, landing with your right foot on top of the box and your left foot on the chão. Swing your braços to aid your movimento.
Continue shuffling costas and forth across the box.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand to one side of the box with your left foot resting on the middle of it.
To begin, jump up and over to the other side of the box, landing with your right foot on top of the box and your left foot on the floor. Swing your arms to aid your movement.
Continue shuffling back and forth across the box.

instrucoes: Comece by moving the pulleys to the high posição, select the resistance to be used, and take a mãole in each mão.

Step forward in front of both pulleys with your braços extended in front of you, bringing your mãos together. Your head and peito should be up as you lean forward, while your pés should be staggered. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your left braço in place, allow your right braço to extend out to the side, maintaining a slight bend at the elbow. The right braço should be perpendicular to the body at approximately shoulder level.
Retorne your braço costas to the posição inicial by pulling your mão costas to the midline of the body.
Segure for a second at the posição inicial and repeat the movimento on the opposite side. Continue alternating costas and forth for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by moving the pulleys to the high position, select the resistance to be used, and take a handle in each hand.

Step forward in front of both pulleys with your arms extended in front of you, bringing your hands together. Your head and chest should be up as you lean forward, while your feet should be staggered. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your left arm in place, allow your right arm to extend out to the side, maintaining a slight bend at the elbow. The right arm should be perpendicular to the body at approximately shoulder level.
Return your arm back to the starting position by pulling your hand back to the midline of the body.
Hold for a second at the starting position and repeat the movement on the opposite side. Continue alternating back and forth for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate peso.
Eleve the bar from the chão, taking it to your ombros with one or both mãos. Adopt a wide stance. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the movimento by extending the elbow, pressing the peso up. Move explosively, extending the quadris and joelhos fully to produce maximal force.
Retorne à posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate weight.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking it to your shoulders with one or both hands. Adopt a wide stance. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by extending the elbow, pressing the weight up. Move explosively, extending the hips and knees fully to produce maximal force.
Return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Comece laying prone on the ground. Move yourself into a posição supporting your peso on your toes and one braço. Your working braço should be placed directly under the shoulder, fully extended. Your pernas should be extended, and for this movimento you may need a wider base, placing your pés further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place your free mão behind your costas. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the braço to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin laying prone on the ground. Move yourself into a position supporting your weight on your toes and one arm. Your working arm should be placed directly under the shoulder, fully extended. Your legs should be extended, and for this movement you may need a wider base, placing your feet further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place your free hand behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the arm to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: This drill teaches quick foot action. You need a single cone. Comece standing next to the cone with one braço costas and one braço forward.
Chop the pés as quickly as possible, blocking with the braços. Circle the cone, keep your joelhos up, with violent foot action.
Rest after three trips around the cone.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill teaches quick foot action. You need a single cone. Begin standing next to the cone with one arm back and one arm forward.
Chop the feet as quickly as possible, blocking with the arms. Circle the cone, keep your knees up, with violent foot action.
Rest after three trips around the cone.

instrucoes: Position a box in a rack. Secure a band or rope in place above the box.
Standing in front of it, step onto the box to a full standing posição, letting your other perna remain unsupported. Segure onto the band for balance
. Continue stepping up and down on the same perna before switching to the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a box in a rack. Secure a band or rope in place above the box.
Standing in front of it, step onto the box to a full standing position, letting your other leg remain unsupported. Hold onto the band for balance
. Continue stepping up and down on the same leg before switching to the opposite side.

instrucoes: Arrange a line of cones in front of you. Assume a relaxed standing posição, balanced on one perna. Eleve the knee of your opposite perna. This will be your posição inicial.
Hop forward, jumping and landing with the same perna over the cone.
Use a countermovimento jump to hop from cone to cone.
At the end, turn around and go costas on the other perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Arrange a line of cones in front of you. Assume a relaxed standing position, balanced on one leg. Raise the knee of your opposite leg. This will be your starting position.
Hop forward, jumping and landing with the same leg over the cone.
Use a countermovement jump to hop from cone to cone.
At the end, turn around and go back on the other leg.

instrucoes: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle. To get into the start posição, stand on one perna with your knee slightly bent.
To begin, execute a counterjump to hop sideways over the cone.
Land on your jumping perna, and immediately rebound out of it by jumping costas to the start posição.
Continue hopping costas and forth.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle. To get into the start position, stand on one leg with your knee slightly bent.
To begin, execute a counterjump to hop sideways over the cone.
Land on your jumping leg, and immediately rebound out of it by jumping back to the start position.
Continue hopping back and forth.

instrucoes: Seat yourself in the machine and adjust it so that you are posiçãoed properly. The pad should be against the lower part of the shin but not in contact with the ankle. Adjust the seat so that the pivot point is in line with your knee. Select a peso appropriate for your abilities.
Maintaining good posture, fully extend one perna, pausing at the top of the motion.
Retorne to the posição inicial without letting the peso stop, keeping tension on the muscle.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Seat yourself in the machine and adjust it so that you are positioned properly. The pad should be against the lower part of the shin but not in contact with the ankle. Adjust the seat so that the pivot point is in line with your knee. Select a weight appropriate for your abilities.
Maintaining good posture, fully extend one leg, pausing at the top of the motion.
Return to the starting position without letting the weight stop, keeping tension on the muscle.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Comece by swinging the braços upward as you push through the top perna, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the same posição that you started, using your inside perna to decelerate the impact.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the arms upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the same position that you started, using your inside leg to decelerate the impact.

instrucoes: With a wide stance, hold a dumbell with both mãos, grasping the head of the halter instead of the mãole. Your braços should be extended and hanging at the waist. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve the peso until it is above shoulder level, keeping your braços extended. Your tronco and quadris should remain stationary throughout the movimento.
Retorne to the posição inicial and repeat for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: With a wide stance, hold a dumbell with both hands, grasping the head of the dumbbell instead of the handle. Your arms should be extended and hanging at the waist. This will be your starting position.
Raise the weight until it is above shoulder level, keeping your arms extended. Your torso and hips should remain stationary throughout the movement.
Return to the starting position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece by standing on one perna, with the bent knee raised. This will be your start posição.
Using a countermovimento jump, take off upward by extending the hip, knee, and ankle of the grounded perna.
Immediately flex the knee and attempt to touch your butt with the heel of your jumping perna.
Retorne the perna to a partially bent posição underneath the quadris and land. Your opposite perna should stay in relatively the same posição throughout the drill.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by standing on one leg, with the bent knee raised. This will be your start position.
Using a countermovement jump, take off upward by extending the hip, knee, and ankle of the grounded leg.
Immediately flex the knee and attempt to touch your butt with the heel of your jumping leg.
Return the leg to a partially bent position underneath the hips and land. Your opposite leg should stay in relatively the same position throughout the drill.

instrucoes: Lay on the chão with your pés flat and joelhos bent.
Eleve one perna off of the ground, pulling the knee to your peito. This will be your posição inicial.
Execute the movimento by driving through the heel, extending your hip upward and raising your glutes off of the ground.
Extend as far as possible, pause and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on the floor with your feet flat and knees bent.
Raise one leg off of the ground, pulling the knee to your chest. This will be your starting position.
Execute the movement by driving through the heel, extending your hip upward and raising your glutes off of the ground.
Extend as far as possible, pause and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on the box, heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the box, trying to gain as much height as possible by extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the same foot on top of the box, returning your other foot costas to the start posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on the box, heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the box, trying to gain as much height as possible by extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the same foot on top of the box, returning your other foot back to the start position.

instrucoes: Deite-se on the chão placing your pés either under something that will not move or by having a partner hold them. Your pernas should be bent at the joelhos.
Place your mãos behind your head and lock them together by clasping your fingers. This is the posição inicial.
Elevate your upper body so that it creates an imaginary V-shape with your thighs. Breathe out when performing this part of the exercise.
Once you feel the contraction for a second, lower your upper body costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on the floor placing your feet either under something that will not move or by having a partner hold them. Your legs should be bent at the knees.
Place your hands behind your head and lock them together by clasping your fingers. This is the starting position.
Elevate your upper body so that it creates an imaginary V-shape with your thighs. Breathe out when performing this part of the exercise.
Once you feel the contraction for a second, lower your upper body back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés shoulder width apart. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing your joelhos and quadris, sitting costas with your quadris.
Continue until you have squatted a portion of the way down, but are above parallel, and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the posição inicial. Repita for 5-10 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing your knees and hips, sitting back with your hips.
Continue until you have squatted a portion of the way down, but are above parallel, and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the starting position. Repeat for 5-10 repetitions.

instrucoes: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating — speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.
instrucoesOriginais: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating — speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.

instrucoes: To begin, load the sled with the desired peso and attach the pulling strap. You can pull with mãoles, use a harness, or attach the pulling strap to a peso belt.
Whether pulling forwards or costaswards, lean in the direction of travel and progress by extending through the quadris and joelhos.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, load the sled with the desired weight and attach the pulling strap. You can pull with handles, use a harness, or attach the pulling strap to a weight belt.
Whether pulling forwards or backwards, lean in the direction of travel and progress by extending through the hips and knees.

instrucoes: Attach dual mãoles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light peso.
Face the sled, costasing up until there is some tension in the line. Segure your mãos directly above your head with your cotovelos extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Walk costaswards, keeping your braços raised above your head. Avoid jerky movimentos.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light weight.
Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Hold your hands directly above your head with your elbows extended. This will be your starting position.
Walk backwards, keeping your arms raised above your head. Avoid jerky movements.

instrucoes: Attach dual mãoles to a sled using a chain or rope. Load the sled to an appropriate load.

Facing away from the sled, step away until there is tension in the line. Eleve your mãos above your head, keeping them together, palms facing each other. Your cotovelos should be pointed upward with the cotovelos flexed. This will be your posição inicial.
Extend through the elbow to straighten the braço. Ensure that your upper braço stays in posição to isolate the triceps.
Upon full extension, step forward to take the slack out of the line. You may keep your pés staggered for more stability.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach dual handles to a sled using a chain or rope. Load the sled to an appropriate load.

Facing away from the sled, step away until there is tension in the line. Raise your hands above your head, keeping them together, palms facing each other. Your elbows should be pointed upward with the elbows flexed. This will be your starting position.
Extend through the elbow to straighten the arm. Ensure that your upper arm stays in position to isolate the triceps.
Upon full extension, step forward to take the slack out of the line. You may keep your feet staggered for more stability.

instrucoes: Load your pushing sled with the desired peso.

Take an athletic posture, leaning into the sled with your braços fully extended, grasping the mãoles. Push the sled as fast as possible, focusing on extending your quadris and joelhos to strengthen your posterior chain.
instrucoesOriginais: Load your pushing sled with the desired weight.

Take an athletic posture, leaning into the sled with your arms fully extended, grasping the handles. Push the sled as fast as possible, focusing on extending your hips and knees to strengthen your posterior chain.

instrucoes: Attach dual mãoles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light peso.

Face the sled, costasing up until there is some tension in the line. Take both mãoles at braços length at about waist level. Bend the joelhos slightly and keep your peito and head up. This will be your posição inicial.
Without flexing the elbow, pull the mãoles upward and apart, performing a reverse fly with some external rotation. Your palms should be facing forward as you do this.
Retorne to the posição inicial, taking a couple steps costas to take the slack out of the line.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light weight.

Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Take both handles at arms length at about waist level. Bend the knees slightly and keep your chest and head up. This will be your starting position.
Without flexing the elbow, pull the handles upward and apart, performing a reverse fly with some external rotation. Your palms should be facing forward as you do this.
Return to the starting position, taking a couple steps back to take the slack out of the line.

instrucoes: Attach dual mãoles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to an appropriate peso. Face the sled, costasing up until there is some tension in the line.
With a mãole in each mão, bend the joelhos slightly, keep your head and peito up, and begin with your braços extended.
To initiate the movimento, flex the elbow as you retract your shoulder blades, pulling the sled towards you.
Take a step or two costas to get tension in the line and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to an appropriate weight. Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line.
With a handle in each hand, bend the knees slightly, keep your head and chest up, and begin with your arms extended.
To initiate the movement, flex the elbow as you retract your shoulder blades, pulling the sled towards you.
Take a step or two back to get tension in the line and repeat.

instrucoes: You will need a tire and a sledgehammer for this exercise. Stand in front of the tire about two pés away from it with a staggered stance. Grip the sledgehammer.
If you are right mãoed, your left mão should be at the bottom of the mãole, and your right mão should be choking up closer to the head.

As you bring the sledge up, your right mão slides toward the head; as you swing down, your right mão will slide down to join your left mão. Slam it down as hard as you can against the tire. Control the bounce of the hammer off of the tire.
Repita do outro lado.
instrucoesOriginais: You will need a tire and a sledgehammer for this exercise. Stand in front of the tire about two feet away from it with a staggered stance. Grip the sledgehammer.
If you are right handed, your left hand should be at the bottom of the handle, and your right hand should be choking up closer to the head.

As you bring the sledge up, your right hand slides toward the head; as you swing down, your right hand will slide down to join your left hand. Slam it down as hard as you can against the tire. Control the bounce of the hammer off of the tire.
Repeat on the other side.

instrucoes: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barra at a height that you can reach when lying down and your braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down on the incline bench and make sure your ombros are aligned right under the barra.
Using a shoulder width pronated (palms forward) grip, lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with a slight bend at the cotovelos. This will be your posição inicial.
As you expire, lift the bar up until your braços are fully extended. Note: The contraction should be felt around the ombros.
After a second pause, bring the bar costas down to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended. Once the weight you need is selected, lie down on the incline bench and make sure your shoulders are aligned right under the barbell.
Using a shoulder width pronated (palms forward) grip, lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with a slight bend at the elbows. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe out, lift the bar up until your arms are fully extended. Note: The contraction should be felt around the shoulders.
After a second pause, bring the bar back down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

nome: Smith na máquina Behind the Back Shrug
nomeOriginal: Smith Machine Behind the Back Shrug
instrucoes: With the bar at thigh level, load an appropriate peso.

Stand with the bar behind you, taking a shoulder-width, pronated grip on the bar and unhook the peso. You should be standing up straight with your head and peito up and your braços extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by shrugging your ombros straight up. Do not flex the braços or wrist during the movimento.
After a brief pause return the peso to the posição inicial.
Repita for the número desejado de repetições before engaging the hooks to rack the peso.
instrucoesOriginais: With the bar at thigh level, load an appropriate weight.

Stand with the bar behind you, taking a shoulder-width, pronated grip on the bar and unhook the weight. You should be standing up straight with your head and chest up and your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by shrugging your shoulders straight up. Do not flex the arms or wrist during the movement.
After a brief pause return the weight to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions before engaging the hooks to rack the weight.

instrucoes: Place a flat bench underneath the smith machine. Now place the barra at a height that you can reach when lying down and your braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down on the flat bench. Using a pronated grip that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, lock the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a flat bench underneath the smith machine. Now place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended. Once the weight you need is selected, lie down on the flat bench. Using a pronated grip that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, lock the bar back in the rack.

nome: Smith na máquina Bent Over remada
instrucoes: Set the barra attached to the smith machine to a height that is about 2 inches below your joelhos.

Bend your joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Dica: Make sure that you keep the head up.

Now grasp the barra using an overmão (pronated) grip and unlock it from the smith machine rack. Then let it hang directly in front of you as your braços hang extended perpendicular to the chão and your tronco. This is your posição inicial.

While keeping the tronco stationary, lift the barra as you expire, keeping the cotovelos close to the body and not doing any force with the forebraço other than holding the pesos. On the top contracted posição, squeeze the costas muscles and hold for a second.
Lentamente lower the peso again to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Set the barbell attached to the smith machine to a height that is about 2 inches below your knees.
Bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep the head up.

Now grasp the barbell using an overhand (pronated) grip and unlock it from the smith machine rack. Then let it hang directly in front of you as your arms hang extended perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the barbell as you breathe out, keeping the elbows close to the body and not doing any force with the forearm other than holding the weights. On the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight again to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a block or peso plate below the bar on the Smith machine. Set the bar to a posição that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step onto the plates with the balls of your pés and place the bar on the costas of your ombros.
Take the bar with both mãos facing forward. Rotate the bar to unrack it. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your heels as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of your pés, flexing your calf at the top of the contraction. Your joelhos should remain extended. Segure the contracted posição for a second before you start to go costas down.
Retorne slowly to the posição inicial as you inspire while lowering your heels.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a block or weight plate below the bar on the Smith machine. Set the bar to a position that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step onto the plates with the balls of your feet and place the bar on the back of your shoulders.
Take the bar with both hands facing forward. Rotate the bar to unrack it. This will be your starting position.

Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of your feet, flexing your calf at the top of the contraction. Your knees should remain extended. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go back down.
Return slowly to the starting position as you breathe in while lowering your heels.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a flat bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barra at a height that you can reach when lying down and your braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down on the flat bench. Using a close and pronated grip (palms facing forward) that is around shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.

As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle peito. Dica: Make sure that as opposed to a regular bench press, you keep the cotovelos close to the tronco at all times in order to maximize triceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your triceps muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, lock the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a flat bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended. Once the weight you need is selected, lie down on the flat bench. Using a close and pronated grip (palms facing forward) that is around shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle chest. Tip: Make sure that as opposed to a regular bench press, you keep the elbows close to the torso at all times in order to maximize triceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your triceps muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, lock the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Position a decline bench in the rack so that the bar will be above your peito. Load an appropriate peso and take your place on the bench.
Rotate the bar to unhook it from the rack and fully extend your braços. Your costas should be slightly arched and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing your braços, lowering the bar to your peito.
Faça uma pausa briefly, and then extend your braços to push the peso costas to the posição inicial.
After completing the número desejado de repetições, rotate the bar to rack the peso.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a decline bench in the rack so that the bar will be above your chest. Load an appropriate weight and take your place on the bench.
Rotate the bar to unhook it from the rack and fully extend your arms. Your back should be slightly arched and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing your arms, lowering the bar to your chest.
Pause briefly, and then extend your arms to push the weight back to the starting position.
After completing the desired number of repetitions, rotate the bar to rack the weight.

nome: Smith na máquina Hang Power Clean
instrucoes: Position the bar at knee height and load it to an appropriate peso.

Take a pronated grip on the bar outside of shoulder width and unhook the bar from the machine. Your braços should be fully extended with your head and peito up. Your cotovelos should be pointed out with your ombros costas and down. Your quadris should be costas, loading the tension into the hamstrings. This will be your posição inicial.
Initate the movimento by forcefully extending the quadris and joelhos, accelerating into the bar. Ensure that you keep your braços straight during this part of the motion.
Upon full extension, rebend the quadris and joelhos to lower your receiving posição.
Allow the braços to flex at this point, rotating the cotovelos around the bar to receive it on your ombros.
Extend through the quadris and joelhos to come to a standing posição with the bar racked on your ombros to complete the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: Position the bar at knee height and load it to an appropriate weight.

Take a pronated grip on the bar outside of shoulder width and unhook the bar from the machine. Your arms should be fully extended with your head and chest up. Your elbows should be pointed out with your shoulders back and down. Your hips should be back, loading the tension into the hamstrings. This will be your starting position.
Initate the movement by forcefully extending the hips and knees, accelerating into the bar. Ensure that you keep your arms straight during this part of the motion.
Upon full extension, rebend the hips and knees to lower your receiving position.
Allow the arms to flex at this point, rotating the elbows around the bar to receive it on your shoulders.
Extend through the hips and knees to come to a standing position with the bar racked on your shoulders to complete the movement.

instrucoes: Position a bench in the rack and load the bar to an appropriate peso. Deite-se on the bench, placing the bottom of your pés against the bar. Unlock the bar and extend your pernas. You may need to use your mãos to assist you. For added stability grasp the sides of the Smith Machine. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by rotating your pelvis, flexing your spine to raise your quadris off of the bench. Maintain a slight bend in the joelhos throughout the motion.
After a brief pause, return the quadris to the bench.
Repita pelo número desejado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bench in the rack and load the bar to an appropriate weight. Lie down on the bench, placing the bottom of your feet against the bar. Unlock the bar and extend your legs. You may need to use your hands to assist you. For added stability grasp the sides of the Smith Machine. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rotating your pelvis, flexing your spine to raise your hips off of the bench. Maintain a slight bend in the knees throughout the motion.
After a brief pause, return the hips to the bench.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barra at a height that you can reach when lying down and your braços are almost fully extended. Once the peso you need is selected, lie down on the incline bench and make sure your upper peito is aligned with the barra. Using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your upper peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar costas in the rack.
instrucoesOriginais: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine. Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended. Once the weight you need is selected, lie down on the incline bench and make sure your upper chest is aligned with the barbell. Using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) that is wider than shoulder width, unlock the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your upper chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

instrucoes: Position a Smith machine bar a couple pés off of the ground. Ensure that it is resting on the safeties. After loading the bar to an appropriate peso, lie underneath the bar. Place the middle of your pés on the bar, tucking your joelhos to your peito. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by driving through your pés to move the bar upward, extending the quadris and joelhos. Do not lock out your joelhos.
At the top of the motion, pause briefly before returning to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a Smith machine bar a couple feet off of the ground. Ensure that it is resting on the safeties. After loading the bar to an appropriate weight, lie underneath the bar. Place the middle of your feet on the bar, tucking your knees to your chest. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by driving through your feet to move the bar upward, extending the hips and knees. Do not lock out your knees.
At the top of the motion, pause briefly before returning to the starting position.

nome: Smith na máquina One-Arm Upright remada
instrucoes: With the bar at thigh level, load an appropriate peso.

Take a wide grip on the bar and unhook the peso, removing your off mão from the bar. Your braço should be extended as you stand up straight with your head and peito up. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing the elbow, raising the upper braço with the elbow pointed out. Continue until your upper braço is parallel to the chão.
After a brief pause, return the peso to the posição inicial.
Repita for the número desejado de repetições before engaging the hooks to rack the peso.
instrucoesOriginais: With the bar at thigh level, load an appropriate weight.

Take a wide grip on the bar and unhook the weight, removing your off hand from the bar. Your arm should be extended as you stand up straight with your head and chest up. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the elbow, raising the upper arm with the elbow pointed out. Continue until your upper arm is parallel to the floor.
After a brief pause, return the weight to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions before engaging the hooks to rack the weight.

nome: Smith na máquina Overhead desenvolvimento de ombros
instrucoes: To begin, place a flat bench (or preferably one with costas support) underneath a smith machine. Position the barra at a height so that when seated on the flat bench, the braços must be almost fully extended to reach the barra.

Once you have the correct height, sit slightly in behind the barra so that there is an imaginary straight line from the tip of your nose to the barra. Your pés should be stationary. Grab the barra with the palms facing forward, unlock it and lift it up so that your braços are fully extended. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente begin to lower the barra until it is level with your chin while inhaling.
Then lift the barra costas to the posição inicial using your ombros while exhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, place a flat bench (or preferably one with back support) underneath a smith machine. Position the barbell at a height so that when seated on the flat bench, the arms must be almost fully extended to reach the barbell.

Once you have the correct height, sit slightly in behind the barbell so that there is an imaginary straight line from the tip of your nose to the barbell. Your feet should be stationary. Grab the barbell with the palms facing forward, unlock it and lift it up so that your arms are fully extended. This is the starting position.
Slowly begin to lower the barbell until it is level with your chin while inhaling.
Then lift the barbell back to the starting position using your shoulders while exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, first set the bar to a posição that best matches your height. Step under it and posição the bar across the costas of your ombros.
Take the bar with your mãos facing forward, unlock it and lift it off the rack by extending your pernas. 3

Move one foot forward about 12 inches in front of the bar. Extend the other perna out in front of you, holding it off the ground. Look forward at all times and maintain a neutral or slightly arched spine. This will be your posição inicial.
Maintaining good posture, lower yourself by flexing the knee and hip, going down as far as flexibility allows.
Faça uma pausa briefly at the bottom and then return to the posição inicial by driving through the heel of your foot, extending the knee and hip.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, first set the bar to a position that best matches your height. Step under it and position the bar across the back of your shoulders.
Take the bar with your hands facing forward, unlock it and lift it off the rack by extending your legs. 3

Move one foot forward about 12 inches in front of the bar. Extend the other leg out in front of you, holding it off the ground. Look forward at all times and maintain a neutral or slightly arched spine. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining good posture, lower yourself by flexing the knee and hip, going down as far as flexibility allows.
Pause briefly at the bottom and then return to the starting position by driving through the heel of your foot, extending the knee and hip.

nome: Smith na máquina Reverse Calf elevaçãos
instrucoes: Adjust the barra on the smith machine to fit your height and align a raised platform right under the bar.
Stand on the platform with the heels of your pés secured on top of it with the balls of your pés extending off it. Position your toes facing forward with a shoulder width stance.

Now, place your ombros under the barra while maintaining the foot posiçãoing described and push the barra up by extending your quadris and joelhos until your tronco is standing erect. The joelhos should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: The barra on your costas is only for balance purposes.

Eleve the balls of your pés as you expire by extending your toes as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Segure the contracted posição for a second before you start to go costas down.
Lentamente go costas down to the posição inicial as you inspire by lowering the balls of your pés and toes.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to fit your height and align a raised platform right under the bar.
Stand on the platform with the heels of your feet secured on top of it with the balls of your feet extending off it. Position your toes facing forward with a shoulder width stance.

Now, place your shoulders under the barbell while maintaining the foot positioning described and push the barbell up by extending your hips and knees until your torso is standing erect. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your starting position. Tip: The barbell on your back is only for balance purposes.

Raise the balls of your feet as you breathe out by extending your toes as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go back down.
Slowly go back down to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering the balls of your feet and toes.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, first set the bar on the height that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Position your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, first set the bar on the height that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Smith na máquina Stiff-Legged levantamento terra
instrucoes: To begin, set the bar on the smith machine to a height that is around the middle of your thighs. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, grasp the bar using a pronated (palms forward) grip that is shoulder width apart. You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of peso.

Levante the bar up by fully extending your braços while keeping your costas straight. Stand with your tronco straight and your pernas spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The joelhos should be slightly bent. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the joelhos stationary, lower the barra to over the top of your pés by bending at the waist while keeping your costas straight. Mantenha moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the chão until you feel a stretch on the hamstrings. Exhale as you perform this movimento

Start bringing your tronco up straight again as soon as you feel the hamstrings stretch by extending your quadris and waist until you are costas at the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, set the bar on the smith machine to a height that is around the middle of your thighs. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, grasp the bar using a pronated (palms forward) grip that is shoulder width apart. You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of weight.

Lift the bar up by fully extending your arms while keeping your back straight. Stand with your torso straight and your legs spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The knees should be slightly bent. This is your starting position.

Keeping the knees stationary, lower the barbell to over the top of your feet by bending at the waist while keeping your back straight. Keep moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the floor until you feel a stretch on the hamstrings. Exhale as you perform this movement

Start bringing your torso up straight again as soon as you feel the hamstrings stretch by extending your hips and waist until you are back at the starting position. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, set the bar on the smith machine to a height that is around the middle of your thighs. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, grasp the bar using a pronated (palms forward) grip that is shoulder width apart. You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of peso.
Levante the barra up and fully extend your braços with your costas straight. There should be a slight bend at the cotovelos. This is the posição inicial.

Use your side ombros to lift the bar as you exhale. The bar should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until it nearly touches your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion. As you lift the bar, your cotovelos should always be higher than your forebraços. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the bar costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, set the bar on the smith machine to a height that is around the middle of your thighs. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, grasp the bar using a pronated (palms forward) grip that is shoulder width apart. You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of weight.
Lift the barbell up and fully extend your arms with your back straight. There should be a slight bend at the elbows. This is the starting position.

Use your side shoulders to lift the bar as you exhale. The bar should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until it nearly touches your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the bar, your elbows should always be higher than your forearms. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the bar back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, place a flat bench 2-3 pés behind the smith machine. Then, set the bar on the height that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.
Position your pernas by placing one foot slightly forward under the bar and extending your other perna costas and place the top of your foot on the bench. This will be your posição inicial

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the knee as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calf becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knee should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knee is past that imaginary line (if it is past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten your perna again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch pernas and repeat the movimento.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, place a flat bench 2-3 feet behind the smith machine. Then, set the bar on the height that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side (palms facing forward), unlock it and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.
Position your legs by placing one foot slightly forward under the bar and extending your other leg back and place the top of your foot on the bench. This will be your starting position

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knee as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calf becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knee should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knee is past that imaginary line (if it is past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten your leg again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch legs and repeat the movement.

instrucoes: Place your pés at a shoulder width stance with the barra resting right above the connection between the toes and the rest of the foot.

With a palms facing down grip, bend at the joelhos and keeping the costas flat grab the bar using a wider than shoulder width grip. Bring the quadris down and make sure that your body drops as if you were going to sit on a chair. This will be your posição inicial.
Start pushing the chão as if it were a moving platform with your pés and simultaneously start lifting the barra keeping it close to your pernas.
As the bar reaches the middle of your thighs, push the chão with your pernas and lift your body to a complete extension in an explosive motion.
Levante your ombros costas in a shrugging movimento as you bring the bar up while lifting your cotovelos out to the side and keeping them above the bar for as long as possible.

Now in a very quick but powerful motion, you have to get your body under the barra when it has reached a high enough point where it can be controlled and drop while locking your braços and holding the barra overhead as you assume a squat posição.
Finalize the movimento by rising up out of the squat posição to finish the lift. At the end of the lift both pés should be on line and the braços fully extended holding the barra overhead.
instrucoesOriginais: Place your feet at a shoulder width stance with the barbell resting right above the connection between the toes and the rest of the foot.

With a palms facing down grip, bend at the knees and keeping the back flat grab the bar using a wider than shoulder width grip. Bring the hips down and make sure that your body drops as if you were going to sit on a chair. This will be your starting position.
Start pushing the floor as if it were a moving platform with your feet and simultaneously start lifting the barbell keeping it close to your legs.
As the bar reaches the middle of your thighs, push the floor with your legs and lift your body to a complete extension in an explosive motion.
Lift your shoulders back in a shrugging movement as you bring the bar up while lifting your elbows out to the side and keeping them above the bar for as long as possible.

Now in a very quick but powerful motion, you have to get your body under the barbell when it has reached a high enough point where it can be controlled and drop while locking your arms and holding the barbell overhead as you assume a squat position.
Finalize the movement by rising up out of the squat position to finish the lift. At the end of the lift both feet should be on line and the arms fully extended holding the barbell overhead.

instrucoes: Comece with the pés in the pulling posição, the bar racked across the costas of the ombros, and the mãos placed in a wide snatch grip.
Pop the bar with an abrupt dip and drive of the joelhos, and aggressively drive under the bar, transitioning the pés into the receiving posição.
Receive the bar locked out overhead near the bottom of the squat. The tronco should remain vertical, lowering the quadris between the pernas.
Continue to descend to full depth, and return to a standing posição. Carefully lower the peso.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with the feet in the pulling position, the bar racked across the back of the shoulders, and the hands placed in a wide snatch grip.
Pop the bar with an abrupt dip and drive of the knees, and aggressively drive under the bar, transitioning the feet into the receiving position.
