Receive the bar locked out overhead near the bottom of the squat. The torso should remain vertical, lowering the hips between the legs.
Continue to descend to full depth, and return to a standing position. Carefully lower the weight.

instrucoes: The snatch deadlift strengthens the first pull of the snatch. Comece with a wide snatch grip with the barra placed on the platform. The pés should be directly under the quadris, with the pés turned out. Squat down to the bar, keeping the costas in absolute extension with the head facing forward.
Initiate the movimento by driving through the heels, raising the quadris. The costas angle should remain the same until the bar passes the joelhos.
At that point, drive your quadris through the bar as you lay costas. Retorne the bar to the platform by reversing the motion.
instrucoesOriginais: The snatch deadlift strengthens the first pull of the snatch. Begin with a wide snatch grip with the barbell placed on the platform. The feet should be directly under the hips, with the feet turned out. Squat down to the bar, keeping the back in absolute extension with the head facing forward.
Initiate the movement by driving through the heels, raising the hips. The back angle should remain the same until the bar passes the knees.
At that point, drive your hips through the bar as you lay back. Return the bar to the platform by reversing the motion.

instrucoes: With a barra on the chão close to the shins, take a wide snatch grip. Abaixe your quadris with the peso focused on the heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with your ombros just in front of the bar. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your joelhos. Your costas angle should stay the same, and your braços should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the joelhos.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the pull. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh posição, begin extending through the quadris. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the quadris, joelhos, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward.

There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas. Full extension should be violent and abrupt, and ensure that you do not prolong the extension for longer than necessary.
instrucoesOriginais: With a barbell on the floor close to the shins, take a wide snatch grip. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight. Move the weight with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the pull. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward.

There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back. Full extension should be violent and abrupt, and ensure that you do not prolong the extension for longer than necessary.

instrucoes: Comece with a wide grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh posição. You can use a hook or overmão grip. Your costas should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Shrug your ombros towards your ears. While this exercise can usually by loaded with heavier peso than a snatch, avoid overloading to the point that the execution slows down.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a wide grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh position. You can use a hook or overhand grip. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Shrug your shoulders towards your ears. While this exercise can usually by loaded with heavier weight than a snatch, avoid overloading to the point that the execution slows down.

instrucoes: Comece with a loaded barra on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The pés should be directly below the quadris, with the pés turned out as needed. Abaixe the quadris, with the peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar, with the cotovelos pointed out. This will be the posição inicial.
Comece the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the quadris joelhos and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the cotovelos to flex to the side.

As you move your pés into the receiving posição, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The pés should move to just outside the quadris, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Mantenhaing the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and peito up, drive through heels of the pés to move to a standing posição. Carefully return the peso to the boxes.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar, with the elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to the boxes.

instrucoes: For this exercise anchor a band to the ground. We used an incline bench and anchored the band to the base, standing over the bench. Alternatively, this could be performed standing on the band.
To begin, pull the band behind your head, holding it with a pronated grip and your cotovelos up. This will be your posição inicial.
To perform the movimento, extend through the elbow to to straighten your braços, ensuring that you keep your upper braço in place.
Faça uma pausa, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise anchor a band to the ground. We used an incline bench and anchored the band to the base, standing over the bench. Alternatively, this could be performed standing on the band.
To begin, pull the band behind your head, holding it with a pronated grip and your elbows up. This will be your starting position.
To perform the movement, extend through the elbow to to straighten your arms, ensuring that you keep your upper arm in place.
Pause, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Attach bands to the bar that are securely anchored near the ground. You may need to choke the bands to get adequate tension.

Use a box of an appropriate height for this exercise. Load the bar to a peso that still requires effort, but isn't so heavy that speed is compromised. Typically, that will be between 50-70% of your one rep max.
Position the bar on your upper costas, shoulder blades retracted, costas arched and everything tight head to toe. This will be the posição inicial.
Unrack the bar and posição yourself in front of the box. Sit costas with your quadris until you are seated on the box, ensuring that you descend under control and don't crash onto the surface.
Faça uma pausa briefly, and explode off of the box, extending through the quadris and joelhos.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach bands to the bar that are securely anchored near the ground. You may need to choke the bands to get adequate tension.

Use a box of an appropriate height for this exercise. Load the bar to a weight that still requires effort, but isn't so heavy that speed is compromised. Typically, that will be between 50-70% of your one rep max.
Position the bar on your upper back, shoulder blades retracted, back arched and everything tight head to toe. This will be the starting position.
Unrack the bar and position yourself in front of the box. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box, ensuring that you descend under control and don't crash onto the surface.
Pause briefly, and explode off of the box, extending through the hips and knees.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Comece to lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Comece to raise the bar as fast as possible without involving momentum as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial. Note: You should perform these exercises as fast as possible but without breaking perfect form and without involving momentum.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Begin to raise the bar as fast as possible without involving momentum as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position. Note: You should perform these exercises as fast as possible but without breaking perfect form and without involving momentum.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Segure a halter in each mão with a pronated grip. Your pés should be wide with your quadris and joelhos extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by pulling both of the halters to one side next to your hip, rotating your tronco.
Mantenhaing your braços straight and the halters parallel to the ground, rotate your tronco to swing the pesos to your opposite side.
Continue alternating, rotating from one side to the other until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a pronated grip. Your feet should be wide with your hips and knees extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by pulling both of the dumbbells to one side next to your hip, rotating your torso.
Keeping your arms straight and the dumbbells parallel to the ground, rotate your torso to swing the weights to your opposite side.
Continue alternating, rotating from one side to the other until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Comece in a prone posição on the chão. Support your peso on your mãos and toes, with your pés together and your body straight. Your braços should be bent to 90 degrees. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento by raising one foot off of the ground. Externally rotate the perna and bring the knee toward your elbow, as far forward as possible.
Retorne this perna to the posição inicial and repeat on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a prone position on the floor. Support your weight on your hands and toes, with your feet together and your body straight. Your arms should be bent to 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by raising one foot off of the ground. Externally rotate the leg and bring the knee toward your elbow, as far forward as possible.
Return this leg to the starting position and repeat on the opposite side.

instrucoes: Start out by setting the bar on the part of the preacher bench that you would normally sit on. Make sure to align the barra properly so that it is balanced and will not fall off.

Move to the front side of the preacher bench (the part where the braços usually lay) and posição yourself to lay at a 45 degree slant with your tronco and stomach pressed against the front side of the preacher bench.
Make sure that your pés (especially the toes) are well posiçãoed on the chão and place your upper braços on top of the pad located on the inside part of the preacher bench.
Use your braços to grab the barra with a supinated grip (palms facing up) at about shoulder width apart or slightly closer from each other.
Lentamente begin to lift the barra upwards and exhale. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente begin to bring the barra costas to the posição inicial as your inspire. .
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by setting the bar on the part of the preacher bench that you would normally sit on. Make sure to align the barbell properly so that it is balanced and will not fall off.

Move to the front side of the preacher bench (the part where the arms usually lay) and position yourself to lay at a 45 degree slant with your torso and stomach pressed against the front side of the preacher bench.
Make sure that your feet (especially the toes) are well positioned on the floor and place your upper arms on top of the pad located on the inside part of the preacher bench.
Use your arms to grab the barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up) at about shoulder width apart or slightly closer from each other.
Slowly begin to lift the barbell upwards and exhale. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as your breathe in. .
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sit in a chair so your costas is straight and your pés planted on the chão.
Interlace your fingers behind your head, cotovelos out and your chin down.
Twist your upper body to one side about 3 times as far as you can. Then lean forward and twist your tronco to reach your elbow to the chão on the inside of your knee.
Retorne to upright posição and then repeat for your other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit in a chair so your back is straight and your feet planted on the floor.
Interlace your fingers behind your head, elbows out and your chin down.
Twist your upper body to one side about 3 times as far as you can. Then lean forward and twist your torso to reach your elbow to the floor on the inside of your knee.
Return to upright position and then repeat for your other side.

instrucoes: With a barra on the chão close to the shins, take an overmão grip just outside the pernas. Abaixe your quadris with the peso focused on the heels, costas straight, head facing forward, peito up, with your ombros just in front of the bar. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your joelhos. Your costas angle should stay the same, and your braços should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the joelhos.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh posição, begin extending through the quadris. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the quadris, joelhos, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the braços to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly costas, with the braços still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the braços with the cotovelos up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your cotovelos under the bar as you do so.

Receive the bar with the pés split, aggressively moving one foot forward and one foot costas. The bar should be racked onto the protracted ombros, lightly touching the throat with the mãos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom posição, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the tronco upright and cotovelos up. Bring the pés together as you stand up.
instrucoesOriginais: With a barbell on the floor close to the shins, take an overhand grip just outside the legs. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight. Move the weight with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back, with the arms still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so.

Receive the bar with the feet split, aggressively moving one foot forward and one foot back. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Bring the feet together as you stand up.

instrucoes: Standing with the peso racked on the front of the ombros, begin with the dip. With your pés directly under your quadris, flex the joelhos without moving the quadris costasward.

Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros. At this moment as the pés leave the chão, the pés must be placed into the receiving posição as quickly as possible.

In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should be moved to a split stance, one foot forward, one foot costas, with the joelhos partially bent. Receive the bar with the braços locked out overhead.
Retorne to a standing posição, bringing the pés together.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward.

Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders. At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible.

In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should be moved to a split stance, one foot forward, one foot back, with the knees partially bent. Receive the bar with the arms locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position, bringing the feet together.

instrucoes: Assume a lunge stance posição with one foot forward with the knee bent, and the rear knee nearly touching the ground.
Ensure that the front knee is over the midline of the foot.
Extending through both pernas, jump as high as possible, swinging your braços to gain lift.
As you jump, bring your pés together, and move them costas to their initial posiçãos as you land.
Absorb the impact by reverting costas to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Assume a lunge stance position with one foot forward with the knee bent, and the rear knee nearly touching the ground.
Ensure that the front knee is over the midline of the foot.
Extending through both legs, jump as high as possible, swinging your arms to gain lift.
As you jump, bring your feet together, and move them back to their initial positions as you land.
Absorb the impact by reverting back to the starting position.

instrucoes: Comece with a loaded barra on the chão. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The pés should be directly below the quadris, with the pés turned out as needed. Abaixe the quadris, with the peito up and the head looking forward. The ombros should be just in front of the bar. This will be the posição inicial.
Comece the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The costas angle should stay the same until the bar passes the joelhos.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the quadris joelhos and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the ombros and allow the cotovelos to flex to the side.

As you move your pés into the receiving posição, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The pés should move forcefully to a split posição, one foot forward one foot costas. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the braços fully extended overhead.
Mantenhaing the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and peito up, drive through heels of the pés to move to a standing posição, bringing your pés together.
Carefully return the peso to chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a loaded barbell on the floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The back angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move forcefully to a split position, one foot forward one foot back. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position, bringing your feet together.
Carefully return the weight to floor.

instrucoes: Position yourself into a staggered stance with the rear foot elevated and front foot forward.
Segure a halter in each mão, letting them hang at the sides. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by descending, flexing your knee and hip to lower your body down. Maintain good posture througout the movimento. Mantenha the front knee in line with the foot as you perform the exercise.
At the bottom of the movimento, drive through the heel to extend the knee and hip to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position yourself into a staggered stance with the rear foot elevated and front foot forward.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, letting them hang at the sides. This will be your starting position.
Begin by descending, flexing your knee and hip to lower your body down. Maintain good posture througout the movement. Keep the front knee in line with the foot as you perform the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, drive through the heel to extend the knee and hip to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Being in a standing posição. Jump into a split perna posição, with one perna forward and one perna costas, flexing the joelhos and lowering your quadris slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing costas up and jumping, reversing the posição of your pernas. Repita 5-10 times on each perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg back, flexing the knees and lowering your hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.

instrucoes: Standing with the peso racked on the front of the ombros, begin with the dip. With your pés directly under your quadris, flex the joelhos without moving the quadris costasward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the ombros.

At this moment as the pés leave the chão, the pés must be placed into the receiving posição as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pés are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The pés should move forcefully to just outside the quadris, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body in a full squat and the braços fully extended overhead.
Mantenhaing the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and peito up, drive throught heels of the pés to move to a standing posição. Carefully return the peso to chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders.

At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete's effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should move forcefully to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body in a full squat and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive throught heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to floor.

instrucoes: Set up the bands on the sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or halters so that there is appropriate tension.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wide for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Mantenha your head facing forward.

With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Abaixe bar posição necessitates a greater tronco lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Set up the bands on the sleeves, secured to either band pegs, the rack, or dumbbells so that there is appropriate tension.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

instrucoes: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the chão at the top of the movimento.

Comece by stepping under the bar and placing it across the costas of the ombros. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your cotovelos forward, attempting to bend the bar across your ombros. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower costas, and step costas into posição. Place your pés wide for more emphasis on the costas, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Mantenha your head facing forward.

With your costas, ombros, and core tight, push your joelhos and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit costas with your quadris as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Abaixe bar posição necessitates a greater tronco lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Mantenhaing the peso on your heels and pushing your pés and joelhos out, drive upward as you lead the movimento with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

instrucoes: To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Position a peso plate on the ground a couple pés costas from the rack. Once the bar is loaded, step under it and place the costas of your ombros across it.
Segure on to the bar with both mãos and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straighten your tronco.
Step away from the rack and adopt a wide stance with the toes slightly pointed out, with one foot on the peso plate. Mantenha your head up at all times. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos and quadris. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees.
Eleve the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heels of your pés as you extend the quadris and joelhos.
At the top of the movimento, side step, bringing your pés together on the opposite side of the plate.
Using your inside foot, push the peso plate, sliding it across the chão to where you were just standing.
Place your inside foot on the peso plate, adopting a wide stance for the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Position a weight plate on the ground a couple feet back from the rack. Once the bar is loaded, step under it and place the back of your shoulders across it.
Hold on to the bar with both hands and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straighten your torso.
Step away from the rack and adopt a wide stance with the toes slightly pointed out, with one foot on the weight plate. Keep your head up at all times. This will be your starting position.
Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees.
Raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heels of your feet as you extend the hips and knees.
At the top of the movement, side step, bringing your feet together on the opposite side of the plate.
Using your inside foot, push the weight plate, sliding it across the floor to where you were just standing.
Place your inside foot on the weight plate, adopting a wide stance for the next repetition.

instrucoes: To start out, make sure that the exercise band is at an even split between both the left and right side of the body. To do this, use your mãos to grab both sides of the band and place both pés in the middle of the band. Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other.

When holding the bands, they should be the same height on each side. You should be using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) and have the mãoles of the bands next to your face for this exercise. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente start to bend the joelhos and lower the pernas so that your thighs are parallel to the chão while exhaling.
Use the heel of your pés to push your body up to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To start out, make sure that the exercise band is at an even split between both the left and right side of the body. To do this, use your hands to grab both sides of the band and place both feet in the middle of the band. Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.

When holding the bands, they should be the same height on each side. You should be using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) and have the handles of the bands next to your face for this exercise. This is the starting position.
Slowly start to bend the knees and lower the legs so that your thighs are parallel to the floor while exhaling.
Use the heel of your feet to push your body up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, step onto the stairmaster and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise.

Pump your pernas up and down in an established rhythm, driving the pedals down but not all the way to the chão. It is recommended that you maintain your grip on the mãoles so that you don't fall. The mãoles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Stairmasters offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, step onto the stairmaster and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise.

Pump your legs up and down in an established rhythm, driving the pedals down but not all the way to the floor. It is recommended that you maintain your grip on the handles so that you don't fall. The handles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Stairmasters offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.

instrucoes: Stand with a halter in each mão. Eleve the halters to your ombros with your palms facing forward and your cotovelos pointed out. This will be your posição inicial.
Extend one braço to press the halter straight up, keeping your off mão in place. Do not lean or jerk the peso during the movimento.
After a brief pause, return the peso to the posição inicial.
Repita for the opposite side, continuing to alternate between braços.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand. Raise the dumbbells to your shoulders with your palms facing forward and your elbows pointed out. This will be your starting position.
Extend one arm to press the dumbbell straight up, keeping your off hand in place. Do not lean or jerk the weight during the movement.
After a brief pause, return the weight to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side, continuing to alternate between arms.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the bar on the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck).
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. The joelhos should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your posição inicial. Dica: For better range of motion you may also place the ball of your pés on a wooden block but be careful as this option requires more balance and a sturdy block.

Eleve your heels as you expire by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Segure the contracted posição by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inspire by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the bar on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. This will be your starting position. Tip: For better range of motion you may also place the ball of your feet on a wooden block but be careful as this option requires more balance and a sturdy block.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Standing com barra press Behind Neck
instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for easier pick up of the bar. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Your costas should be kept straight while performing this exercise. This will be your posição inicial.
Elevate the barra overhead by fully extending your braços while breathing out.
Segure the contraction for a second and lower the barra costas down to the posição inicial by inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for easier pick up of the bar. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Your back should be kept straight while performing this exercise. This will be your starting position.
Elevate the barbell overhead by fully extending your arms while breathing out.
Hold the contraction for a second and lower the barbell back down to the starting position by inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Standing Bent-Over One-Arm com halter Triceps Extension
nomeOriginal: Standing Bent-Over One-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instrucoes: With a halter in one mão and the palm facing your tronco, flexione os joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper braço should be close to the tronco and parallel to the chão while the forebraço is pointing towards the chão as the mão holds the peso. Dica: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forebraço and the upper braço. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, use the triceps to lift the pesos as you exhale until the forebraços are parallel to the chão and the whole braço is extended. Like many other braço exercises, only the forebraço moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the halter costas to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: With a dumbbell in one hand and the palm facing your torso, bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arm should be close to the torso and parallel to the floor while the forearm is pointing towards the floor as the hand holds the weight. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm. This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arms stationary, use the triceps to lift the weights as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

nome: Standing Bent-Over Two-Arm com halter Triceps Extension
nomeOriginal: Standing Bent-Over Two-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instrucoes: With a halter in each mão and the palms facing your tronco, flexione os joelhos slightly and bring your tronco forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the costas straight until it is almost parallel to the chão. Make sure that you keep the head up. The upper braços should be close to the tronco and parallel to the chão while the forebraços are pointing towards the chão as the mãos hold the pesos. Dica: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forebraços and the upper braço. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, use the triceps to lift the pesos as you exhale until the forebraços are parallel to the chão and the whole braços are extended. Like many other braço exercises, only the forebraço moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the halters costas to their posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: With a dumbbell in each hand and the palms facing your torso, bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Make sure that you keep the head up. The upper arms should be close to the torso and parallel to the floor while the forearms are pointing towards the floor as the hands hold the weights. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearms and the upper arm. This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arms stationary, use the triceps to lift the weights as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arms are extended. Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells back to their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright while holding a cable curl bar that is attached to a low pulley. Grab the cable bar at shoulder width and keep the cotovelos close to the tronco. The palm of your mãos should be facing up (supinated grip). This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Lentamente begin to bring the curl bar costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright while holding a cable curl bar that is attached to a low pulley. Grab the cable bar at shoulder width and keep the elbows close to the torso. The palm of your hands should be facing up (supinated grip). This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the curl bar back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Clasp your mãos behind your costas with your palms together, straighten braços and then rotate them so your palms face downward.
Eleve your braços up and hold until you feel a stretch in your biceps.
instrucoesOriginais: Clasp your hands behind your back with your palms together, straighten arms and then rotate them so your palms face downward.
Raise your arms up and hold until you feel a stretch in your biceps.

instrucoes: Place a loaded bar at shoulder level in a rack. With a pronated grip at shoulder width, begin with the bar racked across the front of your ombros. This is your posição inicial.
Initiate the lift by extending the cotovelos to press the bar overhead. Avoid locking out the elbow as you move the peso behind your head.
Abaixe the bar down to the costas of the head until your elbow forms a right angle.
Levante the bar costas over your head by extending the cotovelos
Abaixe the bar down to the posição inicial.
Alternate in this manner until you complete the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a loaded bar at shoulder level in a rack. With a pronated grip at shoulder width, begin with the bar racked across the front of your shoulders. This is your starting position.
Initiate the lift by extending the elbows to press the bar overhead. Avoid locking out the elbow as you move the weight behind your head.
Lower the bar down to the back of the head until your elbow forms a right angle.
Lift the bar back over your head by extending the elbows
Lower the bar down to the starting position.
Alternate in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Position dual pulleys to peito height and select an appropriate peso. Stand a foot or two in front of the cables, holding one in each mão. You can stagger your stance for better stability.
Position the upper braço at a 90 degree angle with the shoulder blades together. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing the rest of the body stationary, extend through the cotovelos to press the mãoles forward, drawing them together in front of you.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position dual pulleys to chest height and select an appropriate weight. Stand a foot or two in front of the cables, holding one in each hand. You can stagger your stance for better stability.
Position the upper arm at a 90 degree angle with the shoulder blades together. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the rest of the body stationary, extend through the elbows to press the handles forward, drawing them together in front of you.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Connect a standard mãole on a tower, and move the cable to the lowest pulley posição.

With your side to the cable, grab the mãole with one mão and step away from the tower. You should be approximately braço's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the peso on the cable. Your outstretched braço should be aligned with the cable.
With your pés posiçãoed shoulder width apart, squat down and grab the mãole with both mãos. Your braços should still be fully extended.
In one motion, pull the mãole up and across your body until your braços are in a fully-extended posição above your head.
Mantenha your costas straight and your braços close to your body as you pivot your costas foot and straighten your pernas to get a full range of motion.
Retract your braços and then your body. Retorne to the neutral posição in a slow and controlled manner.
Repita to failure.
Then, reposição and repeat the same series of movimentos on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a standard handle on a tower, and move the cable to the lowest pulley position.

With your side to the cable, grab the handle with one hand and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the weight on the cable. Your outstretched arm should be aligned with the cable.
With your feet positioned shoulder width apart, squat down and grab the handle with both hands. Your arms should still be fully extended.
In one motion, pull the handle up and across your body until your arms are in a fully-extended position above your head.
Keep your back straight and your arms close to your body as you pivot your back foot and straighten your legs to get a full range of motion.
Retract your arms and then your body. Return to the neutral position in a slow and controlled manner.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements on the opposite side.

instrucoes: Connect a standard mãole to a tower, and move the cable to the highest pulley posição.

With your side to the cable, grab the mãole with one mão and step away from the tower. You should be approximately braço's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the peso on the cable. Your outstretched braço should be aligned with the cable.
With your pés posiçãoed shoulder width apart, reach upward with your other mão and grab the mãole with both mãos. Your braços should still be fully extended.
In one motion, pull the mãole down and across your body to your front knee while rotating your tronco.
Mantenha your costas and braços straight and core tight while you pivot your costas foot and flexione os joelhos to get a full range of motion.
Maintain your stance and straight braços. Retorne to the neutral posição in a slow and controlled manner.
Repita to failure.
Then, reposição and repeat the same series of movimentos on the opposite side.
instrucoesOriginais: Connect a standard handle to a tower, and move the cable to the highest pulley position.

With your side to the cable, grab the handle with one hand and step away from the tower. You should be approximately arm's length away from the pulley, with the tension of the weight on the cable. Your outstretched arm should be aligned with the cable.
With your feet positioned shoulder width apart, reach upward with your other hand and grab the handle with both hands. Your arms should still be fully extended.
In one motion, pull the handle down and across your body to your front knee while rotating your torso.
Keep your back and arms straight and core tight while you pivot your back foot and bend your knees to get a full range of motion.
Maintain your stance and straight arms. Return to the neutral position in a slow and controlled manner.
Repeat to failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements on the opposite side.

instrucoes: Adjust the padded lever of the calf raise machine to fit your height.

Place your ombros under the pads provided and posição your toes facing forward (or using any of the two other posiçãos described at the beginning of the chapter). The balls of your pés should be secured on top of the calf block with the heels extending off it. Push the lever up by extending your quadris and joelhos until your tronco is standing erect. The joelhos should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. Toes should be facing forward, outwards or inwards as described at the beginning of the chapter. This will be your posição inicial.

Eleve your heels as you expire by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Segure the contracted posição by a second before you start to go costas down.
Go costas slowly to the posição inicial as you inspire by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the padded lever of the calf raise machine to fit your height.

Place your shoulders under the pads provided and position your toes facing forward (or using any of the two other positions described at the beginning of the chapter). The balls of your feet should be secured on top of the calf block with the heels extending off it. Push the lever up by extending your hips and knees until your torso is standing erect. The knees should be kept with a slight bend; never locked. Toes should be facing forward, outwards or inwards as described at the beginning of the chapter. This will be your starting position.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times. There should be no bending at any time. Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Taking a halter in your working mão, lean forward. Allow your working braço to hang perpendicular to the ground with the elbow pointing out. This will be your posição inicial.
Flex the elbow to curl the peso, keeping the upper braço stationary. At the top of the repetition, flex the biceps and pause.
Abaixe the halter costas to the posição inicial.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Taking a dumbbell in your working hand, lean forward. Allow your working arm to hang perpendicular to the ground with the elbow pointing out. This will be your starting position.
Flex the elbow to curl the weight, keeping the upper arm stationary. At the top of the repetition, flex the biceps and pause.
Lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your tronco upright holding two halters in your mãos by your sides. Place the ball of the foot on a sturdy and stable wooden board (that is around 2-3 inches tall) while your heels extend off and touch the chão. This will be your posição inicial.

With the toes pointing either straight (to hit all parts equally), inwards (for emphasis on the outer head) or outwards (for emphasis on the inner head), raise the heels off the chão as you exhale by contraindo the calves. Segure the top contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go costas to the posição inicial by slowly lowering the heels.
Repita for the recommended amount of times.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your torso upright holding two dumbbells in your hands by your sides. Place the ball of the foot on a sturdy and stable wooden board (that is around 2-3 inches tall) while your heels extend off and touch the floor. This will be your starting position.

With the toes pointing either straight (to hit all parts equally), inwards (for emphasis on the outer head) or outwards (for emphasis on the inner head), raise the heels off the floor as you exhale by contracting the calves. Hold the top contraction for a second.
As you inhale, go back to the starting position by slowly lowering the heels.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

instrucoes: Standing with your pés shoulder width apart, take a halter in each mão. Eleve the halters to head height, the cotovelos out and about 90 degrees. This will be your posição inicial.
Maintaining strict technique with no perna drive or leaning costas, extend through the elbow to raise the pesos together directly above your head.
Faça uma pausa, and slowly return the peso to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing with your feet shoulder width apart, take a dumbbell in each hand. Raise the dumbbells to head height, the elbows out and about 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining strict technique with no leg drive or leaning back, extend through the elbow to raise the weights together directly above your head.
Pause, and slowly return the weight to the starting position.

instrucoes: To begin, stand straight with a halter in each mão using a pronated grip (palms facing down). Your braços should be fully extended while your pés are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand straight with a dumbbell in each hand using a pronated grip (palms facing down). Your arms should be fully extended while your feet are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.

While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the muscle.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Standing com halter Straight-Arm Front Delt elevação Above Head
nomeOriginal: Standing Dumbbell Straight-Arm Front Delt Raise Above Head
instrucoes: Segure the halters in front of your thighs, palms facing your thighs.
Mantenha your braços straight with a slight bend at the cotovelos but keep them locked. This will be your posição inicial.
Eleve the halters in a semicircular motion to braço's length overhead as you exhale.
Lentamente return to the posição inicial using the same path as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold the dumbbells in front of your thighs, palms facing your thighs.
Keep your arms straight with a slight bend at the elbows but keep them locked. This will be your starting position.
Raise the dumbbells in a semicircular motion to arm's length overhead as you exhale.
Slowly return to the starting position using the same path as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, stand up with a halter held by both mãos. Your pés should be about shoulder width apart from each other. Lentamente use both mãos to grab the halter and lift it over your head until both braços are fully extended.
The resistance should be resting in the palms of your mãos with your thumbs around it. The palm of the mãos should be facing up towards the ceiling. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your upper braços close to your head with cotovelos in and perpendicular to the chão, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forebraços touch your biceps. Dica: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forebraços should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the posição inicial by using the triceps to raise the halter. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand up with a dumbbell held by both hands. Your feet should be about shoulder width apart from each other. Slowly use both hands to grab the dumbbell and lift it over your head until both arms are fully extended.
The resistance should be resting in the palms of your hands with your thumbs around it. The palm of the hands should be facing up towards the ceiling. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arms close to your head with elbows in and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the dumbbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grasp a halter in each mão with a pronated (palms forward) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The halters should be resting on top of your thighs. Your braços should be extended with a slight bend at the cotovelos and your costas should be straight. This will be your posição inicial.

Use your side ombros to lift the halters as you exhale. The halters should be close to the body as you move it up and the cotovelos should drive the motion. Continue to lift them until they nearly touch your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion. As you lift the halters, your cotovelos should always be higher than your forebraços. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the halters costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grasp a dumbbell in each hand with a pronated (palms forward) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The dumbbells should be resting on top of your thighs. Your arms should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and your back should be straight. This will be your starting position.

Use your side shoulders to lift the dumbbells as you exhale. The dumbbells should be close to the body as you move it up and the elbows should drive the motion. Continue to lift them until they nearly touch your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the dumbbells, your elbows should always be higher than your forearms. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbells back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start by standing with your costas about two to three pés away from a bench or step.
Levante one perna behind you and rest your foot on the step,either on your instep or the ball of your foot, whichever you find most comfortable.
Mantenha your supporting knee slightly bent and avoid letting that knee extend out beyond your toes. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by standing with your back about two to three feet away from a bench or step.
Lift one leg behind you and rest your foot on the step,either on your instep or the ball of your foot, whichever you find most comfortable.
Keep your supporting knee slightly bent and avoid letting that knee extend out beyond your toes. Switch sides.

nome: Standing Front com barra elevação Over Head
nomeOriginal: Standing Front Barbell Raise Over Head
instrucoes: To begin, stand straight with a barra in your mãos. You should grip the bar with palms facing down and a closer than shoulder width grip apart from each other.
Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Your cotovelos should be slightly bent. This is the posição inicial.
Levante the barra up until it is directly over your head while exhaling. Make sure to keep your cotovelos slightly bent when performing each repetition.
Once you feel the contraction, begin to lower the barra costas down to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand straight with a barbell in your hands. You should grip the bar with palms facing down and a closer than shoulder width grip apart from each other.
Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other. Your elbows should be slightly bent. This is the starting position.
Lift the barbell up until it is directly over your head while exhaling. Make sure to keep your elbows slightly bent when performing each repetition.
Once you feel the contraction, begin to lower the barbell back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place your right heel on a step with your knee extended and lean forward to grab your right toe with your right mão. Your left knee should be slightly bent and your costas should be straight.
Support your peso on your left perna and place your left mão on your left thigh.
Pull your right toes toward your knee until you feel a stretch in your calf.
instrucoesOriginais: Place your right heel on a step with your knee extended and lean forward to grab your right toe with your right hand. Your left knee should be slightly bent and your back should be straight.
Support your weight on your left leg and place your left hand on your left thigh.
Pull your right toes toward your knee until you feel a stretch in your calf.

instrucoes: Being by looping a belt, band, or rope around one foot. While standing, place that foot forward.
Bend your costas perna, while keeping the front one straight. Now raise the toes of your front foot off of the ground and lean forward.
Using the belt, pull on the top of the foot to increase the stretch in the calf. Segure for 10-20 seconds and repeat with the other foot.
instrucoesOriginais: Being by looping a belt, band, or rope around one foot. While standing, place that foot forward.
Bend your back leg, while keeping the front one straight. Now raise the toes of your front foot off of the ground and lean forward.
Using the belt, pull on the top of the foot to increase the stretch in the calf. Hold for 10-20 seconds and repeat with the other foot.

instrucoes: Comece standing on one perna, holding to a vertical support.
Eleve the unsupported knee to 90 degrees. This will be your posição inicial.
Open the hip as far as possible, attempting to make a big circle with your knee.
Perform this movimento slowly for a number of repetitions, and repeat on the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin standing on one leg, holding to a vertical support.
Raise the unsupported knee to 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Open the hip as far as possible, attempting to make a big circle with your knee.
Perform this movement slowly for a number of repetitions, and repeat on the other side.

instrucoes: Fique em pé straight with the spine vertical, the left foot slightly in front of the right.

Bend both joelhos and lift the costas heel off the chão as you press the right hip forward. You can't get a thorough, deep stretch in this posição, however, because it's hard to relax the hip flexor and stand on it at the same time. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up straight with the spine vertical, the left foot slightly in front of the right.

Bend both knees and lift the back heel off the floor as you press the right hip forward. You can't get a thorough, deep stretch in this position, however, because it's hard to relax the hip flexor and stand on it at the same time. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with a halter in each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco. Your pernas should be at about shoulder's width apart from each other.
Rotate the palms of the mãos so that they are facing inward in a neutral posição. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos out while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Your wrist should turn so that when the pesos are fully elevated you have supinated grip (palms facing up).
Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level. Dica: Mantenha the forebraços aligned with your outer deltoids.
Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to the posição inicial as your inspire. Remember to rotate the wrists as you lower the peso in order to switch costas to a neutral grip.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with a dumbbell in each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso. Your legs should be at about shoulder's width apart from each other.
Rotate the palms of the hands so that they are facing inward in a neutral position. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights out while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Your wrist should turn so that when the weights are fully elevated you have supinated grip (palms facing up).
Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Tip: Keep the forearms aligned with your outer deltoids.
Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in. Remember to rotate the wrists as you lower the weight in order to switch back to a neutral grip.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Take a slightly wider than hip distance stance with your joelhos slightly bent.
Place your right mão on your right hip to support the spine.
Eleve your left braço in a vertical line and place your left mão behind your head. Mantenha it there as you incline your tronco to the right.
Mantenha your peso evenly distributed between both pernas (don't lean into your left hip). Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Take a slightly wider than hip distance stance with your knees slightly bent.
Place your right hand on your right hip to support the spine.
Raise your left arm in a vertical line and place your left hand behind your head. Keep it there as you incline your torso to the right.
Keep your weight evenly distributed between both legs (don't lean into your left hip). Switch sides.

instrucoes: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie with your tronco bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled posição is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) with the pad of the lever on the costas of your right perna (just a few inches under the calves) and the front of the right perna on top of the machine pad.
Mantenhaing the tronco bent forward, ensure your perna is fully stretched and grab the side mãoles of the machine. Position your toes straight. This will be your posição inicial.
As you exhale, curl your right perna up as far as possible without lifting the upper perna from the pad. Once you hit the fully contracted posição, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the pernas costas to the initial posição. Repita for the número recomendado de repetições.
Perform the same exercise now for the left perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie with your torso bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) with the pad of the lever on the back of your right leg (just a few inches under the calves) and the front of the right leg on top of the machine pad.
Keeping the torso bent forward, ensure your leg is fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine. Position your toes straight. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl your right leg up as far as possible without lifting the upper leg from the pad. Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the legs back to the initial position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Perform the same exercise now for the left leg.

instrucoes: This drill is best done in sand or other soft landing surface. Ensure that you are able to measure distance. Stand in a partial squat stance with pés shoulder width apart.
Utilizing a big braço swing and a countermovimento of the pernas, jump forward as far as you can.
Attempt to land with your pés out in front you, reaching as far as possible with your pernas.
Measure the distance from your landing point to the starting point and track results.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill is best done in sand or other soft landing surface. Ensure that you are able to measure distance. Stand in a partial squat stance with feet shoulder width apart.
Utilizing a big arm swing and a countermovement of the legs, jump forward as far as you can.
Attempt to land with your feet out in front you, reaching as far as possible with your legs.
Measure the distance from your landing point to the starting point and track results.

instrucoes: Start by standing to the right side of a low pulley row.
