Use your left mão to come across the body and grab a single mãole attached to the low pulley with a pronated grip (palms facing down). Rest your braço in front of you. Your right mão should grab the machine for better support and balance.
Make sure that your costas is erect and your pés are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the posição inicial.
Comece to use the left mão and come across your body out until it is elevated to shoulder height while exhaling.
Feel the contraction at the top for a second and begin to slowly lower the mãole costas down to the original posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by standing to the right side of a low pulley row. Use your left hand to come across the body and grab a single handle attached to the low pulley with a pronated grip (palms facing down). Rest your arm in front of you. Your right hand should grab the machine for better support and balance.
Make sure that your back is erect and your feet are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.
Begin to use the left hand and come across your body out until it is elevated to shoulder height while exhaling.
Feel the contraction at the top for a second and begin to slowly lower the handle back down to the original starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

instrucoes: Grab a single mãole with your left braço next to the low pulley machine. Turn away from the machine keeping the mãole to the side of your body with your braço fully extended. Now use both mãos to elevate the single mãole directly above the head with the palm facing forward. Mantenha your upper braço completely vertical (perpendicular to the chão) and put your right mão on your left elbow to help keep it steady. This is the posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your upper braços close to your head (cotovelos in) and perpendicular to the chão, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forebraços touch your biceps. Dica: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forebraços should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the posição inicial by using the triceps to raise the single mãole. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a single handle with your left arm next to the low pulley machine. Turn away from the machine keeping the handle to the side of your body with your arm fully extended. Now use both hands to elevate the single handle directly above the head with the palm facing forward. Keep your upper arm completely vertical (perpendicular to the floor) and put your right hand on your left elbow to help keep it steady. This is the starting position.

Keeping your upper arms close to your head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the single handle. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

instrucoes: Start by placing a barra that is about peito high on a squat rack. Once you have selected the pesos, grab the barra using a pronated (palms facing forward) grip. Make sure to grip the bar wider than shoulder width apart from each other.
Slightly bend the joelhos and place the barra on your collar bone. Levante the barra up keeping it lying on your peito. Take a step costas and posição your pés shoulder width apart from each other.

Once you pick up the barra with the correct grip length, lift the bar up over your head by locking your braços. Segure at about shoulder level and slightly in front of your head. This is your posição inicial.
Abaixe the bar down to the collarbone slowly as you inhale.
Levante the bar costas up to the posição inicial as you exhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by placing a barbell that is about chest high on a squat rack. Once you have selected the weights, grab the barbell using a pronated (palms facing forward) grip. Make sure to grip the bar wider than shoulder width apart from each other.
Slightly bend the knees and place the barbell on your collar bone. Lift the barbell up keeping it lying on your chest. Take a step back and position your feet shoulder width apart from each other.

Once you pick up the barbell with the correct grip length, lift the bar up over your head by locking your arms. Hold at about shoulder level and slightly in front of your head. This is your starting position.
Lower the bar down to the collarbone slowly as you inhale.
Lift the bar back up to the starting position as you exhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, stand straight while holding a peso plate by the ridge at braço's length in each mão using a neutral grip (palms facing in). You pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. This will be your posição inicial.
Abaixe the plates until the fingers are nearly extended but can still hold pesos. Inhale as you lower the plates.
Now raise the plates costas to the posição inicial as you exhale by closing your mãos.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições prescribed in your program.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand straight while holding a weight plate by the ridge at arm's length in each hand using a neutral grip (palms facing in). You feet should be shoulder width apart from each other. This will be your starting position.
Lower the plates until the fingers are nearly extended but can still hold weights. Inhale as you lower the plates.
Now raise the plates back to the starting position as you exhale by closing your hands.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.

instrucoes: Start out by grabbing single mãole next to the low pulley machine. Make sure you are far enough from the machine so that your braço is supporting the peso.

Make sure that your upper braço is stationary, perpendicular to the chão with cotovelos in and palms facing forward. Your non lifting braço should be grabbing your waist. This will allow you to keep your balance.
Lentamente begin to curl the single mãole upwards while keeping the upper braço stationary until your forebraço touches your bicep while exhaling. Dica: Only the forebraço should move.
Segure the contraction posição as you squeeze the bicep and then lower the single mãole costas down to the posição inicial as you inhale.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços while performing this exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by grabbing single handle next to the low pulley machine. Make sure you are far enough from the machine so that your arm is supporting the weight.

Make sure that your upper arm is stationary, perpendicular to the floor with elbows in and palms facing forward. Your non lifting arm should be grabbing your waist. This will allow you to keep your balance.
Slowly begin to curl the single handle upwards while keeping the upper arm stationary until your forearm touches your bicep while exhaling. Tip: Only the forearm should move.
Hold the contraction position as you squeeze the bicep and then lower the single handle back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms while performing this exercise.

nome: Standing One-Arm com halter rosca Over Incline Bench
nomeOriginal: Standing One-Arm Dumbbell Curl Over Incline Bench
instrucoes: Stand on the costas side of an incline bench as if you were going to be a spotter for someone. Have a halter in one mão and rest it across the incline bench with a supinated (palms up) grip.

Position your non lifting mão at the corner or side of the incline bench. The peito should be pressed against the top part of the incline and your pés should be pressed against the chão at a wide stance. This is the posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the halter upward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halter is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços while performing this exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand on the back side of an incline bench as if you were going to be a spotter for someone. Have a dumbbell in one hand and rest it across the incline bench with a supinated (palms up) grip.

Position your non lifting hand at the corner or side of the incline bench. The chest should be pressed against the top part of the incline and your feet should be pressed against the floor at a wide stance. This is the starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell upward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms while performing this exercise.

nome: Standing One-Arm com halter Triceps Extension
instrucoes: To begin, stand up with a halter held in one mão. Your pés should be about shoulder width apart from each other. Now fully extend the braço with the halter over your head. Dica: The small finger of your mão should be facing the ceiling and the palm of your mão should be facing forward. The halter should be above your head.
Esta será a posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your upper braço close to your head (cotovelos in) and perpendicular to the chão, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forebraço touch your bicep. Dica: The upper braço should remain stationary and only the forebraço should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the posição inicial by using the triceps to raise the halter. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand up with a dumbbell held in one hand. Your feet should be about shoulder width apart from each other. Now fully extend the arm with the dumbbell over your head. Tip: The small finger of your hand should be facing the ceiling and the palm of your hand should be facing forward. The dumbbell should be above your head.
This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arm close to your head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearm touch your bicep. Tip: The upper arm should remain stationary and only the forearm should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the dumbbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

nome: Standing Overhead com barra Triceps Extension
instrucoes: To begin, stand up holding a barra or e-z bar using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) with your mãos closer than shoulder width apart from each other. Your pés should be about shoulder width apart.
Now elevate the barra above your head until your braços are fully extended. Mantenha your cotovelos in. This will be your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your upper braços close to your head and cotovelos in, perpendicular to the chão, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forebraços touch your biceps. Dica: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forebraços should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the posição inicial by using the triceps to raise the barra. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand up holding a barbell or e-z bar using a pronated grip (palms facing forward) with your hands closer than shoulder width apart from each other. Your feet should be about shoulder width apart.
Now elevate the barbell above your head until your arms are fully extended. Keep your elbows in. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows in, perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the barbell. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Standing Palm-In One-Arm com halter press
instrucoes: Start by having a halter in one mão with your braço fully extended to the side using a neutral grip. Use your other braço to hold on to an incline bench to keep your balance.

Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Now slowly lift the halter up until you create a 90 degree angle with your braço. Note: Your forebraço should be perpendicular to the chão. Continue to maintain a neutral grip throughout the entire exercise.
Lentamente lift the halter up until your braço is fully extended. This the posição inicial.
While inhaling lower the peso down until your braço is at a 90 degree angle again.

Feel the contraction for a second and then lift the peso costas up towards the posição inicial while exhaling. Remember to hold on to the incline bench and keep your pés posiçãoed to keep balance during the exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch braços and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by having a dumbbell in one hand with your arm fully extended to the side using a neutral grip. Use your other arm to hold on to an incline bench to keep your balance.

Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other. Now slowly lift the dumbbell up until you create a 90 degree angle with your arm. Note: Your forearm should be perpendicular to the floor. Continue to maintain a neutral grip throughout the entire exercise.
Slowly lift the dumbbell up until your arm is fully extended. This the starting position.
While inhaling lower the weight down until your arm is at a 90 degree angle again.

Feel the contraction for a second and then lift the weight back up towards the starting position while exhaling. Remember to hold on to the incline bench and keep your feet positioned to keep balance during the exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

instrucoes: Start by having a halter in each mão with your braço fully extended to the side using a neutral grip. Your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. Now slowly lift the halters up until you create a 90 degree angle with your braços. Note: Your forebraços should be perpendicular to the chão. This the posição inicial.
Continue to maintain a neutral grip throughout the entire exercise. Lentamente lift the halters up until your braços are fully extended.
While inhaling lower the pesos down until your braço is at a 90 degree angle again.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by having a dumbbell in each hand with your arm fully extended to the side using a neutral grip. Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other. Now slowly lift the dumbbells up until you create a 90 degree angle with your arms. Note: Your forearms should be perpendicular to the floor. This the starting position.
Continue to maintain a neutral grip throughout the entire exercise. Slowly lift the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended.
While inhaling lower the weights down until your arm is at a 90 degree angle again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Standing Palms-Up com barra Behind The Back Wrist rosca
nomeOriginal: Standing Palms-Up Barbell Behind The Back Wrist Curl
instrucoes: Start by standing straight and holding a barra behind your glutes at braço's length while using a pronated grip (palms will be facing costas away from the glutes) and having your mãos shoulder width apart from each other.
You should be looking straight forward while your pés are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the posição inicial.
While exhaling, slowly elevate the barra up by curling your wrist in a semi-circular motion towards the ceiling. Note: Your wrist should be the only body part moving for this exercise.
Segure the contraction for a second and lower the barra costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
When finished, lower the barra down to the squat rack or the chão by bending the joelhos. Dica: It is easiest to either pick it up from a squat rack or have a partner mão it to you.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by standing straight and holding a barbell behind your glutes at arm's length while using a pronated grip (palms will be facing back away from the glutes) and having your hands shoulder width apart from each other.
You should be looking straight forward while your feet are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.
While exhaling, slowly elevate the barbell up by curling your wrist in a semi-circular motion towards the ceiling. Note: Your wrist should be the only body part moving for this exercise.
Hold the contraction for a second and lower the barbell back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When finished, lower the barbell down to the squat rack or the floor by bending the knees. Tip: It is easiest to either pick it up from a squat rack or have a partner hand it to you.

instrucoes: Start off with your pés hip-distance apart.
Bend your joelhos slightly to keep them soft and springy.
You may want to move your pelvis forward and costasward and costas few times before holding the tailbone forward in this stretch.
instrucoesOriginais: Start off with your feet hip-distance apart.
Bend your knees slightly to keep them soft and springy.
You may want to move your pelvis forward and backward and back few times before holding the tailbone forward in this stretch.

instrucoes: Attach a rope to a high pulley and select an appropriate peso.
Stand with your costas to the cable tower. Take the rope with both mãos over your ombros, holding it to your upper peito. This will be your posição inicial.
Perform the movimento by flexing the spine, crunching the peso down as far as you can.
Segure the peak contraction for a moment before returning to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a rope to a high pulley and select an appropriate weight.
Stand with your back to the cable tower. Take the rope with both hands over your shoulders, holding it to your upper chest. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by flexing the spine, crunching the weight down as far as you can.
Hold the peak contraction for a moment before returning to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés hip-distance apart, one foot slightly in front of the other.
Bend both joelhos, keeping your costas heel on the chão. Switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet hip-distance apart, one foot slightly in front of the other.
Bend both knees, keeping your back heel on the floor. Switch sides.

instrucoes: Stand with some space in front and behind you.
Bend at the waist, keeping your pernas straight, until you can relax and let your upper body hang down in front of you. Let your braços and mãos hang down naturally. Segure for 10 to 20 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with some space in front and behind you.
Bend at the waist, keeping your legs straight, until you can relax and let your upper body hang down in front of you. Let your arms and hands hang down naturally. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

instrucoes: To begin, stand up with both braços fully extended above the head holding one end of a towel with both mãos. Your cotovelos should be in and the braços perpendicular to the chão with the palms facing each other while your pés should be shoulder width apart from each other. This is the posição inicial.

Now communicate with your partner so that he/she can grip the other side of the towel to apply resistance. Mantenhaing your upper braços close to your head (cotovelos in) and perpendicular to the chão, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forebraços touch your biceps. Dica: The upper braços should remain stationary and only the forebraços should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go costas to the posição inicial by using the triceps to raise the towel. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand up with both arms fully extended above the head holding one end of a towel with both hands. Your elbows should be in and the arms perpendicular to the floor with the palms facing each other while your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.

Now communicate with your partner so that he/she can grip the other side of the towel to apply resistance. Keeping your upper arms close to your head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the towel. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Stand with your pés shoulder width apart holding a medicine ball in both mãos. To begin, reach the medicine ball deep behind your head as you bend the joelhos slightly and lean costas.
Violently throw the ball forward, flexing at the hip and using your whole body to complete the movimento.
The medicine ball can be thrown to a partner or to a wall, receiving it as it bounces costas.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart holding a medicine ball in both hands. To begin, reach the medicine ball deep behind your head as you bend the knees slightly and lean back.
Violently throw the ball forward, flexing at the hip and using your whole body to complete the movement.
The medicine ball can be thrown to a partner or to a wall, receiving it as it bounces back.

instrucoes: Comece in a relaxed stance with your pés shoulder width apart and hold your braços close to the body.
To initiate the move, squat down halfway and explode costas up as high as possible. Fully extend your entire body, spreading your pernas and braços away from the body.
As you land, bring your limbs costas in and absorb your impact through the pernas.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a relaxed stance with your feet shoulder width apart and hold your arms close to the body.
To initiate the move, squat down halfway and explode back up as high as possible. Fully extend your entire body, spreading your legs and arms away from the body.
As you land, bring your limbs back in and absorb your impact through the legs.

instrucoes: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with your pés together. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece the movimento by stepping up, putting your left foot on the top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of your front perna to stand up on the box. As you stand on the box with your left perna, flex your right knee and hip, bringing your knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence on the opposite perna.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with your feet together. This will be your starting position.

Begin the movement by stepping up, putting your left foot on the top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of your front leg to stand up on the box. As you stand on the box with your left leg, flex your right knee and hip, bringing your knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence on the opposite leg.

instrucoes: To begin, step onto the stepmill and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Use caution so that you don't trip as you climb the stairs. It is recommended that you maintain your grip on the mãoles so that you don't fall.

Stepmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside while offering a similar rate of calories burned. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, step onto the stepmill and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Use caution so that you don't trip as you climb the stairs. It is recommended that you maintain your grip on the handles so that you don't fall.

Stepmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside while offering a similar rate of calories burned. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.

instrucoes: Grasp a bar using an overmão grip (palms facing down). You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of peso.
Stand with your tronco straight and your pernas spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The joelhos should be slightly bent. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the joelhos stationary, lower the barra to over the top of your pés by bending at the quadris while keeping your costas straight. Mantenha moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the chão until you feel a stretch on the hamstrings. Inhale as you perform this movimento.
Start bringing your tronco up straight again by extending your quadris until you are costas at the posição inicial. Exhale as you perform this movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grasp a bar using an overhand grip (palms facing down). You may need some wrist wraps if using a significant amount of weight.
Stand with your torso straight and your legs spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The knees should be slightly bent. This is your starting position.

Keeping the knees stationary, lower the barbell to over the top of your feet by bending at the hips while keeping your back straight. Keep moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the floor until you feel a stretch on the hamstrings. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Start bringing your torso up straight again by extending your hips until you are back at the starting position. Exhale as you perform this movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grasp a couple of halters holding them by your side at braço's length.
Stand with your tronco straight and your pernas spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The joelhos should be slightly bent. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the joelhos stationary, lower the halters to over the top of your pés by bending at the waist while keeping your costas straight. Mantenha moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the chão until you feel a stretch on the hamstrings. Exhale as you perform this movimento
Start bringing your tronco up straight again by extending your quadris and waist until you are costas at the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grasp a couple of dumbbells holding them by your side at arm's length.
Stand with your torso straight and your legs spaced using a shoulder width or narrower stance. The knees should be slightly bent. This is your starting position.

Keeping the knees stationary, lower the dumbbells to over the top of your feet by bending at the waist while keeping your back straight. Keep moving forward as if you were going to pick something from the floor until you feel a stretch on the hamstrings. Exhale as you perform this movement
Start bringing your torso up straight again by extending your hips and waist until you are back at the starting position. Inhale as you perform this movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

nome: Stiff Leg com barra Good Morning
instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your pernas stationary, move your tronco forward by bending at the quadris while inhaling. Abaixe your tronco until it is parallel with the chão.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by elevating your tronco costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your legs stationary, move your torso forward by bending at the hips while inhaling. Lower your torso until it is parallel with the floor.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by elevating your torso back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, stand straight with your pés shoulder width apart from each other. Place your mãos on your quadris. This is the posição inicial.

Now slowly inhale as much air as possible and then start to exhale as much as possible while bringing your stomach in as much as possible and hold this posição. Try to visualize your navel touching your costasbone.
One isometric contraction is around 20 seconds. During the 20 second hold, try to breathe normally. Then inhale and bring your stomach costas to the posição inicial.
Once you have practiced this exercise, try to perform this exercise for longer than 20 seconds. Dica: You can work your way up to 40-60 seconds.
Repita for the recommended amount of sets.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand straight with your feet shoulder width apart from each other. Place your hands on your hips. This is the starting position.

Now slowly inhale as much air as possible and then start to exhale as much as possible while bringing your stomach in as much as possible and hold this position. Try to visualize your navel touching your backbone.
One isometric contraction is around 20 seconds. During the 20 second hold, try to breathe normally. Then inhale and bring your stomach back to the starting position.
Once you have practiced this exercise, try to perform this exercise for longer than 20 seconds. Tip: You can work your way up to 40-60 seconds.
Repeat for the recommended amount of sets.

instrucoes: Place a halter standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the halter stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench (tronco across it as in forming a cross) with only your ombros lying on the surface. Hips should be below the bench and pernas bent with pés firmly on the chão. The head will be off the bench as well.

Grasp the halter with both mãos and hold it straight over your peito at braços length. Both palms should be pressing against the underside one of the sides of the halter. This will be your posição inicial.
Caution: Always ensure that the halter used for this exercise is secure. Using a halter with loose plates can result in the halter falling apart and falling on your face.
While keeping your braços straight, lower the peso slowly in an arc behind your head while breathing in until you feel a stretch on the peito.
At that point, bring the halter costas to the posição inicial using the arc through which the peso was lowered and exhale as you perform this movimento.
Segure the peso on the initial posição for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a dumbbell standing up on a flat bench.

Ensuring that the dumbbell stays securely placed at the top of the bench, lie perpendicular to the bench (torso across it as in forming a cross) with only your shoulders lying on the surface. Hips should be below the bench and legs bent with feet firmly on the floor. The head will be off the bench as well.

Grasp the dumbbell with both hands and hold it straight over your chest at arms length. Both palms should be pressing against the underside one of the sides of the dumbbell. This will be your starting position.
Caution: Always ensure that the dumbbell used for this exercise is secure. Using a dumbbell with loose plates can result in the dumbbell falling apart and falling on your face.
While keeping your arms straight, lower the weight slowly in an arc behind your head while breathing in until you feel a stretch on the chest.
At that point, bring the dumbbell back to the starting position using the arc through which the weight was lowered and exhale as you perform this movement.
Hold the weight on the initial position for a second and repeat the motion for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: You will start by grabbing the wide bar from the top pulley of a pulldown machine and using a wider than shoulder-width pronated (palms down) grip. Step costaswards two pés or so.

Bend your tronco forward at the waist by around 30-degrees with your braços fully extended in front of you and a slight bend at the cotovelos. If your braços are not fully extended then you need to step a bit more costaswards until they are. Once your braços are fully extended and your tronco is slightly bent at the waist, tighten the lats and then you are ready to begin.
While keeping the braços straight, pull the bar down by contraindo the lats until your mãos are next to the side of the thighs. Breathe out as you perform this step.
While keeping the braços straight, go costas to the posição inicial while breathing in.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: You will start by grabbing the wide bar from the top pulley of a pulldown machine and using a wider than shoulder-width pronated (palms down) grip. Step backwards two feet or so.

Bend your torso forward at the waist by around 30-degrees with your arms fully extended in front of you and a slight bend at the elbows. If your arms are not fully extended then you need to step a bit more backwards until they are. Once your arms are fully extended and your torso is slightly bent at the waist, tighten the lats and then you are ready to begin.
While keeping the arms straight, pull the bar down by contracting the lats until your hands are next to the side of the thighs. Breathe out as you perform this step.
While keeping the arms straight, go back to the starting position while breathing in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place a loaded barra on the end of a bench. Standing on the bench behind the bar, take a medium, pronated grip. Stand with your quadris costas and peito up, maintaining a neutral spine. This will be your posição inicial.
Row the bar to your tronco by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the cotovelos. Use a controlled movimento with no jerking.
After a brief pause, slowly return the bar to the posição inicial, ensuring to go all the way down.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a loaded barbell on the end of a bench. Standing on the bench behind the bar, take a medium, pronated grip. Stand with your hips back and chest up, maintaining a neutral spine. This will be your starting position.
Row the bar to your torso by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Use a controlled movement with no jerking.
After a brief pause, slowly return the bar to the starting position, ensuring to go all the way down.

instrucoes: Place a bar on the ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay on the bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barra up from the chão, keeping your braços straight. Allow the bar to hang straight down. This will be your posição inicial.
To begin, raise the barra out in front of your head while keeping your braços extended.
Retorne à posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Place a bar on the ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay on the bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barbell up from the floor, keeping your arms straight. Allow the bar to hang straight down. This will be your starting position.
To begin, raise the barbell out in front of your head while keeping your arms extended.
Return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Comece by swinging the braços upward as you push through the top perna, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the opposite posição that you started, on the opposite side of the box. The foot that was initially on the box will now be on the ground, with the opposite foot now on the box.
Repita the movimento, crossing costas over to the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the arms upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the opposite position that you started, on the opposite side of the box. The foot that was initially on the box will now be on the ground, with the opposite foot now on the box.
Repeat the movement, crossing back over to the other side.

instrucoes: Comece with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the quadris to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the ombros, which in effect lengthens your braços.

Take a breath, and then lower your quadris, looking forward with your head with your peito up. Drive through the chão, spreading your pés apart, with your peso on the costas half of your pés. Extend through the quadris and joelhos.
As the bar passes through the joelhos, lean costas and drive the quadris into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Retorne the peso to the ground by bending at the quadris and controlling the peso on the way down.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the shoulders, which in effect lengthens your arms.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.

nome: Sumo levantamento terra with com elásticos
instrucoes: To deadlift with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up. Ensure that they under the costas half of your foot, directly where you are driving into the chão.

Comece with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the quadris to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip.

Take a breath, and then lower your quadris, looking forward with your head with your peito up. Drive through the chão, spreading your pés apart, with your peso on the costas half of your pés. Extend through the quadris and joelhos.
As the bar passes through the joelhos, lean costas and drive the quadris into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Retorne the peso to the ground by bending at the quadris and controlling the peso on the way down.
instrucoesOriginais: To deadlift with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up. Ensure that they under the back half of your foot, directly where you are driving into the floor.

Begin with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.

instrucoes: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater peso increase as you lift. Attempt to keep the ends of the chains away from the plates so you don't hit them when you lower the peso.

Comece with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pés. The pés should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the quadris to grip the bar. The braços should be directly below the ombros, inside the pernas, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the ombros, which in effect lengthens your braços.

Take a breath, and then lower your quadris, looking forward with your head with your peito up. Drive through the chão, spreading your pés apart, with your peso on the costas half of your pés. Extend through the quadris and joelhos.
As the bar passes through the joelhos, lean costas and drive the quadris into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Retorne the peso to the ground by bending at the quadris and controlling the peso on the way down.
instrucoesOriginais: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater weight increase as you lift. Attempt to keep the ends of the chains away from the plates so you don't hit them when you lower the weight.

Begin with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the shoulders, which in effect lengthens your arms.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.

instrucoes: To begin, lie straight and face down on the chão or exercise mat. Your braços should be fully extended in front of you. This is the posição inicial.

Simultaneously raise your braços, pernas, and peito off of the chão and hold this contraction for 2 seconds. Dica: Squeeze your lower costas to get the best results from this exercise. Remember to exhale during this movimento. Note: When holding the contracted posição, you should look like superman when he is flying.
Lentamente begin to lower your braços, pernas and peito costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições prescribed in your program.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie straight and face down on the floor or exercise mat. Your arms should be fully extended in front of you. This is the starting position.

Simultaneously raise your arms, legs, and chest off of the floor and hold this contraction for 2 seconds. Tip: Squeeze your lower back to get the best results from this exercise. Remember to exhale during this movement. Note: When holding the contracted position, you should look like superman when he is flying.
Slowly begin to lower your arms, legs and chest back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.

instrucoes: This drill is great for peito passes when you lack a partner or a wall of sufficient strength. Lay on the ground on your costas with your joelhos bent.
Comece with the ball on your peito, held with both mãos on the bottom.
Explode up, extending through the elbow to throw the ball directly above you as high as possible.
Catch the ball with both mãos as it comes down.
instrucoesOriginais: This drill is great for chest passes when you lack a partner or a wall of sufficient strength. Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent.
Begin with the ball on your chest, held with both hands on the bottom.
Explode up, extending through the elbow to throw the ball directly above you as high as possible.
Catch the ball with both hands as it comes down.

instrucoes: Lay on the ground on your costas with your joelhos bent. Segure the ball with one mão, extending the braço fully behind your head. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent. Hold the ball with one hand, extending the arm fully behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.

instrucoes: Lay on the ground on your costas with your joelhos bent.
Segure the ball with both mãos, extending the braços fully behind your head. This will be your posição inicial.
Initiate the movimento at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.
instrucoesOriginais: Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent.
Hold the ball with both hands, extending the arms fully behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.

instrucoes: Adjust the straps so the mãoles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Comece standing and grasping the mãoles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up posição. This will be your posição inicial.
Mantenhaing your braços straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing your body closer to the ground, allowing your ombros to extend, raising your braços up and over your head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of your body straight, your ombros being the only joints allowed to move.
Faça uma pausa during the peak contraction, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Adjust the straps so the handles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Begin standing and grasping the handles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up position. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing your body closer to the ground, allowing your shoulders to extend, raising your arms up and over your head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of your body straight, your shoulders being the only joints allowed to move.
Pause during the peak contraction, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Anchor your suspension straps securely to the top of a rack or other object.

Leaning into the straps, take a mãole in each mão and move into a push-up plank posição. You should be as close to parallel to the ground as you can manage with your braços fully extended, maintaining good posture.
Maintaining a straight, rigid tronco, descend slowly by allowing the cotovelos to flex.
Continue until your cotovelos break 90 degrees, pausing before you extend to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Anchor your suspension straps securely to the top of a rack or other object.

Leaning into the straps, take a handle in each hand and move into a push-up plank position. You should be as close to parallel to the ground as you can manage with your arms fully extended, maintaining good posture.
Maintaining a straight, rigid torso, descend slowly by allowing the elbows to flex.
Continue until your elbows break 90 degrees, pausing before you extend to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Secure a set of suspension straps with the mãoles hanging about a foot off of the ground. Move yourself into a pushup plank posição facing away from the rack.
Place your pés into the mãoles. You should maintain a straight posture, not allowing the quadris to sag. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece the movimento by flexing the joelhos and quadris, drawing the joelhos to your tronco. As you do so, anteriorly tilt your pelvis, allowing your spine to flex.
At the top of the controlled motion, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Secure a set of suspension straps with the handles hanging about a foot off of the ground. Move yourself into a pushup plank position facing away from the rack.
Place your feet into the handles. You should maintain a straight posture, not allowing the hips to sag. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the knees and hips, drawing the knees to your torso. As you do so, anteriorly tilt your pelvis, allowing your spine to flex.
At the top of the controlled motion, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Suspend your straps at around peito height. Take a mãole in each mão and lean costas. Mantenha your body erect and your head and peito up. Your braços should be fully extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by flexing the elbow to initiate the movimento. Protract your shoulder blades as you do so.
At the completion of the motion pause, and then return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Suspend your straps at around chest height. Take a handle in each hand and lean back. Keep your body erect and your head and chest up. Your arms should be fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow to initiate the movement. Protract your shoulder blades as you do so.
At the completion of the motion pause, and then return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Suspend your straps so the mãoles are 18-30 inches from the chão.
Facing away from the setup, place your rear foot into the mãole behind you. Mantenha your head looking forward and your peito up, with your knee slightly bent. This will be your posição inicial.
Descend by flexing the knee and quadris, lowering yourself to the ground. Mantenha your peso on the heel of your foot and maintain your posture throughout the exercise.
At the bottom of the movimento, reverse the motion, extending through the hip and knee to return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Suspend your straps so the handles are 18-30 inches from the floor.
Facing away from the setup, place your rear foot into the handle behind you. Keep your head looking forward and your chest up, with your knee slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
Descend by flexing the knee and hips, lowering yourself to the ground. Keep your weight on the heel of your foot and maintain your posture throughout the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, reverse the motion, extending through the hip and knee to return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Comece in a standing posição.

Press two lightpeso plates together with your mãos. Segure the plates together close to your peito to create an isometric contraction in your peito muscles. Your fingers should be pointed forward. This is your posição inicial.
Squeeze the plates between your palms and extend your braços directly out in front of you in a controlled motion.
Faça uma pausa at the top of the motion, and then slowly return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a standing position.

Press two lightweight plates together with your hands. Hold the plates together close to your chest to create an isometric contraction in your chest muscles. Your fingers should be pointed forward. This is your starting position.
Squeeze the plates between your palms and extend your arms directly out in front of you in a controlled motion.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then slowly return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Position a bar into a landmine or in a corner to keep it from moving. Load an appropriate peso onto your end.
Stand over the bar, and posição a Double D row mãole around the bar next to the collar. Using your quadris and pernas, rise to a standing posição.
Assume a wide stance with your quadris costas and your peito up. Your braços should be extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Pull the peso to your upper abdomen by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the cotovelos. Do not jerk the peso or cheat during the movimento.
After a brief pause, return to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a bar into a landmine or in a corner to keep it from moving. Load an appropriate weight onto your end.
Stand over the bar, and position a Double D row handle around the bar next to the collar. Using your hips and legs, rise to a standing position.
Assume a wide stance with your hips back and your chest up. Your arms should be extended. This will be your starting position.
Pull the weight to your upper abdomen by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Do not jerk the weight or cheat during the movement.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a flat bench with a halter in each mão on top of your thighs. The palms of your mão will be facing each other.

By using your thighs to help you get the halters up, clean the halters one braço at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Note: when holding the halters in front of you, make sure your braços are wider than shoulder width apart from each other using a pronated (palms forward) grip. Allow your cotovelos to point out. This is your posição inicial.

Mantenhaing the upper braços stationary, slowly move the halters in and down in a semi circular motion until they touch the upper peito while inhaling. Mantenha full control of the halters at all times and do not move the upper braços nor rest the halters on the peito.

As you expire, move the halters up using your triceps and the same semi-circular motion but in reverse. Attempt to keep the halters together as they move up. Lock your braços in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down again slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand on top of your thighs. The palms of your hand will be facing each other.

By using your thighs to help you get the dumbbells up, clean the dumbbells one arm at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Note: when holding the dumbbells in front of you, make sure your arms are wider than shoulder width apart from each other using a pronated (palms forward) grip. Allow your elbows to point out. This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arms stationary, slowly move the dumbbells in and down in a semi circular motion until they touch the upper chest while inhaling. Keep full control of the dumbbells at all times and do not move the upper arms nor rest the dumbbells on the chest.

As you breathe out, move the dumbbells up using your triceps and the same semi-circular motion but in reverse. Attempt to keep the dumbbells together as they move up. Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down again slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.

instrucoes: Comece in a seated, upright posição. Start by extending your pernas in front of you in a V.
With your mãos on the chão, lean forward as far as possible. Segure for 10 to 20 seconds.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin in a seated, upright position. Start by extending your legs in front of you in a V.
With your hands on the floor, lean forward as far as possible. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

instrucoes: To begin, sit down on the abductor machine and select a peso you are comfortable with. When your pernas are posiçãoed properly, grip the mãoles on each side. Your entire upper body (from the waist up) should be stationary. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente press against the machine with your pernas to move them away from each other while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to move your pernas costas to the posição inicial while breathing in. Note: Remember to keep your upper body stationary to prevent any injuries from occurring.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, sit down on the abductor machine and select a weight you are comfortable with. When your legs are positioned properly, grip the handles on each side. Your entire upper body (from the waist up) should be stationary. This is the starting position.
Slowly press against the machine with your legs to move them away from each other while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to move your legs back to the starting position while breathing in. Note: Remember to keep your upper body stationary to prevent any injuries from occurring.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, sit down on the adductor machine and select a peso you are comfortable with. When your pernas are posiçãoed properly on the perna pads of the machine, grip the mãoles on each side. Your entire upper body (from the waist up) should be stationary. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente press against the machine with your pernas to move them towards each other while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to move your pernas costas to the posição inicial while breathing in. Note: Remember to keep your upper body stationary and avoid fast jerking motions in order to prevent any injuries from occurring.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, sit down on the adductor machine and select a weight you are comfortable with. When your legs are positioned properly on the leg pads of the machine, grip the handles on each side. Your entire upper body (from the waist up) should be stationary. This is the starting position.
Slowly press against the machine with your legs to move them towards each other while exhaling.

Feel the contraction for a second and begin to move your legs back to the starting position while breathing in. Note: Remember to keep your upper body stationary and avoid fast jerking motions in order to prevent any injuries from occurring.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece by gripping the bottom of the tire on the tread, and posição your pés costas a bit. Your peito should be driving into the tire.
To lift the tire, extend through the quadris, joelhos, and ankles, driving into the tire and up.

As the tire reaches a 45 degree angle, step forward and drive a knee into the tire. As you do so adjust your grip to the upper portion of the tire and push it forward as hard as possible to complete the turn. Repita as necessary.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin by gripping the bottom of the tire on the tread, and position your feet back a bit. Your chest should be driving into the tire.
To lift the tire, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles, driving into the tire and up.

As the tire reaches a 45 degree angle, step forward and drive a knee into the tire. As you do so adjust your grip to the upper portion of the tire and push it forward as hard as possible to complete the turn. Repeat as necessary.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on the chão or an exercise mat with your costas pressed against the chão. Your braços should be lying across your sides with the palms facing down.

Your pernas should be touching each other. Lentamente elevate your pernas up in the air until they are almost perpendicular to the chão with a slight bend at the joelhos. Your pés should be parallel to the chão.
Move your braços so that they are fully extended at a 45 degree angle from the chão. This is the posição inicial.
While keeping your lower costas pressed against the chão, slowly lift your tronco and use your mãos to try and touch your toes. Remember to exhale while perform this part of the exercise.
Lentamente begin to lower your tronco and braços costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling. Remember to keep your braços straight out pointing towards your toes.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on the floor or an exercise mat with your back pressed against the floor. Your arms should be lying across your sides with the palms facing down.

Your legs should be touching each other. Slowly elevate your legs up in the air until they are almost perpendicular to the floor with a slight bend at the knees. Your feet should be parallel to the floor.
Move your arms so that they are fully extended at a 45 degree angle from the floor. This is the starting position.
While keeping your lower back pressed against the floor, slowly lift your torso and use your hands to try and touch your toes. Remember to exhale while perform this part of the exercise.
Slowly begin to lower your torso and arms back down to the starting position while inhaling. Remember to keep your arms straight out pointing towards your toes.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em péright holding an exercise ball with both mãos. Extend your braços so the ball is straight out in front of you. This will be your posição inicial.
Rotate your tronco to one side, keeping your eyes on the ball as you move. Now, rotate costas to the opposite direction. Repita for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand upright holding an exercise ball with both hands. Extend your arms so the ball is straight out in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Rotate your torso to one side, keeping your eyes on the ball as you move. Now, rotate back to the opposite direction. Repeat for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: Running or hiking on trails will get the blood pumping and heart beating almost immediately. Make sure you have good shoes. While you use the muscles in your calves and buttocks to pull yourself up a hill, the joelhos, joints and ankles absorb the bulk of the pounding coming costas down. Take smaller steps as you walk downhill, keep your joelhos bent to reduce the impact and slow down to avoid falling.
A 150 lb person can burn over 200 calories for 30 minutes walking uphill, compared to 175 on a flat surface. If running the trail, a 150 lb person can burn well over 500 calories in 30 minutes.
instrucoesOriginais: Running or hiking on trails will get the blood pumping and heart beating almost immediately. Make sure you have good shoes. While you use the muscles in your calves and buttocks to pull yourself up a hill, the knees, joints and ankles absorb the bulk of the pounding coming back down. Take smaller steps as you walk downhill, keep your knees bent to reduce the impact and slow down to avoid falling.
A 150 lb person can burn over 200 calories for 30 minutes walking uphill, compared to 175 on a flat surface. If running the trail, a 150 lb person can burn well over 500 calories in 30 minutes.

instrucoes: For this exercise load a trap bar, also known as a hex bar, to an appropriate peso resting on the ground. Stand in the center of the apparatus and grasp both mãoles.
Abaixe your quadris, look forward with your head and keep your peito up.
Comece the movimento by driving through the heels and extend your quadris and joelhos. Avoid rounding your costas at all times.
At the completion of the movimento, lower the peso costas to the ground under control.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise load a trap bar, also known as a hex bar, to an appropriate weight resting on the ground. Stand in the center of the apparatus and grasp both handles.
Lower your hips, look forward with your head and keep your chest up.
Begin the movement by driving through the heels and extend your hips and knees. Avoid rounding your back at all times.
At the completion of the movement, lower the weight back to the ground under control.

instrucoes: Start with a halter in each mão and your palms facing your tronco. Mantenha your costas straight with a slight bend in the joelhos and bend forward at the waist. Your tronco should be almost parallel to the chão. Make sure to keep your head up. Your upper braços should be close to your tronco and parallel to the chão. Your forebraços should be pointed towards the chão as you hold the pesos. There should be a 90-degree angle formed between your forebraço and upper braço. This is your posição inicial.
Now, while keeping your upper braços stationary, exhale and use your triceps to lift the pesos until the braço is fully extended. Focus on moving the forebraço.
After a brief pause at the top contraction, inhale and slowly lower the halters costas down to the posição inicial.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Start with a dumbbell in each hand and your palms facing your torso. Keep your back straight with a slight bend in the knees and bend forward at the waist. Your torso should be almost parallel to the floor. Make sure to keep your head up. Your upper arms should be close to your torso and parallel to the floor. Your forearms should be pointed towards the floor as you hold the weights. There should be a 90-degree angle formed between your forearm and upper arm. This is your starting position.
Now, while keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and use your triceps to lift the weights until the arm is fully extended. Focus on moving the forearm.
After a brief pause at the top contraction, inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Bring right braço across your body and over your left shoulder, holding your elbow with your left mão, until you feel a stretch in your tricep. Then repeat for your other braço.
instrucoesOriginais: Bring right arm across your body and over your left shoulder, holding your elbow with your left hand, until you feel a stretch in your tricep. Then repeat for your other arm.

instrucoes: Attach a rope to a low pulley. After selecting an appropriate peso, grasp the rope with both mãos and face away from the cable.

Position your mãos behind your head with your cotovelos point straight up. Your cotovelos should start out flexed, and you can stagger your stance and lean gently away from the machine to create greater stability. This will be your posição inicial.
To perform the movimento, extend through the elbow while keeping the upper braço in posição, raising your mãos above your head.
Squeeze your triceps at the top of the movimento, and slowly lower the peso costas to the start posição.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a rope to a low pulley. After selecting an appropriate weight, grasp the rope with both hands and face away from the cable.

Position your hands behind your head with your elbows point straight up. Your elbows should start out flexed, and you can stagger your stance and lean gently away from the machine to create greater stability. This will be your starting position.
To perform the movement, extend through the elbow while keeping the upper arm in position, raising your hands above your head.
Squeeze your triceps at the top of the movement, and slowly lower the weight back to the start position.

instrucoes: Attach a straight or angled bar to a high pulley and grab with an overmão grip (palms facing down) at shoulder width.

Standing upright with the tronco straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper braços close to your body and perpendicular to the chão. The forebraços should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the bar. This is your posição inicial.

Using the triceps, bring the bar down until it touches the front of your thighs and the braços are fully extended perpendicular to the chão. The upper braços should always remain stationary next to your tronco and only the forebraços should move. Exhale as you perform this movimento.
After a second hold at the contracted posição, bring the bar slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a straight or angled bar to a high pulley and grab with an overhand grip (palms facing down) at shoulder width.

Standing upright with the torso straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper arms close to your body and perpendicular to the floor. The forearms should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the bar. This is your starting position.

Using the triceps, bring the bar down until it touches the front of your thighs and the arms are fully extended perpendicular to the floor. The upper arms should always remain stationary next to your torso and only the forearms should move. Exhale as you perform this movement.
After a second hold at the contracted position, bring the bar slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley and grab with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).

Standing upright with the tronco straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper braços close to your body and perpendicular to the chão. The forebraços should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the rope with the palms facing each other. This is your posição inicial.

Using the triceps, bring the rope down as you bring each side of the rope to the side of your thighs. At the end of the movimento the braços are fully extended and perpendicular to the chão. The upper braços should always remain stationary next to your tronco and only the forebraços should move. Exhale as you perform this movimento.
After holding for a second, at the contracted posição, bring the rope slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley and grab with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).

Standing upright with the torso straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper arms close to your body and perpendicular to the floor. The forearms should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the rope with the palms facing each other. This is your starting position.

Using the triceps, bring the rope down as you bring each side of the rope to the side of your thighs. At the end of the movement the arms are fully extended and perpendicular to the floor. The upper arms should always remain stationary next to your torso and only the forearms should move. Exhale as you perform this movement.
After holding for a second, at the contracted position, bring the rope slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Attach a V-Bar to a high pulley and grab with an overmão grip (palms facing down) at shoulder width.

Standing upright with the tronco straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper braços close to your body and perpendicular to the chão. The forebraços should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the bar. The thumbs should be higher than the small finger. This is your posição inicial.

Using the triceps, bring the bar down until it touches the front of your thighs and the braços are fully extended perpendicular to the chão. The upper braços should always remain stationary next to your tronco and only the forebraços should move. Exhale as you perform this movimento.
After a second hold at the contracted posição, bring the V-Bar slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a V-Bar to a high pulley and grab with an overhand grip (palms facing down) at shoulder width.

Standing upright with the torso straight and a very small inclination forward, bring the upper arms close to your body and perpendicular to the floor. The forearms should be pointing up towards the pulley as they hold the bar. The thumbs should be higher than the small finger. This is your starting position.

Using the triceps, bring the bar down until it touches the front of your thighs and the arms are fully extended perpendicular to the floor. The upper arms should always remain stationary next to your torso and only the forearms should move. Exhale as you perform this movement.
After a second hold at the contracted position, bring the V-Bar slowly up to the starting point. Breathe in as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Reach your mão behind your head, grasp your elbow and gently pull. Segure for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.
instrucoesOriginais: Reach your hand behind your head, grasp your elbow and gently pull. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds, then switch sides.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on the chão or an exercise mat with your costas pressed against the chão. Your braços should be lying across your sides with the palms facing down.

Your pernas should be crossed by wrapping one ankle around the other. Lentamente elevate your pernas up in the air until your thighs are perpendicular to the chão with a slight bend at the joelhos. Note: Your joelhos and toes should be parallel to the chão as opposed to the thighs.
Move your braços from the chão and cross them so they are resting on your peito. This is the posição inicial.
While keeping your lower costas pressed against the chão, slowly lift your tronco. Remember to exhale while perform this part of the exercise.
Lentamente begin to lower your tronco costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on the floor or an exercise mat with your back pressed against the floor. Your arms should be lying across your sides with the palms facing down.

Your legs should be crossed by wrapping one ankle around the other. Slowly elevate your legs up in the air until your thighs are perpendicular to the floor with a slight bend at the knees. Note: Your knees and toes should be parallel to the floor as opposed to the thighs.
Move your arms from the floor and cross them so they are resting on your chest. This is the starting position.
While keeping your lower back pressed against the floor, slowly lift your torso. Remember to exhale while perform this part of the exercise.
Slowly begin to lower your torso back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab a halter with each braço and place the upper braços on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The halter should be held at shoulder length. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, slowly lower the halters until your upper braço is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the pesos up until your biceps is fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder height.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted posição and repeat for the número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell with each arm and place the upper arms on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The dumbbell should be held at shoulder length. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells until your upper arm is extended and the biceps is fully stretched.
As you exhale, use the biceps to curl the weights up until your biceps is fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder height.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Place two kettlebells between your pés. To get in the posição inicial, push your butt costas and look straight ahead.
Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you raise the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so.
Abaixe the kettlebells costas to the posição inicial and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells between your feet. To get in the starting position, push your butt back and look straight ahead.
