Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so.
Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position and repeat.

instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells to your ombros. Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you swing the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward. Squat down a few inches and reverse the motion rapidly driving both kettlebells overhead. Immediately after the initial push, squat down again and get under the kettlebells. Once the kettlebells are locked out, stand upright to complete the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you swing the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward. Squat down a few inches and reverse the motion rapidly driving both kettlebells overhead. Immediately after the initial push, squat down again and get under the kettlebells. Once the kettlebells are locked out, stand upright to complete the exercise.

instrucoes: Clean two kettlebells to your ombros. Clean the kettlebells to your ombros by extending through the pernas and quadris as you swing the kettlebells towards your ombros. Rotate your wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward.

Press the kettlebells up and out. As the kettlebells pass your head, lean into the pesos so that the kettlebells are racked behind your head. Make sure to contract your lats, butt, and stomach for added stability.
instrucoesOriginais: Clean two kettlebells to your shoulders. Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you swing the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so, so that the palms face forward.

Press the kettlebells up and out. As the kettlebells pass your head, lean into the weights so that the kettlebells are racked behind your head. Make sure to contract your lats, butt, and stomach for added stability.

instrucoes: Place two kettlebells in front of your pés. Bend your joelhos slightly and then push your butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the posição inicial.
Grab both kettlebells and pull them to your stomach, retracting your shoulder blades and flexing the cotovelos. Mantenha your costas straight. Abaixe and repeat.
instrucoesOriginais: Place two kettlebells in front of your feet. Bend your knees slightly and then push your butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the starting position.
Grab both kettlebells and pull them to your stomach, retracting your shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Keep your back straight. Lower and repeat.

instrucoes: Sente-se on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.
Grab the pull-down bar with the palms facing your tronco (a supinated grip). Make sure that the mãos are placed closer than the shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your tronco costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This is your posição inicial.

As you expire, pull the bar down until it touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the fully contracted posição and keep the cotovelos close to your body. The upper tronco should remain stationary as your bring the bar to you and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted posição, while breathing in, slowly bring the bar costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repita this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.
Grab the pull-down bar with the palms facing your torso (a supinated grip). Make sure that the hands are placed closer than the shoulder width.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out. This is your starting position.

As you breathe out, pull the bar down until it touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the fully contracted position and keep the elbows close to your body. The upper torso should remain stationary as your bring the bar to you and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, while breathing in, slowly bring the bar back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: While seated, bend forward to hug your thighs from underneath with both braços.

Mantenha your joelhos together and your pernas extended out as you bring your peito down to your joelhos. You can also stretch your middle costas by pulling your costas away from your joelhos as your hugging them.
instrucoesOriginais: While seated, bend forward to hug your thighs from underneath with both arms.
Keep your knees together and your legs extended out as you bring your chest down to your knees. You can also stretch your middle back by pulling your back away from your knees as your hugging them.

instrucoes: Clasp fingers together with your thumbs pointing down, round your ombros as you reach your mãos forward.
instrucoesOriginais: Clasp fingers together with your thumbs pointing down, round your shoulders as you reach your hands forward.

instrucoes: Grasp a barra with an overmão grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The bar should be resting on the top of your thighs with your braços extended and a slight bend in your cotovelos. Your costas should also be straight. This will be your posição inicial.

Now exhale and use the sides of your ombros to lift the bar, raising your cotovelos up and to the side. Mantenha the bar close to your body as you raise it. Continue to lift the bar until it nearly touches your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion, and should always be higher than your forebraços. Remember to keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the bar costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grasp a barbell with an overhand grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The bar should be resting on the top of your thighs with your arms extended and a slight bend in your elbows. Your back should also be straight. This will be your starting position.

Now exhale and use the sides of your shoulders to lift the bar, raising your elbows up and to the side. Keep the bar close to your body as you raise it. Continue to lift the bar until it nearly touches your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion, and should always be higher than your forearms. Remember to keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the bar back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grasp a straight bar cable attachment that is attached to a low pulley with a pronated (palms facing your thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The bar should be resting on top of your thighs. Your braços should be extended with a slight bend at the cotovelos and your costas should be straight. This will be your posição inicial.

Use your side ombros to lift the cable bar as you exhale. The bar should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until it nearly touches your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion. As you lift the bar, your cotovelos should always be higher than your forebraços. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the bar costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grasp a straight bar cable attachment that is attached to a low pulley with a pronated (palms facing your thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The bar should be resting on top of your thighs. Your arms should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and your back should be straight. This will be your starting position.

Use your side shoulders to lift the cable bar as you exhale. The bar should be close to the body as you move it up. Continue to lift it until it nearly touches your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the bar, your elbows should always be higher than your forearms. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the bar back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at braço's length. Grasp the mãoles using a pronated (palms facing your thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The mãoles should be resting on top of your thighs. Your braços should be extended with a slight bend at the cotovelos and your costas should be straight. This will be your posição inicial.

Use your side ombros to lift the mãoles as you exhale. The mãoles should be close to the body as you move them up. Continue to lift the mãoles until they nearly touches your chin. Dica: Your cotovelos should drive the motion. As you lift the mãoles, your cotovelos should always be higher than your forebraços. Also, keep your tronco stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movimento.
Abaixe the mãoles costas down slowly to the posição inicial. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand on an exercise band so that tension begins at arm's length. Grasp the handles using a pronated (palms facing your thighs) grip that is slightly less than shoulder width. The handles should be resting on top of your thighs. Your arms should be extended with a slight bend at the elbows and your back should be straight. This will be your starting position.

Use your side shoulders to lift the handles as you exhale. The handles should be close to the body as you move them up. Continue to lift the handles until they nearly touches your chin. Tip: Your elbows should drive the motion. As you lift the handles, your elbows should always be higher than your forearms. Also, keep your torso stationary and pause for a second at the top of the movement.
Lower the handles back down slowly to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Extend both mãos straight above your head, palms touching.
Lentamente push your mãos up and costas, keeping your costas straight.
instrucoesOriginais: Extend both hands straight above your head, palms touching.
Slowly push your hands up and back, keeping your back straight.

instrucoes: Sente-se on a pull-down machine with a V-Bar attached to the top pulley.
Adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.

Grab the V-bar with the palms facing each other (a neutral grip). Stick your peito out and lean yourself costas slightly (around 30-degrees) in order to better engage the lats. This will be your posição inicial.

Using your lats, pull the bar down as you squeeze your shoulder blades. Continue until your peito nearly touches the V-bar. Exhale as you execute this motion. Dica: Mantenha the tronco stationary throughout the movimento.
After a second hold on the contracted posição, slowly bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a V-Bar attached to the top pulley.
Adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.

Grab the V-bar with the palms facing each other (a neutral grip). Stick your chest out and lean yourself back slightly (around 30-degrees) in order to better engage the lats. This will be your starting position.

Using your lats, pull the bar down as you squeeze your shoulder blades. Continue until your chest nearly touches the V-bar. Exhale as you execute this motion. Tip: Keep the torso stationary throughout the movement.
After a second hold on the contracted position, slowly bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start by placing the middle of the V-bar in the middle of the pull-up bar (assuming that the pull-up station you are using does not have neutral grip mãoles). The V-Bar mãoles will be facing down so that you can hang from the pull-up bar through the use of the mãoles.

Once you securely place the V-bar, take a hold of the bar from each side and hang from it. Stick your peito out and lean yourself costas slightly in order to better engage the lats. This will be your posição inicial.

Using your lats, pull your tronco up while leaning your head costas slightly so that you do not hit yourself with the chin-up bar. Continue until your peito nearly touches the V-bar. Exhale as you execute this motion.
After a second hold on the contracted posição, slowly lower your body costas to the posição inicial as you inspire.
Repita for the prescribed number of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by placing the middle of the V-bar in the middle of the pull-up bar (assuming that the pull-up station you are using does not have neutral grip handles). The V-Bar handles will be facing down so that you can hang from the pull-up bar through the use of the handles.

Once you securely place the V-bar, take a hold of the bar from each side and hang from it. Stick your chest out and lean yourself back slightly in order to better engage the lats. This will be your starting position.

Using your lats, pull your torso up while leaning your head back slightly so that you do not hit yourself with the chin-up bar. Continue until your chest nearly touches the V-bar. Exhale as you execute this motion.
After a second hold on the contracted position, slowly lower your body back to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the prescribed number of repetitions.

instrucoes: Allow the halter to hang at braços length between your pernas, holding it with both mãos. Mantenha your costas straight and your head up.
Swing the halter between your pernas, flexing at the quadris and bending the joelhos slightly.
Powerfully reverse the motion by extending at the quadris, joelhos, and ankles to propel yourself upward, swinging the dumbell over your head.
As you land, absorb the impact through your pernas and draw the halter to your tronco before the next repetition.
instrucoesOriginais: Allow the dumbbell to hang at arms length between your legs, holding it with both hands. Keep your back straight and your head up.
Swing the dumbbell between your legs, flexing at the hips and bending the knees slightly.
Powerfully reverse the motion by extending at the hips, knees, and ankles to propel yourself upward, swinging the dumbell over your head.
As you land, absorb the impact through your legs and draw the dumbbell to your torso before the next repetition.

instrucoes: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and peso to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than walking outside. When walking, you should move at a moderate to fast pace, not a leisurely one. Being an activity of lower intensity, walking doesn't burn as many calories as some other activities, but still provides great benefit. A 150 lb person will burn about 175 calories walking 4 miles per hour for 30 minutes, compared to 450 calories running twice as fast. Maintain proper posture as you walk, and only hold onto the mãoles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking your heart rate.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, step onto the treadmill and select the desired option from the menu. Most treadmills have a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise. Elevation can be adjusted to change the intensity of the workout.

Treadmills offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than walking outside. When walking, you should move at a moderate to fast pace, not a leisurely one. Being an activity of lower intensity, walking doesn't burn as many calories as some other activities, but still provides great benefit. A 150 lb person will burn about 175 calories walking 4 miles per hour for 30 minutes, compared to 450 calories running twice as fast. Maintain proper posture as you walk, and only hold onto the handles when necessary, such as when dismounting or checking your heart rate.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on an exercise ball with your tronco pressing against the ball and parallel to the chão. The ball of your pés should be pressed against the chão to help keep you balanced. Place a pesoed plate under your chin or behind your neck. This is the posição inicial.
Lentamente raise your tronco up by bending at the waist and lower costas. Remember to exhale during this movimento.
Segure the contraction on your lower costas for a second and lower your tronco costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita for the número recomendado de repetições prescribed in your program.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on an exercise ball with your torso pressing against the ball and parallel to the floor. The ball of your feet should be pressed against the floor to help keep you balanced. Place a weighted plate under your chin or behind your neck. This is the starting position.
Slowly raise your torso up by bending at the waist and lower back. Remember to exhale during this movement.
Hold the contraction on your lower back for a second and lower your torso back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.

instrucoes: To begin, lie down on an exercise ball with your left side of the tronco (waist, quadris and shoulder) pressed against the ball.

Your pés should be on the chão while your pernas are crossed and hanging from the ball. Segure a pesoed plate with your right mão directly to the right side of your head. Dica: Make sure the smooth side of the plate is resting against your head.
Place your left braço across your tronco so that your palm is on your obliques. There should be a right angle between your left forebraço and upper braço. This is the posição inicial.
Eleve the side of your tronco up by laterally flexing at the waist while exhaling.
Segure the contraction for a second and slowly lower yourself costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, lie down on an exercise ball with your left side of the torso (waist, hips and shoulder) pressed against the ball.

Your feet should be on the floor while your legs are crossed and hanging from the ball. Hold a weighted plate with your right hand directly to the right side of your head. Tip: Make sure the smooth side of the plate is resting against your head.
Place your left arm across your torso so that your palm is on your obliques. There should be a right angle between your left forearm and upper arm. This is the starting position.
Raise the side of your torso up by laterally flexing at the waist while exhaling.
Hold the contraction for a second and slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise.

instrucoes: For this exercise you will need to place a bench behind your costas and another one in front of you. With the benches perpendicular to your body, hold on to one bench on its edge with the mãos close to your body, separated at shoulder width. Your braços should be fully extended.

The pernas will be extended forward on top of the other bench. Your pernas should be parallel to the chão while your tronco is to be perpendicular to the chão. Have your partner place the halter on your lap. Note: This exercise is best performed with a partner as placing the peso on your lap can be challenging and cause injury without assistance. This will be your posição inicial.

Lentamente lower your body as you inhale by bending at the cotovelos until you lower yourself far enough to where there is an angle slightly smaller than 90 degrees between the upper braço and the forebraço. Dica: Mantenha the cotovelos as close as possible throughout the movimento. Forebraços should always be pointing down.
Using your triceps to bring your tronco up again, lift yourself costas to the posição inicial while exhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: For this exercise you will need to place a bench behind your back and another one in front of you. With the benches perpendicular to your body, hold on to one bench on its edge with the hands close to your body, separated at shoulder width. Your arms should be fully extended.

The legs will be extended forward on top of the other bench. Your legs should be parallel to the floor while your torso is to be perpendicular to the floor. Have your partner place the dumbbell on your lap. Note: This exercise is best performed with a partner as placing the weight on your lap can be challenging and cause injury without assistance. This will be your starting position.

Slowly lower your body as you inhale by bending at the elbows until you lower yourself far enough to where there is an angle slightly smaller than 90 degrees between the upper arm and the forearm. Tip: Keep the elbows as close as possible throughout the movement. Forearms should always be pointing down.
Using your triceps to bring your torso up again, lift yourself back to the starting position while exhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie flat on your costas with your pés flat on the ground or resting on a bench with your joelhos bent at a 90 degree angle.
Segure a peso to your peito, or you may hold it extended above your tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
Now, exhale and slowly begin to roll your ombros off the chão. Your ombros should come up off the chão about 4 inches while your lower costas remains on the chão.
At the top of the movimento, flex your abdominals and hold for a brief pause.
Then inhale and slowly lower yourself costas down to the posição inicial.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie flat on your back with your feet flat on the ground or resting on a bench with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle.
Hold a weight to your chest, or you may hold it extended above your torso. This will be your starting position.
Now, exhale and slowly begin to roll your shoulders off the floor. Your shoulders should come up off the floor about 4 inches while your lower back remains on the floor.
At the top of the movement, flex your abdominals and hold for a brief pause.
Then inhale and slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.

instrucoes: Position a lightly loaded barra across the costas of your ombros. You could also use a pesoed vest, sandbag, or other type of resistance for this exercise.
The peso should be light enough that it doesn't slow you down significantly. Your pés should be just outside of shoulder width with your head and peito up. This will be your posição inicial.

Using a countermovimento, squat partially down and immediately reverse your direction to explode off of the ground, extending through your quadris, joelhos, and ankles. Maintain good posture throughout the jump.
As you return to the ground, absorb the impact through your pernas.
instrucoesOriginais: Position a lightly loaded barbell across the back of your shoulders. You could also use a weighted vest, sandbag, or other type of resistance for this exercise.
The weight should be light enough that it doesn't slow you down significantly. Your feet should be just outside of shoulder width with your head and chest up. This will be your starting position.

Using a countermovement, squat partially down and immediately reverse your direction to explode off of the ground, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles. Maintain good posture throughout the jump.
As you return to the ground, absorb the impact through your legs.

instrucoes: Attach a peso to a dip belt and secure it around your waist. Grab the pull-up bar with the palms of your mãos facing forward. For a medium grip, your mãos should be spaced at shoulder width. Both braços should be extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip.
You'll want to bring your tronco costas about 30 degrees while creating a curvature in your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This will be your posição inicial.
Now, exhale and pull your tronco up until your head is above your mãos. Concentrate on squeezing yourshoulder blades costas and down as you reach the top contracted posição.
After a brief moment at the top contracted posição, inhale and slowly lower your tronco costas to the posição inicial with your braços extended and your lats fully stretched.
instrucoesOriginais: Attach a weight to a dip belt and secure it around your waist. Grab the pull-up bar with the palms of your hands facing forward. For a medium grip, your hands should be spaced at shoulder width. Both arms should be extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip.
You'll want to bring your torso back about 30 degrees while creating a curvature in your lower back and sticking your chest out. This will be your starting position.
Now, exhale and pull your torso up until your head is above your hands. Concentrate on squeezing yourshoulder blades back and down as you reach the top contracted position.
After a brief moment at the top contracted position, inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position with your arms extended and your lats fully stretched.

instrucoes: Standing upright, with pés at shoulder width and toes raised, use one mão to hold onto the beams of a squat rack and the opposite braço to hold a plate on top of your peito. This is your posição inicial.

As you use one braço to hold yourself, bend at the joelhos and slowly lower your tronco toward the ground by bringing your pelvis and joelhos forward. Inhale as you go down and stop when your upper and lower pernas almost create a 90-degree angle. Segure the stretch posição for a second.
After your one second hold, use your thigh muscles to bring your tronco costas up to the posição inicial. Exhale as you move up.
Repita for the recommended amount of times.
instrucoesOriginais: Standing upright, with feet at shoulder width and toes raised, use one hand to hold onto the beams of a squat rack and the opposite arm to hold a plate on top of your chest. This is your starting position.

As you use one arm to hold yourself, bend at the knees and slowly lower your torso toward the ground by bringing your pelvis and knees forward. Inhale as you go down and stop when your upper and lower legs almost create a 90-degree angle. Hold the stretch position for a second.
After your one second hold, use your thigh muscles to bring your torso back up to the starting position. Exhale as you move up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of times.

instrucoes: Start out by strapping the bands around the base of the decline bench. Place the mãoles towards the inside of the decline bench so that when lying down, you can reach for both of them.

Position your pernas through the decline machine until they are secured. Now reach for the exercise bands with both mãos. Use a pronated (palms forward) grip to grasp the mãoles. Position them near your collar bone and rotate your wrist to a neutral grip (palms facing the tronco). Note: Your braços should remain stationary throughout the exercise. This is the posição inicial.

Move your tronco upward until your upper body is perpendicular to the chão while exhaling. Segure the contraction for a second and lower your upper body costas down to the posição inicial while inhaling.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start out by strapping the bands around the base of the decline bench. Place the handles towards the inside of the decline bench so that when lying down, you can reach for both of them.

Position your legs through the decline machine until they are secured. Now reach for the exercise bands with both hands. Use a pronated (palms forward) grip to grasp the handles. Position them near your collar bone and rotate your wrist to a neutral grip (palms facing the torso). Note: Your arms should remain stationary throughout the exercise. This is the starting position.

Move your torso upward until your upper body is perpendicular to the floor while exhaling. Hold the contraction for a second and lower your upper body back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Start by posiçãoing two flat benches shoulder width apart from each other. Stand on top of them and wrap the pesoed belt around your waist with the amount of peso you feel comfortable with. Make sure your toes are facing out.
Once you are standing straight up with the peso hanging in between your pernas, posição your braços so that they are fully extended to the side of your body. This is the posição inicial.

Comece by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that are perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Comece to move the body costas up by pushing the chão of the flat bench with the ball of your foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial. Exhale as you perform this portion of the exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by positioning two flat benches shoulder width apart from each other. Stand on top of them and wrap the weighted belt around your waist with the amount of weight you feel comfortable with. Make sure your toes are facing out.
Once you are standing straight up with the weight hanging in between your legs, position your arms so that they are fully extended to the side of your body. This is the starting position.

Begin by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that are perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Begin to move the body back up by pushing the floor of the flat bench with the ball of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position. Exhale as you perform this portion of the exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie costas on a flat bench with pés firm on the chão. Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each mão), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. The bar will be perpendicular to the tronco and the chão. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços and squeeze your peito in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on a flat bench with feet firm on the floor. Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each hand), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. The bar will be perpendicular to the torso and the floor. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Lie costas on a decline bench with the pés securely locked at the front of the bench. Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each mão), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your braços locked. The bar will be perpendicular to the tronco and the chão. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your lower peito.

After a second pause, bring the bar costas to the posição inicial as you expire and push the bar using your peito muscles. Lock your braços and squeeze your peito in the contracted posição, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Dica: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie back on a decline bench with the feet securely locked at the front of the bench. Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each hand), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked. The bar will be perpendicular to the torso and the floor. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your lower chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles. Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Deite-se on a decline bench with both pernas securely locked in posição. Reach for the barra behind the head using a pronated grip (palms facing out). Make sure to grab the barra wider than shoulder width apart for this exercise. Lentamente lift the barra up from the chão by using your braços.
When posiçãoed properly, your braços should be fully extended and perpendicular to the chão. This is the posição inicial.

Comece by moving the barra costas down in a semicircular motion as if you were going to place it on the chão, but instead, stop when the braços are parallel to the chão. Dica: Mantenha the braços fully extended at all times. The movimento should only happen at the shoulder joint. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento.
Now bring the barra up while exhaling until you are costas at the posição inicial. Remember to keep full control of the barra at all times.
Repita the movimento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
When finished with your set, slowly lower the barra costas down until it is level with your head and release it.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie down on a decline bench with both legs securely locked in position. Reach for the barbell behind the head using a pronated grip (palms facing out). Make sure to grab the barbell wider than shoulder width apart for this exercise. Slowly lift the barbell up from the floor by using your arms.
When positioned properly, your arms should be fully extended and perpendicular to the floor. This is the starting position.

Begin by moving the barbell back down in a semicircular motion as if you were going to place it on the floor, but instead, stop when the arms are parallel to the floor. Tip: Keep the arms fully extended at all times. The movement should only happen at the shoulder joint. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Now bring the barbell up while exhaling until you are back at the starting position. Remember to keep full control of the barbell at all times.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
When finished with your set, slowly lower the barbell back down until it is level with your head and release it.

instrucoes: Sente-se on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.

Grab the bar with the palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, your mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than shoulder width. For a medium grip, your mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to your shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than your shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your tronco costas around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower costas and sticking your peito out. This is your posição inicial.

As you expire, bring the bar down until it touches your upper peito by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull down the bar using the forebraços.

After a second at the contracted posição squeezing your shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movimento.
Repita this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.

Grab the bar with the palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, your hands need to be spaced out at a distance wider than shoulder width. For a medium grip, your hands need to be spaced out at a distance equal to your shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than your shoulder width.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out. This is your starting position.

As you breathe out, bring the bar down until it touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull down the bar using the forearms.

After a second at the contracted position squeezing your shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movement.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Sente-se on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.

Grab the bar with the palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, your mãos need to be spaced out at a distance wider than your shoulder width. For a medium grip, your mãos need to be spaced out at a distance equal to your shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than your shoulder width.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your tronco and head forward. Think of an imaginary line from the center of the bar down to the costas of your neck. This is your posição inicial.

As you expire, bring the bar down until it touches the costas of your neck by drawing the ombros and the upper braços down and costas. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull down the bar using the forebraços.

After a second on the contracted posição squeezing your shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movimento.
Repita this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Sit down on a pull-down machine with a wide bar attached to the top pulley. Make sure that you adjust the knee pad of the machine to fit your height. These pads will prevent your body from being raised by the resistance attached to the bar.

Grab the bar with the palms facing forward using the prescribed grip. Note on grips: For a wide grip, your hands need to be spaced out at a distance wider than your shoulder width. For a medium grip, your hands need to be spaced out at a distance equal to your shoulder width and for a close grip at a distance smaller than your shoulder width.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso and head forward. Think of an imaginary line from the center of the bar down to the back of your neck. This is your starting position.

As you breathe out, bring the bar down until it touches the back of your neck by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work except for holding the bar; therefore do not try to pull down the bar using the forearms.

After a second on the contracted position squeezing your shoulder blades together, slowly raise the bar back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched. Inhale during this portion of the movement.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both braços extended in front of you holding the bar, bring your tronco forward and head so that there is an imaginary line from the pull-up bar to the costas of your neck. This is your posição inicial.

Pull your tronco up until the bar is near the costas of your neck. To do this, draw the ombros and upper braços down and costas while slightly leaning your head forward. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: Concentrate on squeezing the costas muscles once you reach the full contracted posição. The upper tronco should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the braços should move. The forebraços should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted posição, start to inhale and slowly lower your tronco costas to the posição inicial when your braços are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repita this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar, bring your torso forward and head so that there is an imaginary line from the pull-up bar to the back of your neck. This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up until the bar is near the back of your neck. To do this, draw the shoulders and upper arms down and back while slightly leaning your head forward. Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position. The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move. The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright while holding a barra at the wide outer mãole. The palm of your mãos should be facing forward. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco. This will be your posição inicial.
While holding the upper braços stationary, curl the pesos forward while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Dica: Only the forebraços should move.
Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Segure the contracted posição for a second and squeeze the biceps hard.
Lentamente begin to bring the bar costas to posição inicial as your inspire.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright while holding a barbell at the wide outer handle. The palm of your hands should be facing forward. The elbows should be close to the torso. This will be your starting position.
While holding the upper arms stationary, curl the weights forward while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second and squeeze the biceps hard.
Slowly begin to bring the bar back to starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the costas of your ombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Segure on to the bar using both braços at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your pernas and at the same time straightening your tronco.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a wider-than-shoulder-width stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance, and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece to slowly lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the heel of your foot as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a wider-than-shoulder-width stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance, and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Comece with a barra loaded on the chão. Adopt a wide stance, and then bend at the quadris to grab the bar. Your quadris should be as far costas as possible, and your pernas nearly straight. Mantenha your costas straight, and your head and peito up. This will be your posição inicial.

Comece the movimento be engaging the quadris, driving them forward as you allow the braços to hang straight. Continue until you are standing straight up, and then slowly return the peso to the posição inicial. For successive reps, the peso need not touch the chão.
instrucoesOriginais: Begin with a barbell loaded on the floor. Adopt a wide stance, and then bend at the hips to grab the bar. Your hips should be as far back as possible, and your legs nearly straight. Keep your back straight, and your head and chest up. This will be your starting position.

Begin the movement be engaging the hips, driving them forward as you allow the arms to hang straight. Continue until you are standing straight up, and then slowly return the weight to the starting position. For successive reps, the weight need not touch the floor.

instrucoes: Hang from a pull-up bar using a pronated grip. Your braços and pernas should be extended. This will be your posição inicial.
Comece by quickly raising one knee as high as you can. Do not swing your body or your pernas. 3
Immediately reverse the motion, returning that perna to the posição inicial. Simultaneously raise the opposite knee as high as possible.
Continue alternating between pernas until the set is complete.
instrucoesOriginais: Hang from a pull-up bar using a pronated grip. Your arms and legs should be extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by quickly raising one knee as high as you can. Do not swing your body or your legs. 3
Immediately reverse the motion, returning that leg to the starting position. Simultaneously raise the opposite knee as high as possible.
Continue alternating between legs until the set is complete.

instrucoes: Deite-se de costas with your braços extended out to the sides and your pernas straight. This will be your posição inicial.
Levante one perna and quickly cross it over your body, attempting to touch the ground near the opposite mão.
Retorne to the posição inicial, and repeat with the opposite perna. Continue to alternate for 10-20 repetitions.
instrucoesOriginais: Lie on your back with your arms extended out to the sides and your legs straight. This will be your starting position.
Lift one leg and quickly cross it over your body, attempting to touch the ground near the opposite hand.
Return to the starting position, and repeat with the opposite leg. Continue to alternate for 10-20 repetitions.

instrucoes: This is a three-part stretch. Comece by lunging forward, with your front foot flat on the ground and on the toes of your costas foot. With your joelhos bent, squat down until your knee is almost touching the ground. Mantenha your tronco erect, and hold this posição for 10-20 seconds.

Now, place the braço on the same side as your front perna on the ground, with the elbow next to the foot. Your other mão should be placed on the ground, parallel to your lead perna, to help support you during this portion of the stretch.

After 10-20 seconds, place your mãos on either side of your front foot. Eleve the toes of the front foot off of the ground, and straighten your perna. You may need to reposição your rear perna to do so. Segure for 10-20 seconds, and then repeat the entire sequence for the other side.
instrucoesOriginais: This is a three-part stretch. Begin by lunging forward, with your front foot flat on the ground and on the toes of your back foot. With your knees bent, squat down until your knee is almost touching the ground. Keep your torso erect, and hold this position for 10-20 seconds.

Now, place the arm on the same side as your front leg on the ground, with the elbow next to the foot. Your other hand should be placed on the ground, parallel to your lead leg, to help support you during this portion of the stretch.

After 10-20 seconds, place your hands on either side of your front foot. Raise the toes of the front foot off of the ground, and straighten your leg. You may need to reposition your rear leg to do so. Hold for 10-20 seconds, and then repeat the entire sequence for the other side.

instrucoes: Start by standing straight with your pés being shoulder width apart from each other. Elevate your braços to the side of you until they are fully extended and parallel to the chão at a height that is evenly aligned with your ombros. Dica: Your tronco and braços should form the letter "T: Your palms should be facing down. This is the posição inicial.

Mantenhaing your entire body stationary except for the wrists, begin to rotate both wrists forward in a circular motion. Dica: Pretend that you are trying to draw circles by using your mãos as the brush. Breathe normally as you perform this exercise.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Start by standing straight with your feet being shoulder width apart from each other. Elevate your arms to the side of you until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor at a height that is evenly aligned with your shoulders. Tip: Your torso and arms should form the letter "T: Your palms should be facing down. This is the starting position.

Keeping your entire body stationary except for the wrists, begin to rotate both wrists forward in a circular motion. Tip: Pretend that you are trying to draw circles by using your hands as the brush. Breathe normally as you perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: To begin, stand straight up grabbing a wrist roller using a pronated grip (palms facing down). Your pés should be shoulder width apart.

Lentamente lift both braços until they are fully extended and parallel to the chão in front of you. Note: Make sure the rope is not wrapped around the roller. Your entire body should be stationary except for the forebraços. This is the posição inicial.
Rotate one wrist at a time in an upward motion to bring the peso up to the bar by rolling the rope around the roller.
Once the peso has reached the bar, slowly begin to lower the peso costas down by rotating the wrist in a downward motion until the peso reaches the posição inicial.
Repita for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.
instrucoesOriginais: To begin, stand straight up grabbing a wrist roller using a pronated grip (palms facing down). Your feet should be shoulder width apart.

Slowly lift both arms until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor in front of you. Note: Make sure the rope is not wrapped around the roller. Your entire body should be stationary except for the forearms. This is the starting position.
Rotate one wrist at a time in an upward motion to bring the weight up to the bar by rolling the rope around the roller.
Once the weight has reached the bar, slowly begin to lower the weight back down by rotating the wrist in a downward motion until the weight reaches the starting position.
Repeat for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.

instrucoes: Segure a barra with both mãos and your palms facing down; mãos spaced about shoulder width. This will be your posição inicial.
Alternating between each of your mãos, perform the movimento by extending the wrist as though you were rolling up a newspaper. Continue alternating costas and forth until failure.
Reverse the motion by flexing the wrist, rolling the opposite direction. Continue the alternating motion until failure.
instrucoesOriginais: Hold a barbell with both hands and your palms facing down; hands spaced about shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Alternating between each of your hands, perform the movement by extending the wrist as though you were rolling up a newspaper. Continue alternating back and forth until failure.
Reverse the motion by flexing the wrist, rolling the opposite direction. Continue the alternating motion until failure.

instrucoes: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Comece by racking the apparatus across the costas of the ombros. With your head looking forward and costas arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Comece walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in posição. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 pés.
instrucoesOriginais: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Begin by racking the apparatus across the back of the shoulders. With your head looking forward and back arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Begin walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in position. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 feet.

instrucoes: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. The correct height should be anywhere above the waist but below the peito. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, lock your mãos together and place the bar on top of your braços in between the forebraço and upper braço.
Levante the bar up so that it is resting on top of your forebraços. If you are holding the bar properly, it should look as if you have your braços crossed but with a bar running across them.

Step away from the rack and posição your pernas using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Mantenha your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight costas. This will be your posição inicial. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Comece to lower the bar by bending the joelhos as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper perna and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper pernas are below parallel to the chão). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movimento. Dica: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the joelhos should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your joelhos are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Comece to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the chão with the ball of your foot mainly as you straighten the pernas again and go costas to the posição inicial.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes. To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height. The correct height should be anywhere above the waist but below the chest. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, lock your hands together and place the bar on top of your arms in between the forearm and upper arm.
Lift the bar up so that it is resting on top of your forearms. If you are holding the bar properly, it should look as if you have your arms crossed but with a bar running across them.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out. Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position. (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor). Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front. If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the ball of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Fique em pé with your tronco upright and a halter in each mão being held at braços length. The cotovelos should be close to the tronco.
Make sure the palms of the mãos are facing each other. This will be your posição inicial.

While holding the upper braço stationary, curl the pesos while contraindo the biceps as you expire. Only the forebraços should move. Your wrist should rotate so that you have a supinated (palms up) grip. Continue the movimento until your biceps are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder level.
Segure the contracted posição for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Now during the contracted posição, rotate your wrist until you now have a pronated (palms facing down) grip with the thumb at a higher posição than the pinky.
Lentamente begin to bring the halters costas down using the pronated grip.
As the halters close your thighs, start rotating the wrist so that you go costas to a neutral (palms facing your body) grip.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Stand up with your torso upright and a dumbbell in each hand being held at arms length. The elbows should be close to the torso.
Make sure the palms of the hands are facing each other. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the weights while contracting the biceps as you breathe out. Only the forearms should move. Your wrist should rotate so that you have a supinated (palms up) grip. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the biceps.
Now during the contracted position, rotate your wrist until you now have a pronated (palms facing down) grip with the thumb at a higher position than the pinky.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back down using the pronated grip.
As the dumbbells close your thighs, start rotating the wrist so that you go back to a neutral (palms facing your body) grip.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instrucoes: Grab a halter in each mão and place your upper braços on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The halters should be held at shoulder height and the cotovelos should be flexed. Segure the halters with the palms of your mãos facing down. This will be your posição inicial.
As you inspire, slowly lower the halters keeping the palms down until your upper braço is extended and your biceps are fully stretched.
Now rotate your wrists once you are at the bottom of the movimento so that the palms of the mãos are facing up.

As you exhale, use your biceps to curl the pesos up until they are fully contracted and the halters are at shoulder height. Again, remember that to ensure full contraction you need to bring that small finger higher than the thumb.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted posição and rotate your wrists so that the palms are facing down again.
Repita pelo número recomendado de repetições.
instrucoesOriginais: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and place your upper arms on top of the preacher bench or the incline bench. The dumbbells should be held at shoulder height and the elbows should be flexed. Hold the dumbbells with the palms of your hands facing down. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells keeping the palms down until your upper arm is extended and your biceps are fully stretched.
Now rotate your wrists once you are at the bottom of the movement so that the palms of the hands are facing up.

As you exhale, use your biceps to curl the weights up until they are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder height. Again, remember that to ensure full contraction you need to bring that small finger higher than the thumb.
Squeeze the biceps hard for a second at the contracted position and rotate your wrists so that the palms are facing down again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
